Log terms mein dilution factor sirf individual log concentrations ka difference hota hai. Yahi wajah hai ke pH = −log[H⁺] — pH 3 wala solution pH 5 se 100 guna zyada acidic hota hai, kyunke 10^(5−3) = 10² = 100!

Total sound power (product) individual log powers ke sum ke barabar hoti hai. Yahi wajah hai ke zalzalon ke liye Richter scale logs istemal karta hai — magnitude 8 ka zalzala magnitude 4 se dogna taqatwar nahi hota, balkay 10,000 guna hota hai!

Exponent log ke aagay "neeche aa jata hai"! Yahi wajah hai ke astronomers logs pasand karte hain: sab se door galaxies ka fasla 10^26 meters hai — log₁₀(10^26) = 26 × log₁₀(10) = 26. In 1924, Louis de Broglie proposed that: 1924 mein, Louis de Broglie ne propose kiya ke har moving particle ki aik associated wavelength hoti hai, jo uske momentum ke inversely proportional hoti hai. Ye revolutionary tha — iska matlab tha ke electrons, neutrons, aur yahan tak ke atoms ko bhi light ki tarah interference patterns produce karne chahiye! In a pressure cooker, heating increases: Aik pressure cooker mein, heating se molecular KE barhti hai, jo directly pressure ko barhati hai — safety valve critical hai kyunke 120°C par pressure 2 atm hota hai, jo aik sealed container ko phaarne ke liye kaafi hai.

In right triangles OAE and OCF: AE² = OA: Right triangles OAE aur OCF mein: AE² = OA² − OE² aur CF² = OC² − OF². Jabke OA = OC (radii) aur OE = OF, humein AE² = CF² milta hai, is liye AE = CF.

Newton realized that the same force that: Newton ko ehsas hua ke jo force saib ko girati hai wohi force Moon ko bhi orbit mein rakhti hai. Gravitational force hamesha attractive, central (dono bodies ko milane wali line ki taraf ishara karti hai) hoti hai, aur fasle ke sath inverse-square law ko follow karti hai. T² ∝ a³ ka relation (Kepler III) centripetal aur gravitational forces ko barabar karne se direct banta hai. Celestial aur terrestrial mechanics ka yeh milap insaniyat ki physics ki pehli grand unification thi — jo yeh zahir karti hai ke saib ke girne aur planets ki motion par aik hi kism ke laws lagoo hote hain.

Since AC = BC, C is the midpoint of chor: Chunke AC = BC, C chord AB ka midpoint hai. Centre se chord tak ka perpendicular isay bisect karta hai. Yeh Theorem 9.2 ka converse hai. Mil kar, yeh dono theorems tamaam chord calculations ki buniyaad hain — arches, bridges, aur circular structures design karne mein istemal hotay hain!
Since E and F are midpoints (Theorem 9.3: Chunke E aur F midpoints hain (Theorem 9.3): AB = 2×AE aur CD = 2×CF. Chunke AE = CF, hamein AB = CD milta hai.
Since O lies on the perpendicular bisect: Chunke O AB ke perpendicular bisector par waqay hai, yeh A aur B se barabar faslay par hai. Chunke yeh BC ke bisector par bhi waqay hai, yeh B aur C se barabar faslay par hai. Isliye OA = OB = OC = R.
Since OC = OE (radii), triangle COE is i: Chunke OC = OE (radii), triangle COE isosceles hai. Exterior angle ∠COF = ∠CEO + ∠OCE = 2∠CEO. Isi tarah, ∠DOF = 2∠DEO.
Since PQ ⟂ OA, the distance from centre: Chunke PQ ⟂ OA, centre O se PQ par kisi bhi point ka fasla kam az kam OA hai (perpendicular distance sab se chota hota hai). O se PQ ke kisi aur point ka fasla > OA = radius hai.
Since S = (a+b+c)/2 (semi-perimeter), we: Chunke S = (a+b+c)/2 (semi-perimeter), humein Δ = rS → r = Δ/S milta hai. Inradius area aur semi-perimeter ka ratio hai! Aik right triangle jiske legs 3 aur 4 hain (hypotenuse 5): Δ = 6, S = 6, isliye r = 1. Incircle ka radius 1 hai. Yeh formula aik triangular box ke andar bilkul fit hone walay pizza ka radius maloom karne ke liye istemal hota hai!
Since both equal the same altitude: c \\: Kyunki dono same altitude ke barabar hain: c \sin α = a \sin γ → a/\sin α = c/\sin γ.
Since tan α = m₂ and tan β = m₁: tan θ =: Chunke tan α = m₂ aur tan β = m₁: tan θ = (m₂ − m₁)/(1 + m₁m₂). Acute angle ke liye absolute value lein. Agar tan θ = 0, to lines parallel hain. Agar 1 + m₁m₂ = 0, to lines perpendicular hain. Road engineers isay safe intersection angles design karne ke liye istemal karte hain!
Since the arcs are congruent, you can ro: Chunke arcs congruent hain, aap circle ko rotate kar sakte hain taake aik arc bilkul doosri arc ke upar aa jaye. Arcs ke endpoints match kar jate hain.
Since the distance from O to any point o: Chunke O se PQ (A ke ilawa) ke kisi bhi point ka fasla radius se bara hai, PQ ka koi aur point circle par nahi hota. Isliye PQ circle ko sirf aik point A par touch karta hai.
Since the gravitational force is purely: Chunke gravitational force khalisatan radial hai (koi tangential component nahi), yeh orbiting body par zero torque lagati hai. Isliye, angular momentum L conserve rehta hai. Iska direct matlab Kepler's Second Law hai: Sun se planet tak ki aik line barabar waqt mein barabar areas sweep karti hai. Jab planet Sun ke qareeb hota hai, to isay wahi area sweep karne ke liye zyada tezi se harkat karni padti hai.
Since x = log_b m, we get: log_b m = log: Chunke x = log_b m, humein milta hai: log_b m = log_a m / log_a b. Yeh formula hai! Isliye log₂(8) = log₁₀(8) / log₁₀(2) = 0.9031 / 0.3010 = 3. Haqeeqatan, 2³ = 8. Yeh SAB SE practical log law hai kyunke yeh aap ko apne calculator par sirf log₁₀ ya ln button ki madad se KOI BHI log calculate karne deta hai!

T = 2.84 s. A longer pendulum swings mor: T = 2.84 s. Lamba pendulum zyada ahista swing karta hai!
T = 2.9×10⁻³ / λ_max. Convert nm to m: 5: T = 2.9×10⁻³ / λ_max. nm ko m mein convert karein: 500 nm = 5×10⁻⁷ m.
T = 4.32 s. The projectile is in the air: T = 4.32 s. Projectile 4 second se zyada hawa mein rehta hai!
T = 5800 K — that's our Sun! The surface: T = 5800 K — yeh hamara Sun hai! Surface temperature star ke color ko determine karta hai.
T1 = 600 K, T2 = 300 K. Find Carnot effi: T1 = 600 K, T2 = 300 K. Carnot efficiency maloom karein.

T_{½} = 6.93 s. After 6.93 s, half the n: T_{½} = 6.93 s. 6.93 s ke baad, aadhay nuclei decay ho chuke hain! Carbon-14 ka T_{½} = 5730 years hai.
Take a screenshot and report it to a tru: Screenshot lein aur kisi baray ko report karein, phir akele mein victim ka haal poochein.
Take side c = AB as the base. The height: Side c = AB ko base lein. Height C se AB tak perpendicular hai, jo ke h = b sin α hai (right triangle ACD se).
Custom avatars ke liye commissions le rahe hain.
Tally surveys and graph weather probabil: Surveys tally karein aur weather probability ka graph banayein.
Tandem (multi-junction) solar cells solv: Tandem (multi-junction) solar cells isko mukhtalif band gaps walay materials stack karke solve karte hain. Top layer (high band gap, jaise 1.9 eV) blue photons ko absorb karti hai, middle layer (1.4 eV) green ko, aur bottom layer (1.0 eV) red/infrared ko absorb karti hai. Is tarah concentrator photovoltaics mein 47% se zyada efficiencies achieve ki gayi hain.
Target shooting for precision/accuracy a: Precision/accuracy ke liye target shooting karein aur daily physics estimate karein.
Tell the actor to speak with great volum: Actor ko kaho ke rozana audience ke samnay onchi awaz mein baat kare.
Test Amylase and Pepsin in interactive w: Mukhtalif pH aur temps par interactive water baths mein Amylase aur Pepsin test karein.
Test Young's Modulus on suspension bridg: Suspension bridges par Young's Modulus test karein aur graphene analyze karein.
Blue litmus paper par acid test karein.

Test agar plate antibiotics, construct P: Agar plate antibiotics test karein, Phage libraries banayein, aur HIV treat karein.
Red litmus paper par alkalis test karein.
Test different logic gates and observe t: Mukhtalif logic gates test karein aur unke truth tables observe karein.
Test flexibility and brittleness of mate: Materials ki flexibility aur brittleness test karein.
Test for CO2 with lime water and operate: Lime water ke sath CO2 test karein aur ek physics-based lung model chalayein.
Test for water loss using cobalt chlorid: Cobalt chloride paper istemaal kar ke water loss test karein.
Test malleability of metals vs non-metal: Metals vs non-metals ki malleability test karein.
Test methods to clean an oil slick from: Pani se oil slick saaf karne ke methods test karein.
Test repeat loops to control sprite move: Sprite movement control karne ke liye repeat loops test karein.
Test sliding friction vs rolling frictio: Bhari kitabein slide kar ke sliding friction vs rolling friction test karein.

Test the ringing sound of different mate: Mukhtalif materials ki ringing sound test karein.
Test various materials in an electrical: Electrical circuit mein mukhtalif materials test karein.
That combination doesn't make a standard: Woh combination koi standard word nahi banata. Koi aur try karein!
That creates an echo chamber. Tolerance: Yeh ek echo chamber banata hai. Tolerance ka matlab mukhtalif viewpoints ki respect karna hai.
That is classic deviant behavior and vio: Yeh classic deviant behavior hai aur digital ethics ke khilaf hai.
That is participating in deviant behavio: Yeh deviant behavior mein hissa lena hai. Iske bajaye empathy par focus karein.
The 12th fret on a guitar sits exactly a: Guitar par 12th fret bilkul midpoint par hota hai — isay press karne se string ki length aadhi ho jati hai, aur frequency double ho kar ek octave higher note produce karti hai.
The Beer-Lambert law falls out of simple: Beer-Lambert law simple probability theory se nikalta hai — photon ke absorb honay ka chance uske molecules se takranay ki tadad ke proportional hota hai. Yeh linear relationship sari quantitative spectroscopy ki buniyad hai, biochemistry mein protein concentrations measure karne se le kar environmental chemistry mein pollutants monitor karne tak.
The EXPLORER total-body PET scanner achi: EXPLORER total-body PET scanner advanced detector physics ke zariye conventional PET se 40x zyada effective sensitivity hasil karta hai, jis se ultra-low radiation doses par whole-body dynamic imaging possible hoti hai.
The ISS orbits at 7.66 km/s, completing: ISS 7.66 km/s par orbit karta hai, aur har 90 minutes mein ek chakar poora karta hai — astronauts har 24 ghantay mein 16 dafa sunrise aur sunset dekhte hain. Is speed par, Earth ki gravity bilkul theek centripetal force provide karti hai.
The PET scan detectors in this lab use s: Is lab mein PET scan detectors scintillation crystals use karte hain jo gamma-ray photons ko electrical signals mein convert karte hain — yeh process photoelectric effect (E = hc/λ) se control hota hai. Quantum computing research qubit readout ke liye is tarah ke scintillator materials explore kar rahi hai.
The Sun's 5800 K surface peaks at 500 nm: Sun ka 5800 K surface 500 nm (green light) par peak karta hai — hamari aankhein bilkul isi wavelength par maximum sensitivity ke liye evolve hui hain. Thermal cameras hamari bodies ko infrared mein 9350 nm par glow karte hue detect karte hain.
[Toota hua] vase farsh par para tha.
The absorbance A is defined using base-1: Absorbance A ko historical aur practical reasons ke liye base-10 logarithms use karke define kiya jata hai. Beer-Lambert law dikhata hai ke absorbance concentration aur path length dono ke linearly proportional hai — is liye har spectrophotometer cuvette ki path length bilkul maloom hoti hai (amoman 1 cm).
The absorption and band gap calculations: Is lab mein absorption aur band gap calculations ko quantum confinement effects directly enhance karte hain — nanoscale par, silicon jaisay materials ka band gap particle size change karke tune kiya ja sakta hai, jis se ek hi material se multi-junction-like performance milti hai.
The absorption threshold is a direct con: Absorption threshold quantum mechanics ka aik direct natija hai — band gap energy photons ke electricity generation mein hissa lene ke liye ek sakht cutoff set karti hai. E < E_g walay photons zaya ho jatay hain, jabke E > E_g walay photons heat generate karte hain (band gap se zyada wali energy heat ke tor par waste ho jati hai, electricity nahi banti). Yeh solar cell design mein fundamental trade-off hai.
The actor should wait in a calm manner,: Actor ko thori thori der baad tree prop ke neechay pur sakoon andaz mein wait karna chahiye.
The angle between a tangent and a chord: Point of contact se guzarnay walay tangent aur chord ke darmiyan ka angle alternate segment ke angle ke barabar hota hai. Yeh circle geometry ke sab se khubsurat theorems mein se ek hai! Yeh navigation mein use hota hai — sailors coastline (tangent) aur lighthouse ki line (chord) ke darmiyan ka angle apni position maloom karne ke liye use karte hain!
The area of a triangle using one side an: Ek side aur do angles use karte hue triangle ka area.
The aurora borealis occurs when solar wi: Aurora borealis tab hota hai jab solar wind ke charged particles Earth ki magnetic field lines ke sath ghoomte hain, poles par roshni ke curtains banate hain — bilkul CRT electron beams jaisi physics.
Author ne teen kitabein likhi hain.
The average speed of a satellite in a ci: Circular orbit mein satellite ki average speed circumference ko orbital period se divide karne ke barabar hoti hai.
The blueprints were lost. ___, the engin: Blueprints ghum gaye thay. ___, engineers ko engine dobara design karna para.
The bony callus is remodeled by osteocla: Bony callus ko osteoclasts aur osteoblasts remodel karte hain. Shaft walls ko reconstruct karne ke liye compact bone banai jati hai.
The brain of the computer that performs: Computer ka dimagh jo tamam calculations aur logical operations karta hai.
Toota hua vase farsh par para tha.
The central angle for chord AB is ∠AOB =: Chord AB ka central angle ∠AOB = 180° hai (diameter se guzarti hui straight line). Theorem 10.7 ke mutabiq, inscribed angle ∠APB = ½ × ∠AOB = ½ × 180° = 90°.
The central angle ∠AOB subtended by the: Major segment se banne wala central angle ∠AOB 180° se kam hai. Theorem 10.7 ke mutabiq: ∠APB = ½∠AOB < ½ × 180° = 90°.
Minor segment se banne wala central angle ∠AOB 180° se BARA hai (major central angle). Theorem 10.7 ke mutabiq: ∠APB = ½ × (major central angle) > ½ × 180° = 90°.
The charge-state distribution in native: Native MS mein charge-state distribution denaturing MS se narrower hoti hai kyunke folded proteins apna native structure barqarar rakhti hain, jahan m/z values seedha intact complex mass ko reflect karti hain.
The chord AB divides the circle into two: Chord AB circle ko do segments mein divide karti hai. "Alternate segment" wo hai jo tangent se chord ke opposite side par hota hai. Us alternate arc par koi bhi point P le lein.
The chords AB and CD are the straight-li: Chords AB aur CD arc endpoints ke darmiyan straight-line distances hain. Kyunke arcs bilkul overlap karte hain, endpoints coincide karte hain, is liye chords ko barabar hona chahiye.
The circles touch at C, which lies on th: Circles C par touch karte hain, jo line AB par hai. Chota circle baray circle ke andar hai.
The circles touch at point C, which lies: Circles point C par touch karte hain, jo centres A aur B ko jorne wali line par mojood hai. Iski wajah yeh hai ke A aur B ke darmiyan sab se chota rasta point of contact se guzarta hai.
Classroom ek chiriya ghar ban gaya tha.
The classroom was very noisy and chaotic: Classroom mein bohat shor aur afratafri thi.
The company announced it was 'downsizing: Company ne announce kiya ke woh apni workforce 'downsize' kar rahi hai aur kuch 'associates' ko nikal rahi hai.
The dependent clause starts with the sub: Dependent clause subordinating conjunction 'when' se shuru hota hai aur akele nahi reh sakta.
The detected planet has mass M = 18.4 M_: Detect honay walay planet ka mass M = 18.4 M_Earth aur orbital radius 5.5 AU hai, jis ka orbital period T = 12.7 years hai — jo ke host star M-dwarf (0.45 M_Sun) par apply honay walay Kepler's Third Law (T² ∝ a³) ke consistent hai.
The differential equation has a beautifu: Differential equation ka aik khubsurat solution hai: general orbit aik conic section hota hai. Jab e = 0 ho, tou orbit circle hota hai; jab 0 < e < 1 ho, tou yeh ellipse hota hai (Kepler's First Law!); jab e = 1 ho, yeh parabola hota hai; jab e > 1 ho, tou yeh hyperbola hota hai. Eccentricity e total energy se determine hoti hai — bound orbits (E < 0) ellipses hote hain, aur unbound (E ≥ 0) parabolas ya hyperbolas hotay hain.
Kutta zor se bhonk raha hai.
The double-angle identity says cos α = 2: Double-angle identity kehti hai ke cos α = 2cos²(α/2) − 1. Law of Cosines substitute karein: 2cos²(α/2) − 1 = (b²+c²−a²)/(2bc).
The effective spring constant k_eff = k_: Effective spring constant k_eff = k_mech - k_elec(V²) hai. Agar mechanical spring constant k_mech = 100 N/m hai aur V=0 par frequency 100 kHz hai, tou ω = √(k/m) use karte hue effective mass m kya hoga? (Hint: m = k/(2πf)²)
The electric field E is defined as force: Electric field E ko force per unit test charge ke tor par define kiya jata hai. Point charge Q ke liye, field outwardly (positive) ya inwardly (negative) radiate hoti hai jiski magnitude E = Q/(4πε₀r²) hoti hai. Yeh tamam electrostatics ki foundation hai.
The electric flux Φ is the surface integ: Electric flux Φ E·dA ka surface integral hota hai. Charge par centered spherical surface ke liye, E constant aur surface ke perpendicular hota hai (cos 0 = 1). Surface area 4πr² hota hai. r² cancel ho jata hai, jis se Φ = Q/ε₀ banta hai — radius ke independent!
The energy of a moving object depends on: Harkat karti hui cheez ki energy uske mass aur velocity ke square par depend karti hai.
The ex-centre I₁ creates three regions:: Ex-centre I₁ teen regions banata hai: I₁AB, I₁AC (triangle ke bahar), aur I₁BC (kuch had tak andar). Total area Δ = Area(I₁AB) + Area(I₁AC) − Area(I₁BC).
Dilchasp kitab ne mujhe jagaye rakha.
The formula ΔE = hc/λ falls directly out: Formula ΔE = hc/λ Planck ki quantum hypothesis aur roshni ki wave nature se seedha banta hai. Yeh roshni ki wave picture (wavelength) aur particle picture (photon energy) ke darmiyan aik bridge hai — wave-particle duality ka nichor. Yeh equation fireworks ke colors se le kar door stars mein elements identify karne wali spectral lines tak sab kuch govern karti hai.
The fringe spacing is 0.5 mm at a detect: 2 m detector distance par 633 nm light use karte hue fringe spacing 0.5 mm hai. Effective slit separation kya hai? (Hint: y = λL/d)
The gears were rusted, ___ the machine s: Gears par zang laga tha, ___ phir bhi machine kaam kar rahi thi.
The girl [with the red hat] is my sister: [Lal topi wali] larki meri behan hai.
The girl with the red hair is my best fr: Lal baalon wali larki meri best friend hai.
The gravitational force between two 1 kg: Do 1 kg masses jo 1 m door hain ke darmiyan gravitational force sirf 6.67×10⁻¹¹ N hai — Newton ka ek billionth hissa. Gravity waqai sab se weak fundamental force hai, phir bhi yeh baray scales par cosmos ko dominate karti hai.
The gravitational potential energy of an: Kisi bhi object ki gravitational potential energy uske mass, height, aur gravity par depend karti hai.
The incentre I divides ΔABC into three s: Incentre I ΔABC ko teen chotay triangles mein divide karta hai: IAB, IBC, aur IAC. Har aik ki height r (inradius) hai.
'Mnemonic' mein shuru ka 'm' silent hota hai.
The interference contrast drops from 98%: Jab which-way information di jati hai tou interference contrast 98% se gir kar 12% ho jata hai, aur quantum erasure ke baad 94% par wapis aa jata hai — jo wave aur particle behavior ke darmiyan complementarity ko seedha demonstrate karta hai.
The internal quantum efficiency (IQE) is: Internal quantum efficiency (IQE) 99.7% report ki gayi hai. Light out-coupling efficiency kya hai? (Hint: EQE = IQE × out-coupling)

The logical OR is associative — (P OR Q): Logical OR associative hota hai — (P OR Q) OR R = P OR (Q OR R). Is liye (x ∈ A OR x ∈ B) OR x ∈ C = x ∈ A OR (x ∈ B OR x ∈ C). School fair ko is se koi faraq nahi parta ke aap teams ko kaisay group karte hain — har tarah se, x combined group ka hissa hai!
The main circuit board connecting all in: Main circuit board jo tamam internal components ko connect karta hai.
The mass spectrometry data analysis in t: Is lab mein mass spectrometry data analysis bilkul unhi techniques ki tarah hai jo cutting-edge structural biology research mein use hoti hain. Ethanol aur acetone ke liye jo m/z peaks aur fragmentation patterns aap ne analyze kiye hain wohi principles protein complexes ka structure maloom karne ke liye use hotay hain.
The material selection in this lab invol: Is lab mein material selection mein efficiency (GaAs: 31.1%) aur environmental impact (CdTe mein toxic cadmium hota hai) ke darmiyan trade-offs shamil hain. Green chemistry ka maqsad Earth par aam milnay walay, non-toxic materials use karke high-efficiency cells develop karna hai.
The math problem is being solved by the: Students math problem solve kar rahay hain.
The measure of an arc equals the measure: Kisi arc ka measure uske central angle ke barabar hota hai. Kyunke ∠AOB = ∠COD, arcs AB aur CD congruent hain. Yeh cycle complete karta hai: equal chords ↔ equal central angles ↔ congruent arcs!
The moon was a ghostly galleon tossed up: Chand baadalon ke samandar mein aik bhotiya jahaaz ki tarah tha.
The net force on an object equals the ra: Kisi object par net force uske linear momentum ke change ke rate ke barabar hoti hai.
The old house groaned and complained in: Puranay ghar ne tez hawa mein awazein nikali.
The page is taking too long to load and: Page load honay mein bohat time le raha hai aur phasa hua lag raha hai. Aap isay dobara load karke dekhna chahte hain.
Qalam talwar se zyada taqatwar hota hai.
The prefix 'un-' means 'not' or the oppo: Prefix 'un-' ka matlab 'nahi' ya iska ulat hota hai.
The quantum confinement principles studi: Solar cell capstone mein parhe gaye quantum confinement principles seedha QLEDs par apply hote hain — dono semiconductor nanostructures ki band gap engineering par rely karte hain.
The quantum eraser demonstrates the deep: Quantum eraser wave-particle duality ki sab se deep implications demonstrate karta hai, jo is lab mein explore kiye gaye diffraction aur interference principles se seedha connect hota hai. Yahan calculate kiya gaya double-slit pattern aur d·sinθ = mλ equation bilkul wohi physics hai jo quantum erasure ko govern karti hai — fringe spacing roshni (aur matter!) ki wave nature zahir karti hai.
Radiation shield fully charge ho chuki hai.
The radius of the circle passing through: Triangle ke teeno vertices se guzarnay walay circle ka radius.
The reactor control panel in this lab si: Is lab mein reactor control panel real-time temperature aur power monitoring simulate karta hai. Asli reactors mein, nano-scale thermocouples aur radiation-hardened nanosensors distributed sensing provide karte hain jis se safety margins behtar hotay hain.
The robot completed the task: Robot ne task poora kar liya
Robot ne khud ko jaldi theek kar liya.
Behta hua pani bohat thanda tha.
The solar industry is adopting green che: Solar industry panel manufacturing mein toxic chemicals (jaisay cadmium aur lead) aur energy-intensive processes ko kam karne ke liye green chemistry principles apna rahi hai.
The stars danced playfully in the moonli: Sitaray chandni raat mein playfully raqs kar rahay thay.
The stars seemed to twinkle and move sli: Sitaray timtimate aur thora sa move karte hue lag rahe thay.
The stars sparkled like diamonds in the: Sitaray andheri raat ke asman mein heeron ki tarah chamak rahe thay.
The student who studied hard passed the: Jis student ne mehnat ki, usne exam pass kar liya.
The students are solving the math proble: Students math problem solve kar rahay hain.
The suffix \"-ous\" typically means:: Suffix "-ous" ka amoman matlab hota hai:
The teacher said, \"The earth revolves a: Teacher ne kaha, "Zameen suraj ke gird ghoomti hai."
The verb 'rang' is intransitive because: Verb 'rang' intransitive hai kyunke iske sath direct object nahi lagta; 'loudly' aik adverb hai.
The wind is a howling wolf,\nIt cries in:
Hawa aik howling wolf hai,
Andheri raat mein roti hai.
Sitaray chamaktay heeray hain,
Apni puri roshni se chamaktay hain.
Hawa ne ek halki si chalne ki awaz nikali.
The wind whispered through the dark and: Hawa andheray aur sunsan jangal mein sargoshi karti thi.
Hawa darakhton ke darmiyan sargoshi kar rahi thi.
There are no labs available for this sel: Is selection ke liye koi labs dastiyab nahi hain.
There are strange anomalies on the radar: Radar par ajeeb si anomalies hain.
There's a small chance it will rain tomo: Kal barish honay ka thora sa chance hai.
Therefore, all angles in a major segment: Is liye, major segment (semicircle se bara) mein tamam angles acute (< 90°) hotay hain. Yeh circular segments mein angles ki nature samajhne mein madad karta hai — jo arches aur domes ke architectural design mein useful hai!
Therefore, all angles inscribed in a min: Is liye, minor segment (semicircle se chota) mein banne walay tamam angles obtuse (> 90°) hotay hain.
Therefore, congruent arcs have equal cho: Is liye, congruent arcs ke chords equal hotay hain. Yeh gear design mein use hota hai — smooth meshing ke liye equal gear teeth (arcs) ke chord lengths barabar honay chahiye. Map-making mein, latitude aur longitude ki equal arcs globe par equal chords banati hain!
Therefore, equal chords are equidistant: Is liye, barabar chords centre se equal distance par hoti hain. Farz karein aik hi length ki do guitar strings (chords) — wo circular sound hole ke centre se barabar faslay par hoti hain. Yeh engineering mein circular structures mein forces ko balance karne ke liye use hota hai!
Therefore, equal chords subtend equal an: Is liye, barabar chords centre par barabar angles banati hain. Sochain ek pizza jiske crust barabar width ke hon — kinaron par equal chords ka matlab hai equal central angles, jis se aapko barabar slices milti hain! Yehi theorem wajah hai ke circle par barabar spacing barabar angles banati hai, jo polygon construction ki buniyad hai.
Therefore, the line from the centre to t: Is liye, centre se chord ke midpoint tak aane wali line chord par perpendicular hoti hai. Yeh circle geometry mein chord lengths aur centre se distance maloom karne ki ek key property hai. Isi liye spirit level kaam karta hai — bubble ki centre line surface par perpendicular hoti hai!
Therefore, ∠ACB = ∠ADB = ∠AEB. All angle: Is liye, ∠ACB = ∠ADB = ∠AEB. Circle ke ek hi segment mein tamam angles barabar hotay hain. Yahi wajah hai ke circular arc par koi bhi point chord ko aik hi angle par "dekhta" hai — yeh circular sports stadiums mein "goal line" ke peechay ka principle hai!
Therefore: tan θ = sin θ / cos θ and cot: Is liye: tan θ = sin θ / cos θ aur cot θ = cos θ / sin θ. Yeh Quotient Identities hain. Yeh primary ratios (sin, cos) ko secondary (tan, cot) se connect karti hain. Yahi wajah hai ke unit circle par, angle θ ka tangent y-coordinate divided by x-coordinate hota hai!
Wo ghum hui chabiyan ____ dhoondtay hain.
Think about the social consequences of t: Jo program aap likh rahay hain us ke social nateejon ke baray mein sochain.
Think before posting, respect difference: Post karne se pehle sochain, faraq ki izzat karein, aur unhein support karein jo target hotay hain.
This PET scanner directly uses the annih: Yeh PET scanner seedha is lab ki annihilation physics use karta hai — positron-electron annihilation 511 keV gamma rays paida karta hai (E = hc/λ = 1240/0.00243 nm). Detectors scintillation crystals use karte hain jo in gamma photons ko photoelectric effect ke zariye visible light mein convert karte hain, jise phir photomultiplier tubes detect karti hain — E = hc/λ ki ek practical application.
This completes the set: Theorems 9.8 and: Yeh set complete karta hai: Theorems 9.8 aur 9.9 mil kar sabit karte hain ke chords aur unke central angles mein mukammal one-to-one correspondence hoti hai. Equal chords ↔ equal central angles. Yeh engineering mein circular flange par barabar faslay wale holes banane mein use hota hai!
This exoplanet detection is a direct app: Yeh exoplanet detection usi gravitational physics ki direct application hai jo aap yahan explore kar rahay hain. Is lab mein Kepler's Third Law calculation (T² ∝ a³) bilkul wohi formula hai jo astronomers door daraz stars ke gird planets dhoondnay ke liye use karte hain. Is lab ka orbital mechanics simulator, jo yeh visualize karta hai ke satellites F = GMm/r² use karke Earth ke gird kaise orbit karte hain, wohi Newtonian inverse-square law use karta hai jo in planetary systems ko govern karta hai.
This is the converse of Theorem 9.4. Tog: Yeh Theorem 9.4 ka ulat hai. Yeh dono mil kar aik "if and only if" relationship banate hain: chords barabar hote hain AGAR AUR SIRF AGAR wo centre se barabar faslay par hon. Yeh symmetry circle geometry mein buniyadi hai aur circular grids aur radial structures design karne mein use hoti hai!
Yeh wo laptop hai jo main ne kharida.
This is why silicon solar cells can abso: Isi wajah se silicon solar cells ~1100 nm tak infrared light absorb kar sakte hain, lekin lambi infrared wavelengths ke liye transparent hotay hain. GaAs (E_g = 1.43 eV) sirf ~867 nm tak absorb kar sakta hai — yeh kuch infrared miss kar deta hai lekin har photon se zyada energy pakar leta hai.
This lab encountered an unexpected error: Is lab mein ek ghair mutawaqqa error aaya aur ye theek se render nahi ho saki.
This lab's orbit simulator uses exactly: Is lab ka orbit simulator bilkul yehi equations use karta hai! Numerical integration ax = -GMx/r³ aur ay = -GMy/r³ use karti hai — wohi inverse-square law. Jab aap velocity 7.67 km/s aur altitude 400 km set karte hain, tou satellite aik elliptical orbit (ya agar perfect ho, tou circular) follow karta hai. NASA ka Mission Control yehi Newtonian equations use karke har satellite launch, ISS resupply trajectory, aur Mars rover landing plan karta hai — GPS satellites ke liye thora sa Einstein ki general relativity se correct karke jahan 38 μs/day ka relativistic drift har din 10 km ki positioning error bana sakta hai.
This other point would be inside the cir: Ye doosra point circle ke andar hoga
This research directly validates the sol: Ye research directly Solar Cell Capstone lab mein solar cell design principles ko validate karti hai — dikhati hai ke material choice, passivation, aur interface engineering ka real-world efficiency par kya asar padta hai.
This research is a direct real-world ana: Ye research is lab mein eel simulation ka direct real-world analogue hai. Electrocyte model (V_total = N × V_cell) bilkul wahi hai jo aap simulator mein calculate karte hain — har bio-cell ek chhote Coulomb generator ke taur par kaam karta hai. RC flash circuit se resistance aur capacitance ke concepts in bio-inspired batteries ki power limitations ko samajhne ke liye bhi apply hote hain.
This simplifies to: (a+b)/(a−b) = tan[(α: Ye simplify ho kar banta hai: (a+b)/(a−b) = tan[(α+β)/2] / tan[(α−β)/2]. The Law of Tangents! Ye khaas taur par surveying aur navigation mein faidamand hai jab aapko do sides aur unke beech ka angle maloom ho, ya do angles aur ek side — is se square roots ke liye calculator ki zaroorat nahi rehti!
This theorem is attributed to Thales of: Ye theorem Thales of Miletus (c. 600 BCE) se mansoob hai, jo isay sab se purane maloom mathematical theorems mein se ek banata hai. lab.c11organicsynthesis_balance_the_crac: Decane (C10H22) ki cracking ko balance karein taake Octane (C8H18) aur ek alkene bane:
lab.c11organicsynthesis_crude_oil_is_sep: Crude oil ko ubalnay ke darjay ke mutabiq hisson mein alag kiya jata hai. Halke molecules (kam carbons) kam darjay par ubaltay hain aur column mein upar uthte hain.
lab.c11organicsynthesis_longer_less_valu: Lambe, kam qeemti alkanes ko garam kar ke aur zeolite catalyst ka istemal karke chhote alkanes aur alkenes mein tor diya jata hai.

lab.c11phasesofmatter_correct_you_found_: Bilkul sahi! Tumne naya boiling point dhoondh liya.

lab.c11stoichiometry_reset_glassware: Sheeshe ke Bartanon ko Reset Karein
lab.c12agriculture_are_engineered_to_exp: Yeh *Bacillus thuringiensis* se Bt toxin ko zahir karne ke liye tayyar kiye gaye hain. Toxin insect gut mein receptors se bandhta hai, pores banata hai jo pest ki maut ka sabab banta hai jabke insaanon ke liye be-asar rehta hai.
lab.c12agriculture_at_a_bt_toxin_express: Is level par Bt toxin expression ke saath
lab.c12agriculture_at_what_exact_time_in: toh kis exact waqt (seconds mein) pest survival rate bilkul
lab.c12agriculture_calculate_the_agroche: Simulation data ke buniyad par agrochemical asraat ka hisaab lagao. Visualized phenomena se derived specific rate equations par dhyan do.
lab.c12agriculture_contains_elevated_h_i: Yeh H⁺ ions ko barhata hai. Yeh ions zaroori nutrient cations jaise Ca²⁺ aur Mg²⁺ ko nakaratmak charge wale zameen ke clay particles se hata dete hain. Phir nutrients leached ho jate hain, jo zameen ki khushkhalai ko khatam kar dete hain.
lab.c12agriculture_if_the_pesticide_conc: Agar pesticide concentration ko configure kiya gaya hai
lab.c12agriculture_irreversibly_inhibit_: Insects mein Acetylcholinesterase (AChE) ko laazmi tor par rokta hai. AChE ke baghair, acetylcholine synapse mein ikattha hota hai, jo musalsal nerve impulses, paralysis, aur maut ka sabab banta hai.
lab.c12agriculture_rate_activity_loss_co: kaise hoga (Rate: Activity loss = conc × time × 2)
lab.c12agriculture_rate_survival_loss_ex: kaise hoga (Rate: Survival loss = expression × time × 2)
lab.c12agriculture_what_will_be_the_exac: toh AChE enzyme ki activity (%) bilkul
lab.c12biochemistry_1_given_km_20_mm_and: 1. Km = 20 mM aur Ki = 10 mM diya gaya hai. Jab [Inhibitor] = 10 mM ho toh apparent Km kya hoga ek competitive inhibitor ke liye?
lab.c12biochemistry_2_at_what_exact_ph_w: 2. Kis exact pH par Amino Acid B (pI = 6.0) electric field mein migrate nahi karega?
lab.c12biochemistry_amino_acids_possess_: Amino acids ka ek isoelectric point (pI) hota hai jahan yeh koi net electrical charge nahi rakhte. Ek buffer solution mein, agar pH < pI, amino acid protonated (positive) hota hai aur cathode (-) ki taraf migrate karta hai. Agar pH > pI, yeh deprotonated (negative) hota hai aur anode (+) ki taraf migrate karta hai. Jab pH = pI hota hai, yeh stationary rehta hai.
lab.c12biochemistry_bind_to_an_allosteri: ek allosteric site se bandhta hai, enzyme ke structure ko badalta hai. Yeh Vmax ko kam karta hai kyunki functional enzymes pool se hata diye jate hain, lekin Km unchanged rehta hai kyunki active site ki affinity par asar nahi hota.
lab.c12biochemistry_bind_to_the_enzyme_s: enzyme ke active site se bandhta hai, substrate ke saath muqabala karta hai. Yeh apparent Michaelis constant (Km) ko barhata hai lekin Vmax unchanged rehta hai kyunki high substrate concentrations inhibitor ko outcompete kar sakti hain.
lab.c12electrochemistry_biochemical_oxyg: Biochemical Oxygen Demand (BOD) ko redox titrations (Winkler Method) ka istemal karke paani mein dissolved O₂ dhoondne ke liye napta hai. Mn²⁺ oxidized hota hai, phir iodide ke saath react karta hai, aur thiosulfate ke saath titrated hota hai.
lab.c12electrochemistry_calculate_the_pr: Apne current cell setup ke liye Nernst equation ka istemal karke precise theoretical voltage (koi noise nahi) ka hisaab lagao.
lab.c12electrochemistry_convert_chemical: chemical energy ko electrical energy mein tabdeel karta hai spontaneous redox reactions ke zariye.
lab.c12electrochemistry_no_data_recorded: Koi data record nahi hua. Ek cell banao aur measurements record karo.
lab.c12equilibriumacidbase_determine_the: Ek anjaam shuda solution ki concentration ko ek standard solution ke saath react karke tay karna.
lab.c12equilibriumacidbase_flask_25_0_ml: Flask: 25.0 mL ka 0.1 M Kamzor Acid (CH₃COOH)
lab.c12equilibriumacidbase_in_equilibriu: Equilibrium mein, solutes do immiscible phases (jaise ke organic aur aqueous) ke darmiyan partition karte hain. K_pc = [Solute]_org / [Solute]_aq.
lab.c12equilibriumacidbase_observe_the_p: pH curve ko observe karo. Graph se kamzor acid ka pKa half-equivalence point par andaza lagao.
lab.c12equilibriumacidbase_used_for_buff: Buffer regions (jaise ke khoon ka plasma buffer) ke liye istemal hota hai:
lab.c12industrymaterials_at_what_exact_t: Emulsion stability kis exact waqt (seconds mein) tak pohanchti hai
lab.c12industrymaterials_breaks_down_lar: Bade, low-value hydrocarbon molecules ko halka, high-value products (jaise ke gasoline components) mein tabdeel karna heat aur zeolite catalyst ka istemal karke.
lab.c12industrymaterials_calculate_the_e: Exact % conversion ko bilkul par calculate karo
lab.c12industrymaterials_compute_the_ind: Plant simulator ke operational data ke buniyad par industrial yields aur rates ko compute karo.
lab.c12industrymaterials_relies_heavily_: Stable emulsions banane par bohat zyada inhesar karta hai. Emulsifiers (surfactants) oil aur paani ke darmiyan surface tension ko kam karte hain, stable micelles banate hain jo phase separation ko rok dete hain.
lab.c12industrymaterials_requires_heatin: Limestone (CaCO₃) aur clay ko 1450°C tak rotary kiln mein garam karna zaroori hai. Tez garmi calcination aur fusion ka sabab banti hai, jo solid clinker nodules (mostly tricalcium silicate) banate hain.
lab.c12industrymaterials_what_is_the_exa: Exact clinker yield (%) kya hai bilkul par
lab.c12medicine_acetylsalicylic_acid_irr: (acetylsalicylic acid) Cyclooxygenase (COX) enzymes ko laazmi tor par inhibit karta hai. Ye apna acetyl group active site mein serine residue ko transfer karta hai, arachidonic acid ko block karta hai aur prostaglandin synthesis ko rok deta hai.
lab.c12medicine_at_what_exact_time_in_se: Bilkul kis waqt (seconds mein) cell wall ki integrity gir jayegi
lab.c12medicine_calculate_the_constant_r: Jab dosage set kiya jaye, to inhibition ki constant rate (%/s) calculate karo
lab.c12medicine_contains_a_beta_lactam_r: Beta-lactam ring ek aisi structure hai jo transpeptidase enzyme (PBP) se judta hai aur mukablay mein rokta hai. Ye bacterial cell walls mein peptidoglycan ka cross-linking rokta hai, jo osmotic lysis ki taraf le jata hai.
lab.c12medicine_dosage_what_will_be_the_: Dosage, DNA crosslinking ka percentage kya hoga bilkul
lab.c12medicine_pt_cl_complex_binding_to: Pt-Cl complex Guanine se bind ho raha hai!
lab.c12medicine_pt_nh_cl_is_a_chemothera: [Pt(NH₃)₂Cl₂] ek chemotherapy dawai hai. Ye tumor cells mein DNA ko cross-link karta hai, khaaskar guanine bases par. Ye DNA replication aur transcription ko disrupt karta hai, jo aakhir mein apoptosis tak le jata hai.
lab.c12medicine_serine_residue_acetylate: Serine residue acetylated! Pathway block ho gaya.
lab.c12medicine_use_the_simulation_data_: Simulation data ko pharmacological parameters calculate karne ke liye istamal karo. Ye maan lo ke ye relationship zero-order kinetics ko follow karta hai is model mein:
lab.c12organicsynthesis_1_what_is_the_ma: 1. Diazonium intermediate ko decompose hone se pehle maintain karne ke liye maximum safe temperature (°C) kya hai?
lab.c12organicsynthesis_2_in_an_asymmetr: 2. Ek asymmetric synthesis mein, aapko 90% (S)-Thalidomide aur 10% (R)-Thalidomide ka mixture milta hai. Enantiomeric Excess (% ee) calculate karo.
lab.c12organicsynthesis_azo_dyes_are_man: Azo dyes do marahil ke amal se tayar kiye jate hain:
lab.c12organicsynthesis_first_a_primary_: Pehle, ek primary aromatic amine (maslan, Aniline) ko nitrous acid (NaNO2 + HCl) ke saath thandi temperatures (0-5°C) par react kiya jata hai taake diazonium salt ban sake. Agar temperature 10°C se zyada ho jaye, to unstable diazonium salt phenol mein tabdeel ho jata hai, nitrogen gas release karta hai. Phir 2-Naphthol jese phenol ke saath coupling karne se chamakdar Azo Dye milta hai.
lab.c12organicsynthesis_thalidomide_poss: Thalidomide ek chiral center rakhta hai, jo (R) aur (S) enantiomers ke tor par maujood hai. Tareekhi tor par, isay ek racemic mixture ke tor par diya gaya, jo (S)-isomer ke zariye tragic teratogenic asraat ka sabab bana, jabke (R)-isomer therapeutic tha. Aaj kal asymmetric synthesis chiral catalysts ka istemal karta hai taake ek hi desired enantiomer ban sake, jo high achieve karta hai.
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_1_base: 1. IR broad peak 3300 cm⁻¹ aur MS base peak m/z=31 ke aadhar par, Sample A ko identify karo. (Ethanol ya Acetone?)
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_2_for_: 2. Sample B ke liye, 1H NMR ek single peak (singlet) dikhata hai. Iski Mass Spectrum mein base peak ka m/z value kya hai?
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_determ: Molecular weight (M+ peak) aur structure ko fragmentation ke zariye determine karta hai. Base peak (sabse uncha) sabse stable fragment ion ko represent karta hai.
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_identi: Functional groups ko identify karta hai. O-H bonds ek broad peak ~3300 cm⁻¹ dikhate hain. C=O bonds ek sharp, strong peak ~1715 cm⁻¹ dikhate hain. C-H bonds sharp peaks ~2900 cm⁻¹ dikhate hain.

Hydrogen environments ko identify karta hai. Splitting (n+1 rule) neighboring protons ko indicate karta hai. Chemical shift (ppm) shielding ko indicate karta hai (maslan, O ke kareeb hona zyada deshielded/higher ppm hota hai).
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_separa: Compounds ko polarity ke zariye separate karta hai. Ek polar stationary phase (silica) polar compounds ko rokta hai. Zyada polar solvent ka istemal karne se sab compounds ka Rf (Retention factor) barhta hai.

lab.c12transitionmetals_the_energy_gap_b: Split d-orbitals ke darmiyan energy gap (Δ) us light ki wavelength se mutabiqat rakhta hai jo absorb hoti hai:

lab.c9separationtech_mixtures_contain_di: Mixtures mukhtalif substances par mushtamil hote hain jo ke chemically bonded nahi hain. Hum inhe inki properties ki buniyad par alag karne ke liye mukhtalif physical processes ka istemal karte hain.

lab.c9separationtech_used_to_separate_a_: Liquid ko solution se alag karne ke liye istemal hota hai (maslan, pure water ko salty water se). Solution ko garam kiya jata hai jab tak liquid vapor mein nahi badal jata. Phir vapor ko condenser mein thanda kiya jata hai, jo ke dobara ek pure liquid (distillate) mein badal jata hai.
lab.c9separationtech_used_to_separate_mi: Soluble substances ke mixtures ko alag karne ke liye istemal hota hai, jaise colored dyes. Jab solvent paper par upar ki taraf move karta hai, yeh dyes ko unki solubility ke hisaab se mukhtalif speeds par le jata hai.

lab.e9partsofspeech_a_derivational_suffi: Ek derivational suffix ko kisi base word ke akhir mein jora jata hai taake ek naya lafz ban sake jis ke mayne ya part of speech mukhtalif hon. Misal ke tor par, 'happy' ke sath '-ness' laganay se 'happiness' banta hai, jo ek adjective ko noun mein tabdeel karta hai.
lab.e9partsofspeech_change_y_to_i: Y ko I mein tabdeel karein:

lab.e9partsofspeech_drop_the_silent_e_be: Agar koi lafz silent 'e' par khatam hota hai, toh aisa suffix laganay se pehlay jo vowel se shuru hota ho, 'e' ko khatam kar dein.
lab.e9partsofspeech_if_a_word_ends_in_a_: Agar koi lafz consonant + y par khatam hota hai, toh suffix shamil karne se pehlay 'y' ko 'i' mein badal dein.
Agar koi lafz aik akelay consonant par khatam hota hai jis se pehlay aik akela vowel ho, toh vowel se shuru honay wala suffix laganay se pehlay consonant ko double kar dein.
lab.e9partsofspeech_morphology_is_the_st: Morphology lafzon, un ke banne ke tareeqay, aur usi zaban mein doosre lafzon ke sath un ke talluq ka mutaliya hai. Yeh lafzon aur un ke hisson, jaise stems, root words, prefixes, aur suffixes ke structure ka tajziya karti hai.
lab.e9partsofspeech_no_words_forged_yet_: Abhi tak koi lafz nahi banaya gaya. Adjectives banane ke liye Word Forge ka istemal karein!

lab.e9partsofspeech_when_adding_suffixes: Suffixes shamil karte waqt, base word mein aksar spelling ki tabdeelian hoti hain:
lab.e9phrases_a_phrase_is_a_group_of_wor: Phrase lafzon ka aik group hai jo jumlay mein aik akele part of speech ke tor par kaam karta hai. Zaroori baat yeh hai ke phrase mein subject aur verb dono ek sath nahi hote (clause ke bar-aks).

lab.e9phrases_an_adverbial_phrase_acts_l: Adverbial phrase aik adverb ki tarah kaam karta hai. Yeh verb, adjective, ya kisi doosre adverb ki tarmeem karta hai aur batata hai

Agarche euphemisms aam baat cheet mein muaddab hotay hain, editors aksar inhein academic ya sahafti likhai mein wazahat aur seedhe pan ke liye nikaal dete hain.

lab.gpe_adjust_desc: Mass aur height adjust karke dekhein ke Eₚ = mgh kaise scale karta hai.
lab.gpe_correct_feedback: Sahi! 73.6 J. 2 kg kitab usi oonchai par sirf 29.4 J rakhti hai — kam mass = kam stored energy!
lab.gpe_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. Eₚ = m × g × h = 5 × 9.81 × 1.5
lab.gpe_practice_q: Ek 5 kg ka backpack ek shelf par 1.5 m farsh se upar hai.
lab.gpe_practice_q2: hamein ki gravitational potential energy kya hai? (g = 9.81)
lab.gpe_real_life: Hydroelectric dams paani ko oonchai par store karte hain — har kilogram paani 100 m par 981 J gravitational PE rakhta hai, jo turbines se gir kar electricity mein convert hota hai.
lab.gpe_step1_detail: 🎢 Aap roller coaster car mein baithe hain aur pehli bari pahadi ki taraf click karte hue ja rahe hain. Chain lift mechanism groans karti hai jab yeh aap ko ooncha kheenchti hai. Har meter jo aap oopar jaate hain, energy store hoti hai. E_p = Work = F × S — motor gravity ke khilaf kaam karta hai aap ko uthane mein.
lab.gpe_step1_label: Gravity ke khilaaf kiya gaya kaam karna
lab.gpe_step2_detail: 500 kg ki car (aur aap!) ko constant speed par uthane ke liye jo force chahiye, woh uska weight hai: F = mg. Do passengers ke saath, total mass ≈ 700 kg hai, toh F = 700 × 9.81 = 6,867 N — ek choti car ke weight ke barabar.
lab.gpe_step3_detail: Pehli pahadi 45 meters oonchi hai — yeh vertical height S = h hai. Motor ka work: W = 6,867 × 45 = 309,015 J. Har joule gravitational potential energy ke tor par store hota hai, release hone ka muntazir.
lab.gpe_step4_detail: E_p = mgh = 700 × 9.81 × 45 = 309,015 J — itni energy jo 60W bulb 85 minutes tak jala sakti hai! Crest par aap ek split second rukte hain... phir aap plunge karte hain. Woh stored PE kinetic energy mein convert hoti hai jab aap neeche race karte hain, loops aur corkscrews ke zariye aap ko power deti hai. Jitni oonchi pehli pahadi, utni zyada energy poori ride ke liye!
lab.gpe_subtitle: Kaise Eₚ = mgh kaam karna ki tareef se nikalta hai
lab.hydraulic_adjust_desc: Piston areas aur input force ko adjust karo taake taqat multiplication dekho.
lab.hydraulic_correct_feedback: Sahi! F₁ = 240 N. 50:1 mechanical advantage ke saath, 240 N 12,000 N uthata hai — yeh hydraulics ki taqat hai!
lab.hydraulic_final_desc: Khaarij honay waali Force = raqbay ka tanasub × Dakhli Force
lab.hydraulic_practice_q: Hydraulic lift: A₁ = 0.005 m², A₂ = 0.25 m². Gaadi ka wazan = 12,000 N.
lab.hydraulic_practice_q2: Kya kam se kam input force chahiye?
lab.hydraulic_real_life: Gaadi ke brakes hydraulic multiplication ka istemal karte hain — brake pedal par choti taqat (5 cm² piston) brake pads par 20× zyada taqat banati hai (100 cm² piston), tumhara paon 2-ton ki gaadi ko rok sakta hai.
lab.hydraulic_step1_detail: 🔧 Tum ek mechanic ho jiske paas 1500 kg ki gaadi hai jo uthani hai. Tum ek hydraulic jack frame ke neeche rakhte ho aur handle ko pump karte ho. Blaise Pascal ne yeh dhoondha ke dabao jo ek band container mein fluid par lagaya jata hai, woh sab taraf barabar transfer hota hai. Tum jo dabao handle par banao, woh gaadi tak bina kisi kami ke pohanchta hai.
lab.hydraulic_step2_detail: Chote piston (area = 0.005 m²) ko sirf 240 N se daba kar aap P₁ = 240/0.005 = 48,000 Pa create karte hain — jaise pen ki nok apni hatheli par dabaye. Chota area matlab choti force se bada pressure.
lab.hydraulic_step3_detail: Pascal ke principle se, 48,000 Pa jo aap ne pump handle par banaya woh hydraulic fluid ke zariye BINA KISI KAMI KE transmit hota hai. P₂ = P₁ = 48,000 Pa. Fluid aap ki force ko invisibly wahan pahunchata hai jahan zaroorat hai.
lab.hydraulic_step4_detail: F₂/A₂ = F₁/A₁, to F₂ = (A₂/A₁) × F₁ = (0.25/0.005) × 240 = 12,000 N! Aap ki 240 N push poori car utha deti hai. Mechanical advantage = 50×. Yahi principle aap ki car rokta hai jab aap brake pedal dabate hain, bade excavators control karta hai, aur dentist chairs bhi chlata hai!
lab.hydraulic_step4_label: Khaarij honay waali Force maloom karein
lab.hydraulic_subtitle: Kaise Pascal ka principle ek choti force ko bhaari load uthane deta hai
lab.incorrect_feedback: Ghalat hai. Yad rakhein raftaar simt badalti hai!
lab.j.interact_laboratory_module: Natija dekhne ke liye dain taraf laboratory module ke sath interact karein.
lab.ke_adjust_desc: Mass aur velocity ko adjust karein taake v² ka asar pehle haath se dekhein.
lab.ke_correct_feedback: Sahi! 200,000 J. 40 m/s (144 km/h) par yeh 800 kJ hoti — chaar guna zyada! Is liye speed itni khatarnak hai.
lab.ke_final_desc: Kinetic energy = aadha × mass × velocity ka square
lab.ke_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. Pehle velocity ka square karein: 20² = 400. Phir E = 0.5 × 1000 × 400.
lab.ke_practice_q: Ek 1000 kg ki car 20 m/s (72 km/h) par chalti hai.
lab.ke_practice_q2: hamein ki kinetic energy kya hai?
lab.ke_real_life: Ek car jo 100 km/h par hai, uski kinetic energy 50 km/h par wahi car se 4 guna zyada hai. Ye is liye hai ke speed limits hain — stopping distance speed ke square ke saath badhta hai, aur crash energy tab quadruple hoti hai jab speed double hoti hai.
lab.ke_step1_detail: 🛹 Aap ek bade half-pipe ke oopar hain, dil zor se dharak raha hai. Aap neeche aate hain, aur gravity kaam karti hai. Gravity aap par jo work karti hai woh aap ki kinetic energy mein badal jata hai: E_k = Work = F × d. Jitna tez dhalaan, utna zyada work gravity karti hai.
lab.ke_step2_detail: Gravity aapko force F = mg se kheenchti hai. Jo distance d aap tay karte hain, woh aapki speed se taluq rakhta hai. Rest se shuru karte hue, aapki average speed ramp par v_avg = v/2 hai. Toh d = v_avg × t = (v/2) × t. E_k = (ma)(d) = m × a × (v/2 × t).
lab.ke_step3_detail: Ramp par aap ki acceleration a = v/t hai (aap kitni jaldi speed v tak time t mein pahunchte hain). Plug karein: E_k = m × (v/t) × (v/2 × t). t numerator AUR denominator mein zahir hota hai. Kuch khoobsurat hone wala hai...
lab.ke_step4_detail: Time cancel ho jata hai! E_k = m × v × v/2 = ½mv². Speed double karna matlab energy QUADRUPLE karna. Yahi wajah hai ke 100 km/h par car crash 50 km/h ke crash se 4× zyada destructive hota hai, aur skateboard par double height se girna sirf double nahi lagta — chaar guna zyada lagta hai!
lab.ke_subtitle: Kaise Eₖ = ½mv² work aur Newton ke doosre law se nikalta hai
lab.lp_adjust_desc: Gehraai aur density ko adjust karo taake dekho P = ρgh asal values ke saath kaise kaam karta hai.
lab.lp_correct_feedback: Sahi! 301,658 Pa. Yeh ~3× atmospheric pressure hai! Submarines in forces ko sahne ke liye banayi jaati hain.
lab.lp_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. P = ρgh = 1025 × 9.81 × 30. Teeno ko zaroor milao!
lab.lp_practice_q: Ek submarine samundari paani (ρ = 1025 kg/m³) mein 30 m tak doobti hai.
lab.lp_practice_q2: Us gehraai par dabao kya hai? (g = 9.81 m/s²)
lab.lp_real_life: Submarines mote hull ke saath banayi jaati hain kyunki 300 m gahrai mein pani ka pressure 30 atmospheres hota hai — ordinary steel ko crush karne ke liye kafi hai. Jitna neeche jayenge, utna zyada pressure.
lab.lp_step1_detail: 🏊 Aap ek boat se samandar mein kood kar neeche gote lagate hain. Aap ke kaano mein ek bechain karne wala pressure banta hai. Pressure = force / area — aap ke oopar paani ka column hai jiska weight hai, aur woh weight aap ke jism ke har square millimeter par dabaav dalta hai.
lab.lp_step2_detail: Taakat paani ka wazan hai: F = mg. Lekin m = ρV (density × volume). Samundari paani ki density 1,025 kg/m³ hai — yeh meetha paani se zyada bhaari hai, isi liye samundar mein tairna asaan hai! F = ρ × V × g.
lab.lp_step3_detail: Aap ke oopar pani ka volume = aap ke jism ka area × depth: V = A × h. To F = ρ × A × h × g. Dekhein area A zahir hota hai — ek chaura shakhs ke oopar zyada pani ka weight hota hai. Lekin aage kuch magical hota hai...
lab.lp_step4_detail: P = F/A = (ρ × A × h × g)/A = ρgh. Area CANCEL ho jata hai! Kisi bhi gahrai par pressure sab ke liye ek jaisa hai chahe jism ki shakal kuch bhi ho. Sirf 10 m gahre mein, pressure double hokar 2 atmospheres ho jata hai. Free divers saalon training karte hain yeh pressure sahne ke liye — pressure aap ke lungs aur sinuses jaisi hawa ki jagahon ko crush kar deta hai.
lab.lp_step4_label: Raqba ko P = ρgh hasl krne ke liye mnsokh karein
lab.lp_subtitle: Kaise P = ρgh dabao aur wazan ki tareef se nikalta hai.
lab.lp_trace2: V = A × h, to P = (ρ × A × h × g) / A
lab.lp_trace3: A khatam hota hai: P = ρgh
lab.m10chordbisectors_a_chord_is_drawn_a: . Ek chord banaya gaya hai perpendicular faaslay par
lab.m10chordbisectors_consequently_if_yo: Natijatan, agar aap ek line banate hain circle ke center se chord ke midpoint tak, toh wo line hamesha chord ke perpendicular hogi. Yeh ek right-angled triangle banata hai, jiski wajah se aap Pythagorean theorem ka istemal karke missing lengths maloom kar sakte hain.
lab.m10chordbisectors_drag_points_a_b_an: Points A, B, aur C ko circumference par khinchain.
lab.m10chordbisectors_is_a_line_segment_: ek line segment hai jis ke endpoints circle par hain.
lab.m10chordbisectors_notice_how_the_per: Ghaur karein ke teeno chords ke perpendicular bisectors bilkul circle ke center par milte hain!
lab.m10chordbisectors_of_a_chord_is_a_li: chord ka ek line hai jo chord ko bilkul 90° angle par do barabar hisson mein takseem karti hai.
lab.m10chordbisectors_the_perpendicular_: Kisi bhi circle ki chord ka perpendicular bisector hamesha circle ke center se guzarta hai.
lab.m10chordbisectors_what_is_the_total_: Chord ki total lambai kya hai?
lab.m10circleangles_a_quadrilateral_insc: Ek quadrilateral jo circle ke andar bana ho. Aamnay samnay ke interior angles supplementary hote hain (total 180° hota hai).
lab.m10circleangles_angle_between_tangen: Tangent aur chord ke darmiyan angle
lab.m10circleangles_angles_in_the_same_s: Same segment mein angles barabar hote hain
lab.m10circleangles_angles_subtended_by_: Ek hi arc se circumference par banne walay angles barabar hote hain.
lab.m10circleangles_drag_the_red_points_: Theorems ko dynamically explore karne ke liye circle ke circumference par mojood laal points ko khinchain.
lab.m10circleangles_the_angle_between_a_: Tangent aur chord ke darmiyan point of contact par angle alternate segment ke angle ke barabar hota hai.
lab.m10circleapplications_a_sector_is_a_: Sector circle ka ek "slice of pie" hai. Iska area total area (πr²) ka ek hissa hota hai.
lab.m10circleapplications_an_engineer_is: Ek engineer ek circular track design kar raha hai jiska radius hai
lab.m10circleapplications_circles_appear: Circles qudrat aur engineering mein har jagah mojood hain: GPS satellite ke orbit se lekar pool ki arch tak aur dhaagay par ghoomte hue pathar tak.

lab.m9logarithms_the_richter_scale_is_a_: Richter scale ek base-10 logarithmic scale hai jo zalzalon ko measure karne ke liye istemal hota hai. Kyun ke earthquake energies mein bohat faraq hota hai, ek logarithmic scale inhein aasan numbers se zahir karne mein madad karta hai.

lab.m9logarithms_very_large_numbers_are_: Bohat bare numbers a × 10^n ki tarah likhe jate hain. Misal ke taur par, 1,500,000 ban jata hai 1.5 × 10^6.
lab.m9realnumbers_a_percentage_is_a_frac: Percentage 100 mein se ek fraction hoti hai. Agar ek truck maximum 1000 kg mein se 400 kg le jata hai, to fraction 400 / 1000 hogi, jo 40% banti hai.

lab.m9theorems_in_both_cases_an_element_: Dono cases mein, ek element tab shamil hota hai agar wo A mein ho, ya phir B aur C dono mein ho. Isliye ye barabar hain!

lab.m9theorems_the_answer_is_always_1_tr: Jawab hamesha 1 hota hai. Phir se koshish karein!

lab.m9trigonometry_conversely_use_pythag: Iske baraks, coordinates se distance aur bearing maloom karne ke liye Pythagoras aur inverse tangent ka istemal karein.
lab.m9trigonometry_in_our_ladder_model_t: Hamare ladder model mein, ladder hypotenuse (L) hai, deewar opposite side (H) hai, aur farsh adjacent side (B) hai.

lab.m9trigonometry_trigonometric_ratios_: Trigonometric ratios right-angled triangle mein angles ko sides ki lengths se relate karte hain.
