lab.orbital_adjust_desc: Slider ko hilakar dekhein ke orbit radius speed aur period ko kaise affect karta hai.
lab.orbital_correct_feedback: Sahi! ~7,658 m/s. ISS 7.66 km/s ki raftaar se safar karta hai — 27,000 km/h se zyada, din mein 16 martaba Zameen ka chakkar lagata hai!
lab.orbital_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. r = 6,779,000 m, T = 5,562 s. v = 2π(6,779,000)/5,562. km ko m mein tabdeel karo!
lab.orbital_practice_q: ISS 408 km ki altitude par orbit karta hai. Earth ka radius = 6,371 km. T = 92.7 minutes.
lab.orbital_real_life: Geostationary satellites 35,786 km par har 24 hours mein ek baar orbit karte hain, Earth ki rotation se mila kar — is liye satellite TV dishes kabhi hilne ki zaroorat nahi hoti. Sirf 3 satellites poore globe ko cover kar sakte hain.
lab.orbital_step1_detail: 🛰️ Tasawur karein aap 100 km oonchai wale pahad se ek baseball ufqi tor par pheink rahe hain. Woh neeche ghanoosdaar raasta banata hai aur door ja girta hai. Jaise jaise aap door phenkna chahte hain, aapko tez phenkna hoga. average speed = distance / time — yeh sada idea orbital mechanics ka beej hai.
lab.orbital_step2_detail: Ab tasawur karein ki aap 7.8 km/s se pheink rahe hain — itni tez ke Zameen us wicket ke neeche usi sharah se mudti hai jis sharah woh girti hai! Ball kabhi zameen nahi lagti — woh orbit karta hai. Ek mukammal orbit mein, woh circle ka circumference travel karta hai: d = 2πr, jahan r Earth ke center se distance hai.
lab.orbital_step3_detail: 408 km Earth ke oopar (ISS altitude), ek mukammal orbit T = 92.7 minutes leti hai — yeh orbital period hai. ISS crew har roz 16 sunrise aur sunset dekhte hain kyunki woh itni tez orbit karte hain.
lab.orbital_step4_detail: v = 2πr/T = 2π × 6,779,000 m / 5,562 s ≈ 7,660 m/s — 27,000 km/h se bhi zyada! Oonche orbits aahista hain: Moon 384,000 km par sirf 1 km/s se orbit karta hai. Jitna ooncha jayenge, utna hi aaram se aap ka safar hoga.
lab.orbital_step4_label: mdary Raftaar hasl krne ke liye tbdyl karein
lab.orbital_subtitle: v = 2πr/T ko speed aur circular motion ke basic definitions se derive karo
lab.orbital_title: Derivation: msnauy syarh ki mdary Raftaar
lab.p10_coulomb_formula_desc: Jahan k ≈ 8.99 × 10⁹ N·m²/C² (Coulomb's constant) hai. Measurements mein haqeeqi sensor noise (±2%) shamil hai.
lab.p10_coulomb_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Coulomb's Law formula ko q₂ ke liye dobara arrange karne ki koshish karein.
lab.p10_coulomb_no_data: Abhi tak koi data record nahi hua.
lab.p10_coulomb_q: Ek alag experiment mein, charge q₁ +4 μC par fixed hai. Force sensor 90.0 N repulsive force measure karta hai jab charge q₂ bilkul 2.0 cm door rakha jata hai. q₂ ki magnitude μC mein kya hai?
lab.p10_coulomb_subtitle: Do point charges ke darmiyan electric force ka jaiza lein.
lab.p10_coulomb_theory: Coulomb's Law kehta hai ke do charged objects ke darmiyan electrical force un objects par charge ki quantity ke product ke directly proportional hai aur do objects ke darmiyan faslay ke square ke inversely proportional hai.
lab.p10_critical_adjust_desc: Refractive indices ko adjust karein taake critical angle ka tabdeel hona dekha ja sake.
lab.p10_critical_correct_fb: Sahi! 41.8°. Is angle ke aage, glass ke andar roshni totally reflect hoti hai — optical fibers ka principle!
lab.p10_critical_final_desc: Critical angle total internal reflection ke liye threshold tay karta hai.
lab.p10_critical_practice_q: Glass ka n = 1.5 hai aur hawa ka n = 1.0 hai. Glass-air boundary ke liye critical angle dhundhein.
lab.p10_critical_real_life: Heere chamakte hain kyunki in ka refractive index bohat zyada hai (n=2.42), jis se critical angle sirf 24° banta hai. Andar aane wali roshni total internal reflection se trapped ho jati hai, andar bounce karti hai aur nikalte waqt chamak paida karti hai!
lab.p10_critical_step1_detail: Pani ke neeche tairte hue, aap oopar dekhte hain. Oopar ki duniya ek chamakti hui circle nazar aati hai. Roshni pani (n=1.33) se hawa (n=1.0) mein jaate hue mudti hai. Snell's law n₁ sinθᵢ = n₂ sinθr mukammal tor par yeh bayan karta hai.
lab.p10_critical_step2_detail: Jaise jaise aap aur zyada angle par dekhte hain, roshan circle chhota hota hai. Ek khaas angle par, refracted ray 90 degrees par surface ke saath chalti hai. Yeh critical angle hai — is ke aage, aap pani ke oopar nahi dekh sakte.
lab.p10_critical_step3_detail: sin 90° = 1 hone se, Snell's law mukhtasar hota hai: n₁ sinθc = n₂. Pani ki surface ek perfect mirror mein badal jati hai. Critical angle se aage, total internal reflection shuru ho jata hai.
lab.p10_critical_subtitle: Snell's Law se Total Internal Reflection ke liye θc ka derivation.
lab.p10_critical_title: Derivation: Critical Angle, TIR ke liye
lab.p10_echo_correct_fb: Sahi! 300 m. Total distance jo tay kiya gaya hai wo 600 m hai (wahan aur wapas), isliye samundar ki teh 300 m gehri hai.
lab.p10_echo_final_desc: Depth = (Speed × Time) / 2 — sonar aur ultrasound mein istemal hota hai.
lab.p10_echo_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Yaad rakhein 2 se divide karna hai! d = v×t/2 = 1500×0.4/2
lab.p10_echo_practice_q: Ek jahaz sonar pulse bhejta hai. Echo 0.4 s ke baad wapas aata hai. Pani mein awaaz ki speed = 1500 m/s.
lab.p10_echo_practice_q2: Samundar ki teh ki gehrai maloom karein.
lab.p10_echo_real_life: Chamgadad echolocation istemal karte hain — yeh ultrasonic chirps nikaalte hain aur echoes sunte hain. 17 kHz ki awaaz 1 m door patange se 6 ms mein wapas aati hai, jo chamgadad ko andhere mein shikar maloom karne deti hai.
lab.p10_echo_step1_detail: Aap ek sonar operator hain jo samandar ki teh map kar rahe hain. Aap ek powerful ping bhejte hain. Speed = distance / time — awaaz 1500 m/s se pani mein travel karti hai.
lab.p10_echo_step2_detail: Ping samandar ki teh se takra kar wapas aati hai. Total safar wahan AUR wapas: D = 2d. Aap sunte hain, echo ka intezaar karte hain...
lab.p10_echo_step3_detail: Aap ka equipment theek 0.4 seconds measure karta hai ping bhejne aur echo aane ke darmiyan. v = 2d/t matlab 1500 = 2d/0.4. Awaaz ne 600 m ka safar kiya.
lab.p10_echo_step4_detail: d = v × t / 2 = 1500 × 0.4 / 2 = 300 m. 2 se is liye divide karte hain kyunki awaaz neeche AUR upar gayi! Yahi formula ocean floor map karta hai, submarines detect karta hai, aur ultrasound images banata hai.
lab.p10_echo_subtitle: Basic speed se ultrasound depth formula ka derivation.
lab.p10_elecenergy_correct_fb: Sahi! 0.5 kWh. Yeh taqreeban 1.8 MJ energy hai.
lab.p10_elecenergy_final_desc: Energy = Power × Time — aap kitni bijli istemal karte hain
lab.p10_elecenergy_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. E = P × t = 100 × 5 = 500 Wh. 1000 se divide karke kWh mein tabdeel karein.
lab.p10_elecenergy_practice_q: Ek 100W light bulb 5 ghante chalta hai. Yeh kitni energy kWh mein consume karta hai?
lab.p10_elecenergy_real_life: Ek typical ghar rozana takreeban 10 kWh istemal karta hai. Ye 36 MJ electrical energy hai! Aapki chhat par solar panels takreeban 1 kWh peak sunlight per square meter generate karte hain.
lab.p10_elecenergy_step1_detail: Power batati hai ke kitni tezi se energy istemal ho rahi hai. 2000W AC 2000 J per second energy consume karta hai. Jitni der chalta hai, utni zyada energy consume karta hai.
lab.p10_elecenergy_step2_detail: P = E/t, is liye E = P × t. Agar aap AC 1 ghante (3600 s) chalate hain, E = 2000 × 3600 = 7,200,000 J. Yeh bahut zyada energy hai!
lab.p10_elecenergy_step3_detail: Kyunki P = V × I, hum likh sakte hain E = V × I × t. Ek 2000W AC jo 240V par chalta hai wo I = P/V = 2000/240 = 8.33 A khinchta hai. E = VIt = 240 × 8.33 × 3600 = 7.2 MJ.
lab.p10_elecenergy_step4_detail: E = VIt. Yeh voltage, current, aur time ko ek formula mein electrical energy ke liye milata hai. 1 kilowatt-hour (kWh) = 3.6 MJ. Aapka electricity bill kWh istemal par mabni hota hai.
lab.p10_elecenergy_subtitle: Power aur time se energy derive karna
lab.p10_escope_angle: Deflection angle θ lagbhag leaf par charge ke square ke proportional hota hai.
lab.p10_escope_conduction: Deflection angle θ lagbhag leaf par charge ke square ke proportional hota hai.
lab.p10_escope_correct_fb: Sahi! Positive rod electrons ko disc ki taraf khenchti hai, leaf ko kam negative chhorti hai, is liye repulsion (aur angle) ghatta hai.
lab.p10_escope_ground_btn: Electroscope ko ground karein (Net Charge Reset)
lab.p10_escope_hint: Kya hota hai electrons ke saath leaf par jab positive rod disc ke paas layi jati hai?
lab.p10_escope_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Simulation try karein! Electroscope ko negative charge dein, phir positive rod ko paas layein.
lab.p10_escope_induction: Agar rod disc ko touch karti hai (<mazboot>Conduction</mazboot>), electrons transfer hote hain, electroscope permanently charged ho jata hai.
lab.p10_escope_no_data: Abhi tak koi data record nahi hua.
lab.p10_escope_q: Ek neutral electroscope ko negative charged rod touch karti hai, phir rod hata li jati hai. Ek positive charged rod disc ke paas layi jati hai (bina touch kiye). Kya leaf angle barhta hai, ghatta hai, ya wahi rehta hai?
lab.p10_escope_subtitle: Induction aur conduction ke zariye electric charge detect karein.
lab.p10_escope_theory: Electroscope charge detect karta hai. Jab charged rod brass disc ke paas layi jati hai, yeh charge separation induce karta hai (<mazboot>Induction</mazboot>). Electrons repel ya attract hote hain, gold leaf ko net charge dete hain jo stem se repel karta hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_adjust_desc: Asal aur zahiri expansion dekhne ke liye expansion coefficients ko adjust karein.
lab.p10_expLiq_correct_fb: Sahi! 1.45×10⁻⁴/°C. Real expansion hamesha apparent se bara hota hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_practice_q: Ek liquid ka apparent expansion γ_a = 1.2×10⁻⁴/°C hai. Glass expansion γ_g = 2.5×10⁻⁵/°C hai. γ_r dhoondhein.
lab.p10_expLiq_real_life: Thermometers mercury ya alcohol expansion ka istemal karte hain — 1°C ka izafa narrow capillary mein liquid ko expand karta hai. Mercury thermometers -39°C se 357°C tak kaam karte hain.
lab.p10_expLiq_step1_detail: Garmiyon ke din, aap outdoor thermometer check karte hain. Laal liquid glass tube mein oopar chadhti hai. Lekin glass bhi phailta hai — aap sirf APPARENT expansion dekh rahe hain.
lab.p10_expLiq_step2_detail: Gamma-r = Gamma-a + Gamma-g. Liquid ka asal expansion (Gamma-r) wo hai jo aap observe karte hain (Gamma-a) plus glass flask ka expansion (Gamma-g). Glass kuch liquid ke asal expansion ko chhupata hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_step3_detail: γ_r hamesha γ_a se bada hota hai. Glass container bhi barhta hai, liquid ke liye extra jagah banata hai.
lab.p10_expLiq_title: Derivation: Liquid ki Real vs Apparent Expansion
lab.p10_halflife_def: Half-life (T_½) wo waqt hai jo ek sample mein radioactive nuclei ka aadha hissa decay hone ke liye chahiye hota hai.
lab.p10_halflife_incorrect_fb: ✗ Ghalat. Ishara: 800 se 100 tak janay ke liye kitni half-lives chahiye?
lab.p10_halflife_q: Ek radioactive sample 800 atoms se shuru hota hai. Bilkul 12 seconds baad, ek detector 100 active atoms ginta hai. Is isotope ki half-life seconds mein kya hai?
lab.p10_halflife_subtitle: Radioactive decay curves ka quantitative analysis.
lab.p10_halflife_theory: Radioactive decay ek random amal hai. Decay ki rate active nuclei N ki tadaad ke proportional hoti hai jo baqi hain:
lab.p10_linExp_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein dekhne ke liye rods temperature ke saath kaise phailti hain.
lab.p10_linExp_correct_fb: Sahi! 7.2 mm. 1 km rail par, yeh 36 cm hai — isliye expansion gaps hote hain!
lab.p10_linExp_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. ΔL = α × L₀ × ΔT. ΔT = 45-15 = 30°C.
lab.p10_linExp_practice_q: Steel rail 20 m lamba 15°C par. Garmiyon mein 45°C. α = 1.2×10⁻⁵/°C. Kitna phailta hai?
lab.p10_linExp_real_life: Railway tracks mein expansion gaps hote hain — steel 0.012 mm/m/°C tak phailta hai. 40°C din par 1 km track sardi ke muqable mein 12 cm lamba ho jata hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step1_detail: Garmiyon ke din, train tracks heat se buckle ho sakte hain. Lambai mein tabdeeli asli length aur temperature tabdeeli ke proportional hoti hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step1_label: Lambai mein tabdeeli Proportional hoti hai
lab.p10_linExp_step2_detail: Engineers buckling se bachne ke liye expansion joints ka istemal karte hain. α, linear expansion ka coefficient hai. Steel ka α = 1.2e-5 per °C hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step3_detail: α = ΔL/(L₀·ΔT). 100 m rail jo 15°C se 45°C tak garam hoti hai, 3.6 cm tak phailti hai.
lab.p10_linExp_step3_label: α ke liye dobara Arrange karein
lab.p10_linExp_step4_detail: L = L₀(1 + α·ΔT). Invar mushkil se phailta hai — precision instruments mein istemal hota hai.
lab.p10_linExp_subtitle: α, linear thermal expansion ka coefficient maloom karna.
lab.p10_logic_desc: MYSTERY GATE ko select karein aur mukhtalif inputs test karein taake iski truth table bana sakein.
lab.p10_logic_subtitle: Mukhtalif logic gates ko test karein aur continuous voltages ke sath unki truth tables observe karein.
lab.p10_logic_theory: Real electronic circuits mein, logic gates continuous voltages ko process karte hain. TTL (Transistor-Transistor Logic) specific voltage thresholds define karta hai.
lab.p10_logic_theory2: HIGH (1): 2.0V aur 5.0V ke darmiyan | LOW (0): 0.0V aur 0.8V ke darmiyan | Undefined: 0.8V aur 2.0V ke darmiyan
lab.p10_lorentz_correct_fb: Sahi! Aap ne m = {m} kg maloom kiya.
lab.p10_lorentz_desc: Na maloom mass m calculate karein. I aur tan(θ) ka slope = (B·L)/(m·g). g = 9.81 m/s² istemal karein.
lab.p10_lorentz_mystery_btn: Na maloom Mass maloom karne ka Challenge
lab.p10_lorentz_subtitle: Ek uniform magnetic field mein current-carrying wire par magnetic force measure karein.
lab.p10_lorentz_theory1: Ek wire jiski lambai L hai aur jo current I ko magnetic field B mein carry karta hai, magnetic force Fm ka samna karta hai:
lab.p10_lorentz_theory2: Jab wire mass m ke pendulum ki tarah latakti hai, gravity usay neeche khenchti hai. Equilibrium par angle θ:
lab.p10_lorentz_title: Unit 17: Lorentz Force aur DC Motor Principle
lab.p10_mag_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein taake dono methods se magnification dekh sakein.
lab.p10_mag_correct_fb: Sahi! I = 4 cm (ulta). M = -2 matlab dogna lamba aur inverted!
lab.p10_mag_final_desc: Magnification = Image ki oonchai / Object ki oonchai = Image ka fasla / Object ka fasla
lab.p10_mag_incorrect_fb: M = q/p = 30/15 = 2. Image ki oonchai = M×O = 2×2 = 4 cm
lab.p10_mag_practice_q: 2 cm object 15 cm door concave mirror se. Image 30 cm aage banti hai. Magnification aur image ki oonchai maloom karein.
lab.p10_mag_real_life: Microscopes do lenses istemal karte hain — objective magnified asli image banata hai, eyepiece isay mazeed magnify karta hai. Compound microscopes 1000× magnification hasil karte hain.
lab.p10_mag_step1_detail: Aap magnifying glass se ek choti antique watch dekh rahe hain. Magnification M = I/O. Lens choti cheez ko bara dikhata hai.
lab.p10_mag_step1_label: Ray Diagram aur Similar Triangles se
lab.p10_mag_step2_detail: Ray diagram geometry se, similar triangles M = q/p dikhate hain. Lens ek virtual image banata hai jo aapka dimagh bara samajhta hai.
lab.p10_mag_step3_detail: M = I/O = q/p. Concave mirror ke liye, q real images ke liye manfi hota hai.
lab.p10_mag_subtitle: Geometry se M = I/O = q/p derive karna
lab.p10_magfield_correct_fb: Sahi! Aap ne m = {m} A·m² maloom kiya.
lab.p10_magfield_desc: Apne B vs 1/x³ graph ka slope calculate karein taake na maloom magnetic moment maloom ho sake. Slope = 0.2 × m.
lab.p10_magfield_formula_desc: Jahan m magnetic moment hai aur μ₀/4π = 10⁻⁷ T·m/A hai. Hamara magnetometer field ko microteslas (μT) mein measure karta hai.
lab.p10_magfield_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Apna slope calculation check karein.
lab.p10_magfield_no_data: Abhi tak koi data record nahi.
lab.p10_magfield_subtitle: Magnetic dipole ki axial line par inverse-cube law ka jaiza lein.
lab.p10_magfield_theory: Ek choti bar magnet (magnetic dipole) ki axial line par magnetic field B uske markaz se faaslay x par hai:
lab.p10_magfield_title: Unit 17: Magnetic Field of a Dipole
lab.p10_ohm_formula2: Voltage (V) aur Current (I) ka graph plot karne se, line of best fit ka gradient (slope) Resistance (R) ko darshata hai.
lab.p10_ohm_subtitle: V-I graph plot kar ke na maloom resistance maloom karein.
lab.p10_ohm_theory: Ohm's Law kehta hai ke ohmic conductor mein current (I) voltage (V) ke direct proportional hota hai.
lab.p10_ohm_valid_number: Meharbani kar ke ek valid number darj karein.
lab.p10_par_adjust_desc: Parallel equivalent dekhne ke liye resistors adjust karein.
lab.p10_par_correct_fb: Sahi! 50Ω. Do equal resistors parallel mein aadhi value dete hain.
lab.p10_par_final_desc: Parallel resistances ke liye reciprocals jorte hain.
lab.p10_par_practice_q: Do resistors 100Ω aur 100Ω parallel mein. Equivalent resistance maloom karein.
lab.p10_par_real_life: Ghar ki wiring parallel hoti hai taake har outlet ko 230V milay. Ek appliance hatane se doosron par farq nahi parta.
lab.p10_par_step1_detail: Aap switch dabate hain aur light jalti hai. Doosra lamp lagayein — dono chamakte hain kyunki woh parallel hain. Total current branches mein taqseem hota hai.
lab.p10_par_step1_label: Branches mein Current jama hota hai
lab.p10_par_step2_detail: Har branch ke liye Ohm's law istemal karte hue: V/Req = V/R₁ + V/R₂ + V/R₃. Voltage tamaam parallel components par same rehta hai.
lab.p10_par_step3_detail: V se divide karein: 1/Req = 1/R₁ + 1/R₂ + 1/R₃. Do 100Ω resistors ke liye: 1/Req = 2/100, toh Req = 50Ω. Raste (paths) barhane se resistance kam hoti hai.
lab.p10_photon_adjust_desc: Frequency adjust karein taake photon ki energy aur momentum dekh sakein.
lab.p10_photon_correct_fb: Sahi! 3.61×10⁻¹⁹ J (2.25 eV). Photon ki energy insani scale par bohat choti hoti hai!
lab.p10_photon_final_desc: Photon energy aur momentum Planck aur de Broglie se.
lab.p10_photon_practice_q: Green light f = 5.45×10¹⁴ Hz. h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴. Photon energy maloom karein.
lab.p10_photon_real_life: Remote controls 940 nm infrared LEDs istemal karte hain — har photon 2.1×10⁻¹⁹ J energy rakhta hai. Aap ka TV hazaron per second detect karta hai.
lab.p10_photon_step1_detail: Max Planck ne maloom kiya ke light chotey packets mein aati hai jinhe photons kehte hain. E = hf — har photon ki energy Planck constant aur frequency ka multiple hoti hai.
lab.p10_photon_step2_detail: Light ke liye c = fλ toh f = c/λ. Red light (700nm) ki frequency kam hoti hai. UV light (380nm se kam) ki frequency zyada hoti hai — zyada energetic photons.
lab.p10_photon_subtitle: E = hf = hc/λ aur p = h/λ ka derivation.
lab.p10_potDiv_adjust_desc: Resistors adjust karein taake dekh sakein voltage kaise divide hota hai.
lab.p10_potDiv_final_desc: Output voltage resistances ke ratio par depend karta hai.
lab.p10_potDiv_practice_q: 9V battery R₁=1kΩ, R₂=500Ω. R₂ ke across V_out kya hai?
lab.p10_potDiv_real_life: Audio equipment mein volume knobs potential dividers hote hain — sliding contact resistive track par chalti hai, aur awaz ko control karti hai.
lab.p10_potDiv_step1_detail: Aap speakers par volume knob ghumate hain. Andar potentiometer hai — ek variable resistor jo voltage divide karta hai.
lab.p10_potDiv_step2_detail: Jo voltage aap chahte hain woh R₂ ke across hai. Ohm ke law se: V_out = I × R₂.
lab.p10_potDiv_step3_detail: V_out = R₂/(R₁+R₂) × V_in. Voltage resistance ke ratio ke mutabiq taqseem hota hai. Knob ghumayein — volume badalta hai!
lab.p10_potDiv_subtitle: V_out = R₂/(R₁+R₂) × V_in ka derivation karna.
lab.p10_power_correct_fb: Sahi! I = 6.25 A. Is liye kettles ko moti taar ki zaroorat hoti hai — yeh zyada current draw karte hain!
lab.p10_power_final_desc: Power = Voltage × Current — circuit mein energy transfer ki rate.
lab.p10_power_practice_q: Ek 1.5 kW kettle 240 V par chalta hai. Yeh kitna current draw karta hai?
lab.p10_power_real_life: Power companies kilowatt-hours (kWh) ka charge karti hain. 1 kWh = 3.6 MJ. Ek 100W bulb jo 10 ghante tak chalta rehta hai wo 1 kWh istemal karta hai. Aapka monthly bill = total kWh × rate.
lab.p10_power_step1_detail: Power aapko batata hai ke electrical energy kitni tezi se istemal ho rahi hai. Ek 60W bulb har second 60 J electrical energy ko light aur heat mein tabdeel karta hai. Power = Energy / Time — energy transfer ki rate.
lab.p10_power_step2_detail: Voltage V per unit charge energy hai: V = E/Q. Ek volt ka matlab hai 1 J energy per coulomb charge. Ek 12V battery har flow karne waley coulomb ko 12 J energy deti hai.
lab.p10_power_step3_detail: Current I per second flow hone wala charge hai: I = Q/t. Ek ampere = 1 coulomb per second. Jo total charge flow karta hai wo energy carry karta hai jo tabdeel hoti hai.
lab.p10_power_step4_detail: P = E/t = (V × Q)/t = V × (Q/t) = V × I. Power = Voltage × Current. Ek 60W bulb 120V par I = P/V = 0.5 A khinchta hai. Aapka phone charger 5V, 2A par 10W power deta hai.
lab.p10_power_subtitle: Voltage aur current ki definition se power formula derive karna.
lab.p10_radDecay_adjust_desc: Half-life aur time adjust karein taake exponential decay dekh sakein.
lab.p10_radDecay_final_desc: Radioactive nuclei ke liye exponential decay law.
lab.p10_radDecay_practice_q: Sample 800 nuclei se shuru hota hai, half-life=5 saal. 15 saal baad kitne bachenge?
lab.p10_radDecay_real_life: Smoke detectors mein americium-241 hota hai (432-year half-life). Yeh hawa ko ionize karta hai; smoke is current ko disrupt karta hai, aur alarm bajta hai.
lab.p10_radDecay_step1_detail: Ek purani lakdi ka artifact mila. Carbon-14 dating jawab deta hai. Ek half-life (5,730 saal) ke baad, aadhe reh jatay hain: N₁ = ½ N₀.
lab.p10_radDecay_step2_detail: Do half-lives (11,460 saal) ke baad, sirf ek chauthai bachti hai: N₂ = (½)² N₀.
lab.p10_radDecay_step3_detail: n half-lives ke baad: N = (½)ⁿ N₀ = N₀/2ⁿ. Yeh exponential decay hai.
lab.p10_radDecay_step4_detail: N = N₀/2^(t/T½). Agar tool ke paas asal C-14 ka 25% hai, toh n = 2 half-lives = 11,460 saal purana.
lab.p10_radDecay_subtitle: Exponential decay law N = N₀/2ⁿ derive karna.
lab.p10_resist_adjust_desc: Wire ki properties adjust karein taake resistivity ko amal mein dekh sakein.
lab.p10_resist_correct_fb: Sahi! 1.68×10⁻⁸ Ω·m — copper ki resistivity, electrical wiring ke liye standard hai!
lab.p10_resist_practice_q: Copper wire 5m lamba, A=1×10⁻⁶ m², R=0.084Ω. Resistivity maloom karein.
lab.p10_resist_real_life: Heating elements nichrome (ρ=1.1×10⁻⁶ Ω·m) ka istemal karte hain — high resistivity bijli ko garmi mein tabdeel karti hai. Copper (ρ=1.7×10⁻⁸) current ko bina garam kiye flow hone deta hai.
lab.p10_resist_step1_detail: Electrician naye ghar mein wiring karta hai. R ∝ L/A. Lambi wires zyada resist karti hain; moti wires kam.
lab.p10_resist_step1_label: Resistance Geometry par depend karti hai
lab.p10_resist_step2_detail: R = ρ × L/A. ρ resistivity hai — material ki andaruni rukawat current ke liye. Copper ki ρ = 1.68×10⁻⁸ Ω·m.
lab.p10_resist_step3_detail: ρ = R × A / L. Silver ki resistivity sabse kam hai (1.59×10⁻⁸) lekin yeh bohat mehngi hai. Copper practical champion hai.
lab.p10_resist_step3_label: Resistivity ke liye dobara Arrange karein
lab.p10_resist_subtitle: Resistance aur geometry se resistivity derive karna.
lab.p10_ser_adjust_desc: Resistors adjust karein taake series equivalent dekh sakein.
lab.p10_ser_correct_fb: Sahi! 1000Ω. Current I = 10/1000 = 10 mA teeno mein se guzray ga.
lab.p10_ser_final_desc: Series mein tamaam resistances ka majmoa
lab.p10_ser_practice_q: Teen resistors 200Ω, 300Ω, 500Ω series mein 10V battery ke saath lagay hain. Total resistance maloom karein.
lab.p10_ser_real_life: Purani Christmas lights series mein hoti hain aur ek bulb kharab hone par sab band ho jati hain — kharab bulb current ka wahid raasta tor deta hai.
lab.p10_ser_step1_detail: Purani Christmas lights yaad hain jahan EK bulb kharab hone se POORI string band ho jati hai? Yeh series wiring hoti hai. V = V₁ + V₂ + V₃.
lab.p10_ser_step2_detail: Ohm's law ka istemal karte hue: I×Req = I×R₁ + I×R₂ + I×R₃. Har bulb mein same current flow karta hai — kyunki sirf ek raasta hota hai.
lab.p10_ser_step3_detail: Req = R₁ + R₂ + R₃. Teen 100Ω bulbs series mein 300Ω total detey hain. Zyada bulbs = zyada resistance = har bulb halka (dim) jalay ga.
lab.p10_ser_subtitle: R_eq = R₁ + R₂ + R₃ ko series ke liye derive karna.
lab.p10_shElec_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein taake electrical calorimetry se specific heat maloom ho sake.
lab.p10_shElec_correct_fb: Sahi! ~780 J/kg·K — vegetable oils ke liye typical hai!
lab.p10_shElec_final_desc: Electrical heating se liquid ki specific heat.
lab.p10_shElec_incorrect_fb: c_l = (VIt - m_c c_c ΔT) / (m_l ΔT) istemal karein.
lab.p10_shElec_practice_q: Ek 12V, 3A heater 150s tak calorimeter (m_c=0.08kg, c_c=900) mein chalta hai jis mein 0.3kg liquid hai. Temperature 22°C se 42°C tak badhta hai. Specific heat maloom karein.
lab.p10_shElec_real_life: Electric kettle 1L water 20°C se 100°C tak garam karne mein 336,000 J leta hai. 2000W par, taqreeban 168 seconds lagte hain.
lab.p10_shElec_step1_detail: Aap ek electric kettle bhartey hain aur usay on kartey hain. Heating element electrical energy ko heat mein tabdeel karta hai: Q_heater = V×I×t.
lab.p10_shElec_step1_label: Heater ki taraf se di gayi Energy
lab.p10_shElec_step2_detail: Heat pani aur metal calorimeter dono ko garam karti hai: Q_heater = m_l c_l ΔT + m_c c_c ΔT.
lab.p10_shElec_step2_label: Liquid + Calorimeter ne jo Heat gain ki
lab.p10_shElec_step3_detail: c_l = (VIt - m_c c_c ΔT) / (m_l ΔT). Calorimeter ka hissa subtract karein, pani ke mass aur temperature mein izafay se divide karein.
lab.p10_shElec_subtitle: Electrical heating aur calorimetry ka istemal karte hue c_l derive karna.
lab.p10_shMix_adjust_desc: Values adjust karein taake dekh sakein calorimetry specific heat kaise maloom karti hai.
lab.p10_shMix_correct_fb: Sahi! ~386 J/kg·K — yeh copper se match karta hai!
lab.p10_shMix_final_desc: Mixture method se solid ki specific heat.
lab.p10_shMix_incorrect_fb: c_s = (m_w c_w + m_c c_c)(T₃ - T₁) / (m_s(T₂ - T₃)) istemal karein.
lab.p10_shMix_practice_q: 0.2kg metal 90°C par 0.15kg pani 25°C mein dala. Calorimeter: 0.08kg, c_c=900. Aakhri temperature=28°C. c_s maloom karein.
lab.p10_shMix_real_life: Chemistry labs mein calorimetry yahi principle istemal karti hai — maloom masses ko maloom temperatures par mila kar na maloom material ki specific heat maloom karna.
lab.p10_shMix_step1_detail: Aap chai bana rahay hain. Garam pani mein thanda doodh milayein. Heat lost = heat gained.
lab.p10_shMix_step2_detail: Q_s = m_s c_s (T₂ - T₃). Garam solid thanda hota hai, heat lose karta hai.
lab.p10_shMix_step3_detail: Q_w + Q_c = (m_w c_w + m_c c_c)(T₃ - T₁). Dono liquid aur container Heat absorb karte hain.
lab.p10_shMix_step3_label: Water + Calorimeter ne kitni Heat haasil ki
lab.p10_shMix_step4_detail: c_s = (m_w c_w + m_c c_c)(T₃ - T₁) / (m_s (T₂ - T₃)). Sab values lab mein napne ke qabil hain.
lab.p10_shMix_subtitle: Calorimetry aur Energy ka conservation istemal karte hue c_s derive karna.
lab.p10_shMix_title: Derivation: Specific Heat (Mix karne ka tareeqa)
lab.p10_tempCo_adjust_desc: Temperature Coefficient maloom karne ke liye values adjust karein.
lab.p10_tempCo_correct_fb: Sahi! 0.0039/°C. Copper ki Resistance har °C par 0.39% barhti hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_practice_q: Copper ki ρ₀=1.68×10⁻⁸ 20°C par. 70°C par ρ_T=2.01×10⁻⁸ hai. α maloom karein.
lab.p10_tempCo_real_life: Incandescent bulbs ki thandi Resistance ~40Ω hoti hai lekin garam Resistance ~400Ω hoti hai — switch on hone par current ke dabao ko 10 gunna izafa wazeh karta hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step1_detail: Aapka phone thande din mein jaldi band ho jata hai. Resistance Temperature ke sath badalta hai. Resistivity mein tabdeeli ibtidai Resistivity × ΔT ke mutanasib hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step1_label: Temperature ke sath Resistivity badalti hai
lab.p10_tempCo_step2_detail: ρ_T - ρ₀ = α ρ₀ ΔT. Copper ke liye α positive hai — garam hone par Resistance BARHTA hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step3_detail: α = (ρ_T - ρ₀)/(ρ₀ ΔT). Copper ka α = 0.0039/°C. Ek copper wire jo 50°C tak garam hota hai, uski Resistance 19.5% barh jati hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_step3_label: α ke liye dobara tarteeb dein
lab.p10_tempCo_step4_detail: ρ_T = ρ₀[1 + α(T - T₀)]. Carbon aur semiconductors ka α negative hota hai — jo digital thermometers ke thermistors mein istemal hota hai.
lab.p10_tempCo_subtitle: Resistivity ka Temperature Coefficient α derive karna.
lab.p10_transGain_adjust_desc: Transistor gain dekhne ke liye Currents adjust karein.
lab.p10_transGain_correct_fb: Sahi! β = 200. 0.05 mA 10 mA ko control karta hai — 200 gunna Amplification!
lab.p10_transGain_final_desc: Transistor Current ke talluqat aur gains.
lab.p10_transGain_practice_q: Transistor mein I_B=0.05 mA aur I_C=10 mA. β maloom karein.
lab.p10_transGain_real_life: Sunne wali machines aese Transistors istemal karti hain jinka β 100+ hota hai — ek chota microphone signal (μA) speaker ko mA levels par chalata hai, 100 gunna amplify karta hai.
lab.p10_transGain_step1_detail: Concert mein, gaane wala microphone mein aahista bolta hai aur poora stadium awaz se bhar jata hai. Andar ek chota Transistor awaz ko amplify karta hai. I_E = I_B + I_C.
lab.p10_transGain_step2_detail: β = I_C/I_B. Current gain aam tor par 50-400 hota hai. Chota Base Current baray Collector Current ko control karta hai.
lab.p10_transGain_step3_detail: α = I_C/I_E, hamesha 1 se thoda kam hota hai (0.95-0.99). α = β/(β+1).
lab.p10_transGain_step4_detail: I_C = β × I_B. Agar β=200 ho to Base mein 1μA tabdeeli Collector mein 200μA tabdeeli paida karti hai. Aapka smartphone aisi arbon tabdeeliyan karta hai!
lab.p10_transGain_subtitle: β = I_C/I_B aur α = I_C/I_E ko derive karna.
lab.p10_trans_adjust_desc: Power conservation dekhne ke liye Voltages/Currents adjust karein.
lab.p10_trans_correct_fb: Sahi! 20A. Voltage 10 gunna step down hota hai, Current 10 gunna step up hota hai. 480W = 480W.
lab.p10_trans_final_desc: Ideal Transformers mein Power mehfooz rehti hai
lab.p10_trans_practice_q: Step-down: V_p=240V, I_p=2A, V_s=24V. I_s maloom karein.
lab.p10_trans_real_life: Phone chargers step-down Transformers istemal karte hain — deewar par 230V, USB par 5V ban jata hai. 46:1 ka turns ratio Voltage ko mehfooz had tak kam karta hai.
lab.p10_trans_step1_detail: Power plants 25,000V par power generate karte hain. Transformers isay 500,000V tak step up karte hain. Ek ideal Transformer Power ko mehfooz rakhta hai: Power_in = Power_out.
lab.p10_trans_step2_detail: Dono coils ke liye P = IV: I_p V_p = I_s V_s. High Voltage = low Current = low I²R heating nuqsanat.
lab.p10_trans_step3_detail: I_s = (V_p/V_s) × I_p. Step-down Transformer (500kV→230V) ka V_p/V_s ≈ 2174 hota hai. Current 2174 se zarb khata hai.
lab.p10_trans_step3_label: Secondary Current ke liye hal karein
lab.p10_trans_step4_detail: V_s/V_p = N_s/N_p = I_p/I_s. Voltage ratio turns ratio ke barabar hai, aur Current ratio ke ulat.
lab.p10_trans_subtitle: Power ke mehfooz rehne se I_p V_p = I_s V_s derive karna.
lab.p10_volExp_adjust_desc: Volume Expansion dekhne ke liye values adjust karein.
lab.p10_volExp_correct_fb: Sahi! 0.011 m³ (11 L). Liquids solids se zyada phailti hain!
lab.p10_volExp_practice_q: Ek 0.5 m³ alcohol ka tank 10°C se 30°C tak garam hota hai. β=1.1×10⁻³/°C. ΔV maloom karein.
lab.p10_volExp_real_life: Gaari ke engine ke thermostats mein ek wax pellet hota hai jo Temperature ke sath expand hota hai — 88°C par ye melt ho kar coolant valve kholta hai taake engine ko overheating se bachaya ja sake.
lab.p10_volExp_step1_detail: Garmiyon mein aap ki gaari ke fuel tank ka petrol phailta hai. ΔV ∝ V₀ × ΔT. Petrol pumps iske mutabiq set kiye jate hain.
lab.p10_volExp_step2_detail: ΔV = β V₀ ΔT. β Volumetric Expansion ka Coefficient hai. Petrol ka β ≈ 9.5×10⁻⁴/°C hai.
lab.p10_volExp_step3_detail: β = ΔV/(V₀ ΔT). Isotropic solids ke liye, β ≈ 3α. Volume = L³, is liye agar lambai (1+αΔT) se phailti hai, to Volume taqreeban (1+3αΔT) se expand hota hai.
lab.p10_volExp_step3_label: β ke liye dobara tarteeb dein
lab.p10_volExp_step4_detail: β = 3α. Yahi wajah hai ke garam hawa wale gubaray oopar jate hain — andar ki hawa phailti hai, kam dense hoti hai, aur oopar uthti hai.
lab.p10_volExp_subtitle: Volumetric Expansion ke Coefficient β ko derive karna.
lab.p10_waveeq_correct_fb: Sahi! ~343 m/s. 20°C par hawa mein awaz ki Speed yahi hai!
lab.p10_waveeq_final_desc: Speed = Frequency × Wavelength — tamam waves ke liye universal.
lab.p10_waveeq_practice_q: Ek Sound wave ki f = 440 Hz (middle A) aur λ = 0.78 m hai. Sound ki Speed maloom karein.
lab.p10_waveeq_real_life: Guitar ki string ko 82 Hz (low E) par tune karna jiski lambai 0.65 m ho iska matlab hai wave ki Speed 107 m/s hai. String ko kasne se wave ki Speed barhti hai, Frequency bhi barhti hai — isi tarah guitar ko tune kiya jata hai.
lab.p10_waveeq_step1_detail: Aap samandar ke kinaray hain aur waves ko aate hue dekh rahe hain. Wave Speed = fasla taqseem waqt: v = d/t.
lab.p10_waveeq_step2_detail: Ek mukammal wave cycle mein, wave ek waqt T mein bilkul ek Wavelength tay karti hai. Isey shamil karne se: v = λ/T.
lab.p10_waveeq_step3_detail: Frequency f = 1/T. Zyada Frequency ka matlab hai har second mein zyada waves. Light waves ki Frequencies bohat zyada hoti hain — surkh Light ke liye 5e14 Hz.
lab.p10_waveeq_step4_detail: v = f × λ. Yeh universal Wave Equation hai — yeh SAB waves par lagoo hoti hai. Sound, Light, radio, pani ki waves — sab v = fλ ko manti hain!
lab.p10_waveeq_subtitle: Bunyadi Speed formula se universal Wave Equation derive karna.
lab.p10_waveeq_title: Derivation: Universal Wave Equation v = fλ
lab.p10absorbersreflectors_both_cans_sta: Dono dabbe kamre ke Temperature (20°C) se shuru hote hain. Heater dono taraf barabar Infrared Radiation nikalta hai.
lab.p10absorbersreflectors_different_sur: Mukhtalif satein Thermal Radiation ko mukhtalif raftar se absorb karti hain. Isey test karne ke liye, ek radiant heater ko do metal ke dabbon ke bilkul darmiyan rakha jata hai: ek rangeen
lab.p10absorbersreflectors_incorrect_hin: ✗ Ghalat. Hint: Bunyad 20°C hai, aur yeh 0.2°C fi Watt barhta hai.

lab.p10absorbersreflectors_using_a_heate: 300W ki heater Power istemal karte hue, Matt Black dabba kis zyada se zyada Temperature tak pahuchega? (Farz karein yeh hamesha chalta rehta hai. Qareebi mukammal adad likhein).
lab.p10carbonfootprint_are_found_by_divi: kul emissions ko musafiron ki tadad se taqseem karne se milte hain.
lab.p10carbonfootprint_calculate_the_per: 15 km ke safar ke liye fi musafir CO₂ footprint (kg mein) ka hisab lagayein jab SUV (0.35 kg/km) mein 3 musafir hon.
lab.p10carbonfootprint_combustion_of_fos: Gariyon mein Fossil Fuels jalne se Carbon Dioxide (CO₂) kharij hoti hai, jo ek greenhouse gas hai. Kul emissions teh karda faslay aur gari ke emission factor par munhasir hain.
lab.p10carbonfootprint_incorrect_check_y: Ghalat. Apna hisab check karein: (Fasla × Factor) / Musafir.
lab.p10carbonfootprint_max_capacity_for: is ke liye zyada se zyada capacity
lab.p10convectioncurrents_given_v_kp_c_u: Diya gaya hai v = kP + c, mutanasib constant k (slope) maloom karne ke liye apna data istemal karein. 3 decimal places tak likhein.
lab.p10convectioncurrents_incorrect_hint: ✗ Ghalat. Hint: Do points chunein aur (v2-v1)/(P2-P1) maloom karein.
lab.p10convectioncurrents_is_the_transfe: fluid (liquid ya gas) ke zariye Thermal Energy ki muntaqili hai jisme garam, kam dense hisse oopar ki taraf harkat karte hain.
lab.p10convectioncurrents_set_the_heater: Heater ki Power set karein aur tajarba shuru karein. Jamni rang ka color Convection Current ko dikhata hai. Oopar tak pohanchne mein lagne wala waqt napein.
lab.p10convectioncurrents_when_the_water: Jab beaker ke penday mein pani garam hota hai, yeh phailta hai, iski Density kam hoti hai, aur oopar uthta hai. Thanda, zyada dense pani iski jagah lene ke liye neechay aata hai, jis se ek lagatar Convection cell banta hai.
lab.p10derivationspecificheatelectrical_: Ek 12V, 3A ka heater 150s tak Calorimeter (m_c=0.08 kg, c_c=900 J/kg·K) mein chalta hai jisme 0.3 kg liquid hai. Temperature 22°C se 42°C tak barhta hai.
Electrical Calorimetry se Specific Heat maloom karne ke liye values set karein.

Ek electric kettle 1 liter pani (1 kg) ko 20°C se 100°C tak garam karti hai — 336,000 J chahiye. 2000 W par, isme taqreeban 168 seconds lagte hain: pani ki zyada Specific Heat isay Thermal Energy mehfooz karne ke liye behtareen banati hai.
— vegetable oils ke liye aam hai! Mukhtalif liquids ki Specific Heat mukhtalif hoti hai.

lab.p10latentheat_to_find_the_specific_l: Melting ki Specific Latent Heat (L_f) nikalne ke liye, solid ko puri tarah melt hone mein lagne wala waqt (Δt) napein. Phir: L_f = (P × Δt) / m.

lab.p11_elec_theory_p1: Ek RC circuit ek resistor (R) aur capacitor (C) ko series mein shamil karta hai. Time constant τ = RC yeh tay karta hai ke capacitor kitni jaldi charge ya discharge hota hai.
lab.p11_elec_theory_p2: Charging: V(t) = V₀(1 - e^(-t/τ)). Discharging: V(t) = V₀ × e^(-t/τ).

lab.p12cosmologyclimate_a_galaxy_is_rece: Ek galaxy light ki speed ke 10% par door ja rahi hai (v = 0.1c). Hydrogen Alpha line ki observed wavelength kya hogi (λ_rest = 656 nm)?
lab.p12cosmologyclimate_as_galaxies_move: Jaise jaise galaxies hum se door hoti hain, un ki light waves stretch (red-shift) hoti hain. Relativistic Doppler formula yeh hai:
lab.p12cosmologyclimate_black_lines_obse: Black lines = observed absorption lines. White dashed = rest frame.
lab.p12cosmologyclimate_calculate_the_pe: Ek red dwarf star ki peak wavelength calculate karein jiska surface temperature 3000 K hai.
lab.p12cosmologyclimate_ocean_currents_a: Ocean currents density gradients se chali jati hain jo surface heat aur freshwater fluxes se bante hain. High salinity aur low temperatures water ki density barhate hain, jis se woh doobti hai (downwelling).
lab.p12cosmologyclimate_where_b_2_898_10: jahan b = 2.898 × 10⁻³ m·K. Garam stars neela dikhate hain; thande stars lal dikhate hain.
lab.p12cosmologyclimate_where_v_is_posit: jahan v is musbat ke liye recession.
lab.p12diffraction_1_to_achieve_perfect_: 1. Destructive interference ke zariye perfect noise cancellation achieve karne ke liye, kya phase shift (degrees mein) chahiye?
lab.p12diffraction_2_calculate_the_expec: 2. 650 nm laser ke liye expected y₁ position (meters mein) calculate karein, 400 lines/mm grating aur screen distance L = 2.5 m use kar ke.
lab.p12diffraction_a_peak_aligns_with_a_: , ek peak ek trough ke sath align hota hai, wave ko cancel kar deta hai. Yeh noise-canceling headphones ke peeche ki core principle hai.
lab.p12diffraction_constructive_interfer: Constructive interference screen par bright spots (fringes) banati hai, jo is equation se control hoti hain:
lab.p12diffraction_occurs_when_two_or_mo: tab hota hai jab do ya zyada waves superpose kar ke ek resultant wave banate hain. In
lab.p12diffraction_target_wave_anti_nois: Target Wave + Anti-Noise Wave (180° shifted) = Silence.
lab.p12diffraction_to_find_the_vertical_: Vertical distance find karne ke liye
lab.p12diffraction_use_the_same_principl: roshni ke liye yahi principle use karein. Ek grating mein har millimeter mein hazaron microscopic slits hote hain. Jab roshni is se guzarti hai, to yeh diffract aur interfere karti hai.
lab.p12electricpotential_1_an_eel_has_ex: 1. Ek eel mein exactly 5000 electrocytes series mein connected hain, har ek 0.15V produce karta hai. Total voltage output (V mein) kya hai?
lab.p12electricpotential_2_in_an_rc_circ: 2. RC circuit mein, agar C = 200 μF aur R = 500 Ω, to time constant τ (seconds mein) calculate karein.
lab.p12electricpotential_a_camera_flash_: Camera flash dheere se capacitor charge karta hai (seconds lagata hai) phir low-resistance bulb ke zariye rapidly discharge karta hai (milliseconds lagate hue), intense light ki burst release karta hai.
lab.p12electricpotential_each_cell_acts_: . Har cell ek chhoti battery/capacitor ki tarah act karta hai. Hazaron ko
lab.p12electricpotential_hold_to_charge: Charge karne ke liye hold karein
lab.p12electricpotential_in_circuits_cha: Circuits mein, resistor ke zariye capacitor ko charge ya discharge karna
lab.p12electricpotential_is_a_device_tha: ek device hai jo electrical energy electric field mein store karta hai. Charge ki miqdar
lab.p12electricpotential_takes_time_the_: mein time lagta hai. Rate time constant se determine hoti hai
lab.p12electricpotential_the_electric_ee: Electric eel shocks specialized cells ka istemal kar ke banata hai jinhein
lab.p12electricpotential_the_voltages_ad: , voltages add up ho jate hain, 800V se zyada ke lethal shocks generate karte hain!
lab.p12electricpotential_voltage_across_: Capacitor ke across Voltage (V vs Time)
lab.p12gravitation_a_geostationary_satel: Ek Geostationary satellite ek orbit 24 hours (86400 seconds) mein mukammal karta hai. Required
lab.p12gravitation_an_orbit_where_the_sa: Ek aisi orbit jahan satellite ka orbital period Earth ki rotation (~24 hours) se match karta hai. Yeh aasman mein stationary dikhta hai.
lab.p12gravitation_as_the_firing_velocit: Jaise jaise firing velocity barhti hai, projectile zameen par girne se pehle aur door travel karta hai. Ek khaas
lab.p12gravitation_calculate_the_require: Is altitude par Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite ke liye required orbital velocity calculate karein
lab.p12gravitation_imagine_a_cannon_on_t: Maan lein ek bohot uncha pahaar ke upar ek cannon hai. Agar cannonball ko kam velocity se fire kiya jaye, to woh zameen par wapas gir jata hai.
lab.p12gravitation_in_km_above_earth_s_s: Earth ki satah se km mein. Hint: Kepler's Third Law use karein: T² = (4π²/GM)r³.
lab.p12gravitation_re_h_distance_from_ea: = Re + h (Earth ke center se Distance)
lab.p12gravitation_set_altitude_to_35800: Apni Geostationary calculations visually confirm karne ke liye simulator par altitude 35800 km aur velocity ~3.07 km/s set karein!
lab.p12gravitation_the_curve_of_the_proj: , projectile ke raaste ka curve Earth ki curvature se match karta hai — yeh continuously girta hai lekin kabhi zameen par nahi lagta!
lab.p12gravitation_try_again_check_units: Dobara koshish karein. Units check karein (km vs m).
lab.p12gravitation_use_re_6371_km_gm_3_9: . Re = 6371 km, GM = 3.986×10¹⁴ m³/s² use karein. (km/s mein convert karein).
lab.p12medicalimaging_10_s_if_the_speed_: (10⁻⁴ s). Agar tissue mein sound ki speed 1540 m/s hai, to boundary kitni gehri hai? (Jawab cm mein)
lab.p12medicalimaging_an_ultrasound_puls: Ek ultrasound pulse wapas aata hai
lab.p12medicalimaging_an_x_ray_beam_pass: Ek X-ray beam 3 cm bone se guzarta hai (μ = 0.5 cm⁻¹). Maan lein koi muscle nahi, to initial intensity ka kitna percentage transmit hota hai?
lab.p12medicalimaging_ultrasound_uses_hi: Ultrasound high-frequency sound waves (1-10 MHz) use karta hai jo piezoelectric crystals se banti hain. Yeh waves tissue se guzarti hain (v ≈ 1540 m/s) aur alag acoustic impedances wale boundaries par partially reflect hoti hain.
lab.p12medicalimaging_x_rays_are_electro: X-rays high energy wali electromagnetic waves hain. Jab yeh matter se guzarti hain, to absorb aur scatter hoti hain. Dense materials (jaise bone mein calcium) ke higher attenuation coefficients (μ) hote hain.
lab.p12quantumnuclear_e_g_boron_cadmium_: (jaise, Boron, Cadmium) chain reaction rate control karne ke liye neutrons absorb karte hain.
lab.p12quantumnuclear_if_your_reactor_op: Agar aap ka reactor continuously 1.0 GW (10⁹ W) par chal raha hai, to har second mein kitni mass pure energy mein convert hoti hai? (Jawab
lab.p12quantumnuclear_in_a_pet_scan_a_po: PET scan mein, ek positron aur electron annihilate hote hain. Total energy of the two gamma rays calculate karein
lab.p12quantumnuclear_nuclear_power_harn: Nuclear power U-235 ki induced fission se release hone wali energy ka istemal karta hai. Neutrons nucleus se takrate hain, use daughter nuclei mein split karte hain aur 2-3 fast neutrons plus energy (E=mc²) release karte hain.
lab.p12quantumnuclear_positron_emission_: Positron Emission Tomography (PET) antimatter par rely karti hai. Ek tracer positron (e⁺) emit karta hai, jo ek electron (e⁻) ke sath annihilate ho jata hai. Puri mass do gamma rays mein convert ho jati hai jo opposite directions mein travel karti hain: E = 2m_e c².
lab.p12quantumnuclear_slows_down_fast_ne: Fast neutrons ko thermal speeds tak slow karta hai takay yeh fission induce kar sakein.
lab.p12shm_a_car_suspension_system_uses_: Car suspension system springs aur shock absorbers (dampers) use karta hai takay vehicle ko road bumps se isolate kiya ja sake.
lab.p12shm_correct_c_12_649_ns_m_try_set: Sahi! c ≈ 12,649 Ns/m. Simulator mein yeh set karein aur bump hit karein!
lab.p12shm_correct_f_510_hz_set_the_simu: Sahi! f = 510 Hz. Simulator ko 510 Hz par set karein aur 3 antinodes dekhein!
lab.p12shm_for_a_closed_tube_of_length_l: L = 1.0 m ki closed tube ke liye, frequency calculate karein jo
lab.p12shm_is_a_pipe_filled_with_flammab: flammable gas se bhara pipe hai, jisme upar ki taraf holes drill kiye gaye hain. Ek end par speaker sound waves banata hai. Resonant frequencies par drive karne par, standing pressure waves ban jati hain.
lab.p12shm_is_the_speed_of_sound_340_m_s: sound ki speed (~340 m/s) hai, aur
lab.p12shm_is_the_tube_length_at_resonan: tube length hai. Resonance par, pressure antinodes par gas tez bah ti hai, jis se lambi flames banti hain!
lab.p12shm_standing_wave_assume_the_spee: standing wave. Maan lein sound ki speed v = 340 m/s hai.
lab.p12shm_system_returns_to_equilibrium: System jitna jaldi mumkin ho equilibrium par wapas aata hai bina oscillate kiye. Cars ke liye ideal!
lab.p12shm_try_again_f_n_n_v_2l: koshish karna phir se. f_n = n(v/2L).
lab.p12shm_try_again_use_c_2_mk: Dobara koshish karein. c = 2√(mk) use karein.
lab.p12shm_when_two_identical_waves_trav: Jab do identical waves opposite directions mein travel karti hain aur interfere karti hain, to yeh ek
lab.p12shm_without_dampers_the_car_would: Dampers ke bina, car endlessly bounce karti (Simple Harmonic Motion). Dampers energy dissipate karte hain, aam taur par heat ki shakal mein, time ke sath amplitude kam karte hain.
lab.p12solarcell_band_gap_is_absorbed_ex: (band gap) absorb hota hai, ek electron ko valence se conduction band mein excite karta hai. E = hc/λ, is liye λ ≤ 1240/E
lab.p12solarcell_design_a_solar_cell_tha: Ek aisa solar cell design karein jo cost, temperature stability, aur environmental impact ko dekhte hue efficiency maximize kare. Photon absorption ki physics ko real-world engineering constraints ke sath balance karein.
lab.p12solarcell_electrons_flow_through_: Electrons external circuit se flow karte hain, electrical work karte hain. Voltage band gap se limited hota hai.
lab.p12solarcell_in_deep_dive_mode_consi: Deep-dive mode mein, perovskite-silicon tandems ya thin-film CIGS optimization par real research papers consider karein.
lab.p12solarcell_q1_calculate_the_maximu: Q1: Is solar cell ki maximum wavelength (nm) calculate karein jo yeh absorb kar sakta hai.
lab.p12solarcell_q2_estimate_the_maximum: Q2: Apne chosen material ke liye maximum theoretical efficiency (%) estimate karein.
lab.p12solarcell_the_built_in_electric_f: p-n junction par built-in electric field electron-hole pair ko recombine hone se pehle separate karti hai.
lab.p12solarcell_which_material_would_yo: Aap kaun sa material choose karenge, aur kya optimizations apply karenge (thickness, anti-reflective coating, tandem structure)?
lab.p12solarcell_your_solar_cell_company: Aap ki solar cell company ko mass production ke liye EK material choose karna hai. Efficiency, cost, temperature stability, aur environmental impact consider karein.
lab.p12thermomechanics_at_extremely_low_: Bhoot hi kam temperatures par, kuch materials phase transition se guzarte hain jahan un ki electrical resistance bilkul zero ho jati hai.
lab.p12thermomechanics_electron_degenera: , electron degeneracy pressure fail ho jati hai, aur yeh neutron star ya black hole mein collapse ho jata hai.
lab.p12thermomechanics_for_levitation_th: Levitation ke liye, magnetic force F_m gravitational force (m·g) ke barabar honi chahiye.
lab.p12thermomechanics_no_two_electrons_: Do electrons same quantum state occupy nahi kar sakte. Jaise jaise gravity star ko daba ti hai, electrons higher energy states mein push ho jate hain, bohot zyada
lab.p12thermomechanics_subrahmanyan_chan: Subrahmanyan Chandrasekhar ne determine kiya ke ek white dwarf apne aap ko support nahi kar sakta agar is ki mass ek khaas limit se zyada ho. Simulation ke mutabiq, kis exact mass (M_sun mein) par star bilkul collapse ho jata hai?
lab.p12thermomechanics_superconductors_e: Superconductors apne interior se magnetic fields expel karte hain. Yeh perfectly diamagnetic behavior unhein permanent magnets ke upar stably levitate karne ki ijazat deta hai, jo Maglev trains mein use hota hai.
lab.p12thermomechanics_to_levitate_a_tra: 50,000 kg mass wali train ko 50 m² area ke upar levitate karne ke liye, magnetic pressure P = F/A gravity ki pressure ke barabar honi chahiye. P = B² / 2μ₀ (jahan μ₀ = 4π × 10⁻⁷ T·m/A) aur g = 9.8 m/s² diya gaya hai. Required Magnetic Field (B) milliTesla (mT) mein calculate karein.
lab.p12thermomechanics_unlike_normal_obj: Normal objects ke ulat, white dwarf mein mass add karne se yeh
lab.p12thermomechanics_when_a_medium_siz: Jab ek medium-sized star apna nuclear fuel khatam kar leta hai, to woh apni gravity ke under collapse ho kar White Dwarf ban jata hai.
lab.p9_density_correct_fb: Behtareen! Density {d} g/cm³ hai. Is ki bunyad par, material shayad {material} hai.
lab.p9_density_density_error: Measurements sahi hain, lekin aap ka calculated density ghalat hai. ρ = m / (V2 - V1) istemal karein.
lab.p9_density_hint: ρ = m / V. Volume = V2 - V1 (displacement). Cylinder V1=50 mL se shuru hota hai.
lab.p9_density_measure_error: Aapke raw measurements (Mass, V1, ya V2) ghalat hain. Balance aur cylinder readings ko dhyan se check karein.
lab.p9_density_theory: Density ek substance ka mass per unit volume hota hai. ρ = m / V. Ek irregular solid ki density dhoondne ke liye: Iska mass (m) electronic balance se measure karo. Measuring cylinder mein initial water volume (V1) measure karo. Solid ko poori tarah immerse karo. Final water volume (V2) measure karo. Solid ka volume V = V2 - V1 hai. Note: 1 mL paani = 1 cm³ volume.
lab.p9_everyday_concept1: Jab object giraaya jata hai, gravity usay taqreeban 9.8 m/s² se accelerate karti hai. Oonchai aur time ka talluq: h = ½gt².
lab.p9_everyday_concept2: Pendulum aage peeche jhoolta hai. Ek mukammal jhoolay ka waqt (Period, T) sirf us ki length aur gravity par munsar hai: T = 2π√(L/g).
lab.p9_everyday_concept3: Sliding box dheere hota hai kyunki floor ek frictional force lagata hai. Yeh distance jo yeh slide karta hai rukne se pehle initial velocity aur friction ka coefficient (μ) par depend karta hai: d = v₀² / (2μg).
lab.p9_everyday_friction_correct: Sahi! Kinetic friction ka coefficient 0.5 hai.
lab.p9_everyday_friction_desc: Box push karein. μ = v₀² / (2gd) istemal karte hue μ calculate karein (g=9.8)
lab.p9_everyday_friction_incorrect: Ghalat. μ = v₀² / (2 × 9.8 × d) istemal karein.
lab.p9_everyday_gravity_correct: Sahi! Gravity ki wajah se acceleration taqreeban 9.8 m/s² hai.
lab.p9_everyday_gravity_desc: Ball giraayein. g = 2h / t² istemal karte hue g (m/s²) calculate karein.
lab.p9_everyday_gravity_incorrect: Ghalat. g = 2h / t² istemal karna yaad rakhein measure ki hui values ke saath.
lab.p9_everyday_instructions: Shelf ki height adjust karo, phir ball ko girane ke liye click karo. Pendulum ki length adjust karo, phir bob ko swing karne ke liye click karo. Box ko floor par slide karne ke liye Push par click karo.
lab.p9_everyday_no_data: Data log karne ke liye objects ke sath interact karein.
lab.p9_everyday_theory: Physics hamari rozana environment mein sab kuch govern karta hai! Teen key concepts: Free Fall (h = ½gt²), Periodic Motion (T = 2π√(L/g)), aur Kinetic Friction (d = v₀² / (2μg)).
lab.p9_friction_assessment_hint: Formula istemal karo: μs = Peak Force / (Mass × 9.8)
lab.p9_friction_assessment_q: Unknown Material mode select karein, simulation run karein, aur Peak Force record karein. Us ka coefficient of static friction (μs) calculate karein. (g = 9.8 m/s² maan lein)
lab.p9_friction_hint: F_max = μs × m × g. Kinetic friction aam tor par static se kam hota hai. Rolling mode ko compare karne ke liye try karo!
lab.p9_friction_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Formula istemal karo: μs = Peak Force / (Mass × 9.8)
lab.p9_friction_instructions: Mass aur surface mode ko adjust karo, phir khinchna shuru karo taake static aur kinetic friction ko observe kar sako. Apne data ko table mein record karo.
lab.p9_friction_no_data: Koi data record nahi hua abhi tak.
lab.p9_friction_record: Max aur Kinetic Forces ko record karo
lab.p9_friction_theory: Friction woh force hai jo solid surfaces ki relative motion ke khilaf mazahemat karti hai. Static friction ko overcome karna padta hai movement shuru karne ke liye. Ek baar harkat karne par, kam kinetic friction apply hota hai. Rolling friction sliding friction se kam hota hai.
lab.p9_inertia_correct_fb: Shabash! Rapid force static friction ko jaldi overcome kar leti hai, jisse coin ki inertia usay glass ke oopar rakhti hai jab tak woh girti nahi.
lab.p9_inertia_incorrect_fb: Kuch jawabat ghalat hain. Inertia aur friction ki theory ka dubara jaiza lein aur dobara koshish karein.
lab.p9_inertia_q1: Jab zor se flick kiya gaya to coin glass mein kyun gira?
lab.p9_inertia_q1_a: Card ne apni kinetic energy coin ko transfer kar di.
lab.p9_inertia_q1_b: Coin ki inertia ne sideways motion ko resist kiya jabke gravity ne usay neeche khench liya.
lab.p9_inertia_q1_c: Flicking force ne sikay ko seedha neeche ki taraf dhaka diya.
lab.p9_inertia_q2: Agar aap card ko flick karne ke bajaye aahista se khenchein, to kya hota hai?
lab.p9_inertia_q2_a: Static friction toot-ta nahi; coin card ke saath harkat karta hai.
lab.p9_inertia_q2_c: Coin fauran glass mein gir jata hai.
lab.p9_inertia_theory: Newton ka Pehla Qanoon-e-Harkat (Qanoon-e-Inertia): Ek cheez jo aaram par hai, aaram par rahegi, aur ek cheez jo harkat mein hai, wahi speed aur wahi direction mein harkat karegi jab tak ke us par ek unbalanced force ka asar na ho. Inertia ek cheez ka wo rujhan hai jo uski harkat ki halat mein tabdeelion ka muqabla karta hai. Jitni zyada mass ek cheez ki hoti hai, utna hi zyada inertia uska hota hai.
lab.p9_kinematics_correct_fb: Aap ke time ki bunyad par sahi! (Asli speed {v} m/s thi)
lab.p9_kinematics_hint: Speed = Distance ÷ Time. Pitch 20.12m hai. Stopwatch se time sahi measure karne ki koshish karein!
lab.p9_kinematics_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Distance ko APNE time se divide karein.
lab.p9_kinematics_sigfig_desc: Laal line textbook ka edge dikhati hai. Ruler ke nishan centimeters (cm) mein hain. Length ko sahi number of significant figures tak record karo.
lab.p9_kinematics_sigfig_incorrect: Ghalat. Marks ko ghaur se dekhein. Chhotay mark ke aage ek digit ka estimate karein.
lab.p9_kinematics_theory1: Average speed total distance ko total time se divide karne se milti hai. Speed (v) = Distance (d) / Time (t)
lab.p9_kinematics_theory2: Measurement lete waqt, tamam khaas digits aur ek estimated digit record karein. Agar ruler par 1mm ke marks hain, to aap 0.1mm (0.01cm) tak estimate kar sakte hain.
lab.p9_magfields_assessment_q: Aap ke mushahidat ki bunyad par, magnet ke center ke bilkul oopar magnetic field ki taqribi direction (degrees mein, 0-360, jahan 0=right, 90=neeche) kya hai?
lab.p9_magfields_correct: Sahi! Field North se South ki taraf ishara karta hai, jo magnet ke bilkul oopar seedhe left (180°) hai.
lab.p9_magfields_incorrect: Ghalat. Magnet ke center ke bilkul oopar compass rakh kar dekhein. Arrow kis simt mein hai? (0°=Right, 90°=Down, 180°=Left)
lab.p9_magfields_instructions: 1. Neeche ek tool chunein. 2. Compass: Magnet ke ird gird kahin bhi click karein taake field direction dekhein. 3. Iron Filings: Unhein chhidkain taake overall field pattern zahir ho.
lab.p9_magfields_no_data: Simulator par compasses rakh kar field directions record karo.
lab.p9_magfields_theory: Magnetic field magnet ke aas-paas ka woh ilaqa hai jahan magnetic forces kaam karti hain. Khaasiyaten: Yeh hamesha North pole se South pole ki taraf ishara karte hain magnet ke bahar. Yeh kabhi ek dosre ko nahi kaat-te. Yeh continuous loops hain jo magnet ke andar se wapas aate hain.
lab.p9_magind_assessment_q: Agar tum unmagnetized steel bar ko North pole ke saath Left se Right tak stroke karte ho, toh bar ka kaunsa end North pole ban jata hai (Left ya Right)?
lab.p9_magind_correct: Sahi! Domains ke North poles magnet ke North pole se repel hote hain, aakhir mein right ki taraf ishara karte hain. Is liye right end North banta hai.
lab.p9_magind_guess_left: Domains ke North poles magnet ke North pole se repel hote hain, aur left ki taraf point karte hain. Toh left end North ban jata hai.
lab.p9_magind_guess_right: Domains ke North poles magnet ke North pole se repel hote hain, aur right ki taraf point karte hain. Toh right end North ban jata hai.
lab.p9_magind_incorrect: Ghalat. Left se right stroke karne ke baad red arrows (North poles) ko observe karein. Yeh kis simt mein hain?
lab.p9_magind_instructions: 1. Magnet ko ek end se doosre end tak baar baar steel bar par kheecho taake domains ko align hota dekho. 2. Bar ki orientation badlo aur Hammer Bar ko dabao taake asraat dekho.
lab.p9_magind_no_data: Simulator ke saath interact karo taake data record kar sako.
lab.p9_magind_theory: Unmagnetized steel mein chotay magnetic domains (atoms ke groups) hote hain jo randomly oriented hain. Kyunki yeh har simt mein ishara karte hain, inke magnetic fields cancel ho jate hain. Stroking: Magnet ko ek hi simt mein steel par bar bar pherna domains ko align karne par majboor karta hai. Hammering: Hammering se metal vibrate hota hai, jo domains ko external field ke saath align hone deta hai.
lab.p9_measurement_clamp_message: Measuring se pehle object ko sahi tarah clamp karein.
lab.p9_measurement_correct_fb: Sahi! Object bilkul {w} mm chaura hai.
lab.p9_measurement_formula: Total Reading = Main Scale Reading + (Vernier Division × Least Count). Yahan, Least Count = 0.1 mm
lab.p9_measurement_incorrect_fb: Ghalat. Vernier zero se pehle main scale check karein, phir matching vernier line dhoondhein.
lab.p9_measurement_theory: Vernier Caliper ek aala hai jo internal aur external dimensions ko sahi napta hai. Main Scale: millimeters (mm) mein parti hai. Vernier scale par zero ke piche wala mark parhein. Vernier Scale: 0.1 mm tak precision deti hai. Vernier mark jo main scale ke kisi mark se bilkul milay, woh dekhein.
lab.p9_pressure_assessment_q: Agar paani ki density 1000 kg/m³ hai aur g = 9.8 m/s² hai, toh lowest hole (depth = 80 cm) par theoretical fluid pressure (Pascals mein) calculate karein.
lab.p9_pressure_hint: P = ρgh. Istamal karein ρ = 1000 kg/m³, g = 9.8 m/s². 80cm ko 0.8m mein tabdeel karein!
lab.p9_pressure_instructions: 1. Can ke side par kale plugs par click karein taake paani bahar aaye. 2. Dekhein ke stream base se kitna door tak jaata hai. 3. Zameen par laal measuring tool ko kheench kar splash point ki distance ko theek se measure karein. 4. Apne readings Data table mein record karein.
lab.p9_pressure_theory: Fluid pressure gehraai ke saath badhta hai jo fluid ke upar ke weight ki wajah se hota hai. Pressure P gehraai h par ek liquid ki density ρ mein hai: P = ρ × g × h. Zyada pressure se hole se zyada ejection velocity (v) milta hai, jo paani ko door tak phenkta hai.
lab.p9_springs_hint: Series mein springs ka same tension hota hai. Total extension har spring ke extension ka majmooa hota hai. 1/k_eq = 1/k1 + 1/k2 + ...
lab.p9_springs_instructions: Springs ki tadaad aur hanging mass adjust karein. Dekhein kaise force parhte hue har spring par ek jaisi hai jabke kul extension barhta hai.

lab.practice_correct_feedback: F = Δp/Δt istemal karte hue, 11.2 / 0.01 = 1120 N — ek person ke weight se bhi zyada!

lab.real_life_airbags: Airbags crash ke doran impact ke time ko barhate hain — Δt ko 0.01s se 0.1s karne se force 10 guna kam ho jati hai, yahi wajah hai ke airbags peak force kam karke jaanen bachate hain.
lab.recoil_adjust_desc: Sliders adjust karein, phir FIRE! daba kar conservation ka momentum ko amal mein dekhein.
lab.recoil_correct_feedback: Sahi! vg = 1.5 m/s. Rifle sirf 1.5 m/s pichay hati hai kyunki yeh bullet se kaafi bhaari hai.
lab.recoil_final_desc: Bandook bullet ki simt ke mukhalif simt mein pichay hati hai
lab.recoil_incorrect_feedback: Bilkul nahi. vg = (mb × vb) / mg = (0.012 × 500) / 4 ka istemal karo
lab.recoil_practice_q: Ek 4 kg rifle 12 g bullet 500 m/s se fire karti hai.
lab.recoil_practice_q2: Rifle ki recoil velocity kya hai?
lab.recoil_real_life: Firefighters ko hose istemal karne se pehle apni jagah mazboot karni hoti hai — aage shooting water utni hi pichay ki force (recoil) paida karti hai, bilkul rocket ki tarah jo gas nikaal kar space mein chalta hai.
lab.recoil_step1_detail: 🎯 Aap shooting range mein hain, 4 kg ki rifle aap ke kandhe par hai. Aap saans lete hain, nishana lagate hain, aur trigger dabaate hain. Gun + bullet ek "isolated system" banate hain — firing se pehle ka momentum firing ke baad ke momentum ke barabar hona chahiye.
lab.recoil_step2_detail: Firing se pehle, rifle aur 10 g bullet dono aap ke haathon mein bilkul abhi tak hain. Kul shuruati momentum = 0. Sab kuch khamosh, mustaqil — zero motion, zero momentum. Phir firing pin strike karta hai.
lab.recoil_step2_label: fair krne se pehle: hr chyz sakn halt mein
lab.recoil_step3_detail: BANG! Goli 400 m/s par aage badhti hai. Iska momentum: 0.01 × 400 = 4 kg·m/s aage. Conservation ke zariye, gun ka momentum aapke kandhe ki taraf −4 kg·m/s hona chahiye: m_b·v_b + m_g·v_g = 0.
lab.recoil_step3_label: fair krne ke baad: goly + bndoq Harkat krty hai
lab.recoil_step4_detail: Hal karte hue: v_g = −(m_b·v_b)/m_g = −(0.01 × 400)/4 = −1 m/s. Negative sign? Gun aap ke kandhe mein 1 m/s se pichay latkti hai. Bhaari gun kam recoil karti hai — yahi wajah hai ke competition shooters bhaari rifles istemal karte hain. Rockets bhi yahi kaam karte hain: exhaust neeche jata hai, rocket upar jata hai!
lab.recoil_subtitle: Momentum ke tahafuz se recoil formula hasil karne ka tareeqa
lab.recoil_title: Derivation: bndoq ka pchayrta hoa Raftaar

lab.s6fatdetection_unit_3_fat_detection_: Unit 3: Khane Mein Fat Ka Pata Lagana

lab.s6lungmodel_upload_a_video_or_photo_: Apne working model ki photo ya video upload karein

lab.s6magnetism_iron_filings_or_plotting: Iron filings ya plotting compasses nazar na aanay wali magnetic field lines ke mutabiq mur jate hain. Ghaur karein ke lines hamesha North pole se nikalti hain aur South pole ki taraf ghoomti hain.
lab.s6microscope_select_a_sample_to_plac: Glass slide par rakhne ke liye ek sample chunein
lab.s6molecularbuilder_click_to_add_atom: Yeh banane ke liye builder mein atoms shamil karne ke liye click karein:

lab.s6particlesimulation_dissolving_comp: Dissolving Mukammal! Sugar ke particles pani mein barabar phail gaye hain.
lab.s6particlesimulation_gas_particles_m: Gas ke particles tezi se aur randomly harkat karte hain. Dekhein ke jama hua spray kaise phail kar poore kamre mein barabar ho jata hai.
lab.s6particlesimulation_select_a_simula: Particles ka bartaav dekhne ke liye upar di gayi ek simulation chunein.
lab.s6particlesimulation_watch_as_the_br: Dekhein ke brown sugar ki coating kaise hal hoti hai. Sugar ke particles pani ke particles ke darmiyan jaga dhoond rahe hain.
lab.s6plantgrowth_observe_growth_over_4_: 4 hafton (28 din) mein growth ka mushahida karein. Control group (A) ka muwazna fertilizer wale groups (B & C) se karein.
lab.s6plantgrowth_the_plants_in_pot_c_10: Pot C (10mg fertilizer) ke paudhay Pot B (5mg) aur control Pot A (0mg) ke muqable mein kafi lambay hue aur inke zyada pattay niklay. Yeh is baat ko sabit karta hai ke fertilizer ka sahi istemal ahem ghizai ajza (jaise Nitrogen, Phosphorus, Potassium) faraham karta hai jo paudhay ki growth ko tez karte hain.
lab.s6plantgrowth_unit_11_effect_of_fert: Unit 11: Paudhon Ki Growth Par Fertilizers Ka Asar
lab.s6separation_add_water_salt_dissolve: Pani dalein. Namak hal ho jata hai, rait nahi.
lab.s6separation_boil_off_water_to_recov: Pani ubaal kar khalis namak wapas hasil karein.
lab.s6separation_filter_to_separate_sand: Rait ko namkeen pani se alag karne ke liye filter karein.
lab.s6separation_observe_salt_and_sand_m: Namak aur rait ke mix hone ka mushahida karein.
lab.s6solarsystembuilder_click_to_add_pl: Apne 3D model mein planets shamil karne ke liye click karein. Woh automatically Sooraj se apne related faslon par lag jayenge.
lab.s6solarsystembuilder_to_the_physical: physical model ke sath! Asal classroom mein, aap isay painted styrofoam balls aur taar (wire) se banayenge. Iska relative size aur central sitaray se fasla dekhein.
lab.s6solarsystembuilder_you_have_succes: Aapne kamiyabi se shamil kar diya hai

process kyunke tawanai (heat energy) solution se jazb hui thi.

Temperature barh gaya. Yeh ek hai
lab.s6unit1projects_balloons_for_lung_ex: Balloons (lungs ke phailne ko simulate karne ke liye)
lab.s6unit1projects_cardboard_tubes_from: Paper towels se cardboard tubes (khoraak ki nali aur saans ki nali ke liye)
lab.s6unit1projects_click_to_upload_a_ph: Apne model ki photo upload karne ke liye click karein

lab.s6unit1projects_make_a_model_of_a_hu: Recycled materials ka istemal karke apni pasand ke kisi insani organ system ka model banayein aur iske hisson ko label karein.
lab.s6unit1projects_make_a_physical_mode: Apni pasand ke materials (jaise clay, cardboard, styrofoam) ka istemal karke janwar ya paudhay ke cell ka physical model banayein aur uske hisson ko label karein.
lab.s6unit1projects_photo_uploaded_succe: Photo kamiyabi se upload ho gayi!
