lab.s6unit1projects_select_organ_system_: Apne Project ke liye Organ System Chunein:
lab.s6vegetativepropagation_based_on_typ: Aam scienci nateejon ki buniyad par, aapko nazar aana chahiye ke cuttings (vegetative propagation) se ugaye gaye paudhay bohat tezi se barhe, un par phool jaldi aaye, aur un phoolon ka rang aur khushboo parent plant se bilkul milti julti thi. Beej (seeds) se ugaye gaye paudhon ko bohat zyada waqt lagta hai aur un mein genetic variations (tabdeeliyan) nazar aa sakti hain.
lab.s6vegetativepropagation_in_winter_ta: Sardiyon mein, ek hi gulab (rose) ke paudhay se beej aur tanay (stem) ki cuttings lein. Inhein alag gamlon (pots) mein bilkul aik jaisi mitti, pani, roshni aur temperature ke sath lagayein. Teen maheene tak inka mushahida karein. Teen maheene ke baad, vegetative propagation (cuttings) aur sexual reproduction (seeds) ke fawaid ka muwazna karne ke liye neeche diye gaye observation table mein apne nateejay likhein.
lab.s6vegetativepropagation_report_submi: Report Kamiyabi Se Jama Ho Gayi
lab.s7atommodel_carbon_has_an_atomic_num: Carbon ka atomic number 6 aur mass number 12 hai. Atom banane ke liye subatomic particles ki sahi tadaad shamil karein.
lab.s7atommodel_perfect_carbon_consists_: Zabardast! Carbon mein 6 protons aur 6 neutrons nucleus mein jukre hote hain, jinke gird 2 shells mein 6 electrons ghoomte hain.
lab.s7balloonrocket_a_balloon_is_taped_t: Ek gubaray (balloon) ko dhaage mein piroyi hui straw par tape se lagaya gaya hai. Gubaray ki dabayi hui gardan ko chhodein aur Newton's Third Law of Motion ko amal mein dekhein.
lab.s7balloonrocket_for_every_action_the: "Har action ka barabar aur ulat (opposite) reaction hota hai."
lab.s7balloonrocket_is_the_air_pushing_t: hawa hai jo gubaray ko barabar quwwat (force) se aage dhakel rahi hai!
lab.s7balloonrocket_is_the_balloon_pushi: gubara hai jo hawa ko peechay ki taraf nikal raha hai. Jo
lab.s7calculatingsubatomicparticles_calc: is element ke neutral atom mein Protons, Neutrons, aur Electrons ki tadaad ka hisab lagayein.
lab.s7calculatingsubatomicparticles_exce: Bohat aala! Fluorine (F) ka atomic number 9 aur mass number 19 hai. Is mein 9 protons, 9 electrons, aur 10 neutrons hote hain.
lab.s7calculatingsubatomicparticles_hint: Hint: Atomic Number protons ki tadaad ke barabar hota hai.
Hint: Ek neutral atom mein, protons aur electrons barabar hote hain.
Hint: Mass Number = Protons + Neutrons. Neutrons ke liye hisab lagayein.
lab.s7calculatingsubatomicparticles_you_: Aapko ek element diya gaya hai jiska hai ek
lab.s7chemicalchange_a_balloon_containin: Ek gubara jisme Baking Soda (NaHCO₃) hai, Sirkay (Acetic Acid) ki flask par charhaya gaya hai. Gubaray ko ulta kar chemicals milane ke liye click karein taake chemical reaction ka mushahida ho sake.
lab.s7chemicalchange_the_baking_soda_and: Baking soda aur sirkay (vinegar) ke reaction se ek bilkul nayi cheez banti hai:
lab.s7chemicalchange_the_production_of_t: . Is gas ke banne se yeh tezi se phailti hai, aur gubaray ko bhar kar phula deti hai. Mukhtalif khasiyaton (properties) ke sath is nayi cheez ka banna yeh sabit karta hai ke yeh ek chemical tabdeeli hai, na ke physical.
lab.s7cleaningcoins_four_heavily_tarnish: Char bohat gande aur mailay (tarnished) tambay (copper) ke sikke mukhtalif rozmarra ke solutions mein 24 ghante ke liye bhigoye gaye. Kamzor acids tambay par jama mail (copper oxide) ke sath reaction karke usay pighla dete hain.
lab.s7cleaningcoins_solution_cleaned_the: solution ne sikke ko mukammal tor par saaf kar diya! Sirka (acetic acid) copper oxide ko pighla deta hai, lekin namak shamil karne se chloride ions milte hain jo chemical reaction ko bohat tez kar dete hain. Leemu ka ras (Lemon juice) aur Ketchup ne bhi apni tezabi (acidic) taseer ki wajah se (citric acid aur sirka) acha kaam kiya.
lab.s7cleaningcoins_unit_7_cleaning_coin: Unit 7: Solutions se Sikkay Saaf Karna
lab.s7diluteconcentratedsolutions_a_solu: Aisa solution jis mein solute ki miqdar kam ho, use
lab.s7diluteconcentratedsolutions_compar: Do solutions ka muwazna karein. Aap solvent (pani) mein milaye gaye solute (Sharbat ke chamach) ki miqdar badal sakte hain. Rang ki gehrai (intensity) par ghaur karein aur concentration ko samjhein.
lab.s7diluteconcentratedsolutions_lighte: (halka rang, kam meetha). Aisa solution jis mein solute ki miqdar zyada hal hui ho, use
lab.s7dripirrigation_drip_irrigation_del: Drip irrigation pani ko qatra qatra seedha paudhon ki jadon (roots) tak pohanchata hai. Yeh bahaav (evaporation) ke zariye hone walay nuqsan ko kam karta hai aur flood ya sprinkler irrigation ke muqable mein pani ka intehai mufeed istemal yaqeeni banata hai.
lab.s7dripirrigation_notice_how_the_soil: Ghaur karein ke paudhon ke darmiyan khali jaga par pani zaya kiye baghair jado ke ird gird ki mitti kis tarah behtareen nam (moist) ho gayi hai. Yeh hai drip irrigation ki taqat!
lab.s7earthseasons_the_earth_s_axis_is_t: Zameen ka mehwar (axis) 23.5 degree par jhuka hua hai. Jab yeh Sooraj ke gird ghoomti hai, to is musalsal jhukao ki wajah se Shimali (Northern) aur Junubi (Southern) nisf kuron mein seedhi dhoop ki miqdar mukhtalif milti hai, jisse mausam bante hain.
lab.s7handsanitizer_create_an_effective_: Ajza ki sahi ratio mila kar ek asardaar hand sanitizer banayein. Aapko bilkul 60ml (2/3 hissa) Rubbing Alcohol, 30ml (1/3 hissa) Aloe Vera Gel, aur 10 qatray (drops) Essential Oil ki zaroorat hai.
lab.s7handsanitizer_the_rubbing_alcohol_: Rubbing alcohol bacteria aur virus ko maarne ke liye ahem juz (active ingredient) faraham karta hai (kargar hone ke liye isay kul miqdar ka kam az kam 60% hona zaroori hai). Aloe vera gel aapke hathon ko khushk hone se bachata hai, aur essential oil achi khushboo deta hai.
lab.s7immunesystemroleplay_i_am_the_b_ce: "Main B-Cell hoon! Main jaraasim (pathogens) ko khatam karne ke liye makhsoos 'Y' shakal ke antibodies banata hoon aur agli baar ke liye unhein yaad rakhta hoon!"
lab.s7immunesystemroleplay_i_am_the_t_ce: "Main T-Cell hoon! Main mutasir shuda (infected) cells ko tabah karta hoon aur B-Cells ko ishara deta hoon!"
lab.s7immunesystemroleplay_pathogens_inv: Jaraasim hamla aawar ho rahe hain!
lab.s7immunesystemroleplay_step_through_: Is simulation ke zariye dekhein ke jild (skin), T-Cells, aur B-Cells kis tarah hamla aawar jaraasim (pathogens) ke khilaf difaai line ke tor par kaam karte hain.
lab.s7lithiumbonding_compare_a_neutral_l: Ek neutral Lithium atom (Li) ka Lithium ion (Li⁺) se muwazna karein. Dekhein ke ion banne ke amal (ionization) ke dauran iske valence electron ka kya hota hai.
lab.s7makestethoscope_a_homemade_stethos: Ghar ka bana hua stethoscope do keef (funnels) aur ek plastic tube se banaya gaya hai. Bade funnel par ek gubara (balloon) phelaya gaya hai jo diaphragm ke tor par kaam karta hai, dil ki dhadkan ki vibrations ko pakadta hai aur unhein tube ke zariye kaan tak pohanchata hai.
lab.s7makingrockcandy_a_supersaturated_s: Cheeni aur pani ka ek supersaturated solution martaban (jars) mein dala jata hai. Lakri ki sticks jin par cheeni lagi hoti hai, unhein latkaya jata hai. Ek hafte mein, jaise hi pani urta (evaporate) hai aur thanda hota hai, baday cheeni ke crystals ban jate hain.
lab.s7makingrockcandy_as_the_water_cools: . Jese jese pani thanda hota hai aur bahaav banta (evaporates) hai, yeh mazeed cheeni ko khud mein nahi rakh sakta. Cheeni solution se alag ho jati hai aur stick par mojud seed crystals se jud jati hai, jisse baday geometric structures bante hain.
lab.s7makingrockcandy_hot_water_can_diss: Garam pani thanday pani ke muqable mein bohat zyada cheeni hal kar sakta hai, jo ek banata hai
lab.s7measuringlungcapacity_of_water_the: pani ka! Ek aam insaan ke phephron (lungs) ki capacity taqreeban 3000 se 4000 mL hoti hai, lekin ek lamba saans le kar poori tarah bahar nikalna aapki is cheez ko napta hai
lab.s7measuringlungcapacity_take_a_deep_: Lamba saans lein aur tube mein phoonkein. Aapke phephron ki hawa ulti botal mein jayegi aur pani ko bahar nikal degi. Jitna pani niklega, utni hi aapki lung capacity hogi.
lab.s7measuringlungcapacity_water_displa: Pani Nikalne ka Tareeqa (Water Displacement Method)
lab.s7mineralsplantgrowth_grew_significa: kafi bada aur zyada hara hua. Halanke dono paudhon ko pani aur dhoop mili, lekin khalis rait mein ahem madniyat (mineral nutrients) (jaise Nitrogen, Phosphorus, aur Potassium) nahi hote. Compost ne yeh zaroori madniyat faraham kiye, jisse yeh sabit hota hai ke sehat mand paudhon ki growth ke liye yeh zaroori hain!
lab.s7mineralsplantgrowth_observe_two_id: Khudi se pani peene wale (sub-irrigated) gamlon (dhagay wali soda botalein) mein lagay gaye do ek jaise paudhon ka mushahida karein. Ek khalis rait mein hai, aur dusra compost aur mitti ke mix mein. Dono ko barabar pani aur roshni milti hai.
lab.s7mineralsplantgrowth_testing_soil_n: Mitti ke Ghizai Ajza (Nutrients) Test Karna
lab.s7mineralsplantgrowth_unit_1_mineral: Unit 1: Minerals aur Paudhon Ki Growth
lab.s7oilpollutants_dragging_cheesecloth: Cheesecloth (jo ke masam-daar hota hai) ko kheinchna tail ko jazb aur qaid karta hai, chamach (spoon) se behtar kaam karta hai lekin phir bhi kafi tail reh jata hai.
lab.s7oilpollutants_oil_is_less_dense_th: Tail pani se kam bhari (less dense) hota hai, is liye yeh oopar tairta hai aur ek teh (slick) banata hai. Pani ki satah se oil spill saaf karne ke liye mukhtalif tools ka intikhab karein.
lab.s7oilpollutants_oil_removal_efficien: Tail Hatane Ki Karkardagi Ka Muwazna
lab.s7oilpollutants_sand_consistently_re: Rait hamesha sab se zyada tail hatati hai! Tariqon ke darmiyan average karkardagi (efficiencies) ka muwazna karein. Ghaur karein ke har trial is wajah se thore mukhtalif nataij deta hai
lab.s7oilpollutants_skimming_with_a_spoo: Chamchay se oopar se hatane par ek waqt mein bohat kam miqdar nikalti hai aur yeh bade spills ke liye bilkul bekar hai.
lab.s7oilpollutants_sprinkling_sand_over: Tail par rait chirakne se rait ke zarray tail ke sath jud jate hain. Dono ka wazan mil kar pani se zyada bhari ho jata hai, jis ki wajah se yeh guche ban kar neeche baith jate hain aur satah saaf ho jati hai.
lab.s7oilpollutants_unit_7_removing_oil_: Unit 7: Tail ki Aalaishon (Oil Pollutants) ko Hatana
lab.s7pulserateexercise_notice_how_your_: Ghaur kiya ke varzish ke doran aapka saans aur nabz (pulse rate) kaise tezi se barha? Aapke pathon (muscles) ko zyada oxygen aur tawanai ki zaroorat thi, isliye aapke dil ko inhein pohanchane ke liye khoon zyada tezi se pump karna para. Aaraam ke waqt (recovery), yeh raftar aahista aahista normal ho jati hai jaise jaise oxygen ki kami poori hoti hai.
lab.s7pulserateexercise_notice_small_var: Readings ke darmiyan chhoti tabdeeliyan (variations) note kin? Yeh hai
lab.s7pulserateexercise_observe_how_your: Ghaur karein ke aapki nabz ki raftar (dil ki dhadkan per minute) aaraam ki halat se lekar, sargarm varzish (active exercise) aur aakhir mein recovery ke doran kaise badalti hai.
lab.s7pulserateexercise_real_heart_rates: — asli dil ki dhadkan naturally tabdeel hoti rehti hai.
lab.s7pulserateexercise_unit_2_pulse_rat: Unit 2: Nabz Ki Raftaar aur Varzish (Exercise)
lab.s7pulserateexercise_your_pulse_incre: Varzish ke doran aapki nabz tezi se barhi aur ab normal ho rahi hai. Recovery ki raftar dil aur sharyanon ki sehat (cardiovascular fitness) ko zahir karti hai. Sehatmand afrad jaldi normal halat mein wapas aate hain!
lab.s7thermalconduction_a_metal_spoon_a_: Ek lohe (metal) ka chamcha, ek plastic ka chamcha, aur ek lakri ke chamchay ke handles par makhan (butter) ka ek thos tukda rakha gaya hai. Inke nichlay hissay ubalte pani mein doobay hue hain. Dekhein ke kaunsa material sab se jaldi garmi muntaqil (conduct) karke makhan pighlata hai.
lab.s7thermalconduction_heat_transfer_vi: Conduction Ke Zariye Garmi (Heat) Muntaqil Hona
lab.s7thermalconduction_melted_very_quic: bohat jaldi pighal gaya! Loha (Metal) garmi (heat) ka ek behtareen conductor hai, jo garmi ko tezi se handle tak pohanchata hai. Plastic ek kamzor conductor (insulator) hai, isliye iska makhan aahista pighla. Lakri ek bohat mazboot insulator hai, isliye iska makhan diye gaye waqt mein bilkul nahi pighla.
lab.s7thermalconduction_metal_conducted_: Lohe ne sab se tezi se garmi muntaqil ki (temperature tezi se barha), plastic darmiana (insulator) tha, aur lakri ne na hone ke barabar garmi muntaqil ki (mazboot insulator). Graph clearly thermal conduction ki mukhtalif raftaaron ko dikhata hai.
lab.s7thermalconduction_real_experiments: Asal tajarbaat mein mamooli tabdeeliyan (variations) nazar aati hain is wajah se
lab.s7thermalconduction_that_s_why_scien: . Isi liye science daan mukhtalif readings lete hain!
lab.s7transpirationleaves_attach_dry_blu: Khushk neela cobalt chloride paper pattay ke dono taraf lagayein. Pani ke bukhaaraat (water vapour) ki mojoodgi mein cobalt chloride paper neelay se gulabi ho jata hai. Aaiye dekhte hain ke kon sa hissa zyada pani khota hai.
lab.s7transpirationleaves_no_two_reading: — koi si do readings bilkul ek jaisi nahi hotin!
lab.s7transpirationleaves_notice_how_wat: Dekhein ke waqt ke sath pani ka nuqsan kaise barhta hai! Raftaar stomata ki tadaad, nami (humidity), darja hararat (temperature) aur hawa ki harkat par munhasir hai. Trend dekhne ke liye mukhtalif data points record karne ki koshish karein.
lab.s7transpirationleaves_turned_pink_wh: gulabi ho gaya, jabke oopri hisse ka kaghaz neela hi raha! Yeh sabit karta hai ke transpiration zyada tar chhotay surakhon ke zariye hoti hai jinhein kehte hain
lab.s7transpirationleaves_which_are_conc: , jo dhoop se hone wale pani ke zyadati nuqsan ko kam karne ke liye pattay ke nichle hissay mein zyada hote hain.
lab.s7transpirationleaves_why_is_the_ans: Jawab har dafa thoda sa mukhtalif kyun hota hai? Kyunke asal tajarbaat mein hoti hai
lab.s7transpirationobservation_two_branc: Do shaakhon (branches) ko saaf polythene bags se dhak diya gaya hai. Ek shaakh par pattay hain, aur doosri bilkul nangi hai. Bags ke andar nami (condensation) banne ka mushahida karne ke liye intezar karein.
lab.s7transpirationobservation_water_dro: Pani ke qatray sirf patton wali shaakh ke bag mein zahir hue! Yeh sabit karta hai ke pani paudhay ke oopri hisson, khaas taur par patton se evaporation ke zariye urr jata hai, is amal ko transpiration kehte hain.
lab.s7unit10projects_after_4_hours_open_: 4 ghante baad, cooler kholein aur pighlay hue pani ko naapne walay cup (measuring cup) mein dalein. Woh cooler jo deta hai
lab.s7unit10projects_aluminum_foil_refle: Aluminum foil (garmi ki shuaon ko wapas bhejta hai)
lab.s7unit10projects_amount_of_liquid_wa: pani ki miqdar, uski insulation sab se behtar hoti hai!
lab.s7unit10projects_engineer_and_constr: Insulation ke asoolon ko istemal karte hue ghar mein ek aisa cooler banayein jo baraf ko pighalne se zyada se zyada dair tak rok sakay.
lab.s7unit10projects_metals_tin_foil_alo: Daat (Metals) (sirf tin foil garmi muntaqil karta hai)
lab.s7unit10projects_project_work_submis: Project Work Jama Karane Ka Guide
lab.s7unit10projects_trapped_air_pockets: Phansi hui hawa ki jaghein (bubble wrap)
lab.s7unit10projects_you_must_test_your_: Aapko apne cooler ko test karna hoga is mein 1 cup baraf daal kar, isay band karke, aur kamre ke darja hararat (room temperature) par 4 ghante ke liye chhor kar.
lab.s7unit10projects_your_cooler_must_be: Aapke cooler mein bilkul 1 cup baraf ke tukray (ice cubes) aane chahiye.
lab.s7unit11projects_calculate_your_dire: Paanch dinon mein apne bara-e-raast pani ke istemal ka hisab lagayein aur apne school mein pani bachane ki mohim (conservation drive) chalayein.
lab.s7unit11projects_compare_your_total_: Apne 5 din ke kul istemal ka apne class fellows ke sath muwazna karein. Phir, pani bachane ke tareeqon par mabni posters banayein (maslan, daant saaf karte waqt nalka band karna, chota shower lena). In posters ko apne school ke washrooms aur cafeteria mein lagayein.
lab.s7unit11projects_keep_a_notebook_and: Ek notebook rakhein aur andaza lagayein ke aap rozana darj zail sargarmiyon (activities) ke liye kitne liter pani istemal karte hain:

lab.step1_detail: 🚴 Aap 10 m/s se muhallay ki gali mein cycle chala rahe hain jab ek bacha ball ke peeche bhagta hua nikalta hai. Aap brakes lagate hain. Newton's 2nd law kehta hai F = ma — brake pads rim ko dabaate hain, ek force lagate hain jo aap ko decelerate karti hai.
lab.step2_detail: Aap ki speed 2 seconds mein 10 m/s se 0 ho jati hai. Tabdeeli ki sharah acceleration hai: a = (0 − 10)/2 = −5 m/s². Aap ka body aage ko jhukta hai — yeh inertia hai jo change ke khilaf mazahemat kar rahi hai. Negative sign? Aap slow ho rahe hain, matlab force backward hai.
lab.step3_detail: Aap + aapki bike = 80 kg. F = 80 × (0 − 10)/2 = −400 N. Mass ko distribute karo: F = (80×0 − 80×10)/2 = (0 − 800)/2. Aapki brakes 400 N ka force laga rahi hain — choti si adult ke wazan ke barabar jo aapki motion ke khilaf push kar raha hai!
lab.step3_label: a ko F = ma mein shamil karein
lab.step4_detail: Momentum p = mv aap ki "quantity of motion" ko zahir karta hai. Aap ne p = 80 × 10 = 800 kg·m/s se start kiya. 2 seconds mein, woh momentum zero ho jata hai. To F = Δp/Δt = (0 − 800)/2 = −400 N. Force sirf yeh hai ke momentum kitni tezi se change hota hai. Yahi wajah hai ke airbags jaan bachate hain — woh impact time Δt ko barhate hain, jis se force F kam ho jati hai!

theorem.class10.alternate_segment.finalF: Tangent aur chord ke beech ki kooni, alternate segment meh kooni ke barabar hoti hai.
theorem.class10.alternate_segment.keyIns: Sailors yeh theorem use karte hain: coastline (tangent) aur lighthouse tak ki line (chord) ke beech ki kooni, unki position ko determine karta hai. Yeh circle geometry meh sabse khoobsurat theorems meh se ek hai!
theorem.class10.alternate_segment.step1_: 🎯 Ek circle draw karein jismein tangent PT point A par hai. Chord AB draw karein, aur ∠APT ko tangent aur chord ke beech meh draw karein.
Tangent aur chord ko draw karein
theorem.class10.alternate_segment.step2_: Chord AB circle ko do segments meh divide karta hai. Alternate segment tangent ke opposite side par hota hai.
theorem.class10.alternate_segment.step3_: Tangent aur chord ke beech ki kooni, alternate segment mein woh kooni hoti hai.
theorem.class10.alternate_segment.title: Theorem 10.6: Alternate Segment Theorem
theorem.class10.area_aas.finalFormulaDes: Ek side aur do angle ka upyog karke area.
theorem.class10.area_aas.keyInsight: Pahad ki chotiyan matra karne ke liye puri tarah sahi hai! Jab aap dono adjacent sides ko matra nahi kar sakte hain lekin door se angle matra kar sakte hain, to yeh formula aapko area deta hai.
theorem.class10.area_aas.practice_errorH: Δ = ½ a² sin β sin γ / sin α
theorem.class10.area_aas.practice_questi: a=7, β=70°, γ=60°. α=50°. Kshetrafal khojein.
theorem.class10.area_aas.step1_detail: 📋 Jab aap do angle (β, γ) aur shamil side a (AAS) jaante hain, to Δ = ½ ab sin γ se shuru karein.
theorem.class10.area_aas.step2_detail: Law of Sines se: b/sin β = a/sin α → b = a sin β / sin α.
theorem.class10.area_aas.step2_label: Law of Sines ka istemal karke b ko khojein
theorem.class10.area_aas.step3_detail: Δ = ½ a × (a sin β / sin α) × sin γ. Yeh formula sirf ek side length aur do angle ke liye zaroori hai!
theorem.class10.area_aas.title: Triangle ka Area (AAS)
theorem.class10.area_sas.finalFormulaDes: Do tarafon aur unke beech ke koon ke madhyam se ek triangle ka kshetrafal.
theorem.class10.area_sas.keyInsight: Zameen ki survey karne wale is formula se pyar karte hain: do tarafon ko kamrein aur unke beech ke koon ko kamrein, aur aapko kshetrafal mil jata hai - perimeter ko chalne ki zaroorat nahin hai!
theorem.class10.area_sas.practice_questi: b=5, c=6, α=30°. Kya area hai?
theorem.class10.area_sas.step1_detail: 🌳 AB ke side c ko base ke roop mein lete hain. Uchchai AB se C tak ki perpendiculer hai.
theorem.class10.area_sas.step2_detail: Triangle ACD se, height h = b sin α.
theorem.class10.area_sas.step3_detail: Agar α = 90° hai, to sin 90° = 1, isliye Δ = ½bc — familiar right triangle area formula hai!
theorem.class10.area_sas.title: Ek Triangle (SAS) ka Kshetrafal
theorem.class10.central_angle.finalFormu: Central angle koi bhi inscribed angle jo usi arc ko subtend karta hai, double hota hai.
theorem.class10.central_angle.keyInsight: Isliye, semicircle mein angle 90° hota hai — central angle 180° (ek stree line) hota hai, isliye inscribed angle half hota hai: 90°. Yeh circle geometry ka 'Sona Theorem' hai!
theorem.class10.central_angle.practice_q: Inscribed angle ne ek arc ko 35° subtend kiya hai. Central angle kitna hai?
theorem.class10.central_angle.step1_deta: 📐 Chord CD ko draw karein. Central angle ∠COD aur inscribed angle ∠CED, dono hi chord CD ko subtend karte hain.
theorem.class10.central_angle.step1_labe: Central aur inscribed angles ko draw karein
theorem.class10.central_angle.step2_deta: OE ko F tak badhayein. Kyunki OC = OE (radii), triangle COE isosceles hai. Exterior angle ∠COF = 2∠CEO.
theorem.class10.central_angle.step2_labe: O ko E se jodein aur extend karein
theorem.class10.central_angle.step4_deta: ∠COD = 2∠CEO + 2∠DEO = 2(∠CEO + ∠DEO) = 2∠CED. Central angle ALWAYS inscribed angle se do guna hota hai!
theorem.class10.central_angle.title: Theorem 10.7: Central Angle = 2 × Inscribed Angle
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.finalForm: Ek line centre se chord ke midpoint tak perpendicular hai chord se.
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.keyInsigh: Yehi wajah hai ki ek spirit level kaam karta hai — bubble ka centre line surface se perpendicular hota hai. Construction mein, yeh theorem circular pipes ko level rakhne ke liye zaroori hota hai.
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.practice_: Ek circle ki radius 10 hai, aur chord ka midpoint centre se 6 units door hai. Chord ki half length kya hai?
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step1_det: ⚽ Ek circle par chord AB lein. Uska midpoint C mark karein. Centre O se C tak ek line draw karein.
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step1_lab: Chord AB ko draw karein, aur uska midpoint C mark karein.
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step2_det: OA aur OB radii hain, isliye OA = OB. Triangle OAB isosceles hai, jo O par apex hai.
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.step3_det: Isosceles triangle OAB mein, centre O se base AB ke midpoint C tak ki line bhi altitude hai. Isliye OC AB se perpendicular hai.
theorem.class10.centre_bisects.title: Theorem 9.2: Chord ke Midpoint se Centre tak ki line perpendicular hai
theorem.class10.circum_radius.finalFormu: Triangle ke sabhi vertices ko pass karne wali circle ki radius.
theorem.class10.circum_radius.keyInsight: Circumradius triangle ke teen sides aur area se judi hai! Ek saman-bahoo triangle ke liye, R = a/√3. Triangle ka size badhne par circumcircle bhi badhta hai. Yeh gear aur wheel design mein use hota hai.
theorem.class10.circum_radius.practice_q: a=5, b=6, c=7, Δ≈14.7. R khojein.
theorem.class10.circum_radius.step1_deta: 🌍 Ek circle sabhi teen vertices ke through draw karein. Ek diameter BD draw karein. Kyunki α aur ∠BDC ek hi segment mein hain, ∠BDC = α hai.
theorem.class10.circum_radius.step2_deta: Triangle BCD (angle in a semicircle) mein: a/(2R) = sin α → R = a/(2 sin α).
theorem.class10.circum_radius.step2_labe: Right triangle mein sine ka upyog karein
theorem.class10.circum_radius.step3_deta: Area formula se: Δ = ½ bc sin α → sin α = 2Δ/(bc).
theorem.class10.circum_radius.step3_labe: Sides aur area ke terms mein vyakt karein
theorem.class10.circum_radius.step4_deta: R = a/(2 × 2Δ/(bc)) = abc/(4Δ). Circumradius sabhi teen sides aur area se juda hai!
theorem.class10.circum_radius.step4_labe: Formula nikalne ke liye substitute karein
theorem.class10.circum_radius.title: Triangle ki Circum-Radius
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.finalForm: Bara bar arc equal chord ke barabar hota hai.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.keyInsigh: Samaan gear daanton (arc) ke liye smooth meshing ke liye samaan chord ki lambai honi chahiye. Map-making mein, samaan arc of latitude globe par equal chord pehchanate hain.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.practice_: Haan, saman arcs ke saath barabar chords hota hai.
Samanya kendra kee kooni → barabar arcs → barabar chords.
Aur AB aur CD dono ke beech se 60° ki parikalpan hoti hai. Chords AB aur CD bhi barabar hain kya?
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.step1_det: 🎵 Do alag-alag arc ek circle par sochna, jaise circular railway track ke equal-length curved sections.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.step2_det: Kyonki arc bara bar hain, ek arc ko doosre par rotate karein. Unke endpoints match ho jate hain.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.step3_det: Chords corresponding endpoints se judte hain. Kyonki arc perfectly overlap hote hain, chords samaan hona chahiye.
theorem.class10.congruent_arcs.title: Theorem 9.6: Bara bar arc
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.finalFormula: Ek cyclic quadrilateral ke opposite angle ka sum 180° hota hai.
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.keyInsight: Ek rectangular picture frame har baar ek circle mein inscribed ho sakta hai kyunki uske opposite angle 90°+90°=180° hota hai. Is theorem ko surveying mein use kiya jata hai, chaukhat ke char points ek circle par hain ya nahi check karne ke liye!
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.practice_que: Ek cyclic quadrilateral mein, ∠A = 80°. ∠C ko khojna hai.
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step1_detail: 🔷 Ek quadrilateral ABCD ko circle mein inscribed karein (sab vertices circle par hain).
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step1_label: Cyclic quadrilateral ABCD ko draw karein
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step2_detail: O ko A, B, C, D se jodein. Arc BCD ko reflex ∠BOD parikrama karne wala kendra hai. Arc BAD ko ∠BOD parikrama karta hai.
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step2_label: Centre O ko vertices se jod dein
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step3_detail: ∠A = ½×(reflex ∠BOD) aur ∠C = ½×(∠BOD). Do central angles 360° ke sum hote hain.
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step3_label: Central angle theorem ka apply karein
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.step4_detail: ∠A + ∠C = ½(360°) = 180°. Isi tarah, ∠B + ∠D = 180°. Ek cyclic quadrilateral ke opposite angles supplementary hote hain!
theorem.class10.cyclic_quad.title: Theorem 10.12: Ek cyclic quadrilateral ke opposite angle alag-alag hain (supplementary)
theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.fina: Center par ek angle ke barabar hota hai, uske barabar chords hota hai.
theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.keyI: Yeh cycle complete hota hai: barabar chords ↔ barabar central angles ↔ barabar arcs. Engineering mein circular flange par evenly spaced holes banane ke liye use hota hai!
theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.prac: Yes, equal central angles always subtend equal chords.
Central angles ∠AOB = ∠COD = 45°. Chords AB aur CD barabar hain?
theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.step: 📐 AB aur CD ke saath ek do chords draw karein jo ke barabar central angles ke saath hain.
Barabar central angles ke saath chords draw karein
OA = OC (radii), OB = OD (radii), ∠AOB = ∠COD (diya gaya). SAS congruence.
Congruence se, AB = CD. Barabar central angles ke saath chords barabar hota hai.
theorem.class10.equal_angles_chords.titl: Theorem 9.9: Equal Central Angles → Equal Chords
theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.fina: Barabar chords central centre par barabar angles subtend karte hain.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.keyI: Barabar pizza crust slices (chords) barabar central angles ka matlab hai — aapko barabar-sized slices mil jayenge! Yeh theorem yeh batata hai ki circle par barabar spacing equal angles create karta hai, polygon construction mein fundamental hai.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.prac: Barabar chord barabar central koonjey ko subtend karte hain
∠COD = 60°. Barabar chord barabar koonjey ko centre par subtend karte hain.
Barabar chord → barabar central koonjey ko subtend karte hain.
Chord AB = chord CD ek hi circle mein. Agar ∠AOB = 60°, to ∠COD kitna hai?
theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.step: Do barabar chord AB aur CD ek circle mein draw karein. Unke endpoints ko centre O se jod dein.
OA = OC (radii), OB = OD (radii), AB = CD (diya gaya). SSS congruence.
Congruence se, ∠AOB = ∠COD. Barabar chord barabar central koonjey ko subtend karte hain.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_angles.titl: Theorem 9.8: Barabar Chords → Barabar Angles at Centre
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.finalF: Barabar chords saman arcs ko prasann karte hain.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.keyIns: Barabar chords ↔ barabar kendra kee kooni ↔ saman arcs. Yah ek-ek kooni prasangikataa circular geometry aur compass aur straightedge constructions mein upyog ki jaati hai.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.practi: Barabar chords hamesha congruent arcs subtend karte hain.
Barabar chords → barabar central angles → barabar arcs.
Do barabar chords kya kind ki arcs subtend karte hain?
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.step1_: 🔗 Doosre circle par do barabar chords AB aur CD draw karein, jaise do barabar lambai ke strings ek circular instrument par.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.step2_: OA = OB = OC = OD = r aur AB = CD. Isliye triangles SSS ke adhar par barabar hain.
Kendra ko endpoints tak jod do.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.step3_: Triangleon ki barabarata se, central angles barabar hain. Barabar central angles barabar arcs ka matlab hain.
theorem.class10.equal_chords_arcs.title: Theorem 9.7: Barabar Chords → Saman Arcs
Barabar chords centre se ek hi distance par hain.
Do guitar strings (chords) ek hi length ke hain, jo circular sound hole ke centre se ek hi distance par hain. Iska upyog circular structures mein balon ko balance karne ke liye kiya jata hai.
Equal chord centre se ek hi door hain.
Equal chord centre se ek hi door hain.
Equal chord → centre se equal distance.
Centre se 6 unit door do equal chord 16 ki lambai ke hain. Kya distance hai?
✏️ Dua chord AB aur CD ek hi lambai ke hain. Centre se har chord par perpendicular OE aur OF khinchayein.
Theorem 9.3 ke anusaar, E aur F midpoints hain. AE = AB/2, CF = CD/2. Kyunki AB = CD, AE = CF.
Perpendicular bisector property ka upyog karein
Right triangles OAE aur OCF mein, kyunki OA = OC (radius) aur AE = CF: OE² = OF² → OE = OF.
Theorem 9.4: Equal Chords are Equidistant from Centre
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.finalForm: Ek circle ke external point se do tangents ki lambai barabar hoti hai.
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.keyInsigh: Aap ek point se circle par do tangents draw karte hain, toh unki lambai har baar hi barabar hoti hai. Iska istemaal V-belt drives ko design karne mein hota hai, jahan pulleys ke dono side equal hoti hain!
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.practice_: Ek hi point se tangents samaan hote hain
Dono tangents A se ek hi hain: AB = AC = 12 cm.
Ek hi bāhir ke point se do tangents hote hain, unka bharosa samaan hai.
Point A se ek circle par do tangents khinchte hain. Agar ek tangent 12 cm ka hai, to doosra kitna lamba hai?
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.step1_det: 📍 Point A ko circle ke bahar le jayein. Ab circle par do tangents AB aur AC draw karein, jo circle par B aur C points par touch karte hain.
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.step1_lab: External point se tangents draw karein
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.step2_det: OA, OB, OC ko jodein. Theorem 10.2 ke anusaar: OB AB ke saath khatra hai aur OC AC ke saath khatra hai, isliye ∠OBA = ∠OCA = 90°.
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.step3_det: OB = OC (radii), OA = OA (samaan), ∠OBA = ∠OCA = 90°. RHS samanata → AB = AC.
theorem.class10.equal_tangents.title: Theorem 10.3: External Point se do Tangents Barabar hain
theorem.class10.equidistant_chords.final: Centre se ek hi door ke chord ek hi lambai ke hain.
theorem.class10.equidistant_chords.keyIn: This completes the "if and only if": chords are equal ↔ equidistant. This symmetry is fundamental in circular grid design and radial structures like Ferris wheels.
theorem.class10.equidistant_chords.pract: Bara bar centre se samaan doori
Yes, chords at equal distance from the centre are always equal in length.
Equal distances from centre → equal chords.
Two chords are both 8 units from the centre of a circle of radius 10. Are they equal?
theorem.class10.equidistant_chords.step1: 🎪 Draw two chords AB and CD such that their perpendicular distances from the centre (OE and OF) are equal.
theorem.class10.equidistant_chords.step2: Kyunki OA = OC (radii) aur OE = OF: AE² = CF² → AE = CF.
theorem.class10.equidistant_chords.step3: E aur F midpoints hain (Theorem 9.3), isliye AB = 2×AE aur CD = 2×CF. Kyunki AE = CF, hamein AB = CD milta hai.
theorem.class10.equidistant_chords.title: Theorem 9.5: Centre se barabar fasle par chords ki lambai barabar hoti hai.
theorem.class10.ex_radius.finalFormulaDe: Vertex A ke opposite excircle ka radius.
theorem.class10.ex_radius.keyInsight: Exradii hamesha inradius se bare hote hain. Har ex-circle triangle ke ek side aur baqi do sides ke extensions ko touch karta hai. Iska istemal advanced geometry aur triangle geometry ke sawalon mein hota hai.
theorem.class10.ex_radius.practice_expla: r₁ ≈ 3.68. Inradius r ≈ 2.10 se compare karein — exradius bara hai!
theorem.class10.ex_radius.practice_quest: a=5, b=6, c=7, S=9, Δ≈14.7. r₁ maloom karein.
theorem.class10.ex_radius.step1_detail: 🔵 Vertex A ke opposite ex-centre I₁ banayein. Isey teeno vertices se milayen, jisse teen regions ban jayenge.
theorem.class10.ex_radius.step2_detail: Δ = Area(I₁AB) + Area(I₁AC) − Area(I₁BC) kyunki I₁BC original triangle ke bahar hai.
theorem.class10.ex_radius.step3_detail: b + c − a = 2S − 2a = 2(S−a). Isliye Δ = ½r₁ × 2(S−a) = r₁(S−a).
theorem.class10.ex_radius.title: Ek Triangle ka Ex-Radius
theorem.class10.external_touching.finalF: Agar circles bahar se touch karte hain, to centres ke darmiyan fasla radii ke sum ke barabar hota hai.
theorem.class10.external_touching.keyIns: Jab do soap bubbles milte hain, to unke centres ko unke radii ka sum alag karta hai. Isi liye ball bearings inner aur outer races ke darmiyan perfectly fit hote hain.
theorem.class10.external_touching.practi: Do circles jinka radius 3 cm aur 4 cm hai, bahar se touch karte hain. Centres ke darmiyan fasla kya hai?
theorem.class10.external_touching.step1_: 🔵🔵 A aur B centres par do circles banayein jo ek hi point C par touch karte hain.
Do circles bahar se touch karte hain
theorem.class10.external_touching.step2_: A aur B ke darmiyan sabse kam fasla point of contact C se guzarta hai.
Point C line AB par hai
theorem.class10.external_touching.step3_: AC radius r₁ hai, BC radius r₂ hai. Kyunki C line AB par hai: AB = r₁ + r₂.
theorem.class10.external_touching.title: Theorem 10.4: Bahar se Touch karne wale Circles
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.finalForm: Cosines ke half-angle ko side lengths ki madad se directly likhein.
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.keyInsigh: In formulas se aap half-angles ke trigonometric functions ko baghair calculator ke calculate kar sakte hain - sirf side lengths ki zaroorat hoti hai! Ye lunar aur planetary calculations mein istemal hote hain.
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.practice_: a=5, b=6, c=7. S=9. α/2 ke liye cos maloom karein.
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.step1_det: 📊 α ke liye cos = (b²+c²−a²)/(2bc). Yeh cos ke full angle ko side lengths ki madad se batata hai.
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.step1_lab: Law of Cosines se shuru karein.
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.step3_det: Semi-perimeter S = (a+b+c)/2 ka istemal karke algebra ki madad se, hamein milta hai: cos²(α/2) = S(S−a)/(bc).
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.step3_lab: α/2 ke liye cos² ko solve karein
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.step4_det: Positive square root lene se half-angle cosine milta hai. Yeh formula side lengths ki madad se trigonometric ratio deta hai!
theorem.class10.half_angle_cos.title: Cosines ke liye Half Angle Formula
theorem.class10.half_angle_sin.finalForm: Sines ke liye Half Angle Formula ko side lengths ki madad se directly likhein.
theorem.class10.half_angle_sin.keyInsigh: Cosine half-angle formula ke sath mil kar, ye Hero's formula mein aur navigation aur astronomy ke dilchasp ilam mein istemal hote hain!
theorem.class10.half_angle_sin.practice_: a=5, b=6, c=7. S=9. sin(α/2) maloom karein.
theorem.class10.half_angle_sin.step1_det: Cos α = 1 − 2sin²(α/2) se shuru karein, aur phir Law of Cosines ka istemal karein.
theorem.class10.half_angle_sin.step2_det: Algebraic manipulation ke baad, hamein milta hai ke sin²(α/2) = (S−b)(S−c)/(bc).
theorem.class10.half_angle_sin.step3_det: Cosine half-angle formula ke sath mil kar, ye navigation aur astronomy ke dilchasp ilam mein istemal hote hain!
theorem.class10.half_angle_sin.title: Sines ke liye Half Angle Formula
theorem.class10.heros_formula.finalFormu: Ek triangle ke teeno sides ki lambai ki madad se uska area nikalna.
theorem.class10.heros_formula.keyInsight: Yeh 2,000 saal purana formula Hero of Alexandria ne banaya tha, jo sirf sides ki lambai par depend karta hai — koi angle ya trigonometry nahi! Aaj bhi yeh formula land surveying, GPS area calculation, aur computer graphics mein istemal hota hai.
theorem.class10.heros_formula.practice_e: Δ = √900 = 30. Yeh ek 5-12-13 right triangle hai!
theorem.class10.heros_formula.practice_q: a=5, b=12, c=13. S aur area maloom karein.
theorem.class10.heros_formula.step1_deta: 📏 Aapne ek triangular garden ke teeno sides ki lambai measure ki: a=5m, b=6m, c=7m. Δ = ½ bc sin α se shuru karein.
theorem.class10.heros_formula.step1_labe: Δ = ½ bc sin α se shuru karein.
theorem.class10.heros_formula.step2_deta: Double-angle identity ka istemal karke: sin α = 2 sin(α/2) cos(α/2). Ab half-angle formulas ko put karein.
theorem.class10.heros_formula.step2_labe: Sin α = 2 sin(α/2) cos(α/2) ka istemal karein.
theorem.class10.heros_formula.step3_deta: Sin(α/2) = √[(S−b)(S−c)/(bc)] aur cos(α/2) = √[S(S−a)/(bc)] ko put karne se, bc terms cancel ho jate hain, aur Hero ka formula mil jata hai!
theorem.class10.heros_formula.title: Hero ka Formula (SSS)
theorem.class10.in_radius.finalFormulaDe: Ek triangle ke andar maujud circle ka radius.
theorem.class10.in_radius.keyInsight: Incircle woh sabse bara circle hai jo ek triangle ke andar fit ho sakta hai. Yeh formula ek triangular box ke andar fit aane wale pizza ka radius nikalne ke liye istemal hota hai — inradius!
theorem.class10.in_radius.practice_expla: r = 2. Ek 6-8-10 right triangle ka inradius 2 hota hai.
theorem.class10.in_radius.practice_quest: a=6, b=8, c=10. Area=24. Inradius maloom karein.
theorem.class10.in_radius.step1_detail: Incircle teeno sides ko triangle ke andar se touch karta hai. Iska centre I angle bisectors ke intersection par hota hai.
theorem.class10.in_radius.step2_detail: Incentre I triangle ΔABC ko teen chhote triangles mein taqseem karta hai, jin mein se har ek ki height r hoti hai.
theorem.class10.in_radius.step2_label: Triangle ko teen hisson mein taqseem karein
theorem.class10.in_radius.step3_detail: Δ = r(a+b+c)/2 = rS. Isliye r = Δ/S.
theorem.class10.in_radius.title: Ek Triangle ka In-Radius
theorem.class10.internal_touching.finalF: Agar circles andar se touch karte hain, to unke darmiyan fasla unke radii ke difference ke barabar hota hai.
theorem.class10.internal_touching.keyIns: Ball bearings is principle ka istemal karte hain: inner race (chhota circle) outer race (bara circle) ko andar se ek hi point par touch karta hai.
theorem.class10.internal_touching.practi: Do circles jinke radii 5 cm aur 2 cm hain, andar se touch karte hain. Centres ke darmiyan fasla kya hai?
theorem.class10.internal_touching.step1_: ⭕🔵 Ek bara circle (radius r₁) aur ek chhota circle (radius r₂) banayein, jo C par touch karte hain.
Andar se touch karne wale circles banayein.
theorem.class10.internal_touching.step2_: Circles C par touch karte hain, jo line AB par hai. Chhota circle bare circle ke andar hai.
Point C line AB par hai.
theorem.class10.internal_touching.step3_: Outer circle ke liye: AC = r₁. Inner circle ke liye: BC = r₂. Kyunki B andar hai: AB = r₁ − r₂.
theorem.class10.internal_touching.title: Theorem 10.5: Andar se Touch karne wale Circles
theorem.class10.law_cosines.finalFormula: Pythagoras ka rule kisi bhi triangle ke liye aam hai, sirf right-angled triangle ke liye nahi.
theorem.class10.law_cosines.keyInsight: Surveyors iska istemal zameen ke plots ki measurement karne ke liye karte hain. Agar aapko do sides aur unke darmiyan ka angle (SAS) maloom hai, to aap teesri side ko baghair wahan jaye calculate kar sakte hain!
theorem.class10.law_cosines.practice_que: b=5, c=6, α=60°. Side a maloom karein
theorem.class10.law_cosines.step1_detail: A se side BC par ek perpendicular AD girayein, jis se do right triangles banenge
theorem.class10.law_cosines.step1_label: Altitude AD ko BC par perpendicular girayein
theorem.class10.law_cosines.step2_detail: CD = a − c cos β. Altitude base ko do hisson mein taqseem karti hai
theorem.class10.law_cosines.step3_detail: b² = c² sin²β + a² + c² cos²β − 2ac cos β
theorem.class10.law_cosines.step3_label: Pythagoras ko ADC right triangle par lagayein
theorem.class10.law_cosines.step4_detail: b² = a² + c²(sin²β + cos²β) − 2ac cos β = a² + c² − 2ac cos β. Jab β = 90° hota hai, to yeh Pythagorean Theorem ban jata hai!
theorem.class10.law_cosines.step4_label: sin²+cos²=1 ka istemal karke simplify karein
theorem.class10.law_cosines.title: Law of Cosines
theorem.class10.law_sines.finalFormulaDe: Ek side ki ratio uski opposite angle ki sine ke sath, constant rehti hai.
theorem.class10.law_sines.keyInsight: GPS satellites iska istemal karte hain! Mukhtalif satellites se angles maloom karke, aapka phone Law of Sines ka istemal karte hue kisi bhi jagah par aapki exact position maloom karta hai.
theorem.class10.law_sines.practice_quest: a=7, α=50°, β=70°. Side b maloom karein.
theorem.class10.law_sines.step1_detail: 🌄 B se AC tak perpendicular girayein. Altitude h ko do tarah se likha ja sakta hai: h = c sin α aur h = a sin γ.
theorem.class10.law_sines.step1_label: B se AC tak altitude h girayein
theorem.class10.law_sines.step2_detail: Dono ek hi altitude ke barabar hain: c sin α = a sin γ → a/sin α = c/sin γ.
theorem.class10.law_sines.step3_detail: Doosre altitudes ke sath bhi yahi karke mukammal Law of Sines hasil karein.
theorem.class10.law_sines.step3_label: Baaki sides ke liye bhi yehi karein
theorem.class10.law_sines.title: Law of Sines
theorem.class10.law_tangents.finalFormul: Side lengths ko half angle sums aur differences ke tangents ke sath jorta hai.
theorem.class10.law_tangents.keyInsight: Navigation aur surveying mein, jab do sides aur unke darmiyan ka angle maloom ho, to Law of Tangents ko Law of Cosines par tarjeeh di jati hai kyunki yeh square roots se bachata hai aur behtar results deta hai!
theorem.class10.law_tangents.step1_detai: 📐 a/sin α = b/sin β se, hamein a/b = sin α/sin β milta hai.
theorem.class10.law_tangents.step1_label: Law of Sines se shuru karein
theorem.class10.law_tangents.step2_detai: Componendo-dividendo ka istemal karke: (a+b)/(a−b) = (sin α + sin β)/(sin α − sin β).
theorem.class10.law_tangents.step3_detai: sin α + sin β = 2 sin[(α+β)/2] cos[(α−β)/2] aur sin α − sin β = 2 cos[(α+β)/2] sin[(α−β)/2]. Is nateeje ko tangent mein tabdeel karne ke liye istemal kiya jata hai.
theorem.class10.law_tangents.title: Law of Tangents
theorem.class10.major_segment.finalFormu: Semicircle se bare segment mein angle acute hota hai.
theorem.class10.major_segment.keyInsight: Theorem 10.11 ke sath milakar, yeh circular segments mein angles ki poori range ko cover karta hai. Semicircle 90° par ek boundary hai, acute aur obtuse ke darmiyan.
theorem.class10.major_segment.practice_e: Major segment mein angles acute (< 90°) hote hain.
theorem.class10.major_segment.practice_q: Major segment mein banne wala angle acute hota hai ya obtuse?
theorem.class10.major_segment.step1_deta: 📐 AB chord ka ek bara segment banayein (semicircle se bara). Major arc par ek point P chunein.
theorem.class10.major_segment.step1_labe: Chord AB se ek major segment banayein
theorem.class10.major_segment.step2_deta: Bare segment ka central angle 180° se kam hota hai.
theorem.class10.major_segment.step3_deta: Kyunki central angle 180° se kam hai, inscribed angle 90° se kam (acute) hota hai.
theorem.class10.major_segment.title: Theorem 10.10: Major Segment mein angle < 90° hota hai
theorem.class10.minor_segment.finalFormu: Ek segment mein banne wala angle jo semicircle se chhota ho, wo obtuse hota hai.
theorem.class10.minor_segment.keyInsight: Yeh classification isay mukammal karti hai: major segment → acute (< 90°), semicircle → right (= 90°), minor segment → obtuse (> 90°). Yahi khoobsoorat nateeja right angles ko itna khaas banata hai!
theorem.class10.minor_segment.practice_e: Ek minor segment mein angle 90° se zyada hota hai (obtuse).
theorem.class10.minor_segment.practice_q: Ek minor segment mein banne wala angle acute hota hai ya obtuse?
theorem.class10.minor_segment.step1_deta: 📐 Ek chord AB banayein jo ek minor segment (semicircle se chhota) banata hai.
theorem.class10.minor_segment.step1_labe: Ek chord banayein jo minor segment banata hai.
theorem.class10.minor_segment.step2_deta: Minor segment se banne wala central angle 180° se bara hota hai.
theorem.class10.minor_segment.step3_deta: Ek angle jo 180° se bara hota hai, uska aadha ek inscribed angle hota hai jo 90° se bara (obtuse) hota hai.
theorem.class10.minor_segment.title: Theorem 10.11: Minor Segment mein angle > 90° hota hai
theorem.class10.perp_bisects.finalFormul: Centre se aane wala perpendicular chord ko barabar hisson mein taqseem karta hai.
theorem.class10.perp_bisects.keyInsight: Yeh Theorem 9.2 ka ulat hai. In dono theorems ne chord calculations ki bunyad rakhi hai — arches, bridges, aur Colosseum jaise circular structures design karne mein inka istemal hota hai!
theorem.class10.perp_bisects.practice_qu: Ek chord 16 units lamba hai, jo centre se 6 units ke fasle par hai. To radius kya hoga?
theorem.class10.perp_bisects.step1_detai: 🎯 AB ek chord hai aur centre O se ek perpendicular girayein jo AB par C par milta hai.
theorem.class10.perp_bisects.step2_detai: OA aur OB radii hain, isliye OA = OB. Triangle OAB isosceles hai.
theorem.class10.perp_bisects.step3_detai: OA = OB (radii), OC = OC (common), ∠OCA = ∠OCB = 90°. Isliye RHS rule se triangles congruent hain. Isliye AC = BC.
theorem.class10.perp_bisects.title: Theorem 9.3: Centre se aane wala perpendicular chord ko bisect karta hai
theorem.class10.perp_radius_tangent.fina: Circle par radius ke aakhri siray par banne wali perpendicular line tangent hoti hai.
theorem.class10.perp_radius_tangent.keyI: Yeh tangents banane ka tareeqa hai — sirf radius ke aakhri siray par ek perpendicular banayein. Yeh roller coaster tracks aur railway curves design karne mein istemal hota hai!
theorem.class10.perp_radius_tangent.prac: Radius ke siray par perpendicular line = tangent
Radius ke siray par perpendicular line kya hoti hai?
Ek radius ke aakhri siray par perpendicular line banayi gayi hai. Yeh kya kehlati hai?
theorem.class10.perp_radius_tangent.step: 🔄 Circle par centre O se point A tak ek radius OA banayein. A par OA ke perpendicular line PQ banayein.
Kyunki OA perpendicular distance hai, isliye yeh O se PQ tak ka sabse kam fasla hai. PQ par koi bhi doosra point O se zyada door hoga.
O se PQ par koi bhi doosra point radius se zyada door hai, isliye koi bhi doosra point circle par nahi hai.
Ek line jo circle ko sirf ek hi point par touch karti hai, tangent kehlati hai. Ek radius ke siray par perpendicular banayein aur tangent tayyar!
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.finalF: Kisi bhi quadratic equation ax² + bx + c = 0 ko solve karne ka universal formula.
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.keyIns: Discriminant D = b²−4ac aapko sab kuch batata hai: D > 0 ka matlab 2 real roots hain (parabola x-axis ko do baar cross karta hai), D = 0 ka matlab 1 root hai (ek baar touch karta hai), D < 0 ka matlab koi real roots nahi hain (kabhi cross nahi karta). Architects iska istemal arches design karne ke liye karte hain jo kisi khaas fasle ko perfectly cover karte hain!
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.practi: x = 2 ya 3. Quadratic formula dono roots maloom karta hai!
Formula ka istemal karke x² − 5x + 6 = 0 ko solve karein.
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.step1_: Aap ek architect hain jo ek parabolic arch design kar rahe hain. Curve ax² + bx + c = 0 ke asoolon par chalti hai. Aapko ek aisa formula chahiye jo kisi bhi arch ki shakal ke liye kaam kare. General quadratic equation se shuru karein.
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.step2_: Constant c ko doosri taraf le jayen: ax² + bx = −c. Arch ki height iski shakal par asar nahi dalti, sirf isey oopar ya neeche shift karti hai.
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.step3_: a se divide karein taakay x² ka coefficient 1 ban jaye. Iske baad completing the square setup ki baari aati hai.
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.step4_: Dono taraf (b/2a)² jama karein: x² + (b/a)x + (b/2a)² = (b/2a)² − c/a. Left side x² + (b/a)x + (b/2a)² simplify ho jati hai, aur right side (b²−4ac)/(4a²) ban jati hai.
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.step5_: Square root lein: x + b/2a = ±√(b²−4ac)/(2a). X ko alag karein aur Quadratic Formula hasil karein. Algebra mein is formula ka sabse zyada istemal hota hai!
Square root lein aur solve karein
theorem.class10.quadratic_formula.title: Quadratic Formula ki Derivation
theorem.class10.same_segment.finalFormul: Same segment mein banne wale sabhi angles jo ek hi chord se bante hain, barabar hote hain.
theorem.class10.same_segment.keyInsight: Circular arc par koi bhi point, ek chord ko same angle se dekh sakta hai. Circular sports stadiums mein 'goal line' isi asool par banayi jati hai — har seat se barabar ka viewing angle milta hai!
theorem.class10.same_segment.practice_er: Ek hi segment mein banne wale angles barabar hote hain.
theorem.class10.same_segment.practice_ex: ∠ADB = 40° kyunki dono angles same segment mein hain.
theorem.class10.same_segment.practice_hi: Ek hi segment mein banne wale angles barabar hote hain.
theorem.class10.same_segment.practice_qu: ∠ACB 40° segment mein hai. D bhi same segment par hai, to ∠ADB kitna hoga?
theorem.class10.same_segment.step1_detai: 🎯 Chord AB banayein. Same segment par circle ke points C, D, E lein.
theorem.class10.same_segment.step1_label: Chord AB banayein aur same segment par points lein.
theorem.class10.same_segment.step2_detai: Ye sab angles, chord AB ko same arc ke mukhtalif points par subtend karte hain.
theorem.class10.same_segment.step3_detai: Ye sab, central angle ∠AOB (Theorem 10.7) ke aadhe ke barabar hain. Kyunki ye same central angle ke aadhe ke barabar hain, to inhein barabar hi hona chahiye!
theorem.class10.same_segment.step3_label: Sab angles ∠AOB ke aadhe ke barabar hain.
theorem.class10.same_segment.title: Theorem 10.8: Same Segment mein banne wale Angles barabar hote hain
theorem.class10.semicircle.finalFormulaD: Ek semicircle mein inscribed angle hamesha 90° hota hai.
theorem.class10.semicircle.keyInsight: Yeh theorem Thales of Miletus (c. 600 BCE) ki taraf mansoob hai, yeh pehle maloom karda theorems mein se ek hai. Egyptian pyramid bananewalon ne iska istemal right angles banane ke liye kiya tha. GPS triangulation mein 'circle of possibilities' ki bunyad yahi hai!
theorem.class10.semicircle.practice_ques: AB ek diameter hai. Point P semicircle par maujud hai. ∠APB kya hoga?
theorem.class10.semicircle.step1_detail: 🌓 AB diameter wala ek circle banayein jo centre O se guzarta hai. Semicircle arc par kahin bhi point P chun lein.
theorem.class10.semicircle.step2_detail: Chord AB ke liye central angle ∠AOB = 180° hai. Theorem 10.7 ke mutabiq, ∠APB = ½ × 180° = 90° hota hai.
theorem.class10.semicircle.step3_detail: P semicircle arc par kisi bhi jagah ho, ∠APB 90° hi rehta hai!
theorem.class10.semicircle.step3_label: Kisi bhi point P ke liye kaam karta hai.
theorem.class10.semicircle.title: Theorem 10.9: Semicircle mein banne wala angle Right Angle hota hai
theorem.class10.tangent_perp_radius.fina: Tangent aur point of contact par banne wala radius perpendicular hote hain.
theorem.class10.tangent_perp_radius.keyI: Yahi wajah hai ke bicycle wheel ki spokes (radii) contact point par ground (tangent) ke perpendicular hoti hain. Yeh property wheel design aur railway engineering mein nihayat zaroori hai.
theorem.class10.tangent_perp_radius.prac: Tangent point of contact par radius ke perpendicular hoti hai.
Radius OB tangent par B ke maqam par milta hai. Unke darmiyan angle kya hoga?
theorem.class10.tangent_perp_radius.step: ⭕ Circle ke centre O par ek circle banayein. Circle ko P aur Q se tangent karte hue B par touch karwayen. Radius OB banayein.
Agar OB perpendicular nahi hai, to PQ par koi aur point maujud hai jiska fasla O se B ke fasle se kam hai.
Farz karein ke yeh dono perpendicular nahi hain
Yeh qareebi point circle ke andar maujud hai, isliye PQ circle se do points par milti hai — lekin PQ ek tangent hai, jiska matlab hai yeh sirf ek hi point par milti hai.
Hamari farz karda baat ghalat thi, isliye OB PQ ke perpendicular hai. Radius aur tangent hamesha perpendicular hote hain.
Isliye OB PQ ke perpendicular hai
theorem.class10.tangent_perp_radius.titl: Theorem 10.2: Tangent ⟂ Radius Point of Contact par
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.final: Teen points jo ek line par na hon, wo milk kar ek muqarar circle banate hain.
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.keyIn: Yeh theorem is baat ki misaal hai ke ek tripod ki teen taangein hamesha zameen ko touch karti hain — koi bhi teen non-collinear points ek muqarar circle banate hain. GPS trilateration is asool ka istemal karke position dhoondta hai!
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.pract: Koi bhi teen non-collinear points ek circle define karte hain
Har triangle (3 non-collinear points) sirf ek hi circumcircle define karta hai.
Har triangle ka ek apna circumcircle hota hai.
Teen points milk kar ek triangle banate hain jiski sides 3, 4, 5 hain. Un mein se banne wale unique circle ko kya kehte hain?
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.step1: 📍 Aap koi bhi teen points A, B, C chunein jo ek straight line par na hon. Inko mila kar ek triangle banayein.
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.step2: Kisi bhi do sides ke perpendicular bisectors banayein. Ye ek hi point O par milte hain, jo circumcentre kehlata hai.
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.step3: O AB ke bisector par maujud hai, isliye OA = OB hai. Isi tarah, O BC ke bisector par bhi hai, isliye OB = OC hai. Lihaza, OA = OB = OC.
O sab se barabar fasle par hai
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.step4: Agar points collinear hote, to bisectors parallel hote aur kabhi na milte - jisse pata chalta hai ke collinear points ek circle par nahi aa sakte!
theorem.class10.three_point_circle.title: Theorem 9.1: Teen Non-Collinear Points ek Circle Define Karte Hain
theorem.class10.vector_diff.finalFormula: Vector AB, B ki position vector aur A ki position vector ka farq hai.
theorem.class10.vector_diff.keyInsight: GPS navigation har second iska istemal karta hai! Aapka phone aapki mojooda position vector aur aapki manzil ki position vector ko aapas mein subtract karta hai. Yeh physics aur engineering mein har qism ki movement maloom karne ki bunyad hai.
theorem.class10.vector_diff.practice_que: A=(1,2), B=(4,6). AB ka x-component kaise nikalte hain?
theorem.class10.vector_diff.step1_detail: Aap do delivery drones ko track kar rahe hain. Drone A (2, 3) par hai aur drone B (7, 5) par. Control tower (origin O) se unki position vectors ã aur b⃗ hain.
theorem.class10.vector_diff.step2_detail: O se B tak jaane ke liye A ke raste: OA + AB = OB. Yeh vector addition ka triangle rule hai.
theorem.class10.vector_diff.step3_detail: AB = OB − OA. Vector A se B tak jaane ka raasta darasal do position vectors ka difference hai.
theorem.class10.vector_diff.step4_detail: AB = (x₂−x₁, y₂−y₁). Aapko har direction mein hone wali displacement ka pata chal jata hai. Magnitude |AB| = √((x₂−x₁)² + (y₂−y₁)²) aapko seedhi line ka fasla deta hai.
theorem.class10.vector_diff.title: Position Vectors se Vector banana
theorem.class11.arithmetico_geometric_su: Yeh series arithmetic (jis mein har term mein ek constant d shamil hota hai) aur geometric (jis mein har term ko r se zarb di jati hai) ko milaati hai. Loan wapas karne ke schedules banate waqt, compound interest ke sath tay shuda payments isi tarah calculate hoti hain!
Pehle n terms likh kar unko jama karein
a=1, d=2, r=3, n=2. S₂ maloom karein (pehli term = a=1, doosri term = (a+d)r = 9).

Aap ek banker hain jo ek loan ka hisaab kar rahe hain, jis mein fixed payments aur compound interest shamil hain. Pehli payment a hai, phir har aane wali payment mein d (inflation) ka izafa hota hai, aur interest r rate se compound hota hai.
Series ko jama ki soorat mein likhein
r se multiply karein: rSₙ = ar + (a+d)r² + (a+2d)r³ + ... + [a+(n−1)d]rⁿ.
Subtract karein: (1−r)Sₙ = a + dr + dr² + ... + drⁿ⁻¹ − (a+nd)rⁿ. a ki terms aasani se hal ho jati hain, aur d ki terms ek geometric series banati hain!

Darmiyani dr terms ek geometric series banati hain: dr(1+r+...+rⁿ⁻²) = dr(1−rⁿ⁻¹)/(1−r). (1−r) se divide karne par complete formula mil jata hai. Isi tarah actuaries tiered annuity payments calculate karte hain!
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.finalFo: (a+b)ⁿ ko binomial coefficients wali terms ke sum ke roop mein likhein.
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.keyInsi: Binomial Theorem probability (binomial distribution), finance (binomial options pricing model), aur fractal geometry (Pascal's Triangle se Sierpinski triangle banata hai!) jaise mukhtalif fields mein hisaab ka ek zabardast tool hai.
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.practic: Pascal's Triangle ki row n aur position k istemal karein
Row 4 of Pascal's triangle: 1, 4, 6, 4, 1. Coefficient of a²b² = ⁴C₂ = 6
Find the coefficient of a²b² in (a+b)⁴.
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.step1_d: 🌳 You're a geneticist tracking how a trait spreads through a family tree. Each generation inherits one allele from each parent. The expansion of (A+B)ⁿ gives all possible genotype combinations!
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.step2_d: 📐 Assume the theorem holds for n = k: (a+b)ᵏ = Σ ᵏCᵢ aᵏ⁻ⁱ bⁱ.
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.step3_d: 🧮 To prove for k+1, multiply both sides by (a+b): (a+b)ᵏ⁺¹ = (a+b)(ᵏC₀aᵏ + ᵏC₁aᵏ⁻¹b + ... + ᵏCₖbᵏ).
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.step4_d: ✅ After distributing and grouping like terms, the coefficients follow Pascal's identity: ᵏCᵣ₋₁ + ᵏCᵣ = ᵏ⁺¹Cᵣ. Therefore (a+b)ᵏ⁺¹ = Σ ᵏ⁺¹Cᵣ aᵏ⁺¹⁻ʳ bʳ. By induction, the theorem holds for all positive integers n!
theorem.class11.binomial_theorem.title: Binomial Theorem for Positive Integers
theorem.class11.combination_formula.fina: n distinct objects se r objects chunne ke tarah
theorem.class11.combination_formula.keyI: Chunav ke tarah, order ke bare mein koi fayda nahin hota. Agar aap 10 logon se ek 3-person committee chun rahe hain, to unhein kaise chun rahe hain, uska koi fayda nahin hota — ¹⁰C₃ = 120 tarah hain! Yah formula probability calculations ke liye asaani se kaam aati hai.
theorem.class11.combination_formula.prac: ⁵C₂ = 10. 5 logon se 2 chunne ke 10 tarah hain.
theorem.class11.combination_formula.step: Aap 5 volunteers se ek 3-person team organize kar rahe hain. Pehle aap permutations (ordered arrangements) ke bare mein sochte hain, lekin realize karte hain ki order ka koi fayda nahin hota — Alice, Bob, Charlie ko pick karne ka saman Charlie, Bob, Alice ko pick karne ka saman hai.
X = combinations ke number ko rakhein
📐 Har r objects ke combination ke liye, r! tarah ke arrangements ho sakte hain. Isliye, permutations (ordered) ke number = combinations ke number × arrangements: ⁿPᵣ = X × r!.
🧮 Hum jaante hain ⁿPᵣ = n!/(n−r)!. Substituting: X × r! = n!/(n−r)!.

✅ Dono taraf par r! se divide karein: X = ⁿCᵣ = n!/(r!(n−r)!). 5-choose-3 ke liye: ⁵C₃ = 5!/(3!2!) = 120/(6×2) = 10. 5 logon se 3-person teams banane ke 10 tarah hain. Yah binomial distribution aur Pascal's Triangle ka asar hai!
theorem.class11.complex_division_polar.f: Magnitude ko divide karein, angles ko subtract karein.
theorem.class11.complex_division_polar.k: Complex division polar form mein elegant hai: magnitude ko divide karein aur angles ko subtract karein! Yeh rectangular form se kafi aasan hai aur AC power systems ke liye phasor analysis mein use hota hai.
theorem.class11.complex_division_polar.p: z₁=4(cos 90°+i sin 90°), z₂=2(cos 30°+i sin 30°). Pata karein r₁/r₂.
theorem.class11.complex_division_polar.s: Ek electrical engineer ek power grid ko analyze kar raha hai. Do AC voltages hain: z₁ = r₁(cos θ₁ + i sin θ₁) aur z₂ = r₂(cos θ₂ + i sin θ₂). Unki qisam ko find karne ke liye, unhein polar form mein divide karein.
📐 Numerator aur denominator ko denominator ka conjugate se guna karein
🧮 Badhne ke baad: denominator cos²θ₂ + sin²θ₂ = 1 ban jata hai. Numerator angle sum/difference identities ka istemal karke saral hota hai.
Saral kar trig identities ka istemal karke
✅ cos θ₁ cos θ₂ + sin θ₁ sin θ₂ = cos(θ₁−θ₂) aur sin θ₁ cos θ₂ − cos θ₁ sin θ₂ = sin(θ₁−θ₂). Isliye z₁/z₂ = (r₁/r₂)[cos(θ₁−θ₂) + i sin(θ₁−θ₂)] — magnitude ko divide karein, angle ko subtract karein!
Aur difference identities ka upyog karein
theorem.class11.complex_division_polar.t: Complex Numbers ka Polar Form mein Division
theorem.class11.complex_inverse_polar.fi: Polar form mein multiplicative inverse ka use conjugate ka hota hai.
theorem.class11.complex_inverse_polar.ke: Real numbers ke liye 2⁻¹ = ½ jaisa, har non-zero complex number z = r(cos θ + i sin θ) ke liye inverse hota hai. Inverse ko magnitude r ko divide karke aur angle ko negate karke paya jaata hai!
theorem.class11.complex_inverse_polar.pr: |z⁻¹| = 1/2. Inverse ka magnitude reciprocal hota hai.
theorem.class11.complex_inverse_polar.st: 🔄 Aap ek electrical circuit design kar rahe hain jo AC signals ko complex numbers ke roop mein represent karta hai. Parallel component ka impedance nikalne ke liye, aapko Z ke 1/Z ko compute karna hoga. Shuruat mein z = r(cos θ + i sin θ) se, z⁻¹ = 1/z likhna hai.
📐 Rationalization karne ke liye, numerator aur denominator ko conjugate cos θ − i sin θ se multiply karein.
🧮 Kuchh is tarah hai: i² = −1: cos²θ − i² sin²θ = cos²θ + sin²θ = 1 (Pythagorean identity!). Denominator r × 1 = r mein badal jaata hai.
✅ z⁻¹ = (1/r)(cos θ − i sin θ). Magnitude 1/r aur angle −θ hai. AC circuits mein, yeh parallel circuit analysis ke liye essential hai!
theorem.class11.complex_inverse_polar.ti: Complex Number ka Inverse Polar Form mein
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.finalF: z = x + iy ki magnitude uska complex plane mein mool sthan se doori hai.
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.keyIns: Magnitude |z| ko modulus ya absolute value bhi kaha jata hai. Yeh complex number z = x + iy ki complex plane mein mool sthan se doori ko maapta hai, jaise ki distance formula! Yeh signal processing mein fundamental hai jahaan |z| ek signal ki amplitude ko darshata hai.
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.practi: |3 + 4i| = 5. Complex plane par classic 3-4-5 triangle hai!
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.step1_: Aap ek radar operator hain jo ek plane ko ek circular radar screen par track kar rahe hain. Plane ki position (x, y) par hai — real part x east-west coordinate hai, aur imaginary part y north-south coordinate hai. Centre (origin) se distance range ke liye zaroori hai.
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.step2_: Magnitude ka definition |z| = √(x² + y²) hai. Kyonki real numbers ke squares hamesha ≥ 0 hota hai: x² ≥ 0 aur y² ≥ 0, isliye x² + y² ≥ 0. Ek non-negative number ka square root bhi non-negative hota hai, isliye |z| ≥ 0.
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.step3_: Suppose |z| = 0. To √(x² + y²) = 0 → x² + y² = 0. Do squares ka sum sirf zero ho sakta hai agar dono zero ho: x = 0 aur y = 0. Isliye z = 0 + 0i = 0.
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.step4_: Conversely, agar z = 0 = 0 + 0i, to |z| = √(0² + 0²) = 0. Isliye, |z| = 0 agar aur sirf agar z = 0. Yeh fact control systems mein feedback signal ki check karne ke liye use hota hai ki woh zero par converge ho gaya hai ya nahi!
theorem.class11.complex_magnitude.title: Complex Number ki Magnitude
theorem.class11.determinant_identical.fi: Do alag-alag rows ya columns wali matrix ka determinant zero hota hai.
theorem.class11.determinant_identical.ke: Yeh matlab hai: agar do rows ek hi hain, to matrix singular (non-invertible) hai. System of equations mein redundant information hota hai aur unique solution nahin hota. Isse lagta hai ki do hi directions se ek point ko pakadna hai!
theorem.class11.determinant_identical.pr: det(A) = 0. Identical rows se matrix singular hota hai.
Identical rows → determinant zero hona chahiye
Ek 3×3 matrix ke pehle aur doosre rows identical hain. det(A) kya hai?
theorem.class11.determinant_identical.st: Aapka GPS receiver teen satellite signals (rows) ka istemal karke aapki position ko triangulate karta hai. Agar do satellites identical signals (identical rows) bhejte hain, to receiver unhe distinguish nahin kar sakta hai — unique location nahin pata lag sakta hai!

Agar hum Row 1 aur Row 2 ko swap karte hain, kyunki ve identical hain, matrix B matrix A se identical hai. Lekin interchange property ke hisab se, row swap determinant sign ko flip karta hai: |B| = −|A|.
Kyun ki B = A (identical rows) hai, |B| = |A| hai. Lekin interchange property ke hisab se, |B| = −|A| bhi hai. Isliye |A| = −|A| hai.
Do expressions ko ek saath seta karein.
|A| ko dono sides par add karne se: 2|A| = 0 → |A| = 0. Isliye Gauss-Jordan elimination dependent rows ke liye break hota hai — determinant zero hone se matrix singular hota hai!
Koi bhi do rows ya columns swap karne se determinant ko -1 se ghana hota hai.

Yeh property kehata hai ki determinant ek alternating multilinear function hai. Rows swap karne se ek parallelogram ki orientation flip ho jaati hai — signed area ka sign badal jaata hai! Computer graphics mein polygon winding order detection ke liye use hota hai.
Row swap karne par sign flip hota hai.
Rows swap karne se sign flip hota hai.
det(A) = 5 hai. Aap do rows swap karte hain. Naya determinant kya hai?

Aap ek system of 3 equations ko solve kar rahe hain, aur aapne pehle do equations ko galat se swap kar diya hai. Isse determinant kaise affect hota hai? Aap Row 1 aur Row 2 ko swap karke A se B banayein.
Do A ki do rows ko swap karke B banayein
Expanding |B| ki pehli row se ek alag-dalal expression milta hai.
B ko Row 1 se expand karein
Terms ko rearrange karke aur factor karke, bracket ke andar ki expression A ki pehli row se expansion se match hota hai.

Determinant ka sign badalta hai. Do rows swap karne se original sign wapas aata hai. Yeh property hai ki Cramer's rule ka kaam karta hai — aur yeh hai ki do identical rows wala determinant zero hona chahiye (kyonki unhe swap karke |A| = −|A| → 2|A| = 0 → |A| = 0 ho jata hai)!
theorem.class11.determinant_transpose.fi: Matrix ko transpose karne se uski determinant badal nahin jati.
theorem.class11.determinant_transpose.ke: Matrix ki determinant aur uski transpose ki determinant always barabar hoti hai. Isse row aur column operations ki prabhav identical hota hai — ek key symmetry jo linear algebra ki kai proof ko simplify karta hai!
theorem.class11.determinant_transpose.pr: A 2×2 matrix hai, det(A) = 7 hai. det(Aᵀ) kya hai?
theorem.class11.determinant_transpose.st: Aap ek cryptographer hain jo matrix encryption ke saath kaam karte hain. Matrix A = [[a₁₁, a₁₂, a₁₃], [a₂₁, a₂₂, a₂₃], [a₃₁, a₃₂, a₃₃]] aapki message ko encode karta hai. Transpose karne se determinant kaise badal jata hai?
Ek 3×3 matrix A ko consider karein.
📐 Aᵀ mein rows aur columns swap ho jate hain: Aᵀ = [[a₁₁, a₂₁, a₃₁], [a₁₂, a₂₂, a₃₂], [a₁₃, a₂₃, a₃₃]]. A ke position (i,j) mein element Aᵀ ke position (j,i) mein jaata hai.
🧮 Column 1 se |Aᵀ| expand karne se, Row 1 se |A| expand karne se ek hi expression milta hai. Har term match karta hai.
✅ Dono expansions identical hain, isliye |A| = |Aᵀ|. Isliye, determinants ke rows ke kisi bhi theorem automatically columns par bhi apply karta hai — ek powerful symmetry linear algebra mein!
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.finalForm: (x−c) p(x) ka ek factor hai agar aur hi p(c) = 0 hai.
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.keyInsigh: Yeh polynomials ko factor karne ke liye sabse powerful tool hai! Agar aap ek root guess kar sakte hain (jaise x=1, x=−1, x=2), to aap (x−c) ko factor kar sakte hain aur polynomial degree ko 1 reduce kar sakte hain. Yeh onion ki layers ko peel karne jaisa hai!
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.practice_: p(2) ko check karein. Agar p(2) = 0, toh yeh ek factor hai.
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.step1_det: Aap ek codebreaker hain jo ek jatil polynomial ko factor karne ki koshish kar rahe hain. Factor Theorem aapko ek niyamit tareeke se deta hai: agar aap ek value c jis par p(c) = 0 hota hai, toh aapne ek factor (x-c) pa liya hai!
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.step2_det: Agar (x-c) ek factor hai, to division p(x) ÷ (x-c) mein koi bhi baki nahin hota hai, isliye r = 0. Bain ul Theorem ke madhyam se, r = p(c). Isliye p(c) = 0.
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.step2_lab: Bain ul Theorem ke madhyam se
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.step3_det: Virodhi, agar p(c) = 0, to Bain ul Theorem ke madhyam se r = 0. r = 0 ko daalne par: p(x) = (x-c)q(x). Isse (x-c) ek factor hai iska proof hota hai.
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.step4_det: ✅ p(x) = x³ − 2x² − x + 2: p(1) = 1 − 2 − 1 + 2 = 0. Isliye (x-1) ek factor hai! Division karne par: p(x) = (x-1)(x² − x − 2) = (x-1)(x-2)(x+1). Ek root pa liya, baaki aasani se mil jata hai!
theorem.class11.factor_theorem.title: Factor Theorem
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.finalFo: The cosine of a difference equals the product of cosines plus product of sines.
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.keyInsi: This single formula is the mother of all trigonometric identities! From it, we can derive cos(α+β), sin(α±β), double-angle formulas, half-angle formulas, and product-to-sum identities. It's the Rosetta Stone of trigonometry.
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.practic: cos(α−β) = cosαcosβ + sinαsinβ ka use karein
cos 30° = 0.8660. Formula puri tarah se kaam karti hai!
cos(60°−30°) = cos 60° cos 30° + sin 60° sin 30°. cos(30°) ka calculation karein.
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.step1_d: 🎯 You're a GPS engineer. The unit circle represents the Earth's equator, and points C and D are two satellites at angles α and β from the prime meridian.
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.step2_d: 📐 Yeh central angle C aur D ke beech hai α−β. Angle AOB = α−β ko construct karein A(1,0) aur B(cos(α−β), sin(α−β)) ke saath. Kyunki central angles barabar hain, chords CD aur AB barabar hain.
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.step3_d: 🧮 CD² = AB² aur dono taraf ko expand karein. Bhai left: cos²α + cos²β − 2cosαcosβ + sin²α + sin²β − 2sinαsinβ = 2 − 2(cosαcosβ + sinαsinβ). Right: 1 − 2cos(α−β) + 1 = 2 − 2cos(α−β).
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.step4_d: ✅ Barabar karein: 2 − 2(cosαcosβ + sinαsinβ) = 2 − 2cos(α−β). 2 ko cancel karein aur -2 se divide karein: cos(α−β) = cosαcosβ + sinαsinβ. Is single identity se sabhi trigonometry ke formulas nikalte hain!
theorem.class11.fundamental_trig.title: Fundamental Law of Trigonometry: cos(α−β)
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.finalFormu: Geometric series ka sum: Sₙ = a₁(1−rⁿ)/(1−r) jab r ≠ 1.
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.keyInsight: Yeh formula yeh batata hai ki ek ball jo har baar apni unchai ka 60% tak girta hai, ek sambhavit total distance tak jaata hai — infinite sum converge karta hai! Yeh bhi compound interest ke calculations ke liye kaam karta hai: aapka bank balance geometrically badhta hai.
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.practice_q: a₁ = 2, r = 3, n = 4. S₄ ko khojein.
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.step1_deta: 💰 Aap ek investor hain. Aap $1,000 ek fund mein daalne ke liye. Yeh fund har saal 5% badhta hai. Aapka balance n saal ke baad ek geometric series banata hai: saal 0: $1000, saal 1: $1050, saal 2: $1102.50... Har term pehle ka × 1.05 hai.
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.step2_deta: 📐 Entire series ko r se ghana karein: rSₙ = a₁r + a₁r² + a₁r³ + ... + a₁rⁿ. Yeh har term ko ek position pe shift karta hai.
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.step2_labe: Dono taraf r se ghana karna
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.step3_deta: 🧮 rSₙ se Sₙ ko kam karein: Sₙ − rSₙ = a₁ − a₁rⁿ. Sabhi intermediate terms (a₁r se a₁rⁿ⁻¹) puri tarah se cancel ho jaate hain — telescoping subtraction ki shaukat!
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.step4_deta: ✅ Sₙ(1−r) = a₁(1−rⁿ) → Sₙ = a₁(1−rⁿ)/(1−r). Infinite series ke liye (|r| < 1): S∞ = a₁/(1−r). Aapka $1000 5% par: agar aap isey aabadi se 5% kamane ke liye rakhte hain, to aapke sabhi bhavishya ke aavashyakon ka moolya = 1000/(1−0.05) = $20,000!
theorem.class11.geometric_sum.title: Geometric Series ke pehle n termon ka sum
Ek parallelogram ke dono diagonals ke midpoints ek dusre se milte hain.

Isliye crane ke parallelogram linkage ke liye load level rakhne ka reason yeh hai — diagonals hamesha midpoints par milte hain, jo ki arm angle ke hisab se bhi same relative position maintain karta hai!
M = (3.5, 4.5). Doosri diagonal BD ki usi centroid se milta hai.
Parallelogram with A(1,2), B(4,3), C(6,7). Find midpoint of diagonal AC.
🏗️ You're a structural engineer designing a parallelogram linkage for a construction crane. The four vertices of the parallelogram ABCD have position vectors ã, b⃗, c⃗, d⃗ from the origin.
📐 The midpoint M₁ of diagonal AC has position vector (ã + c⃗)/2 — the average of the two endpoint vectors.
📐 The midpoint M₂ of diagonal BD has position vector (b⃗ + d⃗)/2.
🧮 In a parallelogram, AB = DC. In vectors: b⃗ − ã = c⃗ − d⃗ → b⃗ + d⃗ = ã + c⃗ → (ã + c⃗)/2 = (b⃗ + d⃗)/2. The midpoints are identical — the diagonals bisect each other!
Ek Parallelogram ke diagonals ek dusre ko bisect karte hain
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.finalF: X ko c se divide karne par baki baaki p(c) ke barabar hota hai
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.keyIns: Yeh theorem aapko ek point par polynomial evaluate karne ka mauka deta hai, ismein synthetic division aur computer graphics mein fast polynomial evaluation (Horner's method) ke liye use hota hai.
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.practi: p(x) = x² − 5x + 6. (x−2) se divide karne par raha kya hai?
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.step1_: Aap ek data scientist hain, aap temperature data ko ek polynomial se fit kar rahe hain. Aapko ek specific time t = c par value janna hai. Remainder Theorem aapko isse compute karne ki zaroorat bina pata chala sakta hai!
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.step2_: 📐 x = c ko substitute karein: p(c) = (c−c)q(c) + r. (c−c) term zero ho jata hai.
X ko c se substitute karein
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.step3_: 🧮 c−c = 0 hai, isliye (c−c)q(c) = 0 × q(c) = 0. Isliye p(c) = r. p(x) ko (x−c) se divide karne par raha p(c) hota hai — polynomial x = c par evaluate hota hai!
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.step4_: ✅ Yeh theorem synthetic division ki basis hai — ek shortcut jo polynomials ko coefficients se hi divide karta hai. High-degree polynomials ke liye bahut taza hai aur computer graphics mein Bézier curve evaluation ke liye use hota hai (Horner's method O(n²) ko O(n) mein reduce karta hai)!
theorem.class11.remainder_theorem.title: Remainder Theorem
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.final: Non-parallel sides ke midpoints ke beech mein join karne wala segment parallel sides ki sum ka adhikansh hai.
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.keyIn: Pul designers is theorem ka istemal karte hain: trapezoidal bridge girder ki midline top aur bottom widths ki average hai. Iska istemal numerical integration (trapezoidal rule) mein bhi hota hai jahaan endpoints ki average integral ki approxamation karta hai!
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.pract: AB=8cm aur DC=12cm (parallel) wala trapezium. Non-parallel sides ke midpoints ke joining segment ki length nikalna hai.
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.step1: Aap ek civil engineer hain jo ek bridge banane ke liye trapezoidal cross-section ka design kar rahe hain. Top deck AB bottom base DC se parallel hai. Aapko mid-span support beam ki length nikalni hai.
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.step2: M₁ AD ki side ka midpoint hai, M₂ BC ki side ka midpoint hai — yeh aapki mid-span beam ke endpoints hain.
M₁ aur M₂ ke midpoints hain
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.step3: M₁M₂ = ½[(b⃗ − ã) + (c⃗ − d⃗)] = ½(AB + DC). Parallel side vectors ka sum, halke hue.
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.step4: Kyonki AB ∥ DC, M₁M₂ bhi dono ke parallel hai. Uski length = ½(|AB| + |DC|). Top=10m aur bottom=16m wala bridge ke liye midspan = ½(10+16) = 13m. Isliye trapezoidal rule calculus mein endpoints ka average use karta hai!
theorem.class11.trapezium_midpoint.title: Trapezium Midpoint Theorem
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.finalF: Do sides ke centroids ke beech join karne wala segment third side ke parallel aur half hai.
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.keyIns: Yeh theorem intercept theorem ki foundation hai aur architecture mein truss structures banane ke liye use hota hai. Isse yeh bhi samajh aata hai ki triangle ki median usko do barabar kshetron mein divide karti hai!
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.practi: M₁M₂ = 3 = ½ × AB = ½ × 6. Sahee hai!
Triangle jismein A(0,0), B(6,0), C(2,4) hai. M₁M₂ (CA aur BC ke midpoints) ki length kya hai?
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.step1_: 🔺 Aap ek carpenter hain jo ek roof truss banate hain. Triangle ke vertices A(ã), B(b⃗), C(c⃗) hain. Aapko do sides ke centroids ke beech join karne wali beam khojni hai.
Triangle ke vertices ko define karein
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.step2_: 📐 M₁ yeh CA ke beech mein hai: (ã + c⃗)/2. M₂ yeh BC ke beech mein hai: (b⃗ + c⃗)/2. Yeh truss ke connection points hain.
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.step3_: 🧮 M₁M₂ = M₂ − M₁ = (b⃗ + c⃗)/2 − (ã + c⃗)/2 = ½(b⃗ − ã) = ½AB. c⃗ terms cancel ho jaate hain!
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.step4_: ✅ M₁M₂ = ½AB. Isse kuchh yeh hai: (1) M₁M₂ AB ke saath parallel hai (scalar multiple), aur (2) uski length AB ki length ki adhikansh hai. Aapka roof truss beam base ki adhikansh mein perfect position mein hai!
theorem.class11.triangle_midpoint.title: Triangle Midpoint Theorem
theorem.class11.trig_identities.finalFor: Double-angle formulas fundamental law se derive hote hain.
theorem.class11.trig_identities.keyInsig: Double aur triple angle formulas physics (harmonic oscillators, wave interference), engineering (Fourier series signals ko frequencies mein todne ke liye), aur music synthesis (base frequencies se overtones generate karne ke liye) mein essential hain.
theorem.class11.trig_identities.practice: sin(30°) = 0.5. Find sin(60°) using the double-angle formula.
theorem.class11.trig_identities.step1_de: 🧭 Navigation: If you turn 30° clockwise vs 30° counterclockwise, the eastward component is the same! By the fundamental law with α=0: cos(−β) = cos 0 cos β + sin 0 sin β = cos β.
theorem.class11.trig_identities.step2_de: 🔄 Using co-ratios: sin(α+β) = cos(π/2−(α+β)) = cos[(π/2−α)−β] = cos(π/2−α)cos β + sin(π/2−α)sin β = sin α cos β + cos α sin β.
theorem.class11.trig_identities.step3_de: 🧮 Let β = α in sin(α+β): sin(2α) = sin α cos α + cos α sin α = 2 sin α cos α. For cos: cos(2α) = cos²α − sin²α = 2cos²α − 1 = 1 − 2sin²α.
theorem.class11.trig_identities.step4_de: 🔊 Audio engineers use this: sin(3α) = sin(2α+α) = sin(2α)cos α + cos(2α)sin α = (2 sin α cos α)cos α + (1 − 2 sin²α)sin α = 2 sin α(1−sin²α) + sin α − 2 sin³α = 3 sin α − 4 sin³α. This generates the third harmonic in synthesizers!
theorem.class11.trig_identities.title: Trigonometric Identities (Double & Triple Angle)
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.finalFor: Basic integral formulas reverse differentiation se prapt hain.
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.keyInsig: Integration differentiation ka vipreet hai. Har differentiation rule integration rule deta hai! Power rule d/dx xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) = xⁿ reverse karta hai ∫ xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C. Ye sabhi integral calculus ka asas hai.
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.practice: x³ ka integral x⁴/4 hai. 0 se 2 tak: 2⁴/4 = 16/4 = 4
x³ ka integral kya hai? (x=2 se x=0 tak evaluate karein)
