theorem.class12.basic_integrals.step1_de: Ek civil engineer irregular foundation ka volume calculate karta hai integration ka use karta hai. Agar cross-sectional area A(x) = x² hai, to x=0 se x=3 tak volume ∫₀³ x² dx = [x³/3]₀³ = 9 cubic meters hai.
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.step1_la: Power rule ko alag kar dein
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.step2_de: Power rule n = -1 par fail hota hai (zero se division ho jata hai). Lekin d/dx[ln x] = 1/x hai, isliye ∫ 1/x dx = ln|x| + C. Yeh algebraic aur logarithmic functions ke beech ka pahlu hai.
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.step3_de: aˣ/ln a ki derivative hai aˣ·ln a / ln a = aˣ. Isliye ∫ aˣ dx = aˣ/ln a + C. Natural exponential ke liye: ∫ eˣ dx = eˣ + C (kyonki ln e = 1).
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.step4_de: Integration linear hai: sum ka integral sum ka integral hai, aur constants nikal jaate hain. Isliye ∫ (3x² + 2x + 1) dx = 3·x³/3 + 2·x²/2 + x + C = x³ + x² + x + C.
theorem.class12.basic_integrals.title: Basic Indefinite Integrals
theorem.class12.circle_general.finalForm: General equation center (−g, −f) aur radius √(g²+f²−c) wale circle ko represent karta hai.
theorem.class12.circle_general.keyInsigh: Square complete kar ke, koi bhi equation x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 ko circle ki shakal mein likha ja sakta hai. Agar g²+f²−c > 0, to yeh real circle hai; agar 0 ke barabar hai, to point circle hai; agar negative hai, to equation ka koi real graph nahi. GPS receivers isi tarah teen circle equations se aap ki position determine karte hain!
theorem.class12.circle_general.practice_: x²+y²+4x+6y+4=0. Center ka x-coordinate find karein.
theorem.class12.circle_general.step1_det: 🗺️ Ek GPS receiver teen satellites se signals detect karta hai. Har satellite ka signal ek circle define karta hai: x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0. Receiver ko apni position triangulate karne ke liye har circle ka center aur radius find karna hota hai.
theorem.class12.circle_general.step2_det: 📐 x aur y terms alag karein, c ko right side par move karein.
theorem.class12.circle_general.step2_lab: x aur y terms group karein
theorem.class12.circle_general.step3_det: 🧮 g² add karein (taake (x+g)² complete ho) aur f² add karein (taake (y+f)² complete ho). Balance rakhne ke liye same side par g² aur f² subtract karein.
theorem.class12.circle_general.step3_lab: x aur y ke liye square complete karein
theorem.class12.circle_general.step4_det: ✅ Yeh standard circle form (x−h)² + (y−k)² = r² se match karta hai jahan h = −g, k = −f, r = √(g²+f²−c). Center (−g, −f) hai aur radius √(g²+f²−c) hai. Real circle ke liye, humein g²+f²−c > 0 chahiye!
theorem.class12.circle_general.title: Circle ki General Equation
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.finalForm: Point P(x₁, y₁) par circle ki tangent ki equation.
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.keyInsigh: Kisi point par circle ki tangent us point par radius ke perpendicular hoti hai. Formula x₁x + y₁y + g(x + x₁) + f(y + y₁) + c = 0 slope condition apply kar ke derive kiya jata hai. Isay "T = 0" kehte hain — x² → x₁x, y² → y₁y, x → (x+x₁)/2, y → (y+y₁)/2 replace karein!
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.practice_: Circle x²+y²=25 at point (3,4). Tangent slope = −x₁/y₁ = −3/4 = ?
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.step1_det: 🎯 Ek machinist ko gear tooth cut karna hai jo circular gear par ek precise point par contact karta hai. Cutting tool ko contact point par tangent line follow karna hota hai.
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.step1_lab: Implicit differentiation se slope find karein
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.step2_det: 📐 Implicitly differentiate karein: 2x + 2y·y' + 2g + 2f·y' = 0. y' ke liye solve karein: dy/dx = −(x+g)/(y+f).
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.step3_det: 🧮 Point P(x₁, y₁) par, dy/dx mein substitute karein: slope m = −(x₁+g)/(y₁+f). Tangent line point-slope form mein: y − y₁ = m(x − x₁).
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.step4_det: ✅ Cross-multiply aur rearrange karein. Nateeja elegant T = 0 formula hai: x² → x₁x, y² → y₁y, 2gx → g(x+x₁), 2fy → f(y+y₁), c → c replace karein. Tangent equation bina derivative explicitly calculate kiye likhi jati hai!
theorem.class12.circle_tangent.title: Diye gaye Point par Circle ki Tangent
theorem.class12.concurrency_altitudes.fi: Triangle ke teen altitude aik hi jagah se milte hain (orthocenter).
theorem.class12.concurrency_altitudes.ke: Orthocenter, teen altitude ke intersection hai. Ek acute triangle mein yeh point triangle ke andar hai, aur ek obtuse triangle mein yeh point triangle ke bahar hai! Yeh concurrency hai jo teen altitude ke milne ka karan hai — ek adbhut geometric fact jo surveying mein position ko locate karne ke liye use hota hai.
theorem.class12.concurrency_altitudes.pr: Teen lines ek hi point par milne ka matlab kya hota hai?
Hint: Yeh 'con' se shuru hota hai aur lines of elevation se juda hai.
Triangle ke vertices (0,0), (4,0), (2,5) hain. Teen altitudes ek hi point par milte hain. Yeh property kaun hai?
theorem.class12.concurrency_altitudes.st: Ek surveyor ek triangular plot of land ko map kar raha hai. Orthocenter (jahan sab lines of elevation milte hain) ko find karne ke liye, ve teen altitude intersect karte hain ek hi point par prove karna hoga.
Vertices aur slopes ko define karein.
BC ki slope (y₃−y₂)/(x₃−x₂) hai. Altitude AD ∦ BC, isliye uski slope ki negative reciprocal hai: m_AD = −(x₃−x₂)/(y₃−y₂).
Point-slope form ka upyog karke point A(x₁, y₁) se: y − y₁ = m_AD(x − x₁). Rearranging: (x₃−x₂)x + (y₃−y₂)y − x₁(x₃−x₂) − y₁(y₃−y₂) = 0.

BE aur CF ke liye similar equations likhein. Unke coefficients ko ek determinant mein rakhein. R₂ + R₃ ko R₁ mein add karne se pehle row zero ho jati hai (kyunki har row se coefficients ka sum cancel hota hai). Zero row ka matlab determinant = 0 hai, jo lines concurrent hain orthocenter par prove karta hai!
theorem.class12.concurrency_bisectors.fi: Triangle ke side ke perpendicular bisectors ek hi point par milte hain, circumcenter!
theorem.class12.concurrency_bisectors.ke: Circumcenter woh point hai jo triangle ke sabhi vertices se ek hi doori par hota hai. Yeh point triangle ke sabhi vertices ko pass karne wali circle ka center hai. Yeh point teen perpendicular bisectors ke intersection par hota hai. Isliye, aap kisi bhi teen non-collinear points ke liye ek unique circle draw kar sakte hain!
theorem.class12.concurrency_bisectors.pr: Circumscribed circle ke center ko kya kehte hain?
theorem.class12.concurrency_bisectors.st: 📍 GPS triangulation: Teen satellite positions A, B, C maloom hain. Apni location maloom karne ke liye, AB aur BC ke perpendicular bisectors banayein — inka intersection hi aapki position (circumcenter) hai!
BC ke midpoint aur slope kaun hai?
📐 BC ka right bisector midpoint se guzarta hai aur iski slope BC ke perpendicular hoti hai.
Right bisector ki equation kya hai?
🧮 Multiply kar ke aur rearrange karne se standard linear equation milti hai. Dhyan rahe ke constant terms mein coordinates ke squares shamil hote hain.
Simplify aur standard form mein likhein

✅ Teeno bisectors ke liye equations likhein. R₂ + R₃ add karne ke baad coefficient determinant ki pehli row zero ho jati hai. Zero determinant = concurrency. Intersection point (circumcenter) teeno vertices se barabar fasle par hota hai — circumscribed circle ka center!
theorem.class12.concurrency_medians.fina: Triangle ke teeno medians centroid par milte hain — triangle ka center of mass.
theorem.class12.concurrency_medians.keyI: Centroid har median ko vertex se midpoint tak 2:1 ratio mein divide karta hai. Yeh triangle ka center of mass hai — agar aap cardboard se triangle kaat lein, to yeh centroid par perfectly balance hoga! Engineers isko triangular structures ka center of gravity maloom karne ke liye istemal karte hain.
theorem.class12.concurrency_medians.prac: Ek triangle jiske vertices (0,0), (6,0), (3,6) hain. Centroid ka x-coordinate maloom karein.
theorem.class12.concurrency_medians.step: ⚖️ Ek architect bridge ke roof ke liye ek triangular steel truss design kar raha hai. Center of mass (centroid) wahan hota hai jahan medians milte hain — yahi wo jagah hai jahan main support column hona chahiye.
Median AD: vertex A se BC ke midpoint tak
📐 Median AD, A(x₁, y₁) aur BC ke midpoint se guzarta hai. Two-point formula ka istemal karte hue.
🧮 Cross-multiply karein aur standard linear form banane ke liye simplify karein.

✅ Teeno median equations likhein. Rows ko add karne ke baad unka coefficient determinant zero ho jata hai, jo concurrency ko saabit karta hai. Intersection point G = ((x₁+x₂+x₃)/3, (y₁+y₂+y₃)/3) — centroid. Yeh vertices ka average bhi hai, jo isko center of mass banata hai!
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.finalFo: Ek ellipse jiske foci (±c, 0) par hon jahan c² = a²−b².
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.keyInsi: Ellipse un points ka set hai jinki do foci se distances ka sum constant (2a) hota hai. Isiliye planetary orbits elliptical hote hain aur Sun ek focus par hota hai (Kepler's First Law). Flattening eccentricity e = c/a = √(1−b²/a²) par depend karti hai!
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.practic: Ellipse x²/25 + y²/9 = 1. c maloom karein (center se focus tak ka distance).
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step1_d: 🌍 Johannes Kepler ne daryaft kiya ke planets Sun ke gird elliptical paths mein ghoomte hain. Sun ek focus par hai. Ellipse par kisi bhi point se do foci tak ke distances ka sum constant hota hai — major axis ki length.
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step1_l: Definition: foci se distances ka sum = 2a
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step2_d: 📐 Foci ko F₁(−c, 0) aur F₂(c, 0) par rakhein. Ellipse par kisi bhi point P(x,y) ke liye: √[(x+c)²+y²] + √[(x−c)²+y²] = 2a.
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step2_l: Foci ko (±c, 0) aur point P(x, y) par set karein
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step3_d: 🧮 Ek radical ko alag karein, dono sides ko square karein, bache hue radical ko alag karein, dobara square karein. Simplify karne ke baad: (a²−c²)x² + a²y² = a²(a²−c²).
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step3_l: Isolate karein aur do martaba square karein
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step4_d: ✅ Define karein b² = a²−c². Phir b²x² + a²y² = a²b² → x²/a² + y²/b² = 1. Zameen ki orbit ke liye: a ≈ 149.6 million km, b ≈ 149.5 million km (taqreeban circular, e ≈ 0.017). Mars ki e ≈ 0.093 hai — wazeh taur par zyada elliptical!
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.step4_l: Standard form hasil karne ke liye b² = a²−c² rakhein
theorem.class12.ellipse_standard.title: Ellipse ki Standard Equation
theorem.class12.fundamental_theorem_calc: Definite integral bounds par antiderivative ke difference ke barabar hota hai.

FTC calculus ka sab se ahem theorem hai! Yeh do bunyadi concepts ko jorta hai: differentiation aur integration inverse operations hain. Yahi wajah hai ke hum antiderivatives maloom kar ke areas nikal sakte hain — geometry aur algebra ke darmiyan ek gehra talluq.
∫₁³ (2x) dx. F(3) − F(1) maloom karein jahan F(x) = x².

🏔️ Ek geologist river delta mein sediment ka volume calculate kar raha hai. Cross-sectional area shore se distance x ke sath badal raha hai. Define karein A(x) = ∫ₐˣ f(t) dt a se x tak accumulated area ke taur par.
📐 Definition ke mutabiq: A'(x) = lim[A(x+h)−A(x)]/h jab h→0. Lekin A(x+h)−A(x) = ∫ₓˣ⁺ʰ f(t) dt ≈ f(x)·h Mean Value Theorem ki madad se. Isliye A'(x) = f(x). Area function f ka ek antiderivative hai!
🧮 Kyun ke A'(x) = f(x), f ka koi bhi antiderivative F, A se sirf ek constant ki wajah se mukhtalif hota hai: F(x) = A(x) + C. Phir F(b)−F(a) = A(b)−A(a).

✅ Lekin A(a) = ∫ₐᵃ f(t) dt = 0, isliye F(b)−F(a) = A(b) = ∫ₐᵇ f(x) dx. Definite integral bounds par evaluate kiye gaye antiderivative ke barabar hota hai. River delta volume: agar A'(x) = 2x (linear izafa), x=0 se x=5 tak volume = [x²]₀⁵ = 25 cubic meters!
theorem.class12.homogeneous_second_degre: Har homogeneous second-degree equation origin se guzarne wali lines ka ek pair zahir karti hai.

Ek homogeneous equation ax² + 2hxy + by² = 0 ke sabhi terms ki degree 2 hoti hai. Yeh hamesha do linear equations mein factor hoti hai, iska matlab yeh origin se guzarne wali do straight lines ko zahir karti hai. Agar h² − ab > 0, lines mukhtalif aur real hoti hain — optics mein light cone sections ko analyze karne ke liye istemal hota hai!
Haan! x² − y² = (x−y)(x+y) = 0 origin se guzarne wali do lines hain: x = y aur x = −y.
x² − y² = (x−y)(x+y) = 0 se lines x=y aur x=−y milti hain
Kya x² − y² = 0 do lines mein factor hota hai?

🔦 Ek physicist point source se phailne wali light ki beam analyze kar raha hai. Light cone ek homogeneous equation se bayan hota hai: ax² + 2hxy + by² = 0. Maqsad isko do mukhtalif rays mein factor karna hai.
Dono sides ko a se multiply karein
📐 Asal trick: h²y² add aur subtract kar ke ek perfect square banayein.
🧮 Pehli teen terms mil kar (ax + hy)² banati hain. Baqi terms −y²(h²−ab) ban jati hain.

✅ Difference of squares ke taur par: (ax + hy)² − (y√(h²−ab))² = 0. Yeh do linear equations mein factor hota hai: ax + y(h ± √(h²−ab)) = 0. Dono origin se guzarti hain (koi constant term nahi). Agar h² > ab: do mukhtalif real lines. Agar h² = ab: ek line jo repeat hoti hai. Agar h² < ab: complex (imaginary) lines.
Difference of squares ke taur par factor karein
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.final: Ek hyperbola jiske foci (±c, 0) par hon jahan c² = a²+b².
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.keyIn: Hyperbola un points ka set hai jahan do foci se distances ka difference constant (2a) hota hai. Ellipse (sum constant hota hai) ke bar-aks, hyperbola ki do alag branches hoti hain. Navigation (LORAN systems) mein istemal hota hai jahan do stations se signal aane ke waqt ka farq ship ki location batata hai!
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.pract: Hyperbola x²/16 − y²/9 = 1. c maloom karein (center se focus ka distance).
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.step1: 🚢 Ek ship LORAN navigation istemal karti hai: F₁ aur F₂ par do radio stations synchronized signals bhejte hain. Ship aane ke time ka farq measure karti hai. Constant time difference ka locus ek hyperbola hota hai jiske foci stations par hote hain.
Definition: foci se distances ka difference = 2a
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.step2: 📐 F₁(-c,0) aur F₂(c,0) tak ki distances ka absolute difference 2a hai. Wo branch chunein jahan PF₁ > PF₂ ho.
Foci ko (±c, 0) aur point P(x, y) par set karein
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.step3: 🧮 Wahi double-squaring technique jo ellipse mein use hoti hai. Lekin sign ke farq (subtraction vs addition) ki wajah se final form alag aati hai.
Do martaba square karein (ellipse jaisa process lekin sign alag)
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.step4: ✅ Define karein b² = c²−a². Standard form x²/a² − y²/b² = 1 ki do branches (left aur right) hoti hain. Asymptotes: y = ±(b/a)x. LORAN ship: agar stations 100km door hon (2c=100) aur constant difference 60km (2a=60) ho, to b² = 50²−30² = 1600, aur ship x²/900 − y²/1600 = 1 par hogi!
Standard form hasil karne ke liye b² = c²−a² rakhein
theorem.class12.hyperbola_standard.title: Hyperbola ki Standard Equation
theorem.class12.inverse_trig_derivatives: Inverse trig functions ki implicit differentiation se derivatives

Inverse trig derivatives integration problems mein aate hain (∫ 1/√(1−x²) dx = sin⁻¹ x + C). Yeh physics mein bhi ahem hain, jahan angles ko ratios se nikalna hota hai, jaise velocity components se projectile ka launch angle maloom karna!

🎯 Ek ballistics expert vertical aur horizontal velocity (x) ki ratio measure karta hai aur angle maloom karna chahta hai. Agar x = 0.5 hai, to y = sin⁻¹(0.5) = 30°. Implicit differentiation batati hai ke ratio ke sath angle kis rate par badalta hai.
y = sin⁻¹ x rakhein ⇒ x = sin y
📐 Implicit differentiation ka istemal kar ke: d/dx(x) = d/dx(sin y) → 1 = cos y · dy/dx → dy/dx = 1/cos y.
🧮 cos²y + sin²y = 1 ki identity ka istemal kar ke: cos y = √(1−sin²y) = √(1−x²). Isliye d/dx sin⁻¹ x = 1/√(1−x²).

✅ tan⁻¹ ke liye: x = tan y ko differentiate karein → 1 = sec²y·dy/dx. Kyun ke sec²y = 1 + tan²y = 1 + x², humein d/dx tan⁻¹ x = 1/(1+x²) milta hai. Yeh formulas rational functions ki integration ke liye bunyadi hain!
tan⁻¹ x ke liye bhi same process
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.finalF: Ek parabola jiska focus (a, 0) aur directrix x = −a hai.
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.keyIns: Parabola un points ka set hai jo ek fixed point (focus) aur ek fixed line (directrix) se barabar fasle par hote hain. Is reflective property ki wajah se parabolic mirrors parallel light rays ko focus par jama karte hain — jo telescopes, satellite dishes, aur solar cookers mein istemal hota hai!
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.practi: y² = 4ax. 4a = coefficient se a maloom karein.
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.step1_: 📡 Ek satellite dish antenna parabolic shape ka hota hai. Axis ke parallel aane wale signals reflect ho kar focus par jate hain jahan receiver rakha hota hai. Definition: parabola par har point P focus F aur directrix line se barabar fasle par hota hai.
Definition: focus se fasla = directrix se fasla
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.step2_: 📐 Coordinate axes aise set karein ke focus F = (a, 0) aur directrix x = −a ho. P(x,y) se F ka fasla √[(x−a)²+y²] hai. Directrix se fasla |x−(−a)| = |x + a| hai.
Focus ko (a, 0) aur directrix x = −a par rakhein
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.step3_: 🧮 Dono sides ko square karein (dono non-negative hain): (x−a)² + y² = (x+a)².
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.step4_: ✅ Expand karein: x²−2ax+a²+y² = x²+2ax+a². Dono sides se x² aur a² cancel karein. Solve karein: y² = 4ax. Yeh right ki taraf khulne wale parabola ki standard equation hai. Satellite dishes ke liye: receiver focus (a, 0) par hota hai aur dish y² = 4ax ko follow karti hai!
theorem.class12.parabola_standard.title: Parabola ki Standard Equation
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.finalFo: Tangency ki shart: y = mx + c ko y² = 4ax mein substitute karein aur discriminant = 0 rakhein.
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.keyInsi: Ek line y = mx + c parabola y² = 4ax ke tangent hoti hai agar c = a/m ho. Iska matlab tangent ki slope form y = mx + a/m hai. Kisi di gayi slope m ke liye, theek do parallel tangents hoti hain (parabola ki dono sides par ek ek), siwaye vertex par vertical tangent ke!
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.practic: Parabola y² = 8x. Line slope m = 2. Tangency ke liye c maloom karein (c = a/m).
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.step1_d: 🎯 Ek architect parabolic arch design kar raha hai aur support beam ka angle maloom karne ke liye ek point par tangent line nikalna chahta hai. Line ki equation y = mx + c ko parabola y² = 4ax mein daalein.
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.step1_l: Line ko parabola mein substitute karein
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.step2_d: 📐 Expand karein: m²x² + 2mcx + c² = 4ax. Rearrange karein: m²x² + 2(mc−2a)x + c² = 0. Yeh x mein quadratic equation hai.
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.step2_l: Expand kar ke x mein quadratic banayein
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.step3_d: 🧮 Tangency ke liye, line ko theek ek point par milna chahiye. Iska matlab quadratic ki double root hogi: iska discriminant D = b²−4ac zero hona chahiye.
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.step4_d: ✅ Expand karein: 4(m²c²−4amc+4a²) − 4m²c² = 0 → −16amc + 16a² = 0 → mc = a → c = a/m. Slope form mein tangent ki equation: y = mx + a/m. Yeh formula architects ko parabolic arch par kisi bhi point par support beam ka angle nikalne mein madad karta hai!
theorem.class12.parabola_tangent.title: Parabola ka Tangent
theorem.class12.power_rule.finalFormulaD: xⁿ ki derivative n·xⁿ⁻¹ hai har positive integer n ke liye.
theorem.class12.power_rule.keyInsight: Power rule sab se zyada istemal hone wala differentiation formula hai! Yeh polynomials ko simpler form mein badal deta hai: har term ka exponent 1 kam ho jata hai aur purana exponent naya coefficient ban jata hai. Yeh physics (velocity = position ki derivative) se lekar economics (marginal cost) tak har jagah istemal hota hai.
theorem.class12.power_rule.practice_hint: d/dx xⁿ = n·xⁿ⁻¹, isliye d/dx x⁵ = 5·x⁴
theorem.class12.power_rule.step1_detail: 📈 Ek rocket scientist ko spacecraft ki velocity har instant mein maloom karni hoti hai. Agar position s(t) = t³ hai. Derivative ki definition ke mutabiq, velocity = derivative = h→0 tak ki limit (s(t+h)−s(t))/h hai.
theorem.class12.power_rule.step2_detail: 📐 (x+h)ⁿ ko binomial theorem se expand karein. Terms yeh hongi: xⁿ + n·xⁿ⁻¹·h + n(n−1)/2!·xⁿ⁻²·h² + ... + hⁿ.
theorem.class12.power_rule.step3_detail: 🧮 xⁿ subtract karein aur h se divide karein. xⁿ cancel ho jata hai, aur har term mein h reh jata hai. h common lein: numerator h × [n·xⁿ⁻¹ + ... + hⁿ⁻¹] ban jata hai. h ko denominator se cancel kar dein.
theorem.class12.power_rule.step4_detail: ✅ Jab h→0 ho jata hai, to wo sab terms jin mein h hota hai vanish ho jati hain, aur sirf n·xⁿ⁻¹ bachta hai. Rocket ke liye: agar s(t) = t³ hai, to velocity v(t) = 3t². t=5 seconds par: v = 3×25 = 75 m/s. Power rule differentiation ko bohot aasan bana deta hai!
theorem.class12.power_rule.title: Differentiation ke liye Power Rule
theorem.class12.sin_derivative.finalForm: sin x ki derivative cos x hai.
theorem.class12.sin_derivative.keyInsigh: Yeh trigonometric calculus ki foundation hai! Sine ki derivative cosine hai kyunki sin x ki kisi bhi point par slope cos x ki value ke barabar hoti hai. Yeh relation simple harmonic motion (springs, pendulums) ko itna elegant banata hai: d²x/dt² = −ω²x.
theorem.class12.sin_derivative.step1_det: Ek audio engineer sound waves ko analyze karta hai aur usey amplitude ke badalne ki rate ki zaroorat hoti hai. Ek sine wave sin(440t) musical note A440 ko darshati hai. Rate of change speaker cone ki velocity deti hai.
theorem.class12.sin_derivative.step2_det: Identity sin(A+B) = sin A cos B + cos A sin B ka istemal karein: sin(x+h) = sin x cos h + cos x sin h.
theorem.class12.sin_derivative.step3_det: = lim[sin x(cos h − 1)/h + cos x(sin h)/h] banayein. Yahan do khaas limits banti hain!
theorem.class12.sin_derivative.step4_det: Do bunyadi limits: (1) lim(cos h − 1)/h = 0 (cos graph h=0 par flat hota hai), (2) lim(sin h)/h = 1 (small angle approximation). Nateeja: d/dx sin x = sin x·0 + cos x·1 = cos x. Isi tarah, d/dx cos x = −sin x.
theorem.class12.sin_derivative.title: Sine Function ki Derivative
theorem.class12.substitution_integrals.f: Standard integrals jo trigonometric substitution se nikalte hain.
theorem.class12.substitution_integrals.k: Trigonometric substitution square roots ko trigonometric functions mein badal deti hai! √(a²−x²) → x = a sin θ → a cos θ, yeh radical ko khatam kar deti hai. Newton ne is technique ko circular segment ka area nikalne ke liye istemal kiya tha: ∫ √(a²−x²) dx circular segment ka area deta hai!
theorem.class12.substitution_integrals.p: Formula ∫ 1/√(a²−x²) dx = sin⁻¹(x/a) + C istemal karein
theorem.class12.substitution_integrals.s: 📐 Ek astronomer circular telescope mirror ka area nikal raha hai. Radius a hai. Integral ∫ √(a²−x²) dx saamne aata hai. x = a sin θ substitute karein, jo circle ki equation ko trigonometric form mein badal deta hai.
x = a sin θ substitute karein
🧮 √(a²−x²) = √(a²−a²sin²θ) = a√(1−sin²θ) = a cos θ. Integral kuch is tarah ban jata hai ∫ a cos θ · a cos θ dθ = a² ∫ cos²θ dθ.
📐 cos²θ = (1+cos 2θ)/2 ka istemal karein. Integrate karein: a²[θ/2 + sin 2θ/4] + C = (a²/2)θ + (a²/4) sin 2θ + C.
Half-angle istemal kar ke integrate karein

✅ Wapas substitute karne se: ∫√(a²−x²)dx = (a²/2)sin⁻¹(x/a) + (x√(a²−x²))/2 + C. Yeh formula x height wale circular segment ka area deta hai — jo civil engineering mein adhay bhare pipes mein pani ka flow nikalne ke liye istemal hota hai!
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.final: Do intersecting lines ke darmiyan acute angle unki slopes se nikalne ke liye.
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.keyIn: Road engineers ise safe intersection angles design karne ke liye istemal karte hain — 90° ki crossing sab se safe hoti hai kyunki is se har taraf visibility achi rehti hai!
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.pract: θ 18.4° hai. Lines 18.4° ke angle par hain.
m₁ = 1, m₂ = 2. Unke darmiyan acute angle nikalna hai.
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.step1: 🔄 Do roads ek intersection par milte hain. Ek slope m₁ = 0.5 (halki charhai) hai, jabke doosra zyada steep m₂ = 2 hai.
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.step2: Jab yeh lines milti hain, to x-axis ke sath ek triangle banati hain. Is triangle ka exterior angle do opposite interior angles ke sum ke barabar hota hai: α = β + θ.
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.step3: θ = α − β. Dono taraf tan lein: tan θ = tan(α − β). Tangent subtraction formula istemal kar ke: tan(α−β) = (tan α − tan β)/(1 + tan α × tan β).
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.step4: Kyunki tan α = m₂ aur tan β = m₁ hai: tan θ = (m₂ − m₁)/(1 + m₁m₂). Acute angle ke liye absolute value lete hain. Agar tan θ = 0 ho, lines parallel hain. Agar 1 + m₁m₂ = 0 ho, to lines perpendicular hoti hain!
theorem.class9.angle_between_lines.title: Do Lines ke darmiyan angle
theorem.class9.change_base.finalFormulaD: Ek logarithm ko kisi doosre base mein badalna.
theorem.class9.change_base.keyInsight: Yeh log ka sab se zyada kaam aane wala formula hai kyunki yeh aapko calculator par log₁₀ ya ln button ki madad se koi bhi log nikalne ka tareeqa batata hai!
theorem.class9.change_base.practice_erro: log_b m = log_a m / log_a b
theorem.class9.change_base.practice_expl: log₂(100) ≈ 6.64. Is formula ki madad se aap common logs istemal kar ke koi bhi log nikal sakte hain!
theorem.class9.change_base.practice_ques: log₁₀(100) = 2. Change of base use kar ke log₂(100) maloom karein.
theorem.class9.change_base.step1_detail: 📱 Aap ek calculator bana rahe hain jisme sirf log₁₀ (common log) aur ln (natural log) ke buttons hain, lekin aapko log₂(8) nikalna hai. Yeh classic problem Change of Base formula se solve hota hai.
theorem.class9.change_base.step2_detail: Convert karein: m = b^x. Hum isko ek known base a mein likhna chahte hain. Dono sides ka log_a lene se: log_a m = log_a(b^x). Ab hum Power Law reverse mein lagayenge!
theorem.class9.change_base.step3_detail: log_a m = x · log_a b. Exponent x shuru mein aa jata hai. Ab x ko akela karein: x = log_a m / log_a b.
theorem.class9.change_base.step4_detail: Kyunki x = log_b m, humein milta hai: log_b m = log_a m / log_a b. Isliye log₂(8) = log₁₀(8) / log₁₀(2) = 0.9031 / 0.3010 = 3. Wakai, 2³ = 8 hota hai.
theorem.class9.change_base.title: Base Badalne ka Formula
theorem.class9.distance_formula.finalFor: Coordinate plane par kisi bhi do points ke darmiyan fasla nikalne ka tareeqa.
theorem.class9.distance_formula.keyInsig: Yeh formula GPS ki bunyad hai: aapka phone satellites aur aapki position ke darmiyan fasla is formula ko 3D mein istemal kar ke nikalta hai.
theorem.class9.distance_formula.practice: d = √(9+16) = √25 = 5. Yeh ek classic 3-4-5 triangle hai!
theorem.class9.distance_formula.step1_de: Aap ek city planner hain. Point P₁(1, 2) library hai aur P₂(7, 6) hospital hai. Aap inke darmiyan straight-line fasla maloom karna chahte hain taake ek nayi road plan kar sakein.
theorem.class9.distance_formula.step2_de: P₁ aur P₂ se x-axis aur y-axis par lines draw karein. Yeh ek right triangle banati hain. Horizontal hissa x₁ se x₂ tak aur vertical hissa y₁ se y₂ tak hai.
theorem.class9.distance_formula.step4_de: Yeh formula GPS ki bunyad hai: aapka phone satellites aur aapki position ke darmiyan fasla ishi formula se 3D mein calculate karta hai.
theorem.class9.distance_formula.title: Distance Formula
Intersection bhi union par distribute hota hai.
School library ka rule: aapko library card (A) AUR (ya to valid ID YA teacher ki note) chahiye. Yeh (card AUR ID) YA (card AUR note) ke barabar hai.
A={1,2}, B={2,3}, C={3,4}. A∩(B∪C) mein kitne elements hain?
School library ka rule hai: aapko library card (A) aur (ya ek valid ID ya teacher note) (B ∪ C) chahiye.
x, A mein hai aur x, (B ∪ C) mein hai. Iska matlab hai ke x, A mein hai aur (x, B mein hai ya x, C mein hai).
P aur (Q ya R) = (P aur Q) ya (P aur R). Isliye: (x, A mein hai aur x, B mein hai) ya (x, A mein hai aur x, C mein hai).
x, (A ∩ B) ya (A ∩ C) mein hai, iska matlab hai x, (A ∩ B) ∪ (A ∩ C) mein hai. Isliye A ∩ (B ∪ C), (A ∩ B) ∪ (A ∩ C) ke barabar hai. Iska ulat bhi theek hai.
Union intersection par distribute hota hai, bilkul waise hi jaise multiplication addition par hoti hai.
Jaise arithmetic mein 2×(3+4) = 2×3 + 2×4 hota hai, set union bhi intersection par distribute hota hai — yahi distributive law hai!
A∪(B∩C) = {1,2,3}. Same result (A∪B)∩(A∪C) se bhi aayega = {1,2,3}∩{1,2,4} = {1,2}
A={1,2}, B={2,3}, C={3,4}. A∪(B∩C) mein elements?
🧩 Ek school prize ka sochein: jeetne wale ko ek free period (A) YA (extra recess AUR homework pass) (B ∩ C) milta hai.
x ∈ A ya x ∈ (B ∩ C). Iska matlab hai, ya to x ∈ A, ya phir (x ∈ B aur x ∈ C).
(P OR Q) AND (P OR R) logically barabar hai P OR (Q AND R) ke. Isliye: (x ∈ A OR x ∈ B) AND (x ∈ A OR x ∈ C).
(x ∈ A ∪ B) AND (x ∈ A ∪ C) ka matlab hai x ∈ (A ∪ B) ∩ (A ∪ C). To A ∪ (B ∩ C) ⊆ (A ∪ B) ∩ (A ∪ C) hota hai. Ulat containement bhi sach hai. Bilkul 2×(3+4) = 2×3 + 2×4 ki tarah!
Intersection ka kaam associative hota hai.

Ek student Art Club, Music Club, aur Drama Club mein hai — un sabhi teenon mein hone par is baat se koi farq nahi padta ke aap clubs ko kis tarah group karte hain. Intersection bas yeh kehta hai ke 'yeh sabhi sets mein maujood hai.'
(A∩B)∩C = {3} = A∩(B∩C). Sirf ek hi element hai!
A={1,2,3}, B={2,3,4}, C={3,4,5}. (A∩B)∩C mein elements kya hain?
School mein teen clubs hain: Art Club A, Music Club B, aur Drama Club C. Ek kamyab student teeno mein hissa le sakta hai. Farz karein y ∈ (A ∩ B) ∩ C.
Farz karein y ek element hai
y ∈ (A ∩ B) ∩ C ka matlab hai y ∈ (A ∩ B) aur y ∈ C. Aur y ∈ (A ∩ B) ka matlab hai y ∈ A aur y ∈ B. Isliye: (y ∈ A aur y ∈ B) aur y ∈ C.
Logical AND associative hota hai: (P aur Q) aur R = P aur (Q aur R). To (y ∈ A aur y ∈ B) aur y ∈ C = y ∈ A aur (y ∈ B aur y ∈ C).

y ∈ A aur (y ∈ B aur y ∈ C) ka matlab hai y ∈ A aur y ∈ (B ∩ C), jiska matlab hai y ∈ A ∩ (B ∩ C). Mutual inclusion se dono barabar saabit ho jate hain. Union ki tarah, intersection bhi associative hai!
theorem.class9.normal_form.finalFormulaD: Origin se fasla p aur inclination α ka istemal kar ke equation banayein.
theorem.class9.normal_form.keyInsight: Yeh physics aur engineering mein point aur line ke darmiyan fasla maloom karne aur optics mein wave fronts analyze karne ke liye bohat mufeed hai.
theorem.class9.normal_form.practice_erro: x cos α + y sin α = p
theorem.class9.normal_form.practice_ques: α = 60°, p = 5. cos α aur x cos α + y sin α ko x=2, y=3 par evaluate karein.
theorem.class9.normal_form.step1_detail: Ek line L aur origin O se L par perpendicular jo point C par milta hai. Is perpendicular line ki x-axis ke sath angle α hai. Distance OC = p hai.
theorem.class9.normal_form.step2_detail: Triangle OCA se: cos α = p/OA → OA = p/cos α (x-intercept). Triangle OCB se: sin α = p/OB → OB = p/sin α (y-intercept).
theorem.class9.normal_form.step3_detail: x/a + y/b = 1: x/(p/cos α) + y/(p/sin α) = 1 → (x cos α)/p + (y sin α)/p = 1.
theorem.class9.normal_form.step4_detail: x cos α + y sin α = p. Yeh Normal Form hai! Yeh physics aur engineering mein point aur line ke darmiyan fasla maloom karne ke liye bohat mufeed hai.
theorem.class9.normal_form.title: Line ki Normal Form
theorem.class9.point_slope.finalFormulaD: Agar ek line ka point aur slope dono diye gaye hon, to uski equation kya hogi?
theorem.class9.point_slope.keyInsight: Calculus, physics, aur engineering mein agar aapko ek point aur rate of change (slope) maloom ho, to yeh bohat mufeed hota hai.
theorem.class9.point_slope.practice_expl: y = 10. Yeh y-y₁ = m(x-x₁) ka istemal kar ke nikala.
theorem.class9.point_slope.practice_ques: Point (1,2) se guzarne wali line jiska slope m = 4 hai. x = 3 par y kya hoga?
theorem.class9.point_slope.step1_detail: 📍 Aapko maloom hai ke ek line point (2, 3) se guzarti hai aur uski slope m = 1.5 hai. Aapko line ki equation maloom karni hai taake aap ise apne digital map par graph kar sakein.
theorem.class9.point_slope.step2_detail: Farz karein P(x, y) line par koi bhi point hai. B(x₁, y₁) = (2, 3) aur slope m = (y − y₁)/(x − x₁).
theorem.class9.point_slope.step3_detail: m(x − x₁) = y − y₁. Yeh equation dikhati hai ke agar line par koi bhi point ho, to (x₁, y₁) se (x, y) tak ki slope hamesha m hoti hai.
theorem.class9.point_slope.step4_detail: y − y₁ = m(x − x₁). Hamare example ke liye: y − 3 = 1.5(x − 2) → y = 1.5x.
theorem.class9.point_slope.title: Point-Slope Form
theorem.class9.power_log.finalFormulaDes: Ek power ka log, power aur base ke log ke multiply ke barabar hota hai.
theorem.class9.power_log.keyInsight: Astronomers logarithms pasand karte hain: sab se door galaxies ka fasla 10²⁶ meters hai — log₁₀(10²⁶) = 26 × log₁₀(10) = 26. Isko 26 log scale par likhna aur compare karna asan hai!
theorem.class9.power_log.practice_explan: log₂(81) = 4 × 1.585 = 6.34. Power log ke aage aa jati hai!
theorem.class9.power_log.step1_detail: Aap ek investor hain jo apne paison ki growth dekhte hain. Aapka initial investment m = ,000 hai, jo b = 2× per year ki growth rate se barhta hai. n = 4 saal ke baad, aapke paise 2^4 se multiply hote hain. Let log_b m = x, meaning b^x = m.
theorem.class9.power_log.step2_detail: m = b^x ko convert karein. Aapka initial ,000 = 2^x ka matlab hai x = log₂(3000) ≈ 11.55 — aapke investment ki 'doubling power'.
theorem.class9.power_log.step3_detail: Dono taraf ko n-th power tak raise karein: m^n = (b^x)^n. Power of a power rule ka istemal karein: m^n = b^(nx). Aapka investment 4 saal ke baad: 3000^4? Nahi — yeh ek mathematical power hai, financial nahin.
theorem.class9.power_log.step3_label: Dono taraf ko power n tak raise karein
theorem.class9.power_log.step4_detail: m^n = b^(nx) ko log form mein convert karne ke liye: log_b(m^n) = nx. x ko log_b m se replace karne par, log_b(m^n) = n log_b m. Exponent 'log ke aage nikal aata hai!'
theorem.class9.power_log.title: Power Logarithms ka Qanoon
theorem.class9.product_log.finalFormulaD: Product ka log, logs ke sum ke barabar hota hai
theorem.class9.product_log.keyInsight: Richter scale mein is qanoon ka istemal hota hai: magnitude 8 ka zalzala 4 ki tarah hi nahin hai, balki 10,000 guna zyada hai! Kyunki scale logarithmic hai, har poora number 10 ka ek factor add karta hai.
theorem.class9.product_log.practice_hint: 32 = 4 × 8. Product rule ka istemal karein: log₂(4) + log₂(8)
theorem.class9.product_log.step1_detail: Aap ek sound engineer hain jo ek live concert ko mix kar rahe hain. Microphone sound ko power m = 4 units par uthata hai, aur amplifier n = 8 units add karta hai. Total gain nikalne ke liye, aap logarithms ka istemal karte hain. Let log_b m = x aur log_b n = y — yeh signal ki 'logarithmic power' ko zahir karte hain.
theorem.class9.product_log.step2_detail: Wapas badalne par: m = b^x aur n = b^y. Hamare concert mein, agar b = 2 (binary amplification) ho, to m = 2^x aur n = 2^y. Exponential form mein, log values ke peeche chhupe actual multipliers zahir hote hain.
theorem.class9.product_log.step3_detail: Ab m × n ko multiply karein: mn = b^x · b^y. Jab hum same base ke powers ko multiply karte hain, to exponents ko ADD karte hain: mn = b^(x+y). Yeh key insight hai — real world mein multiplication, log world mein addition ban jata hai.
theorem.class9.product_log.step4_detail: mn ka logarithmic form, mn ke individual logarithmic forms ke sum ke barabar hota hai. x aur y ko logarithmic form mein rakhne par, aapko milta hai: log_b(mn) = log_b m + log_b n. Total sound power (product) individual log powers ke sum ke barabar hoti hai.
theorem.class9.product_log.title: Product Law of Logarithms
theorem.class9.pythagorean_identities.fi: Pythagorean Theorem ko trigonometric form mein pesh kiya gaya hai.
theorem.class9.pythagorean_identities.ke: Is ek identity se, hum yeh derive kar sakte hain: sec²θ − tan²θ = 1 aur cosec²θ − cot²θ = 1. Yeh signal processing se lekar orbital mechanics tak sabhi cheezon mein istemal hote hain!
theorem.class9.pythagorean_identities.pr: sin²(30°) + cos²(30°) = 1. Hamesha 1, angle chahe jo bhi ho!
theorem.class9.pythagorean_identities.st: 📐 Kisi bhi right triangle mein jiske legs a, b aur hypotenuse c hai: a² + b² = c². Yeh geometry ka sabse mashhoor relation hai.
sin θ = a/c aur cos θ = b/c. Dono ko square karein: sin²θ = a²/c² aur cos²θ = b²/c².
sin²θ + cos²θ = a²/c² + b²/c² = (a² + b²)/c² = c²/c² = 1. Triangle ke legs aur hypotenuse puri tarah se cancel ho jaate hain!
sin²θ + cos²θ = 1 — θ ki value chahe jo bhi ho, yeh sabse aam relation hai! Isse hum is tarah derive kar sakte hain: sec²θ − tan²θ = 1 aur cosec²θ − cot²θ = 1.
Is identity ka aaghaz hota hai
theorem.class9.quotient_identities.final: Tangent hai sine ko cosine se divide karna; cotangent iska ulat hai.
theorem.class9.quotient_identities.keyIn: Ek unit circle par, tangent angle θ hai y-coordinate ko x-coordinate se divide karna — radius line ki slope!
theorem.class9.quotient_identities.pract: tan θ = sin θ / cos θ
tan(30°) = 0.577. sin/cos se bilkul match karta hai!
theorem.class9.quotient_identities.step1: 🔺 Aap ek building ke base par khade hain, aur uske upar dekhte hain. Angle of elevation θ hai. sin θ = opposite/hypotenuse = a/c. cos θ = adjacent/hypotenuse = b/c. tan θ = opposite/adjacent = a/b.
theorem.class9.quotient_identities.step2: Sine θ ko cosine θ se divide karne par, (a/c) / (b/c) = (a/c) × (c/b) = a/b. Hypotenuse (c) cancel ho jata hai! Aur a/b exactly tan θ hai.
Sine ko cosine se divide karein
theorem.class9.quotient_identities.step3: Isi tarah, cosine θ ko sine θ se divide karne par, b/a = cot θ. Yeh Quotient Identities hain. Yeh primary ratios (sin, cos) ko secondary ones (tan, cot) se jodte hain.
Isi tarah cotangent ke liye bhi
theorem.class9.quotient_identities.title: Quotient Trigonometric Identities
theorem.class9.quotient_log.finalFormula: Ek quotient ka log, logs ke difference ke barabar hota hai.
theorem.class9.quotient_log.keyInsight: pH = −log[H⁺] mein iska istemal hota hai: ek solution jiska pH 3 hai, woh pH 5 se 100 guna zyada acidic hai, kyunki 10^(5−3) = 10² = 100 logarithmic scale par hota hai.
theorem.class9.quotient_log.practice_exp: log₁₀(10) = 1. Quotient law humein bilkul sahi 1 deta hai!
theorem.class9.quotient_log.practice_hin: 10 = 100/10. Quotient law ka istemal karein: log₁₀(100) − log₁₀(10)
theorem.class9.quotient_log.step1_detail: Aap ek chemist hain jo ek solution ki concentration dilution se pehle aur baad mein map rahe hain. Initial concentration m = 32 M (molar) hai aur dilution ke baad yeh gir kar n = 4 M ho jati hai. Chalo log_b m = x aur log_b n = y likhte hain.
theorem.class9.quotient_log.step2_detail: Exponential form mein badal dein: m = b^x aur n = b^y. Agar base b = 10 (common log) hai, to 32 = 10^x aur 4 = 10^y. Exponents x aur y yeh powers of 10 hain jo humein yeh concentrations dete hain.
theorem.class9.quotient_log.step3_detail: m ko n se divide karein: m/n = b^x / b^y. Jab hum same base ke powers ko divide karte hain, to exponents ko subtract karte hain: m/n = b^(x−y). Real world mein division, log world mein subtraction ban jaati hai.
theorem.class9.quotient_log.step4_detail: m/n = b^(x−y) ko log form mein badal dein: log_b(m/n) = x − y. Wapas replace karne par: log_b(m/n) = log_b m − log_b n. Log terms mein dilution factor, individual log concentrations ke darmiyan ka difference hai.
theorem.class9.quotient_log.step4_label: Wapas log form mein badal dein
theorem.class9.quotient_log.title: Logarithms ka Quotient Law
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.finalForm: Ek straight line ki equation jisme slope m aur y-intercept c ho.
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.keyInsigh: Business mein, yeh linear cost functions ko model karta hai: Total Cost = Variable Cost × Units + Fixed Cost. Slope ek unit ki cost hai!
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.practice_: y = 14. y = mx + c ka istemal karke.
Ek line ki slope m = 3 aur intercept c = 2 hai. x = 4 ho to y kya hai?
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.step1_det: Aap apni bachat ko track kar rahe hain. Aap  (y-intercept c = 1 ek scaled graph par) se shuru karte hain aur har hafte  bachate hain (slope m = 2). Line aapke waqt ke sath aapki total bachat ko dikhati hai.
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.step1_lab: Slope aur intercept ko identify karein
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.step2_det: Farz karein P(x, y) koi bhi point hai jo line par maujood hai. Line jo y-axis ko cross karti hai woh point A(0, c) hai — aapke week 0 par shuru ki bachat.
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.step3_det: Slope m = (y − c) / (x − 0) = (y − c) / x. Yeh A se P tak ki rise over run, line ki constant slope ke barabar hoti hai.
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.step4_det: m = (y − c)/x → y − c = mx → y = mx + c. Yehi hai! Sabhi straight lines is tarah likhi ja sakti hain.
theorem.class9.slope_intercept.title: Slope-Intercept Form
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.finalF: Line ki equation uske x-intercept a aur y-intercept b ke hawale se.
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.keyIns: Economists iska istemal budget constraints ka graph banane ke liye karte hain: agar aap khane par  aur ghar par  kharch karte hain, to x/a + y/b = 1 tamam mumkin kharchon ke combinations dikhata hai!
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.practi: y = 2. x/a + y/b = 1 ka istemal karke.
x-intercept = 6, y-intercept = 3. x = 2 ke liye y maloom karein.
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.step1_: 🎯 Ek line x-axis ko x = 4 (x-intercept a = 4) aur y-axis ko y = 3 (y-intercept b = 3) par cut karti hai.
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.step2_: Slope m = (b − 0)/(0 − a) = b/(−a) = −b/a = −3/4. Line har 4 qadam right jaane par 3 qadam down jaati hai.
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.step3_: Point (0, b) ka istemal karke: y − b = (−b/a)x → ay − ab = −bx → bx + ay = ab.
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.step4_: (bx)/(ab) + (ay)/(ab) = 1 → x/a + y/b = 1. Yeh khoobsurat form direct intercepts dikhati hai.
theorem.class9.two_intercept_form.title: Two-Intercept Form
theorem.class9.two_point_form.finalFormu: Do points ke darmiyan se guzarne wali line ki equation.
theorem.class9.two_point_form.keyInsight: Yeh formula surveyors istemal karte hain boundaries map karne ke liye - do measured points ke darmiyan se guzarne wali line!
theorem.class9.two_point_form.practice_e: y = 15. Two-Point Form ka istemal karke.
theorem.class9.two_point_form.practice_q: Line (0,0) aur (2,6) ke through. x = 5 ke liye y kya hai?
theorem.class9.two_point_form.step1_deta: Aapke paas do points hain A(1, 2) aur B(4, 8). Sirf ek straight line in dono ke through jaati hai — unke darmiyan ka sabse kam fasla.
theorem.class9.two_point_form.step1_labe: Do points ek line ko define karte hain
theorem.class9.two_point_form.step2_deta: Slope m = (y₂ − y₁)/(x₂ − x₁) = (8 − 2)/(4 − 1) = 6/3 = 2. Yeh line har 1 unit horizontally aage badhne par 2 units upar jaati hai.
theorem.class9.two_point_form.step3_deta: Ab humein m = 2 mil gaya hai, Point-Slope Form ka istemal karein: y − y₁ = m(x − x₁) → y − 2 = 2(x − 1).
theorem.class9.two_point_form.step4_deta: Slope formula ko direct daalne se: y − y₁ = ((y₂−y₁)/(x₂−x₁))(x − x₁). Yeh Two-Point Form hai.
theorem.class9.two_point_form.title: Two-Point Form
theorem.class9.union_associative.finalFo: Union ka operation associative hai — grouping se koi farq nahi parta.
theorem.class9.union_associative.keyInsi: School fair ki analogy: teen groups (food stall, games, raffle). Total combined team kisi bhi tarah group karne par same rehti hai — union ka matlab sirf 'yeh in sets mein se kam az kam ek mein maujood hai' hota hai.
theorem.class9.union_associative.practic: (A ∪ B) ∪ C = {1,2,3,4} = A ∪ (B ∪ C). Wahi 4 elements hain!
A={1,2}, B={2,3}, C={3,4}. (A ∪ B) ∪ C ke elements kya hain?
theorem.class9.union_associative.step1_d: 🏟️ School fair mein teen groups ke students ka tasawwur karein: Group A food stall chalata hai, Group B games chalata hai, aur Group C raffle chalata hai. x ko kisi bhi student ke taur par sochein. Agar x ∈ (A ∪ B) ∪ C mein hai, to...
theorem.class9.union_associative.step1_l: x ko ek element tasawwur karein
theorem.class9.union_associative.step2_d: x ∈ (A ∪ B) ∪ C ka matlab hai x ∈ (A ∪ B) ya x ∈ C. Aur x ∈ (A ∪ B) ka matlab hai x ∈ A ya x ∈ B. Isliye: (x ∈ A OR x ∈ B) OR x ∈ C.
theorem.class9.union_associative.step2_l: Union ki definition ka istemal karein
theorem.class9.union_associative.step3_d: Logical OR associative hai — (P OR Q) OR R = P OR (Q OR R). Isliye (x ∈ A OR x ∈ B) OR x ∈ C = x ∈ A OR (x ∈ B OR x ∈ C). School fair mein teams ko kisi bhi tarah group karne se koi farq nahi parta.
theorem.class9.union_associative.step4_d: x, A mein hai ya (x, B mein hai ya x, C mein hai) ka matlab hai x, A mein hai ya x (B ∪ C) mein hai, jiska matlab hai x, A ∪ (B ∪ C) mein hai. Equality dono taraf se sabit hai. Isliye (A ∪ B) ∪ C = A ∪ (B ∪ C). Grouping ka koi farq nahi parta!
theorem.class9.union_associative.title: Union ki Associative Property

☀️ You walk through automatic sliding do: ☀️ Aap supermarket ke automatic sliding doors se guzarte hain. Door ke upar ek light beam aapki maujoodgi se toot jati hai, jo mechanism ko trigger karti hai. Lekin yahan ek puzzle hai: dim blue light dalein to yeh theek kaam karta hai; bright red light dalein to kuch nahi hota — chahay red light 100× zyada bright ho! Isne physicists ko pareshan kiya yahan tak ke Einstein ne 1905 mein isay explain kiya.
☢️ A nuclear power plant generates elect: ☢️ Ek nuclear power plant uranium atoms ko split karke electricity generate karta hai. Jab ek uranium nucleus split hota hai, to products ka total mass original nucleus se thora kam hota hai. Mass kahan jata hai? Yeh energy mein convert ho jata hai! E = mc². Mass ka ek chota hissa bohat zyada energy release karta hai.
⚖️ You step on a bathroom scale. It read: ⚖️ Aap bathroom scale par kharay hote hain. Yeh aapka weight mg batata hai. Lekin ek 70 kg ka shakhs 686 N kyun weigh karta hai? Jawab weight ko Newton's law ke barabar karne mein hai: mg = G × m × M_E / R_E². Aapka mass m dono side par aata hai — isay cancel kar dein! Iska matlab hai gravity ki wajah se acceleration aapke mass par bilkul depend nahi karti.
⚡ Momentum conservation: m₁u₁ + m₂u₂ = m: ⚡ Momentum conservation: m₁u₁ + m₂u₂ = m₁v₁ + m₂v₂. u₁=3, u₂=0, m₁=m₂ ke sath: 0.17×3 = 0.17v₁ + 0.17v₂, to v₁ + v₂ = 3. Lekin ek equation, do unknowns — aapko mazeed information ki zaroorat hai.
⚡ You're investigating a Van de Graaff g: ⚡ Aap ek science museum mein Van de Graaff generator investigate kar rahay hain. Jaise hi aap apna hath metal dome ke qareeb late hain, aapko ek crackling sensation mehsoos hoti hai — electric field. Ek charged object apne ird gird ek invisible 'force field' banata hai jo dusre charges ko push ya pull karta hai. Kisi bhi point par field E, force per unit test charge ke tor par define hota hai: E = F/q.
⚡ You're standing near a lightning rod d: ⚡ Aap thunderstorm ke doran ek lightning rod ke qareeb kharay hain. Rod apni tip par charge concentrate karti hai, ek strong electric field banati hai jo air ko ionize karti hai aur lightning ko safely ground tak conduct karti hai. Kisi bhi point par electric potential V aapko potential energy per unit charge batata hai.
⚡ Your camera's flash needs a sudden bur: ⚡ Aapke camera ki flash ko energy ke sudden burst ki zaroorat hoti hai. Ek bara capacitor bank ahista ahista charge store karta hai, phir isay foran release kar deta hai. Kabhi kabhi capacitors series (higher voltage handle karne ke liye) ya parallel (zyada charge store karne ke liye) mein connect hote hain. Unki equivalent capacitance resistors ke ulat hoti hai.
⚫ The potential well near a black hole i: ⚫ Ek black hole ke qareeb potential well intehai deep hota hai. Sun se 10× zyada mass wale black hole ke event horizon (r = 30 km) par: V = −GM/r = −6.67×10⁻¹¹ × 2×10³¹ / 30000 = −4.4×10¹⁶ J/kg. Yeh Earth ki well se 700 million times zyada deep hai! Koi hairat nahi ke light escape nahi kar sakti.
⚽ You're a soccer player lining up a fre: ⚽ Aap ek soccer player hain jo goal se 30 m door free kick ke liye line up kar rahay hain. Aapko chahiye ke ball wall ke upar se guzre aur top corner mein dip kare. Range R yeh hai ke ball horizontally kitni door travel karti hai. Aap jante hain ke horizontal velocity constant hoti hai (air resistance ko ignore karte hue): v_x = vi cos θ. Agar aap 25 m/s aur 30° par kick karte hain: v_x = 25 × 0.866 = 21.65 m/s.
⛸️ You're watching an Olympic figure ska: ⛸️ Aap ek Olympic figure skater ko dekh rahay hain. Woh arms ko extend karke spin karna shuru karti hai, phir apne arms ko andar kheencti hai — aur achanak bohat tezi se spin karne lagti hai! Yeh angular momentum ki conservation ka practical muzahira hai. Angular momentum L linear momentum (p = mv) ka rotational equivalent hai, aur isay L = r × p (position vector cross linear momentum) ke tor par define kiya jata hai.

Lekin woh straight line mein zyada door travel nahi karte; woh har second dusre molecules se taqreeban 7 billion times takrate hain, har collision direction change karta hai. Yeh zigzag path (diffusion) wajah hai ke khushbu ko kamray ko cross karne mein seconds lagte hain, milliseconds nahi.
✅ x = x₀ cos(ωt), v = ±ω√(x₀²−x²), a = −: ✅ x = x₀ cos(ωt), v = ±ω√(x₀²−x²), a = −ω²x. Ek metronome jiski ω = 2π rad/s aur x₀ = 0.1 m ho: t = 0.2 s par, x = 0.1×cos(2π×0.2) = 0.1×cos(72°) = 0.031 m, v = −2π×0.1×sin(72°) = −0.6 m/s, a = −(2π)²×0.031 = −1.22 m/s². Yeh simple pattern guitar strings se lekar jhulnay wali buildings tak har cheez ko describe karta hai!
✅ Δy = λL/d. For red light (λ = 650 nm): ✅ Δy = λL/d. Red light (λ = 650 nm) aur d = 0.5 mm, L = 2 m ke liye: Δy = 650×10⁻⁹×2/0.0005 = 2.6 mm. Young ne in choti fringe spacings ko measure kiya aur light ki wavelength calculate ki — ek micrometer se bhi kam! Is experiment ne sadiyon puranay debate ko hal kar diya: light ek wave hai.
✅ ε = -NdΦ/dt. The negative sign is Lenz: ✅ ε = -NdΦ/dt. Negative sign Lenz's Law hai: induced current us tabdeeli ko oppose karta hai jisne isay banaya. Ek induction cooktop mein, glass ke neeche coils ek tezi se oscillate karne wali magnetic field (20-100 kHz) banati hain jo metal pan mein eddy currents induce karti hain. Pan khud heating element ban jata hai!
✅ ε₂/ε₁ = l₂/l₁. If ε₁ = 1.5 V gives l₁: ✅ ε₂/ε₁ = l₂/l₁. Agar ε₁ = 1.5 V, l₁ = 60 cm deta hai, aur unknown cell l₂ = 40 cm deta hai: ε₂ = 1.5 × 40/60 = 1.0 V. Khoobsurti yeh hai: balance par, cell ZERO current draw karta hai — aap true EMF measure karte hain!
✅ η_max = 1 - 300/800 = 1 - 0.375 = 0.62: ✅ η_max = 1 - 300/800 = 1 - 0.375 = 0.625 = 62.5%. Real steam turbines taqreeban 40-45% achieve karti hain. Kyunke T₂ kabhi bhi 0 K (absolute zero) nahi ho sakta, is liye koi engine 100% efficient nahi ho sakta. Yehi wajah hai ke in materials par billions kharach kiye jate hain jo zyada T₁ bardasht kar sakein — turbine temperature mein har 100 K ka izafa efficiency ko 5-8% behtar banata hai!
✅ λ = h/p = h/(mv). Electron microscopes: ✅ λ = h/p = h/(mv). Electron microscopes yeh use karte hain: 100,000 eV tak accelerate kiye gaye electrons ki λ ≈ 0.0037 nm hoti hai — visible light se 100,000× choti! Yehi wajah hai ke woh individual atoms ko resolve kar sakte hain. Ek cricket ball (m = 0.16 kg) jo 30 m/s par move kar rahi ho uski λ = 1.4×10⁻³⁴ m hoti hai — itni choti ke detect nahi ki ja sakti, isi liye macroscopic objects wazeh wave behavior show nahi karte.
✅ λ_max × T = 2.9×10⁻³ m·K. A blacksmith: ✅ λ_max × T = 2.9×10⁻³ m·K. Ek blacksmith's forge 1300 K par: λ_max = 2.9×10⁻³/1300 = 2230 nm (far infrared — aap iske chamaknay se pehlay heat ko FEEL karte hain). 800 K par: λ_max = 3625 nm. Human body (310 K): λ_max = 9350 nm — hum infrared mein glow karte hain! Is tarah thermal imaging cameras aur night vision kaam karte hain.
✅ τ = RC. For the wiper circuit (R = 100: ✅ τ = RC. Wiper circuit (R = 100 kΩ, C = 100 μF) ke liye: τ = 100,000 × 100×10⁻⁶ = 10 s. Capacitor taqreeban 7 s mein threshold tak pohnchta hai, wiper sweep ko trigger karta hai. Discharging: Q(t) = Q₀e⁻ᵗ/ᴿᶜ. t = RC ke baad, sirf 37% bachta hai. RC circuits har jagah hain — pacemakers se lekar audio filters tak, aapke keyboard par 60 Hz debounce filter tak!
✅ ω = √(k/m), T = 2π√(m/k). For a car wi: ✅ ω = √(k/m), T = 2π√(m/k). Ek car jiska mass 1000 kg aur k = 40,000 N/m wale springs par hai: ω = √(40000/1000) = 6.32 rad/s, T = 2π/6.32 = 0.99 s. Aapki car har second mein taqreeban ek dafa bounce karti hai. Race cars behtar handling ke liye stiffer springs (zyada k) use karti hain — yehi wajah hai ke woh kharab raston par harsh mehsoos hoti hain!
✈️ You're an aerospace engineer designin: ✈️ Aap ek aerospace engineer hain jo ek airplane wing design kar rahay hain. Ek 380-ton Airbus zameen se kaise lift off karti hai? Bernoulli ka principle: tezi se move karne wala fluid lower pressure rakhta hai. Wing top par curved hota hai, jis se wahan hawa tezi se travel karti hai — neeche ke muqable mein upar lower pressure banati hai.
✨ Substituting back: λ = constant × h¹ m: ✨ Wapas substitute karna: λ = constant × h¹ m⁻¹ v⁻¹ = h/(mv). Jab physicist Louis de Broglie ne 1924 mein yeh propose kiya, to yeh revolutionary tha — electrons jese particles ki wave nature hoti hai! Aaj, electron microscopes bilkul isi principle ko use karte hain, aur 0.05 nm ki resolutions achieve karte hain — individual atoms ko image karne ke liye kafi hai!
❄️ You're designing a refrigerator. Your: ❄️ Aap ek refrigerator design kar rahay hain. Aapka goal: andar (cold reservoir 270 K par) se jitni ho sake heat nikalna jabke kam se kam work karna. Compressor work W karta hai, food compartment se heat Q₂ extract ki jati hai, aur Q₁ kitchen (310 K par) mein reject ki jati hai.
❤️ A defibrillator delivers a life-savin: ❤️ Ek defibrillator heart ko restart karne ke liye life-saving electric shock deliver karta hai. Iske andar, ek capacitor energy store karta hai aur isay milliseconds mein release karta hai. Capacitor mein store hone wali energy charges ko separate karne ke work se aati hai — electric field ke mukhalif ek plate par positive charge aur dusri par negative charge build karna.
➗ Rearranging: vf = vi + at. This is the: ➗ Rearrange karne par: vf = vi + at. Yeh motion ki pehli equation hai. Aapki car ke liye: vf = 0 + 3.33 × 5 = 16.7 m/s. Simple lekin powerful — yeh aapko kisi bhi duration ke liye kisi bhi acceleration ke baad aapki final speed batati hai.
⭕ Draw a circle with centre O. Draw a ta: ⭕ Centre O ke sath ek circle draw karein. Ek tangent PQ draw karein jo circle ko point B par touch kare. Radial segment OB draw karein.
⭕🔵 Draw two circles — one larger (radius: ⭕🔵 Do circles draw karein — ek larger (radius r₁ = 3cm, centre A) aur ek smaller (radius r₂ = 1cm, centre B) uske andar, jo bilkul ek point C par touch karein.
🌀 You're watching a weather forecast. Th: 🌀 Aap ek weather forecast dekh rahay hain. Meteorologist Northern Hemisphere mein counterclockwise spin karne wale ek swirling cyclone ki taraf ishara karta hai. Storms spin kyun karte hain? Coriolis force — ek apparent force jo ghoomti hui Earth par move karte objects ko deflect karti hai. Yehi wajah hai ke hawain high se low pressure ki taraf seedhi nahi chalti.
🌀 Your electric fan has an inductor (a c: 🌀 Aapke electric fan ke andar ek inductor (wire ki ek coil) hai. Jab AC is mein se guzarti hai, to inductor current mein tabdeeli ko resist karta hai — back EMF banata hai. AC ki is opposition ko inductive reactance X_L kehte hain. Ek resistor ke baraks, yeh energy dissipate nahi karta — yeh isay magnetic field mein store aur release karta hai.
🌄 A mountain expedition measures a trian: 🌄 Ek mountain expedition ek triangular valley ko measure karti hai. Vertex B se base AC (agar zaroorat ho to extended) tak ek perpendicular h girayein. Yeh do right triangles banata hai.
🌄 Drop a perpendicular from B to base AC: 🌄 B se base AC par aik perpendicular drop karein. Altitude h ko do tariko se express kiya ja sakta hai: h = c \sin α aur h = a \sin γ.
🌊 You're standing by a river. The river: 🌊 Aap ek river ke pas kharay hain. River upstream wide aur slow hai, lekin downstream ek fast-flowing rapids mein narrow ho jati hai. Har second har point se water ki same amount guzarna zaroori hai — water incompressible hai. Mass entering = mass leaving.
🌌 You're an astronomer at the Mount Wils: 🌌 Aap 1929 mein Mount Wilson Observatory mein ek astronomer hain. Edwin Hubble ek hairan kun discovery karta hai: har distant galaxy hum se door ja rahi hai, aur woh jitni door hain, utni hi tezi se door ja rahi hain. Universe expand ho raha hai! v ∝ d — recession velocity distance ke proportional hai.
🌍 A smaller station (R = 10 m) would nee: 🌍 Ek chotay station (R = 10 m) ko ω = √(9.81/10) = 0.99 rad/s ki zaroorat hogi, har 6.3 seconds mein aik bar ghoomte hue — itna tez ke dizziness paida kar de! Yehi wajah hai ke space stations ko large radii ki zaroorat hoti hai. NASA ke proposed Nautilus-X mein Mars-bound astronauts ke liye partial gravity faraham karne ke liye 9 m radius rotating section ka istemal kiya jana tha.
🌍 Imagine drawing a circle that passes t: 🌍 Ek circle draw karne ka tasawwur karein jo ek triangle ke teeno vertices se guzarta ho. Yeh circumcircle hai, aur iska centre O circumcentre hai. Diameter BD draw karein.
🌍 You're calculating how much energy is: 🌍 Aap calculate kar rahay hain ke ek rocket ko infinity tak launch karne ke liye — Earth ki gravity se mukammal tor par bach nikalne ke liye kitni energy ki zaroorat hai. Lekin ek masla hai: gravity distance (1/r²) ke sath kamzor hoti hai, to force constant nahi hai. Aap sirf W = Fd use nahi kar sakte. Aapko calculus ki zaroorat hai ek infinite path par work ko sum karne ke liye.
🌍 g = 9.81 m/s². Every second in free fa: 🌍 g = 9.81 m/s². Free fall mein har second, aapki speed 9.81 m/s barhti hai. Lekin g vary karta hai: Earth ki rotation ki wajah se equator par (9.78 m/s²), aur flattening ki wajah se poles par (9.83 m/s²). Mount Everest par, g 9.79 m/s² hai — 0.2% kam. Mars par, g sirf 3.71 m/s² hai — aapka weight Earth ke weight ka sirf 38% hoga!
🌓 Draw a circle with diameter AB (passin: 🌓 Diameter AB ke sath (jo centre O se guzarta ho) ek circle draw karein. Semicircle arc par koi bhi point P lein.
🌡️ You're checking a fever with a thermo: 🌡️ Aap ek thermometer se fever check kar rahay hain. Mercury upar jata hai — lekin temperature molecular level par asal mein kya measure karta hai? Ideal gas law PV = NkT macroscopic pressure/volume/temperature ko relate karta hai. Isay microscopic kinetic theory result PV = (2/3)N×KE_avg ke sath milayen.
🌧️ You're a meteorologist studying raind: 🌧️ Aap ek meteorologist hain jo raindrops ko study kar rahay hain. Raindrops zameen par girnay tak accelerate kyun nahi karte rehte? Kyunke speed ke sath air drag barhta hai jab tak ke yeh gravity ko balance na kar le. Us point par, net force = 0, acceleration = 0, aur drop ek constant terminal velocity se girta hai.
🌳 A land surveyor measures a triangular: 🌳 Ek land surveyor ek triangular plot ko measure karta hai. Inhain do sides (b aur c) aur unke darmiyan ka angle (α) pata hai. Basic area formula hai: Area = ½ × base × height.
🍎 It's 1666, and Isaac Newton sits under: 🍎 Yeh 1666 hai, aur Isaac Newton Woolsthorpe Manor mein ek apple tree ke neeche betha hai. Ek apple girta hai — lekin kya ho agar wahi force jo apple ko kheencti hai Moon tak phail jaye? Newton ne realize kiya ke kisi bhi do masses ke darmiyan gravitational force is baat par depend karti hai ke har ek mein kitna matter hai: F_g ∝ m₁ × m₂. Ek mass ko double karein = pull ko double karein. Ek 50 kg ka shakhs aur us ka 70 kg ka dost, do 50 kg logon ke muqablay mein 1.4× force mehsoos karte hain.
🍲 Aap pressure cooker se paka rahay hain. Lid tight seal hoti hai, steam ko andar trap karti hai. Pressure is liye barhta hai kyunke same volume mein gas molecules zyada tezi se move kar rahay hote hain (heated). Aayen pressure ko individual molecules ki microscopic kinetic energy ke sath connect karein.
🍳 You're cooking with an induction cookt: 🍳 Aap ek induction cooktop se paka rahay hain. Yeh BINA kisi visible flame ya glowing element ke heat generate karta hai — sirf ek magnetic field jo har second mein hazaron baar badalti hai. Kaisay? Michael Faraday ne 1831 mein daryaft kiya tha ke ek changing magnetic field qareebi conductors mein ek electric current induce karti hai — electromagnetic induction.
🎄 You're decorating a Christmas tree wit: 🎄 Aap series mein connected old-style incandescent fairy lights ke sath ek Christmas tree ko decorate kar rahay hain. Agar ek bulb fuse ho jaye, to poori string bujh jati hai. Series circuit mein, har component se same current I guzarta hai. Kirchhoff's Voltage Law ke mutabiq, total voltage individual voltage drops ke sum ke barabar hota hai.
🎡 You're at an amusement park on the Fer: 🎡 Aap ek amusement park mein Ferris wheel par hain. Wheel ek constant angular speed ω par rotate karta hai, lekin aap center ke qareeb kisi shakhs ke muqable mein outer edge par zyada tezi se move kar rahay hain. Same angular motion aapke axis se distance par depend karte hue bohat mukhtalif linear speeds paida karti hai — yeh rotation aur straight-line motion ke darmiyan fundamental link hai.
🎢 You're riding a roller coaster through: 🎢 Aap ek sharp curve se guzarte hue roller coaster ride kar rahay hain. Aap side ki taraf push mehsoos karte hain — yeh centripetal acceleration hai jo aapko center ki taraf kheencti hai. Lekin yeh formula kahan se aata hai? Circle mein move karne wale ek particle ko imagine karein: ek chotay se time Δt mein, yeh ek chotay angle Δθ se guzarta hai. Pehlay aur baad mein position vectors ek choti triangle banate hain — bilkul wesi hi jesi pehlay aur baad ke velocity vectors.
🎯 A line crosses the x-axis at x = 4 (th: 🎯 Ek line x = 4 par x-axis (x-intercept a = 4) aur y = 3 par y-axis (y-intercept b = 3) ko cross karti hai. Yeh do points puri tarah se line ko define karte hain.
🎯 Conservation of angular momentum: L =: 🎯 Conservation of angular momentum: L = Iω = constant. Agar I kam hota hai, to ω lazmi barhna chahiye: ω_new = ω_old × (I_old/I_new). Skater ki spin speed 11 se multiply ho jati hai! Yeh is baat ko bhi explain karta hai ke neutron stars second mein senkron martaba kyun spin karte hain — yeh massive stars ke collapsed cores hain, jin ke moments of inertia na qabil e tasawwur had tak chotay hote hain.
🎯 Draw a chord AB and a perpendicular fr: 🎯 Ek chord AB aur centre O se AB se milne ke liye ek perpendicular draw karein C par (∠OCA = 90°).
🎯 Draw a chord AB. Take three points C,: 🎯 Ek chord AB draw karein. Circle ke SAME segment (major ya minor) par teen points C, D, E lein. Misaal ke tor par, sabhi major arc AB par.
🎯 Draw a circle with tangent PT at point: 🎯 Point A par tangent PT ke sath ek circle draw karein. A se guzarti hui chord AB draw karein, jo tangent aur chord ke darmiyan angle ∠APT banaye.
🎯 Solving: a=0, d=-1/2, b=1/2, c=0. The: 🎯 Solve karne par: a=0, d=-1/2, b=1/2, c=0. Period mass par bilkul depend nahi karta — Galileo theek tha! Bhari bob tezi se ya dhime se swing nahi karta. Length ki power 1/2, gravity ki power -1/2 hai. Angle matter nahi karta (small swings ke liye).
🎯 Tangential acceleration a_t = rα (wher: 🎯 Tangential acceleration a_t = rα (jahan α angular acceleration hai). Lekin centripetal acceleration a_c = v²/r bhi hai jo aapko center ki taraf kheencti hai. Total acceleration in do perpendicular components ka vector sum hai — aapke Ferris wheel ki seat changing speed aur changing direction dono ka experience karti hai!
🎯 The general solution: v₁ = (m₁-m₂)/(m₁: 🎯 General solution: v₁ = (m₁-m₂)/(m₁+m₂) × u₁ + 2m₂/(m₁+m₂) × u₂. Equal masses ke liye: pehli ball ruk jati hai, dusri iski speed le leti hai. Ek light car ko hit karne wali heavy car ke liye: light car backward fly karti hai. Nuclear reactor mein proton ko hit karne wale neutron ke liye: neutron apni zyadatar energy transfer kar deta hai — is tarah nuclear moderators kaam karte hain!
🎯 The incircle touches all three sides o: 🎯 Incircle ek triangle ki teeno sides ko andar se touch karta hai. Iska centre I (incentre) angle bisectors ka intersection hai. I se har side tak perpendicular distances sabhi r ke barabar hote hain.
🎯 Using 2 sin θ cos θ = sin 2θ: R = vi²: 🎯 2 sin θ cos θ = sin 2θ use karte hue: R = vi² sin 2θ / g. θ = 45° ke liye: sin 90° = 1, R_max = vi²/g = 625/9.81 = 63.7 m. Yeh is speed par maximum range hai. Lekin soccer mein, aapko accuracy chahiye, sirf distance nahi — Messi jese top players precision ke liye taqreeban 25-30° ke angles use karte hain!
🎱 You're playing pool. The cue ball (m₁: 🎱 Aap pool khel rahay hain. Cue ball (m₁ = 0.17 kg) 3 m/s par rest mein mojood 8-ball (m₂ = 0.17 kg) ki taraf roll karti hai. Crash ke baad, kya hota hai? Ideal case (elastic collision) mein, dono balls perfectly bounce karti hain — heat ya deformation mein koi energy zaya nahi hoti. Isay do laws govern karte hain: conservation of momentum aur conservation of kinetic energy.
🎵 A metronome ticks back and forth, mark: 🎵 Ek metronome aage peeche tick karta hai, pianist ke liye time mark karta hai. Iski motion SHM hai — ek diameter par uniform circular motion ki projection. Tasawwur karein ke ek point constant angular speed ω par circle ke ird gird ghoom raha hai. Iska x-coordinate waqt ke sath ek cosine wave trace karta hai.
🎵 Imagine two identical arcs on a circle: 🎵 Circle par do identical arcs ka tasawwur karein — jese circular railway track ke do equal-length curved sections.
🎵 Aap orchestra mein ek flute player hain. Jab aap mouthpiece ke aar paar blow karte hain, to andar air column vibrate karta hai jo musical notes paida karta hai. Ek open pipe (dono end par open) dono ends par antinodes (maximum vibration) rakhta hai. Hawa ka openings par freely vibrate karna zaroori hai.
🎵 Your stereo system has a crossover net: 🎵 Aapke stereo system mein ek crossover network hai jo audio signal ko split karta hai: low frequencies woofer ko jati hain, high frequencies tweeter ko. Yeh inductors aur capacitors ki frequency-dependent behavior ko use karta hai. AC ke mukhalif total opposition impedance Z hai — resistance R aur reactance X ka combination.
🎸 You're tuning your guitar before a con: 🎸 Aap ek concert se pehle apna guitar tune kar rahay hain. Jab aap kisi string ko pluck karte hain, to yeh apni length, tension, aur mass ki bina par specific frequencies par vibrate karti hai. String dono ends par fix hoti hai — yeh nodes (zero vibration ke points) hain. Vibration pattern fix ends ke darmiyan half-wavelengths ke ek integer number mein fit hona chahiye.
🏀 You're a basketball player taking a ju: 🏀 Aap ek basketball player hain jo jump shot le rahay hain. Aap ball ko 10 m/s par horizontal se 60° upar launch karte hain. Ball kitni unchi jayegi? Vertical component height determine karta hai: v_iy = vi sin θ = 10 × sin 60° = 10 × 0.866 = 8.66 m/s. Horizontal component (5 m/s) is baat par asar nahi dalta ke ball kitni unchi jati hai — yeh sirf isay aage le jata hai.
🏃 You're a long jump athlete running dow: 🏃 Aap ek long jump athlete hain jo track par daur rahay hain. Aapki takeoff speed horizontal se 20° upar 9 m/s hai. Sand pit par girnay se pehlay aap kitni der hawa mein rahenge? Jawab sirf vertical motion par depend karta hai — aapki horizontal speed hang time par bilkul asar nahi dalti.
🏎️ You're a Formula 1 engineer calculati: 🏎️ Aap ek Formula 1 engineer hain jo yeh calculate kar rahay hain ke aapka driver corner se nikalne ke baad bilkul kahan hoga. Final velocity kafi nahi hai — aapko distance traveled chahiye. Ek velocity-time graph par, line ke neeche ka area displacement ke barabar hota hai. Shape ek trapezoid (rectangle + triangle) hoti hai.
🏔️ You're a surveyor measuring a sloped: 🏔️ Aap ek surveyor hain jo zameen ke ek sloped plot ko measure kar rahay hain. Triangle ABC mein koi right angle nahi hai, lekin aap ek bana sakte hain! A se side BC tak ek perpendicular AD girayein, jis se do right triangles ban jayengi.
🏔️ You're climbing Mount Everest. At the: 🏔️ Aap Mount Everest climb kar rahay hain. Summit (8,848 m) par, aap assume karte hain ke gravity weak hogi kyunke aap Earth ke center se zyada door hain. Waqai: g_h = G × M_E / (R_E + h)². Everest ke top par: g_h = 6.67×10⁻¹¹ × 5.97×10²⁴ / (6.37×10⁶ + 8848)² = 9.79 m/s² — sea level ke 9.81 se sirf thora sa kam.
🏗️ Newton's Second Law says F = ma for l: 🏗️ Newton ka Second Law linear motion ke liye F = ma kehta hai. Rotation ke liye: τ = rF = r(ma_t). Tangential acceleration a_t = rα hai, jahan α angular acceleration hai. Substitute karne par: τ = r × m × (rα) = mr²α.
🏗️ You're an architect designing a parab: 🏗️ Aap ek architect hain jo ek parabolic arch design kar rahay hain. Curve ax² + bx + c = 0 ko follow karta hai. Aapko ek formula chahiye jo KISI BHI arch shape ke liye kaam kare. General equation se start karein: ax² + bx + c = 0.
🏠 You're wiring your house. Every outlet: 🏠 Aap apne ghar ki wiring kar rahay hain. Har outlet, light, aur appliance 230 V mains ke aar paar parallel mein connected hai. Yeh ahem hai: agar aap apna toaster unplug karte hain, to ghar ka baqi hissa on rehta hai. Parallel mein, har branch ki SAME voltage hoti hai lekin apni apni current carry karti hai. Kirchhoff's Current Law ke zariye, total current = branch currents ka sum.
🏥 You're a nuclear medicine technician p: 🏥 Aap ek nuclear medicine technician hain jo patient ke PET scan ke liye ek radioactive tracer tayar kar rahay hain. Tracer (fluorine-18) ki half-life 110 minutes hai. Aapko calculate karna hai ke inject hone tak kitna active bachega. Half-life, aadhi nuclei ko decay hone mein lagne wala time hai — aur yeh ek simple formula ke zariye decay constant se related hai.
🏭 You're a power plant engineer trying t: 🏭 Aap ek power plant engineer hain jo electricity generation ko maximize karne ki koshish kar rahay hain. Aapki steam turbine 800 K (boiler se steam) aur 300 K (cooling water) ke darmiyan operate karti hai. Maximum possible efficiency kya hai? French engineer Sadi Carnot ne 1824 mein iska jawab daryaft kiya, jis ne thermodynamics ki foundation rakhi.
🏹 You're an archer drawing a bow. The mo: 🏹 Aap ek archer hain jo bow draw kar rahay hain. Aap jitna zyada string ko peechay kheenchte hain, isay mazeed kheenchna utna hi mushkil ho jata hai — Robert Hooke ne isay 1660 mein daryaft kiya tha: F = kx, jahan k spring constant hai. Ek typical bow ka k = 200 N/m hota hai. Isay 0.5 m peechay kheenchnay ke liye 100 N ki force chahiye hoti hai.
👃 You walk into a room and smell freshly: 👃 Aap ek kamre mein dakhil hote hain aur aapko tazah pakki hui bread ki khushbu aati hai. Aroma molecules kitchen se aapki naak tak safar karte hain — lekin individual molecules asal mein kitni tezi se move kar rahay hote hain? KE_avg = (3/2)kT = (½)m<v²> se start karein. Yeh temperature ko molecular motion ke sath relate karta hai.
💡 It's 1801. Thomas Young performs a rev: 💡 Yeh 1801 hai. Thomas Young ne ek revolutionary experiment perform kiya jo sabit karta hai ke light ek wave hai. Us ne do tiny slits se light pass ki aur ek screen par alternating bright aur dark bands observe kiye — interference! Water waves bhi yahi karti hain jab woh kisi barrier mein do openings se guzarti hain.
💡 You flip a light switch, and the bulb: 💡 Aap light switch flip karte hain, aur bulb foran on ho jata hai. Lekin electrons khud wire ke zariye incredibly slowly move karte hain. Agar electrons rengte hain to light foran kaise on ho sakti hai? Jawab: signal electric field ke zariye light speed ke qareeb propagate karta hai, jabke individual electrons ghonghe ki raftar se drift karte hain.
💡 You look at your electricity bill. It: 💡 Aap apna electricity bill dekhte hain. Yeh aap se use ki gayi energy ke kilowatt-hours charge karta hai. Lekin aapke ghar mein voltage aur current alternating hain — woh second mein 50 ya 60 baar direction reverse karte hain. Jab voltage aur current musalsal badal rahay hon to aap average power kaisay calculate karte hain?
💿 You hold a CD up to the light and see: 💿 Aap CD ko light ki taraf hold karte hain aur colors ka ek rainbow dekhte hain. CD ki surface par ek spiral track hoti hai jis ki grooves 1.6 μm apart hoti hain — yeh ek diffraction grating ki tarah kaam karti hai! Jab white light is par girti hai, to different wavelengths (colors) different angles par bend hoti hain, jis se rainbow banta hai.
📈 At the maximum height, the ball's vert: 📈 Maximum height par, ball ki vertical velocity lamha bhar ke liye zero ho jati hai — yeh upar jane aur neeche aane ke darmiyan ka turning point hai. v_fy = 0. Yeh parabolic arc ki peak hai.
📈 On a velocity-time graph, this equatio: 📈 Ek velocity-time graph par, yeh equation ek straight line deti hai. Slope acceleration hai, y-intercept initial velocity hai. Drag racers isay use karte hain: 3 seconds mein 0 se 100 km/h (27.8 m/s) tak ka matlab hai a = 9.27 m/s² — taqreeban 1 g acceleration!
📊 By definition: a = (vf - vi)/t. In you: 📊 Definition ke roo se: a = (vf - vi)/t. Aapki car mein: a = (16.7 - 0)/5 = 3.33 m/s². Aapki speed har second 3.33 m/s barhti hai. Cross-multiply karne par: a × t = vf - vi. Velocity mein change, acceleration ko time se multiply karne ke barabar hai.
📊 Start with cos α = (b²+c²−a²)/(2bc). T: 📊 cos α = (b²+c²−a²)/(2bc) se start karein. Yeh full angle α ka cos teen side lengths ki form mein deta hai.
📊 The pressure difference is measured by: 📊 Pressure difference ko ek manometer se measure kiya jata hai: P₁ - P₂ = ρgh. Equate karein: ρgh = ½ρv₁²((A₁/A₂)² - 1). Solve karein: v₁ = √(2gh/((A₁/A₂)² - 1)). Yeh formula carburetors mein fuel ko hawa ke sath mix karne, perfume atomizers, aur medical nebulizers mein use hota hai!
📊 \\cos α = (b²+c²−a²)/(2bc). This gives: 📊 \cos α = (b²+c²−a²)/(2bc). Ye full angle ka \cos side lengths ki terms mein deta hai.
📋 When you know two angles (β, γ) and th: 📋 Jab aapko do angles (β, γ) aur included side a (AAS) maloom ho, to Δ = ½ ab \sin γ se shuru karein.
📋 Jab aap do angles (β, γ) aur darmiyan ki side a (AAS) jante hain, to aap phir bhi area find kar sakte hain. Area = ½ ab sin γ se start karein.
📍 Pick any three points A, B, C that don: 📍 Koi se teen points A, B, C lein jo seedhi line mein na hon — jese park mein teen trees jo ek line mein nahi hotay. Inhain mila kar ek triangle banayein.
📍 Take a point A outside the circle. Dra: 📍 Circle ke bahar ek point A lein. Do tangents AB aur AC draw karein jo circle ko B aur C par touch karein.
📏 But as objects get farther apart, grav: 📏 Lekin jese hi objects ek dusre se door hote hain, gravity rapidly weak ho jati hai. Newton ne pata lagaya: F_g ∝ 1/r². Agar aap distance double kar dein, to force 1/4 reh jati hai. Yeh inverse-square law explain karta hai ke ISS par (400 km upar) astronauts weightless mehsoos karne ke bawajood Earth ki surface gravity ka taqreeban 90% kyun mehsoos karte hain — woh free fall mein hotay hain!
📏 You pull out your dimensional analysis: 📏 Aap apna dimensional analysis toolkit nikalte hain. Planck's constant h ki dimensions [ML²T⁻¹] (energy × time) hain, mass m ki [M], velocity v ki [LT⁻¹] hain. Wavelength λ ki [L] hai. Aap set up karte hain: [L] = [ML²T⁻¹]^a [M]^b [LT⁻¹]^c. Yeh ek puzzle ki tarah hai jahan har dimension M, L, T dono sides par match honi chahiye.
📏 You've measured all three sides of a t: 📏 Aap ne ek triangular garden ki teeno sides measure kar li hain: a=5m, b=6m, c=7m. Δ = ½ bc \sin α se start karein.
📏 Aap ne ek triangular garden ki teeno sides measure kar li hain: a=5m, b=6m, c=7m. Aapko area chahiye lekin koi angles nahi pata. Δ = ½ bc sin α se start karein.
📏 Your initial vertical velocity: v_iy =: 📏 Aapki initial vertical velocity: v_iy = vi sin θ = 9 × sin 20° = 9 × 0.342 = 3.08 m/s. Yeh upward component woh hai jo aapko zameen se upar rakhti hai. Aapka launch angle jitna zyada hoga, aap utni hi der tak hawa mein rahenge — lekin agar bohat zyada hua to aap horizontal distance loose kar denge.
📐 A long straight wire carrying current: 📐 Current I₁ carry karne wali ek long straight wire r distance par ek magnetic field banati hai: B₁ = μ₀I₁/(2πr), jahan μ₀ = 4π×10⁻⁷ T·m/A free space ki permeability hai. Yeh field wire ke ird gird concentric rings ki tarah circulate karti hai.
📐 A nucleus is made of Z protons and (A−: 📐 Ek nucleus Z protons aur (A−Z) neutrons se mil kar bana hai. In separate nucleons ka total mass: m_total = Zm_p + (A−Z)m_n. Helium-4 (2 protons, 2 neutrons) ke liye: m_total = 2×1.00728 + 2×1.00866 = 4.03188 amu.
📐 A single charge q moving at velocity v: 📐 Field B ke zariye velocity v par move karte hue ek single charge q force F = qvB sin θ (v aur B dono ke perpendicular) mehsoos karta hai. Ek wire mein, bohat se charges mil kar move karte hain. Total charge q = I × t (current × time).
📐 Acceleration is the derivative of velo: 📐 Acceleration velocity ki derivative hai: a = −ω²x₀ cos(ωt) = −ω²x. Yeh SHM ka hallmark hai — acceleration hamesha displacement ke proportional aur direction mein ulat hoti hai. Extremes par, acceleration maximum hoti hai. Center par, acceleration zero hoti hai.
📐 All objects emit thermal radiation. Th: 📐 Tamaam objects thermal radiation emit karte hain. Spectrum ki ek peak hoti hai — woh wavelength jahan zyada tar energy emit hoti hai. Jese jese temperature barhta hai, yeh peak shorter (bluer) wavelengths ki taraf shift hoti hai: λ_max ∝ 1/T.
📐 An electric field exerts force F_E = q: 📐 Ek electric field field ki direction mein force F_E = qE lagati hai. Particles ko electric field ki taraf se ek side par pull kiya jata hai.
📐 Apply Kirchhoff's Voltage Law: V_batte: 📐 Kirchhoff's Voltage Law apply karein: V_battery = IR + Q/C. Kyunke I = dQ/dt, humein ek differential equation milti hai: R(dQ/dt) + Q/C = V. Yeh describe karti hai ke charge waqt ke sath kaisay build up hota hai.
📐 At balance, no current flows through t: 📐 Balance par, galvanometer mein koi current flow nahi karta — points B aur D same potential par hote hain. Upper branch mein: voltage across P = voltage across R. Kyunke B aur D same potential par hain: I₁P = I₂R.
📐 Between parallel plates, the electric: 📐 Parallel plates ke darmiyan, electric field uniform hoti hai: E = V/d. Iske alawa, Gauss's law ke mutabiq, E = σ/ε₀ = Q/(Aε₀), jahan σ surface charge density hai. Inko equal rakhein: V/d = Q/(Aε₀).
📐 By definition: V = U/m. Substitute U =: 📐 Definition ke roo se: V = U/m. U = −GMm/r substitute karein. Mass m cancel ho jata hai: V = (−GMm/r)/m = −GM/r. Potential sirf Earth ke mass aur distance par depend karta hai, is object par nahi jisko aap consider kar rahay hain.
📐 By definition: at t = T_½, N = N₀/2. S: 📐 Definition ke roo se: t = T_½ par, N = N₀/2. Decay law mein substitute karein: N₀/2 = N₀e⁻ˡᵀ_½. N₀ cancel karein: 1/2 = e⁻ˡᵀ_½.
📐 COP (Coefficient of Performance) = Q₂/: 📐 COP (Coefficient of Performance) = Q₂/W (cooling ke liye) — per unit work input remove ki gayi heat. 6 ka COP matlab hai ke aap har 1 J electrical work ke badle 6 J heat remove karte hain. 100% 'efficiency' se behtar kyunke aap heat ko move kar rahay hain, create nahi kar rahay!
📐 Centripetal acceleration a_c = v²/R. S: 📐 Centripetal acceleration a_c = v²/R. Isay Earth ki gravity ke barabar set karein: v²/R = g = 9.81 m/s². Dono sides ko R se multiply karein: v² = gR. Required linear speed v = √(gR). Radius R = 50 m wale station ke liye: v = √(9.81 × 50) = √490.5 = 22.1 m/s ≈ 80 km/h.
📐 Coulomb's Law: the force between two c: 📐 Coulomb's Law: r distance par alag do charges Q aur q ke darmiyan force F = kQq/r² hai, jahan k = 9×10⁹ N·m²/C². Van de Graaff dome (Q = 1×10⁻⁶ C) aur induced charge wale aapke hath ke liye: force dono charges ke proportional hai aur distance squared ke inversely proportional hai.
📐 Displacement: x = x₀ cos(ωt). At t = 0: 📐 Displacement: x = x₀ cos(ωt). t = 0 par, x = x₀ (fully right). t = π/(2ω) par, x = 0 (center). t = π/ω par, x = −x₀ (fully left). Velocity iski derivative hai: v = −ωx₀ sin(ωt). sin² + cos² = 1 use karne par: v = ±ω√(x₀² − x²). Center par, speed maximum hoti hai. Extremes par, speed zero hoti hai.
