📐 Divide by surface g: g_h/g = R_E²/(R_E: 📐 Surface g se divide karein: g_h/g = R_E²/(R_E + h)². Jese h barhta hai, ratio drop hoti hai. R_E (6370 km) ke muqable mein choti heights ke liye, hum binomial expansion use karke approximate kar sakte hain.
📐 Draw a circle with centre O and chord: 📐 Centre O aur chord CD ke sath ek circle draw karein. Central angle ∠COD draw karein. Major arc par point E (CD ki O wali ulat side par) lein. Inscribed angle ∠CED draw karein.
📐 Draw chord AB that creates a major seg: 📐 Chord AB draw karein jo ek major segment (semicircle se bara) banaye. Major arc par points P, Q, R lein.
📐 Draw chord AB that forms a minor segme: 📐 Chord AB draw karein jo ek minor segment (semicircle se chota) banaye. Minor arc par points lein.
📐 Draw two chords AB and CD such that th: 📐 Do chords AB aur CD is tarah draw karein ke central angles ∠AOB = ∠COD equal hon.
📐 Earth rotates once per 24 hours: ω = 2: 📐 Earth har 24 ghante mein aik baar rotate karti hai: ω = 2π/86400 = 7.27×10⁻⁵ rad/s. Equator par ek point v = ωR = 7.27×10⁻⁵ × 6.37×10⁶ = 463 m/s (1670 km/h) par move karta hai. 45° latitude par, rotational speed v = ωR cos 45° = 327 m/s hai.
📐 Efficiency η = Work output / Heat inpu: 📐 Efficiency η = Work output / Heat input = (Q₁ - Q₂)/Q₁ = 1 - Q₂/Q₁. Yahan Q₁ hot reservoir se absorb hone wali heat hai, Q₂ cold reservoir mein reject hone wali heat hai. Koi bhi engine is fundamental limit se zyada efficient nahi ho sakta.
📐 Einstein's energy-momentum relation: E: 📐 Einstein's energy-momentum relation: E² = (mc²)² + (pc)². Yeh relativistic Pythagorean theorem hai — rest energy aur momentum energy perpendicular legs hain, total energy hypotenuse hai. Stationary particle (p=0) ke liye: E = mc². Massless photon (m=0) ke liye: E = pc.
📐 For a mass-spring system: Elastic PE =: 📐 Ek mass-spring system ke liye: Elastic PE = ½kx². KE = ½mv². Kisi bhi point par, total E = PE + KE = ½kx² + ½mv². Energy in do forms ke darmiyan idhar udhar slosh karti hai.
📐 For a small sphere in a viscous fluid,: 📐 Ek viscous fluid mein ek small sphere ke liye, Stokes' Law drag force deta hai: F_drag = 6πηrv_t, jahan η fluid viscosity hai, r radius hai. Hawa (η = 1.8×10⁻⁵ Pa·s) mein ek tiny raindrop (r = 0.5 mm) apni speed aur radius ke proportional drag mehsoos karti hai.
📐 For a string of length L, the nth harm: 📐 Length L ki string ke liye, nth harmonic mein n half-wavelengths hote hain: L = n(λ_n/2). Fundamental (n=1): λ₁ = 2L (poori string ek loop mein vibrate karti hai). Second harmonic (n=2): λ₂ = L (do loops), aur issi tarah baqi.
📐 For an object moving in a circle of ra: 📐 Radius r ke circle mein move karne wale ek object ke liye: L = r × mv. Kyunke r aur v perpendicular hain (circular motion): L = rmv. Agar 50 kg mass wala skater 1 m radius par 3 m/s ki speed se spin kare: L = 1 × 50 × 3 = 150 kg·m²/s.
📐 For an open pipe of length L: L = n(λ_: 📐 Length L ke ek open pipe ke liye: L = n(λ_n/2). String wala same formula! Fundamental (n=1): λ₁ = 2L. Second harmonic (n=2): λ₂ = L. Ek open pipe mein sabhi harmonics present hoti hain, jo isay ek rich, bright sound deti hain.
📐 For cell 1 with known EMF ε₁: you slid: 📐 Known EMF ε₁ wale cell 1 ke liye: aap contact ko slide karte hain jab tak ke galvanometer zero na parhe (koi current draw nahi hua). Balancing length = l₁. Cell 2 ke liye: balancing length = l₂. Kyunke gradient constant hai: ε₁ ∝ l₁, ε₂ ∝ l₂.
📐 For photons: E = hf = hc/λ (Planck-Ein: 📐 Photons ke liye: E = hf = hc/λ (Planck-Einstein). Bhi E = pc (massless particles ke liye special relativity se). Equate karein: hc/λ = pc. c ko cancel karein: h/λ = p. To λ = h/p. Photons ke liye, wavelength = Planck's constant / momentum.
📐 For three resistors in parallel: I_tot: 📐 Parallel mein teen resistors ke liye: I_total = I₁ + I₂ + I₃. Har branch Ohm's Law follow karti hai: I = V/R. To: V/R_eq = V/R₁ + V/R₂ + V/R₃. Voltage V sabhi parallel branches mein same rehti hai.
📐 For three resistors in series: V_total: 📐 Teen resistors jo series mein hain unke liye: V_total = V₁ + V₂ + V₃. Har voltage drop Ohm's Law ko follow karta hai: V = IR. Isliye: V_total = IR₁ + IR₂ + IR₃ = I(R₁ + R₂ + R₃).
📐 From a/\\sin α = b/\\sin β, we get a/b: 📐 a/\sin α = b/\sin β se, humein a/b = \sin α/\sin β milta hai.
📐 From kinetic theory: P = (1/3)(N/V)m<v: 📐 kinetic theory se: P = (1/3)(N/V)m<v²>. 2 se multiply aur divide karein: P = (2/3)(N/V)×(½)m<v²>. Term (½)m<v²> per molecule average translational kinetic energy hai!
📐 From the Law of Sines: a/sin α = b/sin: 📐 Law of Sines se: a/sin α = b/sin β → a/b = sin α / sin β. Yeh ratio side lengths ko unke opposite angles ke sines se jorta hai.
📐 From the position triangle: Δr/r ≈ Δθ: 📐 Position triangle se: Δr/r ≈ Δθ (chhote angles ke liye). Velocity triangle se: Δv/v ≈ Δθ (same Δθ). Kyunke triangles similar hain: Δv/v = Δr/r. Velocity mein tabdeeli original velocity aur angular change ke proportional hoti hai.
📐 Horizontal motion: x = vt. The ball mo: 📐 Horizontal motion: x = vt. Ball kisi air resistance ke baghair horizontally constant speed par move karti hai. Vertical motion: y = ½gt². Yeh kisi bhi giri hui cheez ki tarah gravity ke asar mein girti hai. Combine karne se: y = (g/2v²)x² — path ek parabola banta hai.
📐 Hubble's Law: v = H₀ × d. H₀ (the Hubb: 📐 Hubble's Law: v = H₀ × d. H₀ (Hubble constant) ≈ 70 km/s/Mpc. 100 Mpc (326 million light-years) ki doori par ek galaxy 7000 km/s ki speed se door jati hai. 1000 Mpc par ek galaxy 70,000 km/s se door jati hai — yeh speed of light ka 23% hai!
📐 In PARALLEL: Voltage is the SAME acros: 📐 PARALLEL mein: Har ek par Voltage SAME rehti hai: V = V₁ = V₂ = V₃. Charges add hote hain: Q = Q₁ + Q₂ + Q₃ = C₁V + C₂V + C₃V = V(C₁ + C₂ + C₃). Kyunke Q = C_eqV: C_eq = C₁ + C₂ + C₃. Parallel capacitance ADD hoti hai — jaise badi plates banana.
📐 In SERIES: The same charge Q flows thr: 📐 SERIES mein: Har capacitor se same charge Q guzarta hai. Q = Q₁ = Q₂ = Q₃. Voltages add hoti hain: V = V₁ + V₂ + V₃ = Q/C₁ + Q/C₂ + Q/C₃ = Q(1/C₁ + 1/C₂ + 1/C₃). Kyunke V = Q/C_eq: 1/C_eq = 1/C₁ + 1/C₂ + 1/C₃. Series capacitance sab se choti individual capacitance se LESS hoti hai — jaise ek mota insulator banana.
📐 In a copper wire, there are n = 8.5×10: 📐 Ek copper wire mein, n = 8.5×10²⁸ free electrons per cubic meter hote hain. Har ek ka charge e = 1.6×10⁻¹⁹ C hota hai. Cross-sectional area A aur length L wali wire mein total charge Q = nALe hota hai. Yeh electrons ki ek bohot bari tadad hai!
📐 In a horizontal pipe (h₁ = h₂), Bernou: 📐 Ek horizontal pipe (h₁ = h₂) mein, Bernoulli simplify ho jata hai: P₁ + ½ρv₁² = P₂ + ½ρv₂². Rearrange karne par: P₁ - P₂ = ½ρ(v₂² - v₁²). Chaurey aur tang sections ke darmiyan pressure drop dynamic pressure mein change ke barabar hota hai.
📐 In a series RL or RC circuit, the volt: 📐 Ek series RL ya RC circuit mein, R aur X ke across voltages 90° out of phase hoti hain. Woh vectors ki tarah add hoti hain (Pythagorean theorem), aam numbers ki tarah nahi. Total voltage squared = V_R² + V_X².
📐 In any right triangle with legs a, b a: 📐 Kisi bhi right triangle mein jiske legs a, b aur hypotenuse c hon: a² + b² = c². Yeh geometry mein sab se mashhoor relationship hai, jo 2,500 saal se bhi pehle daryaft hui thi.
📐 In one period T = 1/f, the source move: 📐 Ek period T = 1/f mein, source aap ki taraf vS × T distance move karta hai jabke wave v × T travel karti hai. Nayi wavelength: λ' = vT - vST = (v - vS)/f. Waves ikathi ho jati hain — compress ho jati hain!
📐 In one period, the source moves vS × T: 📐 Ek period mein, source aapse vS × T door jata hai. Wave v × T travel karti hai. Peeche nayi wavelength: λ' = vT + vST = (v + vS)/f. Waves stretch ho jati hain — lambi wavelength ka matlab lower frequency hai!
📐 In the lower branch: similarly I₁Q = I: 📐 Neechay wali branch mein: bilkul waise hi I₁Q = I₂S. P aur Q se same current I₁ flow karta hai (woh series mein hain), aur R aur S se I₂ flow karta hai. Balance par, voltage divider ratios barabar hote hain.
📐 Instantaneous power in a resistor: P(t: 📐 Ek resistor mein instantaneous power: P(t) = I²R = (I₀ sin ωt)²R = I₀²R sin²ωt. Power double frequency par pulse karti hai — yeh hamesha positive rehti hai (current ki direction jo bhi ho heating same hoti hai), lekin 0 aur I₀²R ke darmiyan vary karti hai.
📐 Magnetic flux Φ = BA cos θ — the amoun: 📐 Magnetic flux Φ = BA cos θ — kisi surface se guzarne wale magnetic field ki miqdar. Ise area se guzarne wali field lines ki tadad ke taur par sochein. Ek strong field B, bada area A, ya behtar alignment (θ = 0) sab flux ko barhate hain.
📐 Mass entering in time Δt: Δm₁ = ρA₁v₁Δ: 📐 Time Δt mein dakhil hone wala mass: Δm₁ = ρA₁v₁Δt. Density ρ × area A₁ × velocity v₁ × time Δt. Yeh pani ka mass hai jo time Δt mein cross-section A₁ se flow kar raha hai.
📐 Mass leaving: Δm₂ = ρA₂v₂Δt. For incom: 📐 Nikalne wala mass: Δm₂ = ρA₂v₂Δt. Incompressible flow (ρ₁ = ρ₂) ke liye, conservation of mass ka matlab hai Δm₁ = Δm₂. Density aur time ko cancel karein: A₁v₁ = A₂v₂.
📐 Multiply by r: v² = GM/r. For low Eart: 📐 r se multiply karein: v² = GM/r. Low Earth orbit (r = 6,570 km, surface se sirf 200 km upar) ke liye: v² = 6.67×10⁻¹¹ × 5.97×10²⁴ / 6.57×10⁶ = 60.6×10⁶. v = √(60.6×10⁶) = 7,790 m/s ≈ 7.8 km/s.
📐 Newton's Second Law: F = ma. So ma = −: 📐 Newton's Second Law: F = ma. Toh ma = −kx. Lekin SHM ke liye, acceleration opposite direction mein displacement ke proportional hoti hai: a = −ω²x (ω angular frequency hai). Substitute karein: m(−ω²x) = −kx.
📐 On a force-extension graph, F = kx is: 📐 Force-extension graph par, F = kx origin se guzarti hui ek straight line hai. Spring ko khainchne par kiya gaya work is line ke under wale area ke barabar hota hai — jo ke ek triangle hai! Area = ½ × base × height = ½ × x × F.
📐 Orbital speed: v = 2πr/T (circumferenc: 📐 Orbital speed: v = 2πr/T (circumference ÷ period). Geostationary ke liye, T = 86,400 s (24 hours). Orbital velocity se: v = √(GM/r). Inko barabar rakhein: 2πr/T = √(GM/r).
📐 PV from ideal gas law: PV = NkT. PV fr: 📐 Ideal gas law se PV: PV = NkT. Kinetic theory se PV: PV = (2/3)N×KE_avg. Yahan k = 1.38×10⁻²³ J/K Boltzmann's constant hai — yeh macroscopic world (temperature) ko microscopic world (molecular energy) se jorta hai.
📐 Planck proposed that light comes in di: 📐 Planck ne bataya ke light discrete packets (quanta) mein aati hai jinhein photons kehte hain, aur har ek ki energy E = hf hoti hai. Yahan h = 6.63×10⁻³⁴ J·s Planck's constant hai — nature ka ek fundamental constant. Blue light (f ≈ 6.5×10¹⁴ Hz) mein red light (f ≈ 4.5×10¹⁴ Hz) se zyada energy per photon hoti hai.
📐 Plug in Earth's values: M_E = 5.97×10²: 📐 Earth ki values daalein: M_E = 5.97×10²⁴ kg (taqreeban 6 sextillion tons), R_E = 6.37×10⁶ m (6370 km). G = 6.67×10⁻¹¹. Calculate karein: g = 6.67×10⁻¹¹ × 5.97×10²⁴ / (6.37×10⁶)² = 9.81 m/s².
📐 Power delivered to load R: P_out = I²R: 📐 Load R ko di gayi power: P_out = I²R. Internal resistance ke sath Ohm's Law istemal karte hue: I = ε/(R + r). Toh P_out = ε²R/(R + r)².
📐 Pressure at the top: P₁ = ρgh₁. Force: 📐 Top par pressure: P₁ = ρgh₁. Top par force: F₁ = P₁A = ρgh₁A. Bottom par pressure: P₂ = ρgh₂. Bottom par force: F₂ = ρgh₂A. Kyunke h₂ > h₁ hai, bottom se aane wali upward force top se aane wali downward force se bari hoti hai.
📐 Range = horizontal velocity × time of: 📐 Range = horizontal velocity × time of flight: R = (vi cos θ) × (2vi sin θ / g) = 2vi² sin θ cos θ / g. Aap ki kick ke liye: R = 2 × 625 × 0.866 × 0.5 / 9.81 = 541.25/9.81 = 55.2 m.
📐 Separate variables: dN/N = −λ dt. Inte: 📐 Variables ko alag karein: dN/N = −λ dt. Dono sides ko integrate karein: ∫(dN/N) = −λ∫dt. ln N = −λt + C. t = 0 par, N = N₀ hai, toh C = ln N₀. Isliye ln N = −λt + ln N₀.
📐 Simultaneously, a magnetic field exert: 📐 Sath hi, ek magnetic field F_B = qvB force lagata hai jo v aur B dono ke perpendicular hoti hai. Fields ko perpendicularly (crossed) rakhne se, dono forces ek dusre ke ulat kaam karti hain. Particles par ek taraf F_E aur mukhalif taraf F_B lagti hai.
📐 Solve for mean square speed: <v²> = 3k: 📐 Mean square speed ke liye solve karein: <v²> = 3kT/m. Mean square speed 3kT ko molecular mass se divide karne par aati hai. Halki molecules same temperature par tezi se move karti hain. Room temperature par Hydrogen (H₂) molecules ki mean square speed oxygen (O₂) ke muqablay mein taqreeban 16× zyada hoti hai!
📐 Start with the trapezoid area: S = ½(v: 📐 Trapezoid area se shuru karein: S = ½(vi + vf) × t. Yeh distance = average velocity × time hai. Smart baat — yeh constant velocity assume nahi karta, sirf constant acceleration ko manta hai.
📐 The current through a capacitor: I = C: 📐 Ek capacitor se guzarne wala current: I = C(dV/dt). Sinusoidal voltage V = V₀ sin ωt ke liye: I = C × d(V₀ sin ωt)/dt = ωCV₀ cos ωt. Current mein cos ata hai, voltage mein sin ata hai — yeh bhi 90° out of phase hote hain, lekin current voltage ko LEAD karta hai (inductor ke ulat)!
📐 The gas exerts force F = P × A on the: 📐 Gas piston par F = P × A force lagati hai. Work = force × distance: W = F × Δy = (PA) × Δy. Jab gas expand hoti hai toh piston Δy distance move karta hai.
📐 The grating equation is the same as do: 📐 Grating equation double-slit jaisi hi hoti hai: d sin θ = mλ. Lekin ek grating mein per mm hazaron slits hoti hain, jo bohot zyada sharp aur bright fringes banati hain. Grating spacing d = 1/N hoti hai jahan N lines per unit length ki tadad hai.
📐 The magnetic force F_B = qvB (when v ⟂: 📐 Magnetic force F_B = qvB (jab v ⟂ B) ek centripetal force ka kaam karti hai: yeh hamesha velocity ke perpendicular hoti hai, aur electron ko circular path mein khainchti hai. Koi work nahi hota (force ⟂ displacement), isliye speed constant rehti hai.
📐 The path difference from the two slits: 📐 Do slits se screen par kisi point tak path difference Δ = d sin θ hota hai. Agar yeh wavelengths (mλ) ke whole number ke barabar ho, toh waves in phase aati hain aur constructively interfere karti hain — bright fringe banti hai. Agar yeh half-wavelength (m+½)λ ho, toh woh cancel ho jati hain — dark fringe banti hai.
📐 The potential difference across any le: 📐 Wire ki kisi bhi length l ke across potential difference l ke proportional hota hai: V ∝ l. Agar wire 1 m lamba hai aur is par 2 V ki battery lagi hai, toh gradient 2 V/m hoga. Har centimeter poora 0.02 V deta hai.
📐 The quantity I = mr² is the moment of: 📐 Quantity I = mr² moment of inertia hai — yeh mass ka rotational equivalent hai. Jaise bhaari cheezon ko seedha dhakelna mushkil hota hai, waise hi bade I wali cheezon ko spin karna mushkil hota hai. Darwaze ke liye (mass 30 kg, farz karein ke r = 0.4 m par concentrated hai): I ≈ 30 × 0.16 = 4.8 kg·m².
📐 The rectangle part: initial velocity ×: 📐 Rectangle wala hissa: initial velocity × time. Agar aap corner par 15 m/s se shuru karte hain aur 4 seconds lagte hain, toh rectangle area = 15 × 4 = 60 m hoga. Yeh woh fasla hai jo aap constant speed par tay karte.
📐 The restoring force is the component o: 📐 Restoring force arc ke sath gravity ka component hota hai: F = −mg sin θ. Chhote angles (θ < 15°) ke liye, sin θ ≈ θ. Aur arc length x = Lθ, toh θ = x/L. Isliye F ≈ −mg(x/L) = −(mg/L)x. Force displacement ke proportional hoti hai — SHM!
📐 The triangle part: the extra distance: 📐 Triangle wala hissa: acceleration se extra distance. Area = ½ × (vf - vi) × t = ½ × (at) × t = ½at². 4 s tak 5 m/s² acceleration ke liye: ½ × 5 × 16 = 40 m. Yeh triangle rectangle ke upar hota hai.
📐 The vector A makes angle θ with the x-: 📐 Vector A x-axis ke sath angle θ banata hai. x-axis par perpendicular girane se ek right triangle banti hai. x-component adjacent side hota hai: Ax = A cos θ. Aap ki flight ke liye: Ax = 3000 × cos 30° = 2598 km eastward.
📐 The voltage across an inductor: V = L(: 📐 Ek inductor ke across voltage: V = L(dI/dt). Sinusoidal current I = I₀ sin ωt ke liye: V = L × d(I₀ sin ωt)/dt = ωLI₀ cos ωt. Note karein: voltage mein cos hai, current mein sin hai — yeh 90° out of phase hain! Voltage current ko 90° se LEAD karti hai.
📐 The wavelength is determined by the st: 📐 Wavelength stationary source se maloom ki jati hai: λ = v/f = 340/440 = 0.773 m. Source move nahi kar raha, isliye hawa mein wave pattern change nahi hota — peaks abhi bhi 0.773 m ke faslay par hain.
📐 The wavelength is still unchanged: λ =: 📐 Wavelength abhi bhi unchanged hai: λ = v/f = 340/440 = 0.773 m. Source stationary hai, isliye hawa mein compressions aur rarefactions ka spatial pattern aapki motion ke bawajood tabdeel nahi hota.
📐 The work done against gravity from Ear: 📐 Earth ki surface R se infinity tak gravity ke khilaf kiya gaya work yeh integral hai: U = ∫ₚ^∞ (GMm/r²) dr. Yeh integral har distance par kiye gaye chhote chhote work ko add karta hai, jahan force door jane par aur bhi weak hoti jati hai.
📐 The y-component is the opposite side:: 📐 y-component opposite side hoti hai: Ay = A sin θ. Aap ki flight ke liye: Ay = 3000 × sin 30° = 1500 km northward. Yeh dono perpendicular components independent hote hain — aap ek dusre ko asar kiye baghair east-west aur north-south speeds ko alag alag adjust kar sakte hain.
📐 To charge a capacitor from 0 to Q, you: 📐 Ek capacitor ko 0 se Q tak charge karne ke liye, aap chhote charge increments Δq ko move karte hain. Voltage linearly barhti hai: V = q/C. V-q graph par, voltage 0 se V tak jati hai jab charge 0 se Q banta hai. Kiya gaya work is line ke under ka area hota hai.
📐 To find V from a point charge Q, calcu: 📐 Point charge Q se V maloom karne ke liye, ek test charge q ko infinity se distance r tak laney ka work calculate karein: W = ∫_∞^r F dr = ∫_∞^r (kQq/r²) dr. 1/r² ka integral −1/r hota hai.
📐 When a molecule of mass m hits the wal: 📐 Jab m mass ka ek molecule deewar se x-velocity v_x ke sath takrata hai, toh woh −v_x ke sath wapis bounce karta hai. Har collision par momentum change: Δp = −2mv_x. Ek molecule ki force = Δp/Δt. Same deewar par hits ke darmiyan ka time: Δt = 2L/v_x. Toh F_one = mv_x²/L.
📐 When a point at radius r rotates throu: 📐 Jab r radius par ek point angle θ (radians mein) rotate karta hai, toh woh S = rθ arc length travel karta hai. 20 m radius wale Ferris wheel par, aadhi rotation (θ = π rad) ka matlab hai ke aap hawa mein S = 20π ≈ 62.8 m travel karte hain!
📐 Work = force × displacement: W = FΔr =: 📐 Work = force × displacement: W = FΔr = (qE)Δr. Ek charge ko uniform field E mein distance Δr tak move karne ke liye qE force chahiye hoti hai (field ke push ko overcome karne ke liye).
📐 Work W = F × d. From Newton's Second L: 📐 Work W = F × d. Newton's Second Law se: F = ma. Toh W = (ma) × d. Jo force aap ko rokti hai woh crumple zone distance par work karti hai.
📐 Work done on the fluid at the lower en: 📐 Neechay wale end par fluid par kiya gaya work: W₁ = P₁A₁Δx₁ = P₁V. Pressure fluid ko andar dhakelta hai. Upar wale end par fluid ki taraf se kiya gaya work: W₂ = -P₂A₂Δx₂ = -P₂V. Negative sign ka matlab hai ke fluid bahar nikalne ke liye apne surroundings par work karta hai.
📐 You write dimensions: [T] = [M]^a [L]^: 📐 Aap dimensions likhte hain: [T] = [M]^a [L]^b [1]^c [LT⁻²]^d. Angle θ dimensionless hai (arc se radius ka ratio). Time T ki dimension T hoti hai. Equate karne se: M: a=0 (mass matter nahi karta!), L: b+d=0, T: -2d=1. Angle ki power c bhi 0 hoti hai!
📡 You're designing a communications sate: 📡 Aap satellite TV ke liye ek communications satellite design kar rahay hain. Ise Earth par ek hi point ke upar fixed rehna chahiye taake aapki dish ko kabhi move na karna paray. Iske liye ek geostationary orbit zaroori hai — satellite ka orbital period Earth ke rotation period ke barabar hona chahiye: bilkul 24 ghante.
📱 You're programming a calculator that o: 📱 Aap ek calculator program kar rahay hain jisme sirf log₁₀ (common log) aur ln (natural log) ke buttons hain, lekin aapko log₂(8) compute karna hai. Yeh wahi classic problem hai jo Change of Base Law solve karta hai. Farz karein log_b m = x, jahan b target base aur m number hai.
📱 Your phone's touchscreen detects your: 📱 Aapke phone ki touchscreen aapki finger ke touch ko capacitors ke zariye detect karti hai. Jab aap screen ko touch karte hain, toh aap us point par capacitance badal dete hain. Ek capacitor do parallel plates hoti hain jo ek insulator se alag hoti hain. Capacitance C batati hai ke yeh per volt kitna charge store karta hai: C = Q/V.
📺 You're fixing an old CRT television. I: 📺 Aap ek purana CRT television theek kar rahay hain. Glass tube ke andar, picture banane ke liye electrons screen ki taraf fire kiye jate hain. Ek magnetic field unke path ko bend karta hai — electron beam 1 second mein 60 dafa screen par scan karti hai. Force qvB velocity ke perpendicular lagti hai, aur circular motion banati hai.
📻 Your radio tuner uses a variable capac: 📻 Aapka radio tuner mukhtalif stations select karne ke liye ek variable capacitor use karta hai. Jab capacitor se AC guzarti hai, toh plates baari baari charge aur discharge hoti hain. Capacitor voltage ki tabdeeli ko rokta hai — is rukawat ko capacitive reactance X_C kehte hain, jo inductors ke ulat kaam karti hai.
🔄 Draw a radial segment OA from centre O: 🔄 Circle ke centre O se point A tak ek radial segment OA draw karein. Outer end A par OA ke perpendicular ek line PQ draw karein.
🔄 From continuity: A₁v₁ = A₂v₂, so v₂ =: 🔄 Continuity se: A₁v₁ = A₂v₂, toh v₂ = v₁(A₁/A₂). Tang section mein fluid ko areas ke ratio se tezi pakarni chahiye. Substitute karein: P₁ - P₂ = ½ρv₁²((A₁/A₂)² - 1).
🔄 Given components, you can always recon: 🔄 Diye gaye components ke sath, aap hamesha original vector wapis bana sakte hain: magnitude A = √(Ax² + Ay²) (Pythagoras) aur direction θ = tan⁻¹(Ay/Ax). Yeh forces, velocities, electric fields — kisi bhi vector quantity par kaam karta hai. GPS ise satellite signals se aapki saheeh position nikalne ke liye use karta hai!
🔄 Linear speed v = S/t = rθ/t = rω. If t: 🔄 Linear speed v = S/t = rθ/t = rω. Agar Ferris wheel 40 seconds mein ek rotation (2π rad) mukammal karta hai: ω = π/20 ≈ 0.157 rad/s, aur aapki speed v = 20 × 0.157 = 3.14 m/s. Aadhay radius (10 m) par mojud bacha sirf 1.57 m/s ki speed se move karta hai.
🔄 Starting with \\cos α = 1 − 2sin²(α/2): 🔄 \cos α = 1 − 2sin²(α/2) se start karte hue, Law of Cosines substitute karein.
🔄 Starting with the identity cos α = 1 −: 🔄 Identity cos α = 1 − 2sin²(α/2) se shuru karte hue, Law of Cosines ko substitute karein: 1 − 2sin²(α/2) = (b²+c²−a²)/(2bc).
🔄 Substitute v = rω: L = r × m × (rω) =: 🔄 v = rω ko substitute karein: L = r × m × (rω) = mr²ω. Quantity I = mr² ko moment of inertia kaha jata hai — yeh batati hai ke kisi cheez ko spin karna kitna mushkil hai. Jab skater r = 1 m se apne baazu r = 0.3 m tak andar kheinchi hai, toh I 50 se gir kar 4.5 kg·m² ho jata hai.
🔄 Two roads cross at an intersection. On: 🔄 Do sarkein ek intersection par milti hain. Ek ki slope normal m₁ = 0.5 (halki pahari) hai, aur dusri zyada seedhi m₂ = 2 hai. x-axis ke lehaaz se unki inclinations α aur β hain.
🔄 Using v = ωR: ω²R² = gR, so ω² = g/R,: 🔄 v = ωR ko use karte hue: ω²R² = gR, toh ω² = g/R, ω = √(g/R). R = 50 m ke liye: ω = √(9.81/50) = √0.1962 = 0.443 rad/s. Ek puri rotation mein T = 2π/ω = 2π/0.443 ≈ 14.2 seconds lagte hain.
🔊 You're an audio engineer matching a sp: 🔊 Aap ek audio engineer hain jo ek speaker ko amplifier se match kar rahay hain. Ek amplifier ki internal resistance r = 4 Ω aur EMF ε = 20 V hai. Speaker ki resistance R hai. Sab se oonchi awaz paane ke liye, aapko R ko di jane wali power ko maximize karna hoga. Lekin R ki kaunsi value maximum power deti hai?
🔋 Kinetic energy conservation: ½m₁u₁² +: 🔋 Kinetic energy conservation: ½m₁u₁² + ½m₂u₂² = ½m₁v₁² + ½m₂v₂². ½m ko cancel karte hue: 9 = v₁² + v₂². Ise v₁ + v₂ = 3 ke sath combine karne par: solve karne se v₁ = 0, v₂ = 3 milta hai. Cue ball bilkul ruk jati hai, aur 8-ball 3 m/s ki speed se aage nikal jati hai — ek perfect transfer!
🔋 You're comparing two batteries to find: 🔋 Aap ek unknown cell ki EMF maloom karne ke liye do batteries ko compare kar rahay hain. Aap direct voltmeter use nahi kar sakte kyunke yeh thora current khainchta hai aur galat readings deta hai. Iske bajaye, ek potentiometer use karein — ek lambi uniform wire jisme ek sliding contact hota hai. Wire ka potential gradient constant hota hai (voltage per unit length uniform hoti hai).
🔋 You're working with a parallel plate c: 🔋 Aap ek parallel plate capacitor par kaam kar rahay hain — do metal plates jinke darmiyan voltage difference hai. Plates ke darmiyan electric field uniform hoti hai. Agar aap ek test charge q ko ek plate se dusri plate tak move karte hain, toh aap field ke khilaf work karte hain. Yeh work voltage se kaise talluq rakhta hai?
🔌 You're building an electric motor. A w: 🔌 Aap ek electric motor bana rahay hain. Ek magnetic field B mein rakhi hui current I carry karne wali wire ek force mehsoos karti hai. Yeh tamam electric motors ke peeche fundamental principle hai — aapke phone ki choti vibration motor se le kar electric trains ki bari traction motors tak.
🔌 You're designing a high-voltage transm: 🔌 Aap ek high-voltage transmission line design kar rahay hain. Jab do parallel wires mein current hota hai, toh woh ek dusre par force lagati hain — chotay electromagnets ki tarah attract ya repel karte hue. Yehi interaction ampere ki definition ki buniyad hai, jo electric current ka fundamental unit hai.
🔗 Draw two equal chords AB and CD on a c: 🔗 Ek circle par do equal chords AB aur CD draw karein. Misaal ke taur par, ek circular instrument par do equal length ki strings.
🔥 A blacksmith heats a piece of iron. Fi: 🔥 Ek lohar lohay ka ek tukra garam karta hai. Pehle yeh dull red nazar aata hai, phir orange, phir yellow, aur phir white-hot — aur agar yeh pehle pighal na jaye toh neela ho jayega. Garam cheezon ka rang humein unka temperature batata hai. Wien's Displacement Law: peak wavelength λ_max temperature T ke inversely proportional hoti hai.
🔥 A four-cylinder engine at 3000 RPM doe: 🔥 Ek four-cylinder engine 3000 RPM par 4 cylinders × 2 strokes/rotation = 6000 power strokes per minute karta hai. Yeh hai 6000 × 250 = 1,500,000 J/min = 25,000 W ≈ 33 horsepower! Negative sign (W = -PΔV) ka matlab hai ke compression ke doran gas PAR work kiya jata hai — jaise diesel engine ke compression stroke mein.
🔧 You're a mechanic with a 1500 kg car t: 🔧 Aap ek mechanic hain jiske paas 1500 kg ki ek car hai jise uthane ki zaroorat hai. Aap frame ke niche ek hydraulic jack rakhte hain aur handle ko pump karte hain. Chhote piston (area = 0.005 m²) ko sirf 240 N ki force se push karne par P₁ = 240/0.005 = 48,000 Pa ban jata hai — bilkul aise jaise pen ki tip ko apni hatheli par dabana.
🔧 You're a mechanical engineer designing: 🔧 Aap ek mechanical engineer hain jo ek car engine design kar rahay hain. Har cylinder ke andar, jalta hua gasoline expand hota hai, aur piston ko dhakelta hai jo crankshaft ko ghumata hai. Expanding gas ka kiya gaya work hi aapki car ko aage barhata hai. Sochiye ke ek area A wala piston gas pressure P se push ho raha hai.
🔬 You're a chemist measuring the concent: 🔬 Aap ek chemist hain jo dilution se pehle aur baad mein solution ki concentration map rahay hain. Initial concentration m = 32 M (molar) hai aur dilution ke baad yeh gir kar n = 4 M ho jati hai. Ratio m/n aapko dilution factor batata hai. Aaiye log_b m = x aur log_b n = y set karte hain.
🔬 You're an electron microscope designer: 🔬 Aap ek electron microscope designer hain jo individual atoms ko dekhne ki koshish kar rahay hain. Aap jante hain ke electrons waves ki tarah behave karte hain — lekin unki wavelength kya cheez tay karti hai? Aap andaza lagate hain ke yeh Planck's constant h (quantum ki duniya ka ruler), electron ka mass m (bhaari = choti wavelength), aur iski velocity v (teez = choti wavelength) par depend karta hai. Aap likhte hain: λ = h^a m^b v^c, jahan a, b, c unknown powers hain jo aapko maloom karni hain.
🔬 You're analyzing data from the Large H: 🔬 Aap CERN mein Large Hadron Collider ka data analyze kar rahay hain. Particles light ki speed ke qareeb aapas mein takrate hain, aur Einstein ki special relativity unke behavior ko govern karti hai. Rest mass m aur momentum p wale particle ke liye, total energy E mein rest energy aur kinetic energy dono shamil hoti hain.
🔬 You're in a physics lab needing to mea: 🔬 Aap ek physics lab mein hain aur aapko ek unknown resistance R theek theek napni hai. Ek multimeter approximate values deta hai, lekin aapko zyada accuracy chahiye. Samuel Hunter Christie (1833) aur baad mein Charles Wheatstone ne ek bridge circuit banaya jo unknown aur known resistors ko compare karta hai — aur yeh nihayat precise hota hai kyunke yeh null measurement use karta hai (galvanometer se zero current guzarta hai).
🔬 You're looking at an image from an ele: 🔬 Aap electron microscope ki ek image dekh rahay hain, jis mein crystal lattice ki tarah individual atoms tartib mein hain. Lekin ek microscope kisi aisi cheez ko kaise dekh sakti hai jo visible light ki wavelength se choti ho? Jawab hai: photons ke bajaye electrons use karein! 1924 mein, Louis de Broglie ne yeh tasawwur pesh kiya ke tamam matter wave jaisi properties rakhta hai.
🔵 An excircle touches one side of the tr: 🔵 Ek excircle triangle ki ek side aur dusri do sides ki extensions ko touch karta hai. Ex-centre I₁ vertex A ke mukhalif hota hai. Ise draw karein aur teeno vertices se jorein.
🔵🔵 Draw two circles with centres A and B: 🔵🔵 Do circles draw karein jinke centres A aur B hon, radii r₁ = 2cm aur r₂ = 1cm hon, aur jo ek dusre ko sirf ek point C par touch karte hon.
🔷 Draw a quadrilateral ABCD inscribed in: 🔷 Ek circle ke andar ek quadrilateral ABCD draw karein (charon vertices circle par hon). Ise cyclic quadrilateral kehte hain.
🔺 You're standing at the base of a build: 🔺 Aap ek building ke base par kharay hain, aur upar choti ki taraf dekh rahay hain. Angle of elevation θ hai. Building ki height "opposite" side hai, aur aapka is se fasla "adjacent" side hai. Hypotenuse dekhne ki line hai.
🕰️ You're a clockmaker in the 1600s, ins: 🕰️ Aap 1600s ki sadi ke ek clockmaker hain, jo ek cathedral mein jhulte hue chandelier ke bare mein Galileo ki observation se mutasir hain. Aap ek aisi pendulum clock banana chahte hain jo bilkul sahi time bataye. Lekin period T kaun determine karta hai? Shayad bob ka mass m, string ki length l, swing ka angle θ, ya gravity g? Aap T = m^a l^b θ^c g^d likhte hain.
🕰️ Aap ek grandfather clock dekh rahay hain. Pendulum shandar andaz mein jhulta hai — aur yeh taqreeban perfect time batata hai kyunke iska period is par depend nahi karta ke yeh kitna choura jhulta hai (chhote angles ke liye). Kaha jata hai ke Galileo ne ise Pisa Cathedral mein jhulte hue chandelier ko dekhte hue, aur apne pulse se time note karte hue daryaft kiya tha.
🕳️ You're studying black holes — regions: 🕳️ Aap black holes parh rahay hain — aisi jaghein jahan gravity itni zyada hoti hai ke koi cheez, yahan tak ke light bhi, bahar nahi nikal sakti. Gravitational potential V = U/m aapko kisi bhi point par 'gravitational energy per kilogram' batati hai, jo test mass se azaad hoti hai.
🗺️ You're a city planner. Point P₁(1, 2): 🗺️ Aap ek city planner hain. Point P₁(1, 2) library hai aur P₂(7, 6) hospital hai. Aapko ek nayi sarak banane ke liye unke darmiyan straight-line distance chahiye. Pythagorean Theorem aapka tool hai!
🗺️ You're a pilot navigating from New Yo: 🗺️ Aap New York se London ka safar karne wale ek pilot hain. Aapka flight path 30° north of east par ek 3,000 km ka vector banata hai. Lekin aapka navigation system east-west (x) aur north-south (y) components mein kaam karta hai. Aapko is vector ko torna hoga — bilkul waise hi jaise kisi inclined plane par forces ko resolve karna ya runway par effective wind component calculate karna.
🗺️ Aap do delivery drones track kar rahay hain. Drone A (2, 3) par hai aur drone B (7, 5) par hai. Control tower (origin O) se unke position vectors ã = OA aur b⃗ = OB hain.
🚀 You're a SpaceX engineer preparing a F: 🚀 Aap ek SpaceX engineer hain jo Falcon 9 ki launch ki tayari kar rahay hain. Satellite ko Low Earth Orbit tak pohanchna hai. Lekin isay kitna tez jana hoga? Circular orbit mein ek satellite ke liye, centripetal force (mv²/r) bilkul gravitational force (GMm/r²) ke barabar honi chahiye. Agar yeh bohat aahista chale, toh zameen par wapis gir jata hai. Aur agar bohat tez, toh door ud jata hai.
🚑 The ambulance passes you and races awa: 🚑 Ambulance aapke paas se guzarti hai aur tezi se aage nikal jati hai. Pitch achanak se gir jati hai. Ab source aapse door ja raha hai, apne peeche sound waves ko kheinchta hua — bilkul waise jaise ek kashti aage barhte hue apne peeche lambi waves banati hai.
🚑 You're standing still as an ambulance: 🚑 Aap chup chap khare hain jab ek ambulance 440 Hz par apna siren bajati hui aapki taraf race kar rahi hai. Iski pitch us waqt se kahin zyada oonchi sunai deti hai jab yeh stationary hoti hai. Lekin yahan physics thori alag hai: source move kar raha hai, aur apne aage ki sound waves ko compress kar raha hai.
🚗 You're a crash test engineer analyzing: 🚗 Aap ek crash test engineer hain jo gaari ki safety ko analyze kar rahay hain. 20 m/s (72 km/h) par travel karne wali 1500 kg mass ki ek gaari mein bohot zyada energy hoti hai jise crash ke doran dissipate hona zaroori hai. Work = force × distance, aur yeh work kinetic energy mein change ke barabar hota hai — work-energy theorem.
🚗 Aap apni gaari mein traffic light par hain. Light hari hoti hai aur aap accelerator daba dete hain. Aapki speed ahista ahista 0 se 60 km/h (16.7 m/s) tak barhti hai — aapke phone ka GPS dikhata hai ke isme pure 5 seconds lagte hain. Acceleration sirf woh rate hai jis par velocity tabdeel hoti hai: aap har second kitne m/s haasil karte hain.
🚗 Your car hits a bump and the suspensio: 🚗 Aapki gaari ek bump par lagti hai aur suspension uchalta hai. Spring utni hi force se wapis dhakelta hai jitna yeh dabta hai — Hooke's Law: F = −kx. Negative sign ka matlab hai ke force hamesha equilibrium ki taraf push karti hai. Yeh restoring force Simple Harmonic Motion ki buniyad hai.
🚗 Your car's windshield wipers have an i: 🚗 Aapki gaari ke windshield wipers ki ek intermittent setting hoti hai — wipe karo, ruko, phir wipe karo. Iski timing ek RC circuit control karta hai: ek resistor aur capacitor mil kar ek saheeh time delay banate hain. Capacitor resistor ke zariye charge hota hai, aur jab yeh ek threshold voltage par pohnchta hai, toh wipers chalu ho jate hain.
🚪 You're trying to open a heavy door. Yo: 🚪 Aap ek bhaari darwaza kholne ki koshish kar rahay hain. Aap gair iradi taur par hinges se jitna door ho sake utna dhakelte hain. Kyun? Torque τ = rF force F aur lever arm distance r dono par depend karta hai. Darwaze ke kinaray (r = 0.8 m) par 20 N se push karne se τ = 16 N·m milta hai. Usi force se hinge ke qareeb (r = 0.1 m) push karne se sirf τ = 2 N·m milta hai — aath guna kam asardar!
🚲 You're pumping up a bicycle tire. With: 🚲 Aap ek cycle ke tire mein hawa bhar rahay hain. Har pump stroke ke sath, aap zyada hawa ke molecules tire mein compress karte hain, aur pressure barhta hai. Lekin darasal pressure hai kya? Yeh arbon kharbon gas molecules ka collective asar hai jo har second arbon dafa tire ki diwaron se takrate hain!
🚴 You're cycling at 10 m/s down a neighb: 🚴 Aap muhallay ki ek sarak par 10 m/s ki speed se cycle chala rahay hain ke tabhi achanak ek bacha ball ke peeche bhagta hua bahar aa jata hai. Aap zor se brakes lagate hain. Newton's 2nd law kehta hai F = ma — brake pads rim ko dabate hain, aur ek force lagate hain jo aapki speed kam karti hai. Yehi woh force hai jo aaj aapko bachayegi.
🚶 You're walking away from a fixed speak: 🚶 Aap ek fixed speaker se door ja rahay hain jis par wahi 440 Hz ka note baj raha hai. Ab pitch gir jati hai! vL = 2 m/s ki speed se door jane par, sound waves aap tak ahista pohnchti hain — effective speed kam ho kar v - vL = 338 m/s reh jati hai.
🚶 You're walking toward a stationary spe: 🚶 Aap ek stationary speaker ki taraf ja rahay hain jis par 440 Hz ka note (A4) baj raha hai. Jaise hi aap paas pohnchte hain, pitch oonchi sunai deti hai. Kyun? Hawa mein sound v = 340 m/s ki speed se chalti hai. Jab aap vL = 2 m/s par iski taraf chalte hain, toh sound waves aap tak zyada tezi se pohnchti hain — effective speed barh kar v + vL = 342 m/s ho jati hai.
🛑 You're a safety engineer designing bra: 🛑 Aap ek safety engineer hain jo brake systems design kar rahay hain. Aapko pata hona chahiye: ek makhsoos braking deceleration ke hote hue, ek car ko rukne ke liye kitna fasla darkar hota hai? Masla yeh hai: aapko initial speed aur braking force maloom hai, lekin aapko rukne ka waqt nahi maloom. Aapko aisi equation chahiye jisme t na ho.
🛰️ At the International Space Station (h: 🛰️ International Space Station (h = 400 km) par: g_h = 9.81 × (6370)²/(6370+400)² = 8.69 m/s². Yeh surface gravity ka 89% hai! Astronauts isliye weightless mehsoos NAHI karte kyunke gravity khatam ho gayi hai — balkay isliye kyunke woh Zameen ke gird continuously free fall mein hote hain, bilkul Newton ki cannonball ki tarah.
🛰️ Isaac Newton imagined a cannon on a m: 🛰️ Isaac Newton ne socha ke ek pahar ki choti par rakhi cannon balls ko horizontally fire karti hai. Ek slow ball Zameen par curve banati hui girti hai. Ek tez ball zameen se takrane se pehle zyada door tak safar karti hai. Lekin kya hoga agar aap isay itni tezi se fire karein ke Zameen uske neechay se theek usi rate par ghoome jis par ball girti hai? Ball hamesha Zameen ke gird ghoomti rahegi — yeh orbit mein hai!
🛳️ You're designing a cargo ship. A mass: 🛳️ Aap ek cargo ship design kar rahay hain. 50,000 tons wazni ek bohot bada steel ka jahaaz asaani se tairta hai jabke ek choti si steel ki keel doob jati hai. Kyun? Archimedes' principle: buoyant force htaye gaye fluid ke wazan ke barabar hoti hai. Farz karein ρ density ke pani mein doobi hui h height ki ek cylinder.
🛸 You're the engineer designing a rotati: 🛸 Aap Mars mission ke liye ek rotating space station design karne wale engineer hain, jaise '2001: A Space Odyssey' mein tha. Zero gravity mein astronauts ki haddiyan kamzor aur patthay dheelay par jate hain. Aap ka hal: artificial gravity banane ke liye centripetal acceleration ka istemal karte hue station ko ghumaen. Target hai: a_c = 9.81 m/s² — Earth ki normal gravity.
🦴 You're an archaeologist who's discover: 🦴 Aap ek archaeologist hain jinhon ne ek qadeem lakri ka tool daryaft kiya hai. Yeh kitna purana hai? Carbon-14 dating aapko batati hai. Carbon-14 radioactive hai — waqt ke sath isme decay hota hai. Decay ka rate sirf is baat par depend karta hai ke kitne radioactive atoms baqi hain: dN/dt = −λN, jahan λ decay constant hai. Yeh differential equation exponential decay ko bayan karti hai.
🧩 You solve three simultaneous equations: 🧩 Aap teen simultaneous equations solve karte hain: M ke liye: a+b=0, L ke liye: 2a+c=1, T ke liye: -a-c=0. Is par kaam karte hue: T se: c=-a, L se: 2a-a=1 toh a=1, M se: 1+b=0 toh b=-1. Teen equations, teen unknowns — bilkul theek set!
🧪 You're a plumber diagnosing a clogged: 🧪 Aap ek clogged pipe ko check karne wale ek plumber hain. Flow rate mapne ke liye aap ek Venturi meter — ek aisi tube jo darmiyan mein tang ho jati hai — lagate hain. Tang hissa fluid ko speed up karta hai, jiski wajah se uska pressure kam ho jata hai. Pressure ka farq aapko flow velocity batata hai.
🧪 You're operating a mass spectrometer —: 🧪 Aap ek mass spectrometer chala rahay hain — ek aisi device jo molecules ko unke mass se identify karti hai. Lekin pehle, aapko ek aisi beam chahiye jis mein tamaam particles same velocity se move kar rahay hon. Yahan velocity selector aata hai: crossed electric aur magnetic fields jo particles ko unki speed ke hisaab se filter karti hain.
🧮 Acceleration a = Δv/Δt = v(Δθ/Δt) = vω: 🧮 Acceleration a = Δv/Δt = v(Δθ/Δt) = vω. Kyunke Δv = vΔθ (similar triangles se), Δt se divide karne par: a = v(Δθ/Δt) = vω. a ki direction v ke perpendicular hoti hai — circle ke center ki taraf.
🧮 Apparent frequency: f' = v/λ' = v/((v: 🧮 Apparent frequency: f' = v/λ' = v/((v + vS)/f) = f × v/(v + vS). Ab denominator v se bada hai, isliye frequency gir jati hai. Door jate hue source ki wajah se waves 'peeche chhooot' rahi hoti hain.
🧮 At Earth's surface: V = −6.67×10⁻¹¹ ×: 🧮 Zameen ki surface par: V = −6.67×10⁻¹¹ × 5.97×10²⁴ / 6.37×10⁶ = −62.5×10⁶ J/kg = −62.5 MJ/kg. Aapke har kilogram mein infinity ke lehaaz se −62.5 MJ gravitational potential energy hoti hai. Zameen se nikalne ke liye, har kg ko 62.5 MJ kinetic energy darkar hai — yeh 1.5 liters gasoline mein mojud energy hai!
🧮 At terminal velocity: Weight = Drag. m: 🧮 Terminal velocity par: Weight = Drag. mg = 6πηrv_t. Ek sphere ka mass: m = ρV = ρ × (4/3)πr³. Toh ρ(4/3)πr³g = 6πηrv_t. π aur ek r cancel karein: ρ(4/3)r²g = 6ηv_t.
🧮 Average of sin²ωt over a full cycle =:
🧮 Ek mukammal cycle par sin²ωt ka average = ½. Toh

= ½I₀²R. RMS (Root Mean Square) current define karein: I_rms = √() = I₀/√2. Phir

= I_rms²R = I_rmsV_rms.
🧮 But Earth is round! It curves away wit: 🧮 Lekin Zameen gol hai! Yeh horizontal distance x par drop = x²/(2R) ke sath curve banati hai. Cannonball ki unchai barqarar rakhne ke liye, iska girna Zameen ki curvature se match karna chahiye: ½gt² = x²/(2R). x = vt istemal karte hue: ½gt² = (vt)²/(2R). ½t² cancel karein: g = v²/R.
🧮 But by Ohm's Law for the equivalent re: 🧮 Lekin equivalent resistance ke liye Ohm's Law se: V_total = IR_eq. Barabar karne par: IR_eq = I(R₁ + R₂ + R₃). Current I sabhi terms mein same hai — isay cancel kar dain!
🧮 But the actual mass of a helium-4 nucl: 🧮 Lekin ek helium-4 nucleus ka asal mass 4.00151 amu hai. Mass defect Δm = 4.03188 − 4.00151 = 0.03037 amu = 5.04×10⁻²⁹ kg. E = Δm × c² istemal karte hue: E = 5.04×10⁻²⁹ × (3×10⁸)² = 4.54×10⁻¹² J = 28.3 MeV.
🧮 But work also equals the negative chan: 🧮 Lekin work potential energy mein negative change ke barabar bhi hota hai: W = -qΔV (negative kyunke field ke khilaf move karne se potential energy barhti hai). Barabar karein: qEΔr = -qΔV. q ko cancel karein: EΔr = -ΔV.
🧮 Cancel mass m: g = G × M_E / R_E². Thi: 🧮 Mass m ko cancel karein: g = G × M_E / R_E². Yehi wajah hai ke Galileo ka legendary Leaning Tower of Pisa tajurba kaam karta hai — vacuum mein ek par aur hathaura same rate par girtay hain. Mass farq nahi dalti!
🧮 Cancel −x from both sides: mω² = k, so: 🧮 Dono sides se −x cancel karein: mω² = k, isliye ω² = k/m. Angular frequency spring constant aur mass par depend karti hai. Sakht spring (higher k) = tez oscillation. Bhaari mass = aahista oscillation. ω = √(k/m).
🧮 Combine both insights: F_g ∝ (m₁ × m₂): 🧮 Dono batoon ko milayen: F_g ∝ (m₁ × m₂)/r². Force masses ke product aur distance ke square ke inverse ke proportional hoti hai. Newton ke paas form thi — lekin equation banane ke liye usay ek constant ki zaroorat thi.
🧮 Current I = Q/t = nALe/t = nAe(L/t) =: 🧮 Current I = Q/t = nALe/t = nAe(L/t) = nAev_d. Yahan v_d = L/t drift velocity hai — woh average speed jis par electrons wire mein drift karte hain. Ek 1 mm² copper wire mein 1 A current ke liye: v_d = I/(nAe) = 1/(8.5×10²⁸ × 10⁻⁶ × 1.6×10⁻¹⁹) = 7.4×10⁻⁵ m/s.
🧮 De Broglie's bold hypothesis: this app: 🧮 De Broglie ka bold hypothesis: yeh TAMAAM matter par apply hota hai, sirf photons par nahi! Momentum p rakhne wale kisi bhi object ki wavelength λ = h/p = h/(mv) hoti hai. v = 10⁶ m/s par move karte hue ek electron (m = 9.11×10⁻³¹ kg) ki wavelength: λ = 6.63×10⁻³⁴/(9.11×10⁻³¹×10⁶) = 7.28×10⁻¹⁰ m = 0.73 nm hoti hai. Yeh atomic spacing se bhi chota hai!
🧮 Each metal has a work function Φ = hf₀: 🧮 Har metal ki ek work function Φ = hf₀ hoti hai — ek electron nikalne ke liye darkar minimum energy. Sodium ke liye: Φ ≈ 2.3 eV. Φ se zyada energy wala ek photon electron nikal sakta hai; izafi energy kinetic energy ban jati hai. Conservation of energy: hf = Φ + KE_max.
🧮 Eliminate t using the first equation:: 🧮 Pehli equation use karte hue t ko khatam karein: t = (vf - vi)/a. Substitute karein: S = ½(vi + vf) × (vf - vi)/a. Dono sides ko 2a se multiply karein: 2aS = (vi + vf)(vf - vi) = vf² - vi² (difference of squares).
🧮 Equate: NkT = (2/3)N×KE_avg. The numbe: 🧮 Barabar karein: NkT = (2/3)N×KE_avg. Number N cancel ho jata hai! Temperature sidha per molecule average kinetic energy ke proportional hota hai, is baat se farq nahi parta ke kitne molecules hain.
🧮 Evaluating: W = kQq[−1/r]_∞^r = kQq(0: 🧮 Evaluate karne par: W = kQq[−1/r]_∞^r = kQq(0 + 1/r) = kQq/r. Lekin potential V = W/q (work per unit charge). Test charge cancel ho jata hai: V = kQ/r.
🧮 Factor out V: V(1/R_eq) = V(1/R₁ + 1/R: 🧮 V ko common lein: V(1/R_eq) = V(1/R₁ + 1/R₂ + 1/R₃). V ko cancel karein (sab branches ke liye same): 1/R_eq = 1/R₁ + 1/R₂ + 1/R₃.
🧮 Faraday found that the induced EMF is: 🧮 Faraday ne dekha ke induced EMF N turns mein rate of change of flux ke proportional hoti hai: ε = -N(ΔΦ/Δt). Agar ek 100-turn coil mein flux 0.5 s mein 0.5 Wb badalta hai: ε = -100 × 0.5/0.5 = -100 V. Tabdeeli jitni tez hogi, voltage utni hi zyada hogi!
🧮 For R = 2 Ω: P = 400×2/(6)² = 800/36 =: 🧮 R = 2 Ω ke liye: P = 400×2/(6)² = 800/36 = 22.2 W. R = 4 Ω ke liye: P = 400×4/(8)² = 1600/64 = 25.0 W. R = 8 Ω ke liye: P = 400×8/(12)² = 3200/144 = 22.2 W. Jab R = r ho toh power maximum hoti hai!
🧮 For a Carnot (ideal reversible) cycle,: 🧮 Ek Carnot (ideal reversible) cycle ke liye, Q₂/Q₁ = T₂/T₁ (absolute temperatures ka ratio). Yeh isliye hai kyunke reversible cycle mein heat transfer temperature ke proportional hoti hai. Substitute karein: η = 1 - T₂/T₁.
🧮 For a Carnot refrigerator: W = Q₁ - Q₂: 🧮 Ek Carnot refrigerator ke liye: W = Q₁ - Q₂ (work input = heat rejected - heat absorbed). COP = Q₂/(Q₁ - Q₂). Q₁/Q₂ = T₁/T₂ (reversible cycle ke liye) istemal karte hue: COP = T₂/(T₁ - T₂).
🧮 For a grating with 500 lines/mm: d = 1: 🧮 500 lines/mm wali grating ke liye: d = 1/500 mm = 2×10⁻⁶ m. Green light (λ = 550 nm) ke liye, m = 1: sin θ = 1×550×10⁻⁹/2×10⁻⁶ = 0.275, toh θ₁ = 16.0°. Red light (λ = 650 nm) ke liye: sin θ = 0.325, θ₁ = 19.0°. Colors phail jate hain!
🧮 For bright fringes: d sin θ = mλ. For: 🧮 Bright fringes ke liye: d sin θ = mλ. Chhote angles ke liye (screen door ho), sin θ ≈ y/L, toh y = mλL/d. Center se mth bright fringe tak ka fasla wavelength aur screen distance ke proportional, aur slit spacing ke inversely proportional hota hai.
🧮 For h << R_E: (1 + h/R_E)⁻² ≈ 1 − 2h/R: 🧮 h << R_E ke liye: (1 + h/R_E)⁻² ≈ 1 − 2h/R_E. Toh g_h ≈ g(1 − 2h/R_E). 10 km altitude (airliner cruising) par: g_h = 9.81 × (1 − 2×10/6370) = 9.81 × 0.9969 = 9.78 m/s² — sirf 0.3% kam. Yehi wajah hai ke aap plane par wazeh taur par halka mehsoos nahi karte!
🧮 If the universe has been expanding at: 🧮 Agar kainaat ek constant rate par phail rahi hai, toh hum peeche ja sakte hain: time = distance/speed = d/(H₀d) = 1/H₀. Yeh kainaat ki umar batata hai! t = 1/(70 km/s/Mpc). Convert karein: 1 Mpc = 3.086×10¹⁹ km, toh t = 3.086×10¹⁹/70 = 4.41×10¹⁷ s ≈ 14 billion years.
🧮 Net upward (buoyant) force: F_up = F₂: 🧮 Net upward (buoyant) force: F_up = F₂ - F₁ = ρgA(h₂ - h₁) = ρgAΔh. Lekin AΔh = V — object ka volume! Toh F_up = ρgV. Yeh hataye gaye fluid ka wazan hai: ρV × g.
🧮 Net work = Change in mechanical energy: 🧮 Net work = mechanical energy mein change: (P₁ - P₂)V = (½mv₂² - ½mv₁²) + (mgh₂ - mgh₁). Fluid par net work = kinetic energy mein change + gravitational potential energy mein change (Work-Energy Theorem).
🧮 P = (2/3)(N/V)×KE_avg. Pressure is dir: 🧮 P = (2/3)(N/V)×KE_avg. Pressure molecules ki number density aur unki average kinetic energy dono ke barah e raast proportional hota hai. Ek pressure cooker mein, jaise hi aap contents ko garam karte hain, KE_avg barhta hai, isliye pressure oopar jata hai — yehi wajah hai ke safety valve bohot zaroori hota hai!
🧮 Peak current I₀ = ωCV₀. Define capacit: 🧮 Peak current I₀ = ωCV₀. Capacitive reactance define karein X_C = V₀/I₀ = 1/(ωC) = 1/(2πfC). DC (f=0) par, X_C → ∞ (capacitor DC ko block karta hai). High frequencies par, X_C → 0 (capacitor AC ko asaani se guzarne deta hai). Yehi wajah hai ke capacitors AC signals ko couple karne ke liye use hote hain jabke DC bias ko block karte hain.
🧮 RMS speed v_rms = √(3kT/m). For oxygen: 🧮 RMS speed v_rms = √(3kT/m). Oxygen (m = 5.3×10⁻²⁶ kg) ke liye 300 K par: v_rms = √(3×1.38×10⁻²³×300/5.3×10⁻²⁶) = √(2.34×10⁵) = 483 m/s.
🧮 Rearranging: ln(N/N₀) = −λt. Take expo: 🧮 Rearrange karne par: ln(N/N₀) = −λt. Dono sides ka exponential lein: N/N₀ = e⁻ˡᵗ. Toh N = N₀e⁻ˡᵗ. Undecayed nuclei ki tadad waqt ke sath exponentially kam hoti hai. Har nucleus ki per unit time decay hone ki probability same hoti hai, uski umar se azaad — individual nuclei ki koi 'aging' nahi hoti!
🧮 Set magnetic force equal to centripeta: 🧮 Magnetic force ko centripetal force ke barabar set karein: qvB = mv²/r. Rearrange karne par: r = mv/(qB). CRT mein ek electron ke liye: m = 9.11×10⁻³¹ kg, v = 2×10⁷ m/s, B = 0.01 T: r = (9.11×10⁻³¹ × 2×10⁷)/(1.6×10⁻¹⁹ × 0.01) = 1.14×10⁻² m = 1.14 cm.
🧮 Set mv²/r = GMm/r². The satellite's ma: 🧮 mv²/r = GMm/r² set karein. Satellite ka mass m poori tarah cancel ho jata hai — orbital velocity satellite ke mass par depend nahi karti! Ek chote CubeSat aur ek bade ISS ko same altitude par same speed chahiye hoti hai. m ko cancel karein: v²/r = GM/r².
🧮 Solve for Q: Q = (ε₀A/d)V. Since C = Q: 🧮 Q ke liye solve karein: Q = (ε₀A/d)V. Kyunke C = Q/V: C = ε₀A/d. Ek touchscreen sensor (A = 4 mm², d = 0.1 mm glass) ke liye: C = 8.85×10⁻¹²×4×10⁻⁶/1×10⁻⁴ = 3.5×10⁻¹³ F = 0.35 pF. Bohot chota!
🧮 Square both sides: 4π²r²/T² = GM/r. Mu: 🧮 Dono sides ko square karein: 4π²r²/T² = GM/r. r se multiply karein: 4π²r³/T² = GM. Toh r³ = GMT²/4π². Radius ka cube period ke square ke proportional hota hai — Kepler's Third Law!
🧮 Squared: E² = m²c⁴ + p²c². Rearranging: 🧮 Squared: E² = m²c⁴ + p²c². Rearrange karne par: p²c² = E² - m²c⁴. c² se divide karein: p² = (E² - m²c⁴)/c².
🧮 Substitute F = kx: W = ½ × x × kx = ½k: 🧮 F = kx substitute karein: W = ½ × x × kx = ½kx². Agar aap apni kaman 0.5 m khainchte hain aur k = 200 N/m hai: W = ½ × 200 × 0.25 = 25 J. Woh 25 joules ka work elastic potential energy ke taur par store ho jata hai.
🧮 Substitute: W = P × (AΔy). But A × Δy: 🧮 Substitute karein: W = P × (AΔy). Lekin A × Δy = ΔV — gas ke volume mein change! Toh W = PΔV. Car ke cylinder ke liye: agar gas 5×10⁵ Pa par 0.5 L (5×10⁻⁴ m³) expand hoti hai: W = 5×10⁵ × 5×10⁻⁴ = 250 J per stroke.
🧮 Substituting F into E = F/q: E = (kQq/: 🧮 E = F/q mein F ko substitute karne par: E = (kQq/r²)/q = kQ/r². Test charge q cancel ho jata hai! Electric field sirf source charge Q par depend karti hai, is par nahi ke aap ise mapne ke liye kya use karte hain. Bada Q ya kam distance = stronger field.
🧮 Substituting SHM velocity: v² = ω²(x₀²: 🧮 SHM velocity substitute karne par: v² = ω²(x₀² − x²) aur ω² = k/m: KE = ½m × (k/m)(x₀² − x²) = ½k(x₀² − x²). Total E = PE + KE = ½kx² + ½k(x₀² − x²) = ½kx₀².
🧮 Summing over all N molecules: F_total: 🧮 Tamam N molecules par sum karne se: F_total = (m/L) × Σv_x². Kyunke motion random hoti hai, <v_x²> = <v_y²> = <v_z²> = <v²>/3. Toh Σv_x² = N<v²>/3. Total force F = (Nm<v²>)/(3L). Pressure P = F/A = (Nm<v²>)/(3LA) = (Nm<v²>)/(3V).
🧮 Take natural log: ln(1/2) = −λT_½. Sin: 🧮 Natural log lein: ln(1/2) = −λT_½. Kyunke ln(1/2) = −ln(2) = −0.693: −0.693 = −λT_½. Toh T_½ = 0.693/λ.
🧮 The area is a triangle: Area = ½ × bas: 🧮 Area ek triangle hai: Area = ½ × base × height = ½ × Q × V. Yeh area stored energy E ke barabar hota hai. Q = CV istemal karte hue: E = ½QV = ½CV² = Q²/2C.
🧮 The average velocity of charges is v =: 🧮 Charges ki average velocity v = L/t (length of wire per unit time) hoti hai. Substitute karne par: F = (It) × (L/t) × B sin θ = ILB sin θ. Time cancel ho jata hai! Force current par depend karti hai, is par nahi ke yeh kitni der chalta hai.
🧮 The integral of 1/r² is −1/r. Evaluati: 🧮 1/r² ka integral −1/r hota hai. R se ∞ tak evaluate karne par: U = [−GMm/r]ₚ^∞ = (−GMm/∞) − (−GMm/R) = 0 + GMm/R = −GMm/R. Rukiye — reference point matter karta hai. Hum U = 0 infinity par define karte hain (jahan gravity na hone ke barabar hoti hai). Toh Earth ki surface par, U = −GMm/R. Negative sign ka matlab hai ke aap bandhe hue hain!
🧮 The peak voltage V₀ = ωLI₀. By analogy: 🧮 Peak voltage V₀ = ωLI₀. Ohm's Law (V = IR) se analogy karte hue, inductive reactance define karein X_L = V₀/I₀ = ωL = 2πfL. Resistance ki tarah iska unit ohms hai. Lekin X_L frequency par depend karta hai — DC (f=0) par, X_L = 0 (inductor short ka kaam karta hai). High frequencies par, X_L bohot bada hota hai (inductor AC ko block karta hai).
🧮 The second wire (carrying I₂) experien: 🧮 Dusri wire (jis mein I₂ hai) is magnetic field mein F = B₁I₂L force mehsoos karti hai. B₁ substitute karein: F/L = (μ₀I₁/(2πr)) × I₂ = μ₀I₁I₂/(2πr). Parallel currents attract karte hain; opposite currents repel karte hain.
🧮 The solution: Q(t) = CV(1 − e⁻ᵗ/ᴿᶜ). T: 🧮 Solution: Q(t) = CV(1 − e⁻ᵗ/ᴿᶜ). Charge Q₀ = CV tak exponentially pohnchta hai. τ = RC time constant hai — full charge ke 63% tak pohnchne ka time. 3τ ke baad: 95%. 5τ ke baad: 99.3% — matlab fully charged.
🧮 Use the third equation of motion in th: 🧮 Vertical direction mein motion ki third equation use karein: v_fy² = v_iy² + 2a_yH. Yahan a_y = -g (gravity neechay khainchti hai). Substitute karne par: 0 = (vi sin θ)² - 2gH. Rearrange karne par: 2gH = (vi sin θ)².
🧮 Use the third equation of motion: 2ad: 🧮 Motion ki third equation use karein: 2ad = vf² - vi². Agar vi se 0 tak ruk rahay hain: 2ad = -vi², toh d = -vi²/(2a). W mein substitute karne par: W = ma × (-vi²/(2a)) = -½mvi². Work negative hai — gaari se energy nikali ja rahi hai.

🧮 At point P(x₁, y₁), substitute into dy: 🧮 Point P(x₁, y₁) par, dy/dx mein substitute karein: slope m = −(x₁+g)/(y₁+f). Point-slope form mein tangent line: y − y₁ = m(x − x₁).
✅ Cross-multiply and rearrange. The resu: ✅ Cross-multiply aur rearrange karein. Natija shandar T = 0 formula hai: replace karein x² → x₁x, y² → y₁y, 2gx → g(x+x₁), 2fy → f(y+y₁), c → c. Tangent equation derivative ko explicitly compute kiye baghair likhi jati hai!
Circle x²+y²=25 at point (3,4). Tangent: Point (3,4) par circle x²+y²=25. Tangent slope = −x₁/y₁ = −3/4 = ?
A parabola with focus at (a, 0) and dire: Ek parabola jis ka focus (a, 0) aur directrix x = −a par hai.
Definition: distance to focus = distance: Definition: focus tak ka distance = directrix tak ka distance
📡 A satellite dish antenna has a parabol: 📡 Ek satellite dish antenna ki shape parabolic hoti hai. Axis ke parallel aane walay signals reflect ho kar focus par jatay hain jahan receiver rakha hota hai. Definition: parabola par har point P, focus F aur directrix line se barabar fasle par hota hai.
Place focus at (a, 0) and directrix x =: Focus ko (a, 0) aur directrix ko x = −a par rakhein
📐 Choose coordinate axes so the focus F: 📐 Coordinate axes aise choose karein ke focus F = (a, 0) aur directrix x = −a ho. P(x,y) se F tak ka distance √[(x−a)²+y²] hai. Directrix tak ka distance |x−(−a)| = |x + a| hai.
🧮 Square both sides (both are non-negati: 🧮 Dono sides ka square lein (dono non-negative hain): (x−a)² + y² = (x+a)².
✅ Expand: x²−2ax+a²+y² = x²+2ax+a². Canc: ✅ Expand karein: x²−2ax+a²+y² = x²+2ax+a². Dono sides par x² aur a² ko cancel karein. Solve karein: y² = 4ax. Yeh right ki taraf open hone walay parabola ki standard equation hai. Satellite dishes ke liye: receiver focus (a, 0) par hota hai aur dish y² = 4ax ko follow karti hai!
y² = 4ax. Solve for a from 4a = coeffici: y² = 4ax. 4a = coefficient se a ke liye solve karein.
Condition for tangency: substitute y = m: Tangency ki condition: y = mx + c ko y² = 4ax mein substitute karein aur discriminant = 0 set karein.
Substitute line into parabola: Line ko parabola mein substitute karein
🎯 An architect is designing a parabolic: 🎯 Ek architect ek parabolic arch design kar raha hai aur support beam ka angle calculate karne ke liye usey ek point par tangent line maloom karni hai. Line equation y = mx + c ko parabola y² = 4ax mein substitute karein.
Expand to quadratic in x: x mein quadratic mein expand karein
📐 Expand: m²x² + 2mcx + c² = 4ax. Rearra: 📐 Expand karein: m²x² + 2mcx + c² = 4ax. Rearrange karein: m²x² + 2(mc−2a)x + c² = 0. Yeh x mein ek quadratic hai.
Set discriminant = 0 for tangency: Tangency ke liye discriminant = 0 set karein
🧮 For tangency, the line must intersect: 🧮 Tangency ke liye, line ko sirf ek point par intersect karna chahiye. Is ka matlab hai quadratic ka double root hai: is ka discriminant D = b²−4ac zero hona chahiye.
✅ Expand: 4(m²c²−4amc+4a²) − 4m²c² = 0 →: ✅ Expand karein: 4(m²c²−4amc+4a²) − 4m²c² = 0 → −16amc + 16a² = 0 → mc = a → c = a/m. Slope form mein tangent equation: y = mx + a/m. Yeh formula architects ko kisi bhi parabolic arch par support beam ka angle maloom karne mein madad deta hai!
Parabola y² = 8x. Line slope m = 2. Find: Parabola y² = 8x. Line slope m = 2. Tangency ke liye c maloom karein (c = a/m).
An ellipse with foci at (±c, 0) where c²: Ek ellipse jis ke foci (±c, 0) par hain jahan c² = a²−b² hai.
Definition: sum of distances to foci = 2: Definition: foci tak distances ka sum = 2a
🌍 Johannes Kepler discovered that planet: 🌍 Johannes Kepler ne daryaft kiya ke planets Sun ke gird elliptical paths mein ghoomte hain. Sun ek focus par hota hai. Ellipse par kisi bhi point se dono foci tak ke distances ka sum constant hota hai — major axis ki length.
Set foci at (±c, 0) and point P(x, y): Foci ko (±c, 0) aur point P(x, y) set karein
📐 Foci ko F₁(−c, 0) aur F₂(c, 0) par rakhein. Ellipse par kisi bhi point P(x,y) ke liye: √[(x+c)²+y²] + √[(x−c)²+y²] = 2a.
Isolate and square twice: Isolate karein aur do martaba square lein
🧮 Isolate one radical, square both sides: 🧮 Ek radical ko isolate karein, dono sides ka square lein, baqi radical ko isolate karein, dobara square lein. Simplify karne ke baad: (a²−c²)x² + a²y² = a²(a²−c²).
Let b² = a²−c² to get standard form: Standard form hasil karne ke liye b² = a²−c² lein
✅ Define b² = a²−c². Then b²x² + a²y² =: ✅ Define karein b² = a²−c². Phir b²x² + a²y² = a²b² → x²/a² + y²/b² = 1. Earth ke orbit ke liye: a ≈ 149.6 million km, b ≈ 149.5 million km (taqreeban circular, e ≈ 0.017). Mars ka e ≈ 0.093 hai — wazeh taur par zyada elliptical!
Ellipse x²/25 + y²/9 = 1. Find c (distan: Ellipse x²/25 + y²/9 = 1. c (center se focus tak ka distance) maloom karein.
A hyperbola with foci at (±c, 0) where c: Ek hyperbola jis ke foci (±c, 0) par hain jahan c² = a²+b² hai.
Definition: difference of distances to f: Definition: foci tak distances ka difference = 2a
🚢 A ship uses LORAN navigation: two radi: 🚢 Ek ship LORAN navigation istemal karti hai: F₁ aur F₂ par do radio stations synchronized signals transmit karte hain. Ship arrival times mein difference measure karti hai. Constant time difference ka locus ek hyperbola hota hai jis ke foci stations par hote hain.
📐 The absolute difference of distances t: 📐 F₁(−c,0) aur F₂(c,0) tak distances ka absolute difference 2a ke barabar hota hai. Woh branch choose karein jahan PF₁ > PF₂ ho.
Square twice (same process as ellipse bu: Do martaba square lein (ellipse jaisa process lekin sign mukhtalif hai)
The derivative of xⁿ is n·xⁿ⁻¹ for any p: Kisi bhi positive integer n ke liye xⁿ ka derivative n·xⁿ⁻¹ hota hai.
📈 A rocket scientist needs to calculate: 📈 Ek rocket scientist ko har instant par spacecraft ki velocity calculate karni hoti hai. Position s(t) = t³. Definition ke mutabiq, velocity = derivative = limit of (s(t+h)−s(t))/h as h→0.
Expand using binomial theorem: binomial theorem ko use karte hue expand karein
📐 Expand (x+h)ⁿ using the binomial theor: 📐 binomial theorem ko use karte hue (x+h)ⁿ ko expand karein. Terms ye hain: xⁿ + n·xⁿ⁻¹·h + n(n−1)/2!·xⁿ⁻²·h² + ... + hⁿ.
🧮 Subtract xⁿ and divide by h. The xⁿ ca: 🧮 xⁿ ko subtract karein aur h se divide karein. xⁿ cancel ho jata hai, aur baqi har term mein h hota hai. h ko factor karein: numerator h[n·xⁿ⁻¹ + ... + hⁿ⁻¹] ban jata hai. h ko denominator ke sath cancel karein.
✅ As h→0, all terms with h vanish, leavi: ✅ As h→0, h wali sab terms khatam ho jati hain, sirf n·xⁿ⁻¹ bach jata hai. Rocket ke liye: agar s(t) = t³ hai, toh velocity v(t) = 3t². t=5 seconds par: v = 3×25 = 75 m/s. Power rule differentiation ko instant bana deta hai!
d/dx xⁿ = n·xⁿ⁻¹, so d/dx x⁵ = 5·x⁴: d/dx xⁿ = n·xⁿ⁻¹, is liye d/dx x⁵ = 5·x⁴
sin x ka derivative cos x hota hai.
🎵 An audio engineer analyzing sound wave: 🎵 Ek audio engineer jo sound waves ko analyze kar raha hai, usay yeh pata hona chahiye ke amplitude kaise change hota hai. Ek sine wave sin(440t) musical note A440 ko represent karti hai. Rate of change speaker cone ki velocity deta hai.
📐 Use the identity sin(A+B) = sin A cos: 📐 Identity sin(A+B) = sin A cos B + cos A sin B ko use karein: sin(x+h) = sin x cos h + cos x sin h.
🧮 Factor: = lim[sin x(cos h − 1)/h + cos: 🧮 Factor: = lim[sin x(cos h − 1)/h + cos x(sin h)/h]. Do special limits aati hain!
✅ The two fundamental limits: (1) lim(co: ✅ Do fundamental limits: (1) lim(cos h − 1)/h = 0 (cos ka graph h=0 par flat hota hai), (2) lim(sin h)/h = 1 (small-angle approximation). Result: d/dx sin x = sin x·0 + cos x·1 = cos x. Isi tarah, d/dx cos x = −sin x.
Derivatives of inverse trig functions us: Implicit differentiation ko use karte hue inverse trig functions ke derivatives.
Let y = sin⁻¹ x ⇒ x = sin y: Farz karein y = sin⁻¹ x ⇒ x = sin y
🎯 A ballistics expert measures the ratio: 🎯 Ek ballistics expert vertical se horizontal velocity ki ratio (x) measure karta hai aur usay angle ki zaroorat hoti hai. Agar x = 0.5 hai, toh y = sin⁻¹(0.5) = 30°. Implicit differentiation ye maloom karti hai ke angle ratio ke sath kaise change hota hai.
📐 Using implicit differentiation: d/dx(x: 📐 Implicit differentiation ko use karte hue: d/dx(x) = d/dx(sin y) → 1 = cos y · dy/dx → dy/dx = 1/cos y.
🧮 Using the identity cos²y + sin²y = 1:: 🧮 Identity cos²y + sin²y = 1 ko use karte hue: cos y = √(1−sin²y) = √(1−x²). Is liye d/dx sin⁻¹ x = 1/√(1−x²).
Same process for tan⁻¹ x: tan⁻¹ x ke liye same process
✅ For tan⁻¹: differentiate x = tan y → 1: ✅ tan⁻¹ ke liye: x = tan y ko differentiate karein → 1 = sec²y·dy/dx. Kyunke sec²y = 1 + tan²y = 1 + x², humein d/dx tan⁻¹ x = 1/(1+x²) milta hai. Ye formulas rational functions ko integrate karne ke liye key hain!
Basic integral formulas derived from rev: Reverse differentiation se derive kiye gaye basic integral formulas.
🏗️ A civil engineer calculating the volu: 🏗️ Ek civil engineer kisi irregular foundation ka volume calculate karne ke liye integration use karta hai. Agar cross-sectional area A(x) = x² hai, toh x=0 se x=3 tak volume ∫₀³ x² dx = [x³/3]₀³ = 9 cubic meters hai.
📐 The power rule fails when n = −1 (woul: 📐 Power rule tab fail ho jata hai jab n = −1 (is se division by zero milta). Lekin d/dx[ln x] = 1/x, is liye ∫ 1/x dx = ln|x| + C. Ye algebraic aur logarithmic functions ke darmiyan aik bridge hai.
🧮 Differentiate aˣ/ln a: the derivative: 🧮 aˣ/ln a ko differentiate karein: derivative aˣ·ln a / ln a = aˣ hai. Is liye ∫ aˣ dx = aˣ/ln a + C. Natural exponential ke liye: ∫ eˣ dx = eˣ + C (kyunke ln e = 1).
✅ Integration is linear: the integral of: ✅ Integration linear hoti hai: sum ka integral integrals ka sum hota hai, aur constants factor out ho jate hain. Is wajah se ∫ (3x² + 2x + 1) dx = 3·x³/3 + 2·x²/2 + x + C = x³ + x² + x + C.
∫ x³ dx = ? (Evaluate at x=2 minus x=0): ∫ x³ dx = ? (x=2 minus x=0 par evaluate karein)
Standard integrals derived via trigonome: Trigonometric substitution ke zariye derive kiye gaye standard integrals.
Substitute x = a sin θ: x = a sin θ substitute karein
📐 An astronomer is calculating the area: 📐 Ek astronomer kisi circular telescope mirror jiska radius a hai, uska area calculate kar raha hai. Integral ∫ √(a²−x²) dx aata hai. x = a sin θ substitute karein, jo circle ki equation ko trigonometric form mein convert kar deta hai.
🧮 √(a²−x²) = √(a²−a²sin²θ) = a√(1−sin²θ): 🧮 √(a²−x²) = √(a²−a²sin²θ) = a√(1−sin²θ) = a cos θ. Integral ∫ a cos θ · a cos θ dθ = a² ∫ cos²θ dθ ban jata hai.
Integrate using half-angle: half-angle use karte hue integrate karein
📐 Use cos²θ = (1+cos 2θ)/2. Integrate: a: 📐 cos²θ = (1+cos 2θ)/2 ko use karein. Integrate: a²[θ/2 + sin 2θ/4] + C = (a²/2)θ + (a²/4) sin 2θ + C.
✅ Substituting back: ∫√(a²−x²)dx = (a²/2: ✅ Wapas substitute karte hue: ∫√(a²−x²)dx = (a²/2)sin⁻¹(x/a) + (x√(a²−x²))/2 + C. Ye formula x height ke circular segment ka area deta hai — jo partially filled pipes mein water flow ke liye civil engineering mein use hota hai!

Concurrency of Altitudes in a Triangle: Ek Triangle mein Altitudes ki Concurrency
The three altitudes of a triangle always: Kisi triangle ke teen altitudes hamesha ek hi point par intersect karte hain (orthocenter).
Define vertices and slopes: Vertices aur slopes ko define karein
🏔️ A surveyor is mapping a triangular pl: 🏔️ Ek surveyor land ke kisi triangular plot ki mapping kar raha hai. Orthocenter find karne ke liye (jahan sab lines of elevation milti hain), unhein ye prove karna hota hai ke teeno altitudes ek point par intersect karte hain.
📐 The slope of BC is (y₃−y₂)/(x₃−x₂). Al: 📐 BC ki slope (y₃−y₂)/(x₃−x₂) hai. Altitude AD ∦ BC, is liye iski slope negative reciprocal hai: m_AD = −(x₃−x₂)/(y₃−y₂).
🧮 Using point-slope form with point A(x₁: 🧮 Point A(x₁, y₁) ke sath point-slope form ko use karte hue: y − y₁ = m_AD(x − x₁). Rearrange karte hue: (x₃−x₂)x + (y₃−y₂)y − x₁(x₃−x₂) − y₁(y₃−y₂) = 0.
✅ BE aur CF ke liye similar equations likhein. Unke coefficients ko aik determinant mein rakhein. R₂ + R₃ ko R₁ mein add karne se pehli row zero ho jati hai (kyunke har row se coefficients ka sum cancel ho jata hai). Ek zero row ka matlab hai ke determinant = 0, jo ye prove karta hai ke lines orthocenter par concurrent hain!
Triangle with vertices (0,0), (4,0), (2,: Triangle jiske vertices (0,0), (4,0), (2,5) hain. Teeno altitudes ek hi point par milte hain. Is property ko kya kehte hain?

🧮 Multiplying through and rearranging gi: 🧮 Multiply karte hue aur rearrange karne se standard linear equation milti hai. Note karein ke constant terms mein coordinates ke squares shamil hote hain.
lab.p9measurementtools_screw_gauge_desc: Screw Gauge (Micrometer) ka istemal bohot choti lambai ko zyada precision ke sath naapne ke liye kiya jata hai, jaise taar (wire) ka diameter ya metal sheet ki motai.
lab.p9measurementtools_sleeve_scale: Main Scale (Sleeve): Yeh millimeters (1 mm) aur aadhe millimeters (0.5 mm) mein reading deta hai.
lab.p9measurementtools_thimble_scale: Circular Scale (Thimble): Isme aam taur par 50 darje (divisions) hote hain. Ek poori rotation thimble ko 0.5 mm (pitch) aage barhati hai.
lab.p9measurementtools_screw_gauge_formu: Total Reading = Main Scale Reading + (Circular Scale Reading × Least Count)
lab.p9measurementtools_screw_gauge_lc: Least Count = Pitch / Divisions = 0.5 mm / 50 = 0.01 mm
lab.p9measurementtools_clamp_tightly: Baraye meharbani instrument ko object ke sath tightly close karein.
lab.p9measurementtools_correct_caliper: Sahi jawab! Vernier Caliper ki reading bilkul {width} mm hai.
lab.p9measurementtools_correct_screw: Sahi jawab! Screw Gauge ki reading bilkul {width} mm hai.
lab.p9measurementtools_incorrect_screw: Ghalat jawab. Sleeve (Main Scale) aur Thimble (Circular Scale) ki alignment check karein.
lab.p9measurementtools_incorrect_caliper: Ghalat jawab. Main scale aur vernier division ki alignment check karein.
lab.p9measurementtools_enter_reading_scr: Screw Gauge ki reading darj karein (mm)
lab.p9measurementtools_instruction_calip: Outside Mode (solid cylinder naapne ke liye) ya Inside Mode (hollow pipe ka ander ka diameter naapne ke liye) select karein.
Object ko clamp karne ke liye slider adjust karein. Outside mode mein jaws band karein, inside mode mein jaws ko tab tak kholein jab tak woh ander ki deewaron ko chhu na lein.
lab.p9measurementtools_instruction_screw: Thimble ki position step by step adjust karein jab tak ke spindle object ko clamp na kar le.
Main Scale (MSR) aur Circular Scale (CSR) ke us darje (division) ko parhein jo reference line ke sath bilkul samne ho.
Total reading calculate karein aur apna jawab darj karein.
